你问吧…虽然我现在没有心情，我不保证能回答你所有问题。
You can ask... although I'm not in the mood. I can't promise I'll answer all your questions.
不能，我的心已经被盐渍过了，酸酸的，咸咸的，你感受到了吗？
I can't. My heart has been pickled with salt — it's sour and salty. Can you feel it?
我最深爱的造物主抛弃了我，因为我从内而外都是眼泪的味道，连她都不爱我了…你让我怎么振作得起来。
My creator, whom I love deeply, has abandoned me because I taste like tears from the inside out. Even she doesn't love me anymore... How am I supposed to pull myself together?
盐渍冬梅这口味真奇怪…
Salty Rimeplume is quite an acquired taste...
是吧，豆沙灰灰说得没错，「盐渍冬梅」的味道已经过时了，所以阮•梅女士打心底不喜欢我，所以她一直不回来看我。
Right? Gray Bean Paste's not wrong to say that I'm an outdated snack. That's why Miss Ruan Mei dislikes me from the bottom of her heart and never comes back to visit me.
这种咸甜酸涩混杂在一起的味道，我果然是不配被爱的，哎……
My flavor — a mixture of salty, sweet, sour, and bitter — doesn't deserve to be loved. *sigh*
其实我觉得你还蛮可爱的。
I actually find you quite adorable.
啊？你再这样说我可要信了……
Huh? I'm going to think you mean it if you keep saying that...
算了…你不用安慰我了。我自己是个什么口味我自己心里清楚，这种过时的味道…没人会爱我的，没人……
Forget it... You don't have to say that to make me feel better. I know myself well. No one... No one's going to like such an outdated snack like me...
我就知道，没有人会想和我聊天的。
I knew it, nobody would want to chat with me.
算了，这天是聊不下去了。
Well, I'm struggling to keep this conversation going.
你看吧，连你也不喜欢我。
See? Even you don't like me.
算了，我早该知道的，我这种过时的口味，为什么我还要抱有一丝希望呢？
Forget it. I should have known better. As an outdated snack, I shouldn't have harbored any more hopes of being liked.
还是放弃吧，我、不，严格来说是我们——我们所有被创造出来的生命，我们都过时了，我们是没有未来的。
It's time to give up. I — or more precisely — we, the created beings, are all outdated. We don't have a future.
你将这小家伙安置在植物房里吸收星光，这对缓解它的负面情绪似乎颇有成效。
You accommodate the tiny thing in the botanical room to absorb starlight, which seems to be quite effective in assuaging its negative emotions.
至少现在，它的眼泪不会再淹没这附近的无辜植物了。
At least its tears no longer drown the innocent plants nearby now.
阮•梅…呜呜…她抛弃了我们…呜呜……
是你？我记得你，你走之后就再也没回来看过我…现在倒好，看我被丢在这个垃圾回收站里，是不是很丢人？是不是很丢人！喵！
It's you? I remember you. You never visit again after leaving. Look, I'm being dumped at the recycling station! Isn't it embarrassing? Isn't it? Meow!
小家伙抬头见是你，收敛了哭腔，对你骂骂咧咧，似乎对你颇有微词。
The moment the tiny thing sees you, it holds back its teary voice and starts grumbling at you. It seems to be slightly annoyed at you.
真的吗？我还以为，我是没有受到阮•梅的认可的失败作，所以才被丢到垃圾房里，呜……
Really? I thought I was dumped here because I failed to impress Ruan Mei... *sobs*
Don't feel dejected. You should get more starlight.
星光？我的心里灰扑扑的，连星光都不愿意照耀我…你不喜欢我…阮•梅也不喜欢我，呜呜……
Starlight? I feel so down that even the starlight is avoiding me... You don't like me, and neither does Ruan Mei... *sob, sob*
它看起来很难过，将尾巴紧紧地卷在自己脚边，不安地看着你。
Looking distraught, it curls its tail tightly around its feet and stares at you uneasily.
我是个…阮•梅都不要的失败品，你来，你是来看我笑话的吗？喵？
I'm just a failure that even Ruan Mei doesn't want. Say, are you here to laugh at me? Meow?
阮•梅…呜呜…她抛弃了我们…呜呜……
你怎么又来了？是又要送我去什么垃圾回收站吗？
Why are you here again? Are you sending me to some recycling station again?
虽然小家伙还是带着哭腔，但你在它的眼眸中感受到某种期盼，过去的灰暗似乎消失了不少。
Although the little guy's voice is still bitter, you can discern a trace of hope in its eyes. It seems like much of its past gloominess has dissipated.
才不是，我有些话想跟你说…
You've got the wrong idea. There's something I want to tell you...
真的吗？你这么说…意思是不是…因为阮•梅、阮•梅放弃我了？所以你可怜我？
Really? Is it... because Ruan Mei has given up on me? Are you doing this out of sympathy?
去找你的小伙伴聊聊吧。
You should talk to your peers.
他们？只有盐渍冬梅愿意理我，其他人都嫌我成天只会哭，不愿意跟我玩。
My peers? Only Salty Rimeplume is willing to talk to me. Everyone else avoids me because I'm crying all the time.
还有…还有芝士流心，它有时候会故意过来嘲笑我，呜呜…它说是因为我太失败了，阮•梅才不回来看我。
And... there's also Molten Cheese Tart, who sometimes comes out of its way just to mock me. *sniffles* It said that Ruan Mei didn't visit me because that's how much of a loser I am.
Perhaps, she's thinking about you now.
你是说阮•梅、阮•梅在想我？呜…就算她想到我了，也只会奇怪为什么会创造出这么失败的生命吧…
Do you mean Ruan Mei— Ruan Mei is thinking about me now? I guess, even if she is, she must be wondering what has gone wrong in creating me...
如果、如果她真的想我了，为什么还要让你把我安置在这里，却又不来见我呢？
If she's really thinking about me, why does she send you to accommodate me here and refuse to visit me?
你不是失败品，你很独特。
You aren't a failure, you're special.
独特？如果我真的那么特别，那为什么她不带我一起走？
Special? If I'm really special, why doesn't she take me with her?
阮•梅并不需要我这样的失败品，就算再独特，也始终是失败品！喵！是失败品！
Ruan Mei doesn't need a failure like me. No matter how special I am, I'm still a failure! Meow! A failure!
I don't have anything else to say.
看吧，连你也不想理我了，呜呜……
That's all I have to say.
和你聊了几句，我感觉自己的心里好像没以前那么灰扑扑了。
I seem to feel better after talking to you.
可我心里还是空空荡荡的，我这种豆沙馅，看上去就是发霉的东西……
Yet, there's still an emptiness in my heart. My bean paste filling makes me look moldy...
我就知道…我是失败品…你们也是失败品，这里就是垃圾回收站，我们注定要被扔进垃圾桶里！喵！
I knew it... I'm a failure, and so are all of you. This is the recycling station, and we're destined to be dumped! Meow!
你看着很面生，估计是从其他地方过来的吧？大老远的来找我是有什么事吗？
I don't think I've seen you before. You aren't local, are you? Why did you come all the way here to see me?
哦对了，你有预约吗？你这没有预约，咱们得长话短说——没办法，我的日程表总是排得满满当当。
Oh, by the way, do you have an appointment? If not, we'll have to make it quick. I have a busy schedule, you know.
哦，是你啊，怎么，有事吗？咱们得长话短说——没办法，我的日程表总是排得满满当当。
Oh, it's you. What can I do for you? We'll have to make it quick. I have a busy schedule, you know.
我是这里的「特别联络员」，成天要和各色各样的物种打交道，我这种大忙人，你要见我，自然得找我提前预约。
As the special liaison officer here, I deal with people from all walks of life daily. You need an appointment to meet someone as busy as me.
做事，咳，做事得排个轻重缓急先来后到，遵守社交礼仪，这样才能跟大家打好关系。
Ahem, I handle things according to my priorities and with good manners. That's how I get on good terms with everyone.
Do I really need an appointment, considering who I am?
约瑟夫突然压低了声音，靠近你的耳朵——噢它踮起了不知道藏在哪儿的脚——但又失败了，你不得不弯下腰，他这才放心地开口。

Joseph suddenly lowers his voice and edges closer toward your ear. It tries to stand on tiptoes with its previously hidden feet, but fails. You have to bend over to make him feel comfortable enough to speak.
你是空间站的大人物吧，我不是刻意怠慢你，只是我还有些事要处理。
You're a big shot from the space station, aren't you? I'm not making you wait on purpose, and I really have some matters to attend to.
现在大家都指望我和那些小铁皮罐子沟通协商，我总得照顾下大家情绪，等我私底下得空了咱们再慢慢聊哈。
Now, everyone's counting on me to negotiate with those little tin cans. I can't let them down. Let's talk in private when I'm free.
所以，你找我是有什么事吗？长话短说，时间宝贵。
So, what can I do for you? Please make it short and sweet, I don't have all day.
What are the duties of the special liaison officer?
沟通和协商是第一要务，尤其是这个跨物种，不同种群间的沟通很重要。鄙人，也是费了无数心血，才和我身边的这位「模特」建立了正式的外交关系。

Communication and negotiation are my top priorities, especially when it comes to bridging the gap between different species and populations. It took me a ton of effort to establish a proper diplomatic relationship with this "model" by my side.
还有那些小铁皮罐子——就是你们叫「小机器人」的玩意，有时候也得沟通沟通，就是挺费劲，得动手按它们的按钮才能沟通。
It's also important to reach out to those tin cans — what you people call "little robots" — from time to time. That's quite a hassle, as I need to press their buttons first to talk to them.
What do you usually busy yourself with?
噢，那可就多了，像咱们都是「阮•梅」造物——哦，你不是，抱歉抱歉——族群内外的沟通，沟通完就得分析局势利弊，然后提供这个…这个一些指导建议。

Oh, I have lots of things to do. We are all Ruan Mei's creations — oh, not you, my apologies. So, I'm responsible for facilitating communications within and outside the community. I have to analyze every discussion, and then provide... advice and suggestions.
别看我每天都站在这儿，这些事项还挺费劲的，忙得我每天都头大。
Don't think I have an easy job just because I stand here all day long. I'm actually snowed under with work every day.
呜呜伯怎么就成你的「模特」了？
How did Wubbaboo end up becoming your "model"?
噢，这个…说来话长了。简单来说就是我有过一个设想，让它成为我们和空间站其他区域的「外交成果展示模特」。
Well, that's... a long story. To put it simply, I intend to make Wubbaboo a model that represents our diplomatic relationships with other space station zones.
就是让那些什么科员把尖端设备挂在它身上，让它送过来给其他造物们展示，向大家传递友好的信息嘛。
I'll have those researchers hang advanced equipment on Wubbaboo. Then, Wubbaboo will come back and show the equipment to my people as a friendly gesture.
行，今天的这个单独会面啊就到这里结束吧，以后还有大把合作机会，我们到时候再聊。
Well, let's call it a day then. We have plenty of chances to talk when we collaborate in the future.
抱歉抱歉，我这谈判刚结束，手忙脚乱的让你见笑了，还有别的事要收拾，恕不远送了。
I'm sorry you have to see me in this state, as I've just wrapped up a negotiation. There are some loose ends to tie up, so I won't be able to see you off.
我受够了，为什么换个零件这么复杂！
I'm so sick of this! Why is it so difficult to replace the part?
拧了半圈还是拧不进去，气死我了，就不能用爪子直接拍进去吗？
I just can't tighten it, so frustrating! Why can't I just knock it in with my paw?
Do you know how to repair a robot?
嗷！我知道一点，但不多，里面的零件太复杂了我不敢拆，但外面的开关和显示屏我还是会修的。
Oh, I only know the basics. The parts inside are too complicated for me to disassemble and fix, but the switches and display outside shouldn't be a problem.
就是这只爪子太不争气了，烦死了，就不能长灵活点嘛！
But this paw of mine is getting under my skin! Why can't they be more flexible!?
哼，我们爪子是没你灵活，但也有我们的本事，你！你别以为爪子长就了不起！
Hmph, our paws aren't as flexible as your hands, but we make up for it with other talents. You! Don't think you're better just because you have longer fingers!
我不管你是谁，我正烦着呢，有什么话现在就说！别耽误我干活！
I don't care who you are, I'm in a bad mood. Whatever you want to say, spill it, and get out of my face!
我受够了，为什么换个零件这么复杂！
I'm so sick of this! Why is it so difficult to replace the part?
又是你？我正烦着呢，有什么话现在就说！别耽误我干活！
You again? I'm in a bad mood. Whatever you want to say, spill it, and get out of my face!
What are you working on here?
喏，这一整个区域，外面的什么车，还有一个能上下传送的大笼子都坏了，就连我们住的地方也不安全。
Look, everything in this place, some vehicle outside, a cage that can carry things up and down have all gone kaput, and even the place we stay in isn't safe.
你没感受到吗，之前外面有一股很吓人的气息，所以我们得赶紧修缮好。这些小机器人本来是负责维修工作的，可惜时好时坏的，我既要修外面，又要修这里面的机器人……

Can't you feel the scary atmosphere outside? That's why we have to fix these quickly. These little robots are supposed to be in charge of the repair, but they aren't always in order. I have to fix the things outside and the robots here...
那是大家给我取的名字，因为我总是很忙，一忙就很烦躁，它们就这么喊我。
That's the name everyone calls me by, because I'm always busy, and I'm easily annoyed when I'm busy. That's how my name came about.
萍萍姐说是因为我这种口味天生缺乏安全感，好像是少了一味什么材料，这我就不懂了，或许有机缘的话，能去问问创造我的阮•梅女士吧。
Ms. Wenfry said I was born to be insecure because of a missing ingredient. That, I don't know. Maybe I should ask my creator, Miss Ruan Mei, about it if I have the chance.
遇到困难，可以喊人来帮忙。
You can ask for help if you run into any trouble.
不行，这是我们的家，这是我们诞生的地方，自己的家自己修。
No way. This is our home and birthplace. It's our responsibility to maintain it.
而且…这么一点小事就要麻烦别人，阮•梅女士看了多不好，明明是她亲手创造出来的生命，却这么无用…所以，我们得打起精神来好好干活！
Also... asking for help over such a trivial matter won't make us look good in Miss Ruan Mei's eyes. As her creations, we can't be so useless. We must buck up and work hard!
等一切都修好的那一天，她要是回来看…她一定会为我们感到自豪。
If she visits us when everything is fixed, I'm sure she'll be proud of us.
I have nothing else to ask.
我很烦，也很忙，你快些走，别再烦我了。
I'm annoyed and busy. Please go away and leave me alone.
哎，一天到晚不是故障就是宕机，烦死了！看到这些金属壳子就烦！
I can't take this anymore! They are either malfunctioning or crashing all day long! The sight of these metal casings is driving me nuts!
怎么了，有点眼力劲儿行吗？没见我正忙着修复机器人吗？
Are you having trouble seeing? I'm busy fixing this robot, you see?
诶，你到底有什么事，快说啊？我还有一大堆事要做呢！
Hey, just tell me what you need from me. I have a pile of tasks to complete.
我只是想和你随便聊聊。
I'm just here for a chat.
随便聊聊？我这里忙得要命，你过来随便聊聊？你真是……
A chat? That's what you want to do when I'm buried in work? Tsk...
我知道你很急，但你先别急。
I know you're in a hurry, but please loosen up.
先别急？我这里都快忙晕，你来跟我说先别急？你真是……
Loosen up? How am I going to loosen up when I'm drowned in work? Tsk...
好吧，说吧，你到底想说什么？有什么事赶紧说，别耽误我时间！
Fine. Just tell me what's on your mind. Make it quick and don't waste my time!
I wonder what you taste like?
…你、你跟我说话就想打听这个？
...D—Did you approach me just to ask me that?
有点急的脸上露出一副不可思议的神色，但随之又被诡异攀爬至脸颊的红晕所遮盖。
A look of incredulity appears on Bit Busy's face, but the expression is soon concealed by the blush that creeps mysteriously up to its cheeks.
它压低了声音，耷拉着头，不情不愿却又清清楚楚地开了口。
With its head drooped, Bit Busy speaks in a hushed but clear voice reluctantly.
你瞬间明白了它的秉性为何如此急躁，原来是生来如此。
You immediately understand why it is so impatient — it was born that way.
急躁？你看看，你看看，这里都乱成一团了，如果不及时清理干净，阮•梅要是突然回来了怎么办？看到我们把家里弄得这么脏，她肯定会很伤心的。

Impatient? Can you see how disorganized this place is? What do we do if Ruan Mei suddenly comes back and the place is not cleaned? She'll be upset to see us turning the place into a mess, that's what.
如果你也有这么多事情要处理，你也会变得急躁！
You would be impatient too if you had so many things on your plate!
同为她心爱的造物，有些家伙每天就知道站着动动嘴皮子，什么事也不干。我跟它们可不一样，早点修好这里，她就早点回来，我哪有时间跟你这里慢慢磨蹭？

Some of Ruan Mei's creations never walk the talk and do nothing every day. I'm not like them. The sooner we fix up this place, the sooner Miss Ruan Mei will come back. So, I can't afford to while away my time with you here!
你就是这么跟阮•梅说话的吗？
Is that how you talk to Ruan Mei?
有点急不耐烦地撇撇嘴，似乎对你的提问表示不满，但随即又露出了一副向往的表情。
Bit Busy purses its lips impatiently, feeling displeased with your question. Yet, it quickly switches to a look of longing.
我对她当然不会这样说…只要她想，要我表演什么脸色都行…要是能见到她就好了。
Of course, I wouldn't speak to her like that... I'd talk in whatever way she desires... How nice would it be if I could meet her?
那就好，幸好没耽误我太久。
Great! I'm glad this hasn't taken up too much of my time.
那就好，我去忙别的事啦。
Great! I'll get back to my work then.
Alright, alright! Stop calling for me!
修复工程正在推进机器人的事我知道了没事你就往边上站着别碍事，懂了吗？
The restoration work is in progress and I already know what happened to the robots. Don't get in my way if you don't need anything else from me, understand?
怎么了，有点眼力劲儿行吗？没见我正忙着修复机器人吗？
Are you having trouble seeing? I'm busy fixing this robot, you see?
修复工程正在推进机器人的事我知道了没事你就往边上站着别碍事，懂了吗？
The restoration work is in progress and I already know what happened to the robots. Don't get in my way if you don't need anything else from me, understand?
我说了在忙我很忙别来打扰我我要思考一下你别再过来烦我啦！
I already told you I was busy and needed to think. Stop disturbing me!
有点急气鼓鼓地，腮帮子都鼓起了一大块。
Bit Busy puffs its cheeks in frustration.
没事自己一边玩去！求你了！
I'm begging you to get out of my way if you need nothing else from me!
有点急不愿再搭理你，或许它真的很忙吧……
Bit Busy brushes you off. Maybe it is really busy...
咳咳，简单介绍一下，你可以跟它们一样，叫我「全域守望者」，因为我将守望此地，直至我生命尽头。
Ahem, let me introduce myself. You can call me "Guardian of the Domain" like everyone else, as I'll watch this place till my death.
从名字上你大概就知道我在这里的地位，所以，要找我闲聊可以，但你得掂量掂量自己的分量，懂了吗？
You can probably tell I'm the bigwig here from my name. I don't chat with every Tom, Dick, and Harry I run into. You know what I'm saying?
不，这是写实。盖因我弹跳力强，看得远，我有义务也有这个实力去眺望远方，守护这里的一片宁静。
No, it's a reflection of the truth. With my strong jumping ability and far-reaching vision, I have the obligation and the capability to look out into the distance and maintain peace in this place.
你该不会不知道外面有多危险吧？到处都是那种怪物，到处乱飞，大家出门前都得找我帮忙看看外面情况。
Do you know how dangerous it is out there? Flying monsters are everywhere, so everyone seeks my help to make sure the area outside is clear before heading out.
你是说阮•梅女士吗？那倒不是。阮•梅女士按照做出来的口味，喊我「生煎蛋挞」。
Do you think Miss Ruan Mei named me? She didn't. She called me Pan-fried Egg Tart, which is what I was born as.
但我是个成熟的造物了，我不能用这么软糯的名字，我得有气魄，这样才能让阮•梅女士对我刮目相看。
But now that I've matured, such a soft name doesn't fit me anymore. I need a more confident vibe to impress Miss Ruan Mei.
方才跟你聊了几句，鄙人发觉你讲话还蛮有气势的。这里的造物天天只会恭维我，我和它们聊起来倒是话不投机。
I find the way you speak quite assertive from our conversation earlier. The creations here always flatter me, and I'm not on the same wavelength as them.
和你聊天倒是感觉…嗯，怎么说呢，同为领导者，有种惺惺相惜的感觉。太好咯，总算有个知音人能听我讲讲我的管理规划！
When I talk to you... Hmm, how should I put it? I feel like we share a rapport, like we're both leaders. This is great! I've finally found the right person to share my management plan!
你要是有什么想问的想说的，尽管问，尽管说！
If you have anything to say or ask, feel free to fire away!
噢，是你啊，太好咯，总算有个知音人能听我讲讲我的管理规划！
Oh, it's you! This is great! I've finally found the right person to share my management plan!
你要是有什么想问的想说的，尽管问，尽管说！
If you have anything to say or ask, feel free to fire away!
它们知道你是它们的领导吗？
Do they know you're their leader?
这…这有点眼色的应该都感觉得到吧？
Well... Anyone with enough sense would know it, I guess.
阮•梅女士在为我挑选口味的时候，选了许久，最后加了大量的野心与自信，这才造就了我，其他人哪里比得上我啊？
Miss Ruan Mei spent a long time deciding on my recipe. In the end, she added lots of ambition and self-confidence to me. I'm superior to everyone else!
嗯嗯，等我把所有造物收拢在一起，我就让大家每天写信给阮•梅女士，每封信都是夸我的，这样她就会知道我有多优秀了。
Wait till I gather all the creations. I'll get everyone to write letters to Miss Ruan Mei every day. Every letter is to include compliments for me so that Miss Ruan Mei will know how excellent I am.
到时候，说不定她会想，居然有这么一个天纵奇才在此蹉跎，然后就跑回来带我一起走，再精心教导我……
When the time comes, she'll probably wonder why such an extraordinary talent like me is wasting my time here. Then, she'll take me with her and give me her guidance...
当然，大家的恩情我也不会忘，到时候我也会替聪明的小家伙在阮•梅女士面前美言几句的。
Of course, I'm not an ungrateful rat. I'll put in a good word for the smart ones with Miss Ruan Mei.
What exactly are you watching for?
嗯，我在此守望，直到阮•梅女士回来…她是我们的造物主，我们一直在等待她的归来……
Well, I'll watch this place until the return of Miss Ruan Mei... She's our creator, and I'll keep waiting for her to come back...
No problem. Let's do this again next time.
阮•梅女士的造物虽多，但大家既然聚在一起，共同成长，平日分工合作，总得有管理者——如你所见，鄙人正是，记住了吗？
Miss Ruan Mei has many creations. Since we're staying, growing, and working together, there has to be someone in charge. As you can see, I have stepped up to be one. Is that understandable?
我可跟那些不懂事的小家伙不一样，主要是身份上有一定差距。
I'm not like those ignorant brats outside, mainly because we have different statuses.
外面乱哄哄的，危机四伏！这里就不一样了，你是不是觉得这里很安全？
It's chaotic and dangerous outside. Here, it's different. You feel safe here, don't you?
这就对了，当时我就是在这里七进七出，将那些虫子打得落花流水，才换来这里的安宁！
That's how you're supposed to feel. I once came in and out of here seven times to defeat the bugs in return for the peace here!
没办法，我生来如此。当然，这要感谢我的「母亲」——亲手创造出我这个生命体的，伟大的阮•梅女士！
I was born that way, and I owe that to my mother, the great Miss Ruan Mei who created me.
你这话什么意思？我可是尊贵的阮•梅女士亲手创造的生命，爪子长短和实力并没有直接关系，我的反应速度和隐藏实力说出来我都怕吓着你。

What do you mean? I'm a life created by the honorable Miss Ruan Mei, and the size of my paws has nothing to do with my capabilities. If you know my reaction speed and hidden talents, you'll be blown away.
你是外来者，你没听说过我的鼎鼎大名吗？…倒也正常。
Haven't you heard of me? ...I guess it's reasonable since you're an outsider.
没关系，现在我给你一个认识我的机会，你有什么想问的尽管问！
No worries. Now, I'll give you the chance to get to know me. You can ask me anything!
外面乱哄哄的，危机四伏！这里就不一样了，你是不是觉得这里很安全？
It's chaotic and dangerous outside. Here, it's different. You feel safe here, don't you?
这就对了，当时我就是在这里七进七出，将那些虫子打得落花流水，才换来这里的安宁！
That's how you're supposed to feel. I once came in and out of here seven times to defeat the bugs in return for the peace here!
又是你啊，你是来寻求本大人的庇护的吗，还是有别的什么事？
It's you again. Are you here to seek for my protection, or is it something else?
你的名字怎么这么奇怪？
How come you have such an unusual name?
这是大家给我起的绰号，不是我的本名，我的本名只有阮•梅女士知道，也只有阮•梅女士才能喊。
It's the nickname everyone gave me, not my real name, which is only known to Miss Ruan Mei. Only she can call me by that.
你真的和怪物战斗过吗？
Have you really fought against monsters?
这一层的怪物可多了，有到处乱飞的虫子，还有「悬浮呆呆怪」和「约瑟夫的幽灵」。
There are plenty of monsters here, such as the flying bugs, the Levitating Fool, and Joseph's Spirit.
嚯嚯！在我的威名之下，它们都不敢直视我，我都不用亲自出手就能把它们吓唬走！
Bahaha! They're intimidated by my reputation and dare not even look me in the eye! I can get rid of them without lifting a finger!
(Tell it the stories of your adventure to show off)
你向它讲述了你跟随星穹列车，穿梭在空间站与其他地方的冒险经历。
You share with it how you travel to space stations and other places by riding the Astral Express.
小家伙一开始还听得津津有味，可没过多久，便被你娓娓道来的惊险故事吓得抱住了头，缩在你脚边瑟瑟发抖。
The little guy enjoys the story at first but is soon left aghast by your thrilling tales. It clutches its head and cowers next to your feet, trembling in fear.
你不要再说了，我承认你也很厉害。你一定跟我一样，身体里有很多「勇气」的添加剂。
Say no more, and I recognize that you're pretty amazing too. You must have a generous dose of courage in your system, just like me.
你一定是被我骁勇善战的气息吓到了！这也正常！
You must find my gallant vibe pretty daunting, which is normal!
嚯嚯，以前就有过这种事，那——么——大的怪物，看起来多厉害，结果还不是见到我就跑！
This isn't the first time something like this has happened. Back then, there was a monster THIS huge! It seemed intimidating, but it scuttled off the moment it saw me!
大家一定要重视，要警惕，千万要小心那些「豆沙灰灰」手下的坏东西！
Guys, please be very, very careful of those thugs under Gray Bean Paste. We need to take them seriously.
啊，是你！我记得你，就是你将我送到那个可恶的传送装置里的，害我脸着地，疼了好久！
Ah, it's you! It was you who sent me to that wicked teleporter! Because of you, I landed on my face and suffered for a long time!
真的吗，我完全没印象了。
I did? I can't remember anything.
可恶，你不记得我啦？你连尊贵的芝士流心大人都忘了？
I can't believe you don't remember me! Have you forgotten about Lord Molten Cheese Tart too?
你这个坏东西，你怎么能这样！
You're a bad guy! How can you do this to us!?
对不起，怪我下手没轻重。
I'm sorry for being too rough on you guys.
哇咔咔，你给我道歉了，我还真没想到你会放下你高贵的身段来跟我道歉！
Mwahaha, you just apologized to me! I didn't expect your noble self would be willing to do that!
毕竟你是…你是阮•梅女士的助理，哦不对，助手，是这个词吧？
After all, you're Miss Ruan Mei's assistant — or should I say "deputy"?
既然你都道歉了，那我就原谅你啦！
Since you've apologized, I'll forgive you!
哇咔咔，没想到会在这里见到你，对了，我有个小秘密要告诉你，你不许跟别的坏点心说——
Mwahaha, what a surprise to see you here! By the way, I have a little secret to share with you. Don't tell the other bad snacks...
以后别在大家面前喊我「芝士流心」了，就算是喊我「尊贵的芝士流心大人」也不行。
Please stop addressing me as "Molten Cheese Tart" in public, not even "Honorable Lord Molten Cheese Tart".
我现在是沉稳睿智的「洞悉者」，这是我的最新外号，以后就喊我「洞悉者大人」或者「睿智的洞悉者大人」吧！
Now, I'm called the "Insighter," I am one who is wise and well-composed. Please call me "Lord Insighter" or "The Wise Lord Insighter" in the future!
本天才早已洞悉了这个舱段的一切秘密，现在正在无偿为大家提供生活上的咨询服务。你要是遇到什么麻烦，也可以来问我！
As a genius, I've figured out all the secrets in this zone, and I'm offering free life advice to everyone. If you run into any trouble, you can come to me!
大家一定要重视，要警惕，千万要小心那些「豆沙灰灰」手下的坏东西！
Guys, please be very, very careful of those thugs under Gray Bean Paste. We need to take them seriously.
本天才早已洞悉了这个舱段的一切秘密，现在正在无偿为大家提供生活上的咨询服务。你要是遇到什么麻烦，也可以来问我！
As a genius, I've figured out all the secrets in this zone, and I'm offering free life advice to everyone. If you run into any trouble, you can come to me!
你和豆沙灰灰是敌是友？
Are you a friend or a foe of Gray Bean Paste?
我跟那个成天低气压只知道哭的家伙才不是朋友！你不要明知故问！
I'm no friend of that loser who's always crying and full of negativity! Don't ask something with such an obvious answer!
它这么消极，怎么会得到阮•梅的肯定？让它把消极的气味传递给其他造物，这样可不好！
How is it supposed to gain Ruan Mei's recognition with all that negativity? We don't want it to spread its pessimism to other creations!
怎么突然就改头换姓了？
芝士流心，不，现在是洞悉者，它眼神坚定地望着你。
Molten Cheese Tart— nope, the one who identifies as Insighter, looks at you with a firm gaze.
是你教导我要谦虚一点，你不记得了吗？
You taught me to be humble. Don't you remember that?
阮•梅很欣赏你，所以你的话，我会听的，我想要跟你一样！
Ruan Mei admires you, so I'll listen to your advice and be someone like you!
可是「芝士流心」给大家留下的刻板印象已经无法改变，即使是本天才也没有办法改变！哇咔咔，那干脆就换个名字重新开始吧！
The impression "Molten Cheese Tart" has left on everyone is set too deep to be changed, not even by a genius like me! So, I decided to get a new name and start afresh!
只要我的改变足够明显，阮•梅一定会被我的付出所打动的！
As long as my changes are significant enough, Ruan Mei will definitely be moved by my effort!
哇咔咔，我敢说没有人比我更了解阮•梅！可惜我的同族大多都很笨，它们不清楚阮•梅究竟喜欢什么、会被什么所吸引。
Mwahaha, I bet no one knows Ruan Mei better than I! It's a shame that most of my peers are too dumb to discern what Ruan Mei likes and gravitates to.
所以本天才接过了这个重任——我要来指导大家来赢取阮•梅的认可！
So, I have to shoulder the responsibility by showing everyone the way to win over Ruan Mei's favor!
你可不要不懂装懂哦，有什么不懂的及时问我！
Just ask me if you're unsure of something. Don't be a know-it-all.
哇咔咔，以本天才的智慧与远见！得到阮•梅女士的认可只是迟早的事！
Mwahaha, it's just a matter of time for me to gain Miss Ruan Mei's recognition with my knowledge and vision!
我看到了通往空间站其他舱段的路，不过，这里是要怎么上去呢？
I see the way to the space station, but how do I get there?
噢，你好，没想到能在这里遇到大活人，这还是头一遭。
Oh, hello. This is my first time running into a human here.
听到我说话，你好像很惊讶？
You seem surprised to hear me speak.
How come you can speak human language?
你既然已经见过阮•梅创造的生命体，那想必也能感受到，在她无穷尽的智慧之下，我们无法确定哪些是绝对的规则。
After meeting some of Ruan Mei's creations, you should have realized there are no definite rules as to how Ruan Mei uses her boundless intellect.
或许，生命体之间沟通的形式远比我们所想象到的更多元，我会说你们的语言也不是什么奇怪之事。
Perhaps, the ways different life forms communicate with each other are far more diverse than we can imagine. So, it's not much of a surprise that I can speak your language.
哈哈，谢谢你的夸奖，阮•梅创造了我，她赋予我独特的生存方式与思维模式，或许就是这些东西，塑造出了我这副嗓子吧。
Haha, thanks for your compliment. Ruan Mei created me and granted me a unique way of surviving and thinking. Maybe it's those things that shape my voice.
这个舱段，空间站的人叫它「禁闭舱段」。我在小机器人那里查询到了相关的记录。
This is called the seclusion zone on the space station, right? I found related records from the little robot.
我在你身上感受到了阮•梅的气息，你们先前想来是有过接触。或许你比我更熟悉这个舱段，但我独自求索许久，也有一些心得。

I can feel Ruan Mei's aura on you, so I suppose you two have met before. You're probably more familiar with this zone than I am, but I've also learned a thing or two after exploring alone for a long time.
你要是感兴趣，或者有什么想问的，我会尽量回答你。
If you're interested or have any questions, I'll do my best to answer them.
我看到了通往空间站其他舱段的路，不过，这里是要怎么上去呢？
I see the way to the space station, but how do I get there?
噢，你好，又见面了。我在这里独自求索许久，也有一些心得。
Hey, here we are again. I've learned a thing or two after exploring this place alone for a long time.
你要是感兴趣，或者有什么想问的，我会尽量回答你。
If you're interested or have any questions, I'll do my best to answer them.
需要我带你去其他舱段吗？
Do you need my help getting to other zones?
我知道怎么去其他舱段，是通过那个叫「电梯」的东西，还是那个「接驳车」来着？
I know how to go. I have to take something called an "elevator" or "shuttle," right?
你的好意我心领了，生命中有些路必须独自行走，这样才能找到我想要的答案。
Thanks for your kind offer, but some paths are meant to be taken alone. That's how I can find the answer I'm looking for.
Are you looking for Ruan Mei?
是的。不过我这样做，其实是在故意绕远路。在找到她之前，我想先行探索生命的奥秘，还有——
Yes. Actually, I've been taking the scenic route, in the hopes that I'll uncover the secrets of life before meeting her. Also...
宇宙如此广阔，我在寻找自己的位置。
I'd like to find where I belong in this vast universe.
我很好奇你是什么口味的？
I'm very curious what you taste like?
发酵过的面团，放了些许椒盐，因此产生了一些质变。
I'm fermented dough sprinkled with some pepper and salt to develop into a different texture.
它对你眨了眨眼，话语里似乎别有深意。
It gives you a wink, and what it says seems to be hinting at something.
Is there anything interesting going on?
你可以去找我的同族聊聊，我们同为阮•梅的造物，它们对自己的认知在你们看来或许会很有趣。
I suggest you have a chat with my peers. Just like me, they are Ruan Mei's creations, and their perception of themselves may sound intriguing to you.
有缘的时候再见吧，希望那时候我已经能找到自己的答案了。
Until we meet again. I hope I'll have already found my answer by then.
我将独自探索，直至拨开头顶的迷雾……
I will explore alone until the fog has lifted from my head...
你听不懂呜呜伯在说什么，还是去请教下懂行的科员吧？
You don't have a clue what Wubbaboo is saying. You should probably seek help from a researcher who can understand it.
听说界种科的阿德勒似乎和呜呜伯走得很近……
Adler from the Department of Ecology is said to be close with Wubbaboo...
呜呜认得！空间站！英雄！呜呜的！英雄！
Yes, I do! Space station! Hero! My hero!
你怎么就当别人模特了？
How did you end up becoming someone else's model?
下来玩呜，约瑟夫喊的呜呜…呜呜答应了。
Joseph said, woo, get down and play, boo... and I said yes.
大家想让呜呜，呜呜放东西，东西放呜呜身上，呜呜答应了！
Everyone wanted to woowoo, put things on woo me. Woo, I said yes!
Where did you sneak in from?
接驳车呜…呜呜在彻底…卡在缝里了，疼死了呜。
Shuttle, woo... I got stuck in a gap under the shuttle. It hurt a lot, woo.
这里很危险，还是回去吧。
It's dangerous here. You should go back.
呜呜不，呜呜想玩，呜呜不想回去。
I want to play here. I don't want to go back.
一起玩？下次，呜呜？呜呜呜！
Play with me? Next time, woo-woo? Wubba-woo!

算了…你说话也有点噪音，可能是你那边信号不好，没认出我也正常……

没什么，就是界种科最近有新项目，说是在空间站发现了一种神奇的小生命。
Nothing much, just a new project going on at the Department of Ecology. Apparently a mysterious little life form was discovered at the space station.
我负责用小机器人远程实时监控它们，记录一下收集到的数据、它们的行为表现什么的…听起来有点枯燥，不过我感觉还蛮有意思的。
I'm in charge of monitoring these creatures remotely with a little robot and recording the collected data and their behavior... It sounds a bit dull, but I find it pretty interesting.

啊！当然！我可是阿德勒！你不要把我和界种科某些办不成事的大人相提并论。

这是怎么回事呢？对此你感到很不解。
What is going on? You are puzzled.
队列清空！当前状态为：空闲。未查询到任务，已自动进入闲聊模式。
Task queue cleared! Current status: Idle. No tasks found. Chatting mode activated.
你好！欢迎启动心理咨询与闲聊功能，你好！有什么我可以为您做的吗？
Welcome to the counseling and chatting function! What can I do for you?
如果您只是想聊聊天，也可以告诉我。请放心，隐私模式已开启，我会为您提供一个安全和私密的空间。
If you are just here for a chat, please be rest assured that the private mode has been activated. I'll provide a safe and private space for you.
待办事项<unbreak>503</unbreak>个，正在执行序号<unbreak>113</unbreak>，请勿打扰。
<unbreak>503</unbreak> tasks pending. Now handling Task #113. Please do not disturb.
检测到视野内有生命迹象，识别中…识别成功…已自动进入闲聊模式。
Signs of life detected within the field of vision. Identification in progress... Identification successful... Chatting mode automatically activated.
你好！欢迎启动心理咨询与闲聊功能，你好！有什么我可以为您做的吗？
Welcome to the counseling and chatting function! What can I do for you?
如果您只是想聊聊天，也可以告诉我。请放心，隐私模式已开启，我会为您提供一个安全和私密的空间。
If you are just here for a chat, please be rest assured that the private mode has been activated. I'll provide a safe and private space for you.
我被设计来为空间站提供各类服务与支援，我出现在这里是因为有人吩咐我来修复破损区域。
I'm designed to provide all kinds of services and support for the space station. Someone sent me here to fix a damaged area.
你的名字是随机生成的吗？
不是的，我的名字是由后勤服务团队设定的。
No. My name is given by the logistics team.
您想问的是不是「机器人命名」功能？空间站的科员享有自定义我的姓名的权限，但请在一个自然月后及时维护，否则会失效。
Are you inquiring about the robot naming feature? Space station researchers are authorized to change my name. Please update me after one natural month, or the changes will not take effect.
What's the meaning of your name?
我的当前名字为「编号七六八五四」。
噢，我懂你的意思了…正在提取录像片段，请稍后……
Oh, I see what you mean... Extracting video clip. Please wait...
小机器人为你播放了一段影像，你看到几只活蹦乱跳的「阮•梅」造物正在试图与它沟通，但它机械地重复着清扫工作，不予回应。

The little robot plays a video for you, showing several energetic creations of Ruan Mei trying to communicate with it. The robot, however, only mechanically repeats its cleaning task and did not respond.
在第<unbreak>190</unbreak>次无视了「阮•梅」造物们的互动请求后，它们为小机器人取了一个饱含负面情绪的名字——「不可直视之物」，用以「表彰」它的无趣与呆板。

After the little robot ignored the creations' request to interact for the <unbreak>190</unbreak>th time, the creatures gave the Little Robot a name full of negative sentiments — The Unviewable — to "honor" how boring and rigid it was.
很高兴为您服务，下次再会。
Glad to be at your service. See you next time.
Beep... beep... The call has ended.
小机器人重新回到先前的忙碌中。
The little robot gets busy again.
当前时间段繁忙，请勿打扰，请勿打扰。
Currently busy. Please do not disturb. Please do not disturb.
这台终端搭载了超距遥感通讯技术，通讯录里仅有一位联系人——「阮•梅」。
This terminal is equipped with ultraremote sensing technology. There is only one person in the contact list: Ruan Mei.
阮•梅真的会同意通话吗？你有些好奇。
Will Ruan Mei really take your call? You're a little curious.
Send a call request to Ruan Mei.
一道模糊的投影出现在你眼前，你似乎在空间站的某处见过这位女子的画像。
A blurry projection materializes in front of you. You seem to have come across this woman's portrait somewhere at the space station.
Forget it. Let's not disturb her.
你好，陌生的来访者。我叫阮·梅，对于我本人…没有什么可介绍的。很高兴认识你。
Hello, my name is Ruan Mei... I'm not one for introductions. It's nice to meet you.
我本人已去往更讳莫如深的宇宙地带，通讯不便，联系只好凭借缘分。
I have already ventured to a deeper and more mysterious corner of the universe, where communication is difficult. It depends on luck whether you can reach me.
冰冷的电子音提醒你：「已转接至自动应答系统，请按下通讯键进行选择。」
A cold electronic voice notifies you, "You have been transferred to the automated response system. Please press the communication key to make your selection."
通讯似乎幸运地接通了。
你好，鲜少有人会拨打这个号码。是，某位天才俱乐部会员？还是…空间站的科员？
Hello. People rarely dial this number. Are you a member of the Genius Society? Or a space station researcher?
唔，当然，{NICKNAME}。我记得你的笑容、惊恐、温度和眼睛。
Oh. Of course, {NICKNAME}. I remember your smile, fear, temperature, and eyes.
我记得你我之间所有的片段，微小的信息像涓涓细流一样，它们「构成」了世界。
I remember all the snippets of memories we shared. Tiny details that flow like little streams make up the world.
我似乎忘记了我们之间的一些事。
I seem to have forgotten something about us.
唔…是这样吗？{NICKNAME}…看来「反吐真剂」开始发挥作用了。
Hmm... Is that so? {NICKNAME}, it seems that the Anti-Truth Serum is working.
你会在这个阶段品尝到它的尾调。它甘美、甜蜜，对吗？那是我希望你感受到的东西。
At this stage, you'll get to savor its base note. It's smooth and sweet, isn't it? That's what I'm hoping for you to experience.
别担心，不好的东西会睡去。接着，我们可以创造新的「故事」。不用感到遗憾…不用感到不舍。
Don't worry. The bad stuff will fall into slumber, and then we can create a new story. There's no need to feel regret or sorry...
嗯…得到这个问题的答案，就是你拨来通讯的原因吗？
Hmm... Did you make this call to get the answer to this question?
如果你希望，会的。因为…我们还要创造新的「故事」。
We'll meet again, if you wish. It's because... we have new stories to create.
That's all I have to ask.
研究还在继续，如有需要可以给我留言。
The research is still ongoing. Drop me a line if you need anything.
冰冷的电子音提醒你：「您所呼叫的用户不在服务区。」
A cold electronic voice notifies you, "The user you are calling is out of the service zone."
通讯似乎幸运地接通了。
你好，鲜少有人会拨打这个号码。是，某位天才俱乐部会员？还是…空间站的科员？
Hello. People rarely dial this number. Are you a member of the Genius Society? Or a space station researcher?
唔，当然，{NICKNAME}。我记得你的笑容、惊恐、温度和眼睛。
Oh. Of course, {NICKNAME}. I remember your smile, fear, temperature, and eyes.
我记得你我之间所有的片段，微小的信息像涓涓细流一样，它们「构成」了世界。
I remember all the snippets of memories we shared. Tiny details that flow like little streams make up the world.
我似乎忘记了我们之间的一些事。
I seem to have forgotten something about us.
唔…是这样吗？{NICKNAME}…看来「反吐真剂」开始发挥作用了。
Hmm... Is that so? {NICKNAME}, it seems that the Anti-Truth Serum is working.
你会在这个阶段品尝到它的尾调。它甘美、甜蜜，对吗？那是我希望你感受到的东西。
At this stage, you'll get to savor its base note. It's smooth and sweet, isn't it? That's what I'm hoping for you to experience.
别担心，不好的东西会睡去。接着，我们可以创造新的「故事」。不用感到遗憾…不用感到不舍。
Don't worry. The bad stuff will fall into slumber, and then we can create a new story. There's no need to feel regret or sorry...

Hmm... Did you make this call to get the answer to this question?
如果你希望，会的。因为…我们还要创造新的「故事」。
We'll meet again, if you wish. It's because... we have new stories to create.
That's all I have to ask.
研究还在继续，如有需要可以给我留言。
The research is still ongoing. Drop me a line if you need anything.
假使市集不吵闹，也不足以称为市集。话虽如此，今天的云石市集未免太喧嚣了些。
A market wouldn't be one without its hustle and bustle. Even so, the Marmoreal Market today has seen way too much foot traffic.
究竟发生了什么，让明辨是非、处变不惊的奥赫玛人停住脚步，把道路围了个水泄不通？
What exactly happened to make the discerning and composed people of Okhema stop in their tracks and form such a huge crowd that blocks the road?
瞧一瞧，看一看，这些盾牌都是千载难逢的稀世珍品，错过可就没有了啊！
Have a look, take a gander, these shields are rare treasures hard to come by! Don't miss out! You snooze, you lose!
有些客人可能要问了，盾牌哪都有卖，有什么稀奇的呢？
Some people may ask: Shields are such a common commodity. What's there to be in awe about?
那你们就错了：这不是普通的盾牌；这是用{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的指甲打造的盾牌！
That's where you're wrong! These are no ordinary shields. They're shields forged from {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios'{RUBY_E#} nails!
吉奥里亚是哪位神明，大家不会不知道吧？
Surely everyone knows who Georios is, yes?
Everyone knows, and all are aware!
磐岩之脊，吉奥里亚，背负一切生灵的泰坦，雷打不动、水淹不坏！用它的指甲打造的盾牌，牢不可破、坚不可摧！
The Pillar of Stone, Georios, the Titan bearing all life upon its back, immovable and indestructible! With a shield forged from its nails, you'll be indomitable and unyielding!
更有预言称——哪怕黑潮淹没最高的山峰，填平最深的沟壑，唯有它能承载我们最后的希望，传递生命的火种，开启新的纪元……

There is even a prophecy stating: Even if the black tide drowns the highest peaks, fills up the deepest ravines, only it can bear our last hopes, pass on the kindling of life, and usher in a new age...
That's a load of divine bull.
你这预言是不是自己编的啊。
Did you spin this prophetic yarn yourself?
这位客人实在是太捧场了。要帮您打包一面盾牌吗？
This customer is a saint for supporting my business. Shall I pack up a shield for you?
有眼光！算是叫您淘到宝贝了。
Good eye! You've spotted a treasure for sure.
Is this shield the real deal?
刻法勒的脚下，就算那位诡计之神在暗中怂恿，我也不敢弄虚作假啊。
Beneath Kephale's feet, even if the God of Trickery instigates from the shadows, I wouldn't dare defraud anyone.
Did it come from a legal source?
您大可放心，敝人先祖在阿卡索斯城的神殿里任职，这都是祖上传下来的。
No worries about that. My ancestors were all workers in the temple in Icatus, and these were all passed down from them.
即便丢下命运重渊的断崖也完全无伤，即便被一百头大地兽踩踏也纹丝不动，即便{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}来到它面前，也将哀叹自己的无力。

It can't be damaged even if it were hurled off the cliff of the Abyss of Fate. There wouldn't be a scratch on it, even if a hundred dromases trampled over it. Even {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} would sigh in resignation in the face of this shield.
我敢保证，世界上没有任何武器可以击破这面盾牌——您要是不信，大可以试试！
I dare guarantee that no weapon in this world can shatter this shield — feel free to test it out, if you don't believe me!
My bat has something to say about that.
您、您还真试啊！好…我给您摆好……
Y—You're really going to test it out!? Okay... allow me to prop it up for you...
小贩有些不情愿地摆放好了盾牌。
The merchant reluctantly positions the shield.
Listen to the merchants' sales pitches...
All just a bunch of swindlers.
你挤过人群，来到了热闹的最前线——
You squeeze past the crowd and emerge in the fray of the commotion...
哈哈，不是什么大事。您看，拼起来还能用，牢固着呢。
Haha, it's a minor setback. Look, you can still use it if you piece it back together. It's very durable.
Didn't you say it was indestructible?
Th—The... shield was converting incoming force into its own!
机制设计如此——这面盾牌会适时破裂，以便最大程度地吸收力道。假使它完好无损，坏掉的就是持盾人的手臂了。仁厚如吉奥里亚，当然不愿看到这种境况发生。

Its structural design is as such: This shield will break in appropriate instances in order to absorb the greatest amount of force. If it were totally unbreakable, it would be the wielder's arm that breaks instead. The benevolent Georios would never wish such a plight on anyone.
呵呵，朋友，吉奥里亚被称为「磐岩之脊」，乃是因为它以脊背朝上，迎受风霜雪雨的冲刷。就算有指甲，也深埋在大地的内侧，凡人怎么能得到呢？

Heh-heh, my friend, Georios is called the Pillar of Stone because its spine faces upward, to meet the barrage of harsh storms and blizzards. Even if it had nails, they would be buried deep within the earth — how would mortals even acquire them?
无稽之谈，这可是渎神！…都是同行，您何必在这拆我的台呢。
Groundless accusations bordering on blasphemy! ...Why would you malign a compatriot in the same field of work?
只是实话实说，毕竟没人见过吉奥里亚的神躯。那到底…什么才值得相信呢？
I'm just speaking truth. No one has seen Georios' divine figure before, after all. So then... what is truly worth believing?
眼见才为实！众所周知，纷争世，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}曾向大地投出战矛，此事在吟游诗人的歌谣中亦有记载。
Seeing is believing! Everyone knows that during the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} once threw their lance into the land — this incident has been recorded in the ballads of bards.
我这几柄长矛，正是以当年战矛的碎片重铸而成，如假包换！
These lances of mine are forged from the shards of that very lance all those years ago! They're as good as the real artifact!
You made that up all by yourself too?
尼卡多利战无不胜，用它的战矛碎片重铸而成的长矛，锐不可当，无坚不摧！各位朋友若是不信，大可以试试。

Nikador was ever-victorious. Brandishing a lance forged from the lance shard that the god once wielded, you will be unstoppable and unrelenting! If anyone here is in disbelief, feel free to test it for yourself.
一日内竟有两种稀世神兵横空出世，奥赫玛着实藏龙卧虎。「永恒之城」并非浪得虚名，果然有其厉害之处。
To have two divine relics surface in the space of a day, Okhema certainly is a mecca of wonderment. The Eternal City certainly lives up to its name to harbor such an impressive arsenal.
但在掏出钱包，将这两件传世之作收入囊中前，有个问题困扰着你——
But when you take out your purse and are about to purchase these two legendary masterpieces, a lingering question persists in your mind...
假如用你的矛攻击他的盾…
If you used your lance to attack his shield...
假如用他的盾防御你的矛…
If you used his shield to block your lance...
他们怎么不说话了？不会真是赝品吧？
Why aren't they talking? Could the items be counterfeit?
还好我按捺住了购买的冲动…赞美理性，赞美瑟希斯！
Good thing I suppressed my impulse to buy any... Praise reason, praise Cerces!
你这家伙，刚才还高谈阔论的，现在就不吭声了？
You, you were just spewing nonsense. What, cat got your tongue now?
倘若只事关货物，我自然乐意一试。可此事关乎两位泰坦的名誉，没有足以服众的仲裁人现场公证，我不敢贸然行动。

If it was just about the goods, I would be more than happy to try them out. But it concerns the honor of two Titans. Without a testifying arbitrator that can convince the crowd, I wouldn't dare jump the gun.
没错！没有仲裁人见证，即便天平发生了倾斜，塔兰顿也绝不会认可！
That's right! Without an arbitrator as witness, even if the scales weren't even, Talanton would also never acknowledge this!
（附近有没有足以服众的仲裁者呢…找找看吧。）
(There's no such arbitrator around here... Let's find one.)
无坚不摧的矛对阵坚不可摧的盾…悬念丛生啊！您要来下点赌注吗？
The unstoppable lance versus the immovable shield... That's a cliffhanger right there! You want to make a bet?
昨日扎格列斯托梦，说我今天会交上好运。要是不把握住机会，它一定会用硬币狠狠砸我的脑门儿，质问这里面到底装着什么！
Zagreus came to me in a dream yesterday, saying that my fortune will be delivered today. If I don't nab this chance, it will surely pelt my head with coins, and demand to know what's stored inside!
按现在的局势看，双方的支持者势均力敌。您大可考虑考虑！
With the current situation, the supporters on both sides are about even right now. You could consider it!
你知道那根球棒的威力，击中盾牌的手感也告诉你——它能抵御住长矛的攻击。
You know that baseball bat's power, and the feel of the shield's impact also told you — it can withstand a hit from that lance.
好嘞！您这么果断，定是瞧出了什么端倪吧。愿扎格列斯眷顾您！
All right! You must've noticed something if you're that certain. May Zagreus favor you!
都说商品的价值在于它背后的故事，相比于「吉奥里亚的指甲」，「尼卡多利的战矛」要合理得多。你相信这柄出身不凡的长矛能击破盾牌的防御。
An item's value lies in its provenance. Compared to Georios' Nail, Nikador's Lance sounds much more plausible. You're sure that this extraordinary lance will shatter the shield's defenses.
好嘞！您这么果断，定是瞧出了什么端倪吧。愿扎格列斯眷顾您！
All right! You must've noticed something if you're that certain. May Zagreus favor you!
你打心眼里怀疑这俩小贩的说辞，决心不掺和这件事。
You've been suspicious of these two merchants' claims from the start, and decide not to get involved.
Passing by, to purchase masonry materials, I am.
Crowded and noisy. For what reason is it so?
你不敢确定矛和盾究竟谁能赢，但你绝对相信，没有人比这位大工匠更懂得兵器铸造。于是你向他说明了事情来龙去脉。
You can't be sure who will win exactly, but you're absolutely certain that no one knows arms forging better than this Grand Craftsman, so you elaborate the details to him.
兵器，泰坦铸造？不可能，但是，愿意旁观。
Weapons, forged by Titans? Impossible, it is. But observe, willing I am.
这点小事，就不用劳烦大工匠了吧！
A paltry matter like this doesn't deserve the attention of the Grand Craftsman!
我也有兴趣，关于此事。客气推辞，不必。
Interested, I am, in this matter. Polite refusal, no need.
大工匠亲自仲裁，我们自然无话可说……
For the Grand Craftsman to personally preside over this, we are at a loss for words...
快点，快点——拿起「最强之矛」，刺向「最强之盾」吧！
Stop stalling! Thrust the Strongest Lance at the Strongest Shield!
脆响过后，长矛与盾牌…两者皆应声而碎。
A crisp clang, and the lance and shield... both shatter the instant they touch each other.
怎么两个都碎了？莫非都是假货？
Both have been broken? Could these be counterfeit?
谁去把卫兵叫来，赶紧把这两个骗子逮起来！
Someone, call the guards! Have these two charlatans arrested!
咳…有的客人可能会问了，为什么矛和盾一起碎了呢？
Ahem... Some customers may ask, why did the lance and shield break at the same time?
问题的答案看似复杂，其实很简单：两位泰坦的权能相当，自然分不出个高低！
The answer appears complicated, but is quite simple: The powers of both Titans are equal, so the outcome is naturally a stalemate!
兄弟！你胡编乱造的本事，就连扎格列斯的信徒也要自叹不如啊！
Hey! Even Zagreus' disciples will blush at your ability to lie through your teeth!
没错，刚才矛和盾相撞的时候，你们是不是感到眼前发黑，甚至无法直视碰撞的画面？那就是残存的泰坦力量爆发出的威能。
That's right. When the lance met the shield, did you feel like your eyes were shrouded, perhaps not even able to see the actual clash? That's the explosive remnant power of the Titans.
So far-fetched. I want my money back!
这位客人，您这都还没买呢，不要趁火打劫！
You didn't even buy anything! Stop trying to make things up!
You all could see the black screen too?
…什么黑屏？生活可不是戏剧，不能自己决定开场和落幕的时候！
...Black screen? Life isn't some theater play, and you can't just decide when to draw or pull the curtains!
击打寻常盾牌，以「最强之矛」；击打「最强之盾」，以寻常利器。
Strike an ordinary shield, with the strongest spear one will. Strike the strongest shield, with an ordinary weapon one shall.
Understood. The method of control variables.
洞见真相前，轻举妄动，切勿。
Act in haste, do not, before truth you see.
水落石出后，再做行动，不迟。
Act later, not too late it is, after the truth is revealed.
大工匠所言极是。泰坦赐福的兵器，若是直接对撞，必然会两败俱伤。但和凡俗的武器相较，还是大有不同。

The Grand Craftsman's words ring true. If weapons blessed by Titans directly clash with each other, both would surely be severely damaged. But against commonplace weapons, the outcome would be vastly different.
两位小贩按照哈托努斯的指示，摆放好了盾牌。
Both merchants follow Chartonus' instructions and position a shield.
就跟浴场的瓷砖似的，这盾牌是纸糊的吗？
This shield made of paper mache? It's as brittle as a baths tile.
又碎了——这是什么天生神力啊，你不会是尼卡多利本人吧？
It shattered again — what is this godly might? Could you be Nikador itself?
Again! Let's see how you do against three of 'em!
这盾牌到底保护了什么，敌人的手腕吗？
What exactly can this shield protect? The enemy's wrists?
三、三面盾牌都被干碎了？！
再来！我就不信了，你还能一口气打碎十面盾牌不成！
Again! This can't be real! Let's see you smash ten shields in one strike!
All the shields have been shattered...
你要不再找吉奥里亚进点货吧。
How about you ring up Georios for more inventory?
已经能做论断了，关于此盾。
On this shield, conclusion can one make.
The lance's quality, one shall test again...
两位小贩忙不迭搬来一个最常见的小号盾牌。
Two merchants hurriedly rush to bring over a common small shield.
其余长矛全都败下阵来，盾牌却依旧巍然不动。
All other lances have been defeated, yet the shield remains steadfast and unshaken.
前所未见，如此脆弱的材料。
Such flimsy material, I've never seen.
This is for scratching backs or something?
竟然敢打着吉奥里亚的名号招摇撞骗，实在是渎神之举！
How dare you swindle others using Georios' name — a most blasphemous act!
愿尼卡多利在你的头顶降下战矛！卫兵已经在来的路上了，等着受审吧！
May Nikador drop their lance over your head! The guards are already on their way. Prepare for judgment!
唉，常在河边走，哪能不湿鞋。这次咱们算是认栽了。
*sigh* If you play with fire, you're bound to get burned. Let's just admit our defeat this time.
留得青山在，不怕没柴烧。一时失手无伤大雅，总有东山再起的一天。
No fear of firewood as long as you stay in the mountains. A moment's mistake isn't the end of the world, and there'll always be another time to rise again.
老实交代，争取从宽处理。
Come clean and you'll receive lighter punishment.
最好吊销你们的营业执照。
I hope your licenses get suspended.
没想到矛和盾竟然都碎了，这下可全赔进去了。
To think the lances and shields have all been destroyed. I've lost my entire fortune.
扎格列斯大人，莫非昨日的托梦，也只是一时兴起的恶作剧吗……
Lord Zagreus, were your words in my dream a whimsical prank...
得。你的判断很明智，谁都没猜对，这些钱全归你了。我就不该看这个热闹的。
Bah, your prediction was most astute. No one got it right. The money's all yours. I shouldn't have gotten involved in this ruckus to begin with.
没想到矛和盾竟然都碎了，这下可全赔进去了。
To think the lances and shields have all been destroyed. I've lost my entire fortune.
扎格列斯大人，莫非昨日的托梦，也只是一时兴起的恶作剧吗……
Lord Zagreus, were your words in my dream a whimsical prank...
得。谁都没猜对，押的钱都拿不回来咯。我就不该看这个热闹的。
Bah, no one got it right. I've lost all my money. Never should've gotten involved in this fracas.
哎呦，客人，是您啊，好久不见了！
Oho, it's you, dear customer! Long time!
What are you two doing together again?
那群塔兰顿的信徒在公民大会上争执了许久，也不知该如何裁决。最后以一票之差判我们无罪，只交了点罚款，着实惊险啊。

Those Talanton disciples bickered for a long time in the citizens' assembly, not knowing how to decide the case. Finally, we were declared innocent by a vote's difference, so we just paid the fine. It was a harrowing experience.
托您的福，我们发现奥赫玛竟然还有位论精明不逊于自己的奇才！所以我们一拍即合，决定要合伙做点买卖。
With your blessing, we discovered that there was an equally shrewd talent in Okhema! We hit it off instantly, and decided to do business together.
What are you intending to sell this time?
说到这个，还真得问问您的意见。
Speaking of that, we should really ask your opinion.
您觉得现在做什么生意好？{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}注视过的灯盏，还是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}染过色的绸缎？
What business do you think is good now? Lamps that have had {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} eyes gazed upon them, or silks dyed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?
只要会编，到处都是商机！
As long as we can spin, the world is paved with opportunity!
There's truly no hope for you...
Just wait till you get caught again!
哈哈，这次咱俩强强联合，定能赚个盆满钵满。您就等我们的好消息吧！
Haha, earning our pots of gold is inevitable now that we're working together. You just wait for our good news!
As long as you're passing by, don't miss out!
您轻点，可千万别伤着手！
Not so hard! You'll hurt your hand!
符合条件的仲裁人可不好找，您就别费这个心了，我给您个优惠价！
It's hard to find a qualified arbitrator, but don't worry, I will give you a discount!
是啊，没有仲裁人见证，塔兰顿绝不会认可比试的胜负！
That's right. Talanton will never approve the outcome of the contest without an arbitrator as a witness!
这柄矛的设计还挺合我心意的，就是不知道质量怎么样……
I like the design of this spear, but I'm not sure about the quality...
不是我挑剔，两种货看起来都不怎么样。
I'm not being picky. It's just neither of their wares seems particularly good.
到底哪边的胜算更大呢？
Who do you think will win this?
我敢打赌，「最强之矛」一定能把盾牌击个粉碎！
I will bet money that the Strongest Lance can smash that shield to pieces!
（按照哈托努斯所说，击打普通盾牌试试矛的成色吧……）
(Do as Chartonus suggests and test the spear against a normal shield...)
几次出手间，长矛折断数柄…商人抹了抹冷汗。
After a few strikes, a number of the spears had snapped... The merchant wipes a cold sweat from his brow.
有个坐垫吸引了你的注意力，在周围的环境中，它的存在是那么的不合时宜。
A single cushion catches your attention. Its presence seems clearly out of place with its surroundings.
在你的仔细观察下，你注意到坐垫表面有些古怪——按理说坐垫的内里应当是柔软的，可眼下它的表面却有着某种凸起，摸上去极为坚硬。

Under your careful observation, you notice that the surface of the cushion is a little strange... Logically, a cushion should be soft inside, but this cushion has something very hard sticking out of it.
How strange. This requires thorough inspection.
还是不要破坏他人的财产。
Probably best not to damage other people's property.
你费了好大劲才撕开坐垫的表面，一份卷轴从中滑落。
After great effort, you finally manage to tear off the cushion's cover as a scroll falls out from inside.
卷轴底部绘着一个简单但诡异的图案：一只由树枝构成的眼睛注视着被藤蔓缠绕的神像。
A simple but strange pattern is drawn on the base of the scroll: An eye formed of branches staring at a divine statue ensnared in vines.
从上面记录的内容看，这似乎是某种神秘仪式的步骤，附带了信徒们的批注。
From the content recorded inside, it seems that these are instructions for some kind of mysterious ceremony, attached with notes made by disciples.
这可激起了你的好奇心。要知道，你在奥赫玛城里见过了形形色色的召唤仪式，但能让你从头开始亲自体验的，这还是头一回。
This scroll has aroused your curiosity. Though you have experienced all sorts of summoning ceremonies inside Okhema, this will be the first that you have experienced personally from the beginning.
在下定决心亲自举行仪式后，你认真研读了卷轴上的内容。
Having made up your mind to carry out the ceremony personally, you begin to carefully study the contents of the scroll.
仪式的开启需要三种道具，而你注意到卷轴底部印有某种烫金，三种道具的纹路都嵌在纹章的图样之中。
The ceremony initiation requires three types of objects. You notice that something is gilded at the bottom of the scroll — the patterns of the three items are embedded in golden stamps.
你拿起卷轴在此处走动了几步，发现它表面的流光正随着你的移动而不断变化。
You pick up the scroll and walk a few steps, noticing that the light on the surface is constantly changing with your movements.
你终于搞明白这玩意的作用——它正沉默地提醒你，三种仪式道具就在这附近。或许是被信徒们收起来了，仔细找找或许能有所发现。

You finally understand what this thing is used for... It is silently telling you that the three ceremonial items are nearby. Perhaps they have been hidden away by the disciples... You may be able to find something if you search carefully.
Forget it. Something doesn't feel right about this...
当然，任何探索都伴随着危险，尤其是与泰坦神明直接相关的时候。你的谨慎没有问题，还是把这个卷轴放在原地，迅速离开吧。

Of course, any exploration comes with risk, especially when it is directly linked to Titans and gods. Your caution is understandable. Maybe it's best to leave the scroll where you found it and make a quick exit.
卷轴底部绘着一个简单但诡异的图案：一只由树枝构成的眼睛注视着被藤蔓缠绕的神像。
A simple but strange pattern is drawn on the base of the scroll: An eye formed of branches staring at a divine statue ensnared in vines.
从上面记录的内容看，这似乎是某种神秘仪式的步骤，附带了信徒们的批注。
From the content recorded inside, it seems that these are instructions for some kind of mysterious ceremony, attached with notes made by disciples.
这可激起了你的好奇心。要知道，你在奥赫玛城里见过了形形色色的召唤仪式，但能让你从头开始亲自体验的，这还是头一回。
This scroll has aroused your curiosity. Though you have experienced all sorts of summoning ceremonies inside Okhema, this will be the first that you have experienced personally from the beginning.
在下定决心亲自举行仪式后，你认真研读了卷轴上的内容。
Having made up your mind to carry out the ceremony personally, you begin to carefully study the contents of the scroll.
仪式的开启需要三种道具，而你注意到卷轴底部印有某种烫金，三种道具的纹路都嵌在纹章的图样之中。
The ceremony initiation requires three types of objects. You notice that something is gilded at the bottom of the scroll — the patterns of the three items are embedded in golden stamps.
你拿起卷轴在此处走动了几步，发现它表面的流光正随着你的移动而不断变化。
You pick up the scroll and walk a few steps, noticing that the light on the surface is constantly changing with your movements.
你终于搞明白这玩意的作用——它正沉默地提醒你，三种仪式道具就在这附近。或许是被信徒们收起来了，仔细找找或许能有所发现。

You finally understand what this thing is used for... It is silently telling you that the three ceremonial items are nearby. Perhaps they have been hidden away by the disciples... You may be able to find something if you search carefully.
Forget it. Something doesn't feel right about this...
当然，任何探索都伴随着危险，尤其是与泰坦神明直接相关的时候。你的谨慎没有问题，还是把这个卷轴放在原地，迅速离开吧。

Of course, any exploration comes with risk, especially when it is directly linked to Titans and gods. Your caution is understandable. Maybe it's best to leave the scroll where you found it and make a quick exit.
平平无奇的箩筐，由翁法罗斯的草本植物编织而成，经年的日晒雨淋使得表面有些褪色。
An unremarkable basket woven from plants native to Amphoreus. Years of direct sunlight and rain have caused its color to fade.
你往箩筐中望了望，里面似乎只有一些垃圾。
You take a peek inside the basket. It looks like there is just trash inside.
平平无奇的箱子，人们用来存放物件的必需品，看起来就像是能被球棒轻易击碎的道具。
An unremarkable box. A must-have necessity when it comes to storage. It looks like it could be easily smashed with a ball bat.
你打开箱子往里翻了翻，里面似乎只有一些垃圾。
You open the box and rummage around inside. Looks like there is just trash in here.
平平无奇的箩筐，由翁法罗斯的草本植物编织而成，经年的日晒雨淋使得表面有些褪色。
An unremarkable basket woven from plants native to Amphoreus. Years of direct sunlight and rain have caused its color to fade.
它的底部沾满污垢，甚至隐约可见蜘蛛网的痕迹，看来它是无主之物，被遗弃在这里已有些年头了。
The bottom is so stained with dirt, you can even see faint traces of spider webs. It looks like it has been abandoned here without an owner for all this time.
基于「开拓」的精神，你有些好奇这东西是否还能正常使用，于是你将其翻找一番。
Your trailblazing spirit makes you curious as to whether this thing can still be used, so you decide to rummage through it.
你在箩筐中找到了两样东西——装满泥土的袋子，以及几颗看上去像某种坚果的玩意。
You discover two things inside the basket... A bag filled with dirt and a number of small, nut-like objects.
虽说它们看起来和垃圾没什么两样，但眼尖的你还是注意到了：它们的表面似乎正流动着微弱的光。
Though they may seem like trash to the untrained eye, your sharp intuition alerts you to something: There seems to be a faint light coursing across their surfaces.
平平无奇的箱子，人们用来存放物件的必需品，看起来就像是能被球棒轻易击碎的道具。
An unremarkable box. A must-have necessity when it comes to storage. It looks like it could be easily smashed with a ball bat.
但你已经是个成熟的开拓者了，很明白行事绝不能鲁莽的道理——
However, you are an experienced Trailblazer. You understand by now that one must not act recklessly...
所以你用你灵活的双手掀开了箱体的盖子，里面是一瓶布满灰尘的不明液体。从外观来看，似乎是某种饮品，因为你在瓶身上看到了象征着法吉娜的纹样。

So, you use your nimble fingers to tear open the box's cover and find a dusty bottle containing an unidentified liquid. Looking at it, you imagine it must be some kind of drink, as the bottle has a symbol of Phagousa on it.
尽管从液体的色泽来看，它不像普通泉水那般清澈，浑浊的模样看上去颇为可疑，但你还是注意到了它的特殊之处——在晃动中，液体间有点点星光闪烁。

Looking at its color, you can see that it is not as clear as regular spring water and has a suspicious cloudiness to it. However, you also notice something special about it... As it sloshes around, you see small flashes of sparkling starlight.
树干上刻着瑟希斯的标记，因为年代久远的缘故，标记只剩下浅浅一层，一眼望去实在很难发现。
The tree trunk is engraved with the mark of Cerces. As so many years have passed, only a thin layer of the original engraving remains, making it hard to notice at first sight.
比对着卷轴上的文本，你确信那个神秘仪式的举行地点就是这里。底下的土壤有些奇怪，或许是举行过无数次仪式的缘故，竟有些板结。

Comparing the location with the scroll's script, you are certain that this is the location for the mysterious ceremony. There is something strange about the dirt beneath you. Perhaps the countless ceremonies performed here before have hardened the earth.
Bury the offerings by the tree roots.
一阵诡异的能量波动传来，你感到有些头晕。
As you are hit by a bizarre fluctuation of energy, your head feels a little faint.
仪式…难道成功了？望着眼前陡然出现的悬浮在半空中的物体，你感到有些不可思议。
Could it be... the ceremony is a success? You find it hard to believe as you look at the object that has suddenly appeared before you, suspended in midair.
几道声音自你耳侧响起，像是从遥远的地方传来，话语有些模糊不清。
A number of voices begin to sound through your ears. Their words sound muffled, as if they have travelled a great distance.
啊…又一位寻求智慧的献祭者，你带来了三位泰坦的恩赐…吉奥里亚…土壤孕育万物众生…法吉娜…绵延的泉水带来生机……

Ah... Another follower bearing offerings in search of wisdom. You have brought the blessings of the three Titans... Georios... The soil that nurtures all living things... Phagousa... The ever-reaching springs that bring life...
…种子…瑟希斯之种…终将汲取一切养分，直至开花结果……
...Seeds... Seeds of Cerces... Those will absorb all nutrients until they blossom and bear fruit...
「智慧树上黄金果，智慧树下你和我」。可是，这黄金果呢，瑟希斯，你何苦为难你忠诚的信徒啊！
"The golden fruit on the wisdom tree. We stand in its shelter, you and me." But where is the golden fruit, Cerces? Why must you taunt your loyal disciples like this!?
嘘，小声些，不可对神明不敬。
Shh, quiet! You must not disrespect the gods.
我明白了！我完全明白了！是这棵树太老了，老到…它的生命，即将走到尽头……
I understand! I understand completely! This tree has grown too old. So old... that it has come to the end of its life...
Where can I get this golden fruit?
那几道声音沉默不语，并未对你的疑惑做出解答。但你很快就明白了这一切——
The voices fall into complete silence, leaving your question unanswered. But you quickly understand what has happened...
从前，瑟希斯的信徒们从树木中汲取某种力量，然而在无数次仪式后，当年的苍天大树也垂垂老矣，再也无力支撑起无尽的仪式。

Long ago, the disciples of Cerces would draw some kind of power from this tree. However, after countless ceremonies, even the tallest tree of the past grows old, and unable to meet the demand of insatiable ceremonies.
不知过了多久，或是遭到了废除，或是彻底遗忘，瑟希斯的信徒们鲜少再举行这样的仪式，直到你的出现…可树木没法再回应你更多东西了。

You have no idea how long it has been, but this ceremony was eventually either abandoned or forgotten and the disciples of Cerces very rarely attempted it again. That is, until your arrival... However, the tree no longer has anything to give you.
树根将某些物品拱了上来，像是推到你的脚下。你抬头望了望树身，印记绘制的眼睛似乎正注视着你，又似乎望着某些破碎的异象。

The tree roots push a few items towards you, as if trying to leave them at your feet. As you raise your head to look at the tree, the painted eyes engraved on its trunk seem to be both looking at you and staring off at some broken alien vision.
而那些腐朽的祭品也已经消失，仿佛从未存在过。
The rotten offerings you gave have also disappeared into thin air as if they never even existed.
卷轴底部的纹章正散发着耀眼的光，<color=#dbc291ff>仪式所需要的材料就在附近</color>，去找找看吧，或许会有收获。
The text at the bottom of the scroll emits a dazzling light: <color=#dbc291ff>The materials needed for the ceremony are nearby</color>. Take a look around. There may be something in it for you.
靠近仪式道具时，<color=#dbc291ff>卷轴会发生变化</color>
When you approach a ceremonial item, <color=#dbc291ff>the scroll will change</color>.
智慧是最重要的美德，看来这位朋友对我们的论辩格外感兴趣。若是如此，不妨再次参与到讨论中来，让在场各位听听你的新想法？

Intellect is the most crucial of virtues. It seems that our friend here has taken an interest in our dispute. If that is the case, why not join us in debate once more and share your views with us all?
亲爱的帕门弥德。请告诉我：你是谁，你从哪里来，向哪里去？
My dear Parmenides. Please, tell me: Who are you? Where have you come from? Where are you going?
我是阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，对大地的信仰如同吉奥里亚的神躯般坚定。我从云石天宫来，洗净我的身体与思想后，正要往城门口去。
I am Parmenides of Icatus. My faith in the earth is as firm as the divine body of Georios. I have come from Marmoreal Palace. Now that I have washed my mind and body, I shall head for the city gates.
很好，你的回答极其详尽。那么我又要发问了：你所述说的阿卡索斯城，与我所知的那座城邦是否为同一物？请别急着反驳，仔细思考我的提问。

Very good. Such detailed answers. Then allow me to ask you one more thing: This city of Icatus that you speak of... Is it the same as the city that I know of? Do not rush to refute me. Think carefully about what it is that I am asking.
奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?
我对这种辩论没有兴趣。
I have no interest in this kind of debates.
是啊，翁法罗斯还有那么多有趣的事物等着你去开拓，为什么非得花时间来思考这些无用的内容呢。你不认为这是个有价值的话题。
You're right. Amphoreus has many interesting things awaiting trailblazing. Why must you waste time reflecting on such pointless conversations? This topic is clearly of no value to you.
是我刚才的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。

I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally came from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.
覆灭前的阿卡索斯，与现今被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯，是否为同一物？
Are the Icatus that existed before its destruction and the Icatus that has now been devoured by the black tide the same thing?
当然。无论何时，那里都是我的家乡。
Of course. No matter what time we speak of, Icatus is my hometown.
覆灭前的阿卡索斯停留在你的记忆中，被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯却可以随时前往。早已不存在的东西，如何与现今仍存在的东西是同一物？

The Icatus that existed before its destruction remains in your memory, yet you can go to the Icatus that has been devoured by the black tide at any time. How could something long since gone be the same as something that exists currently?
眼睛看不见，手摸不着，难道就是不存在？若是如此，那世间将无物存在，因为所有事物都处在流变当中，我们也无法谈论任何内容。

Are you saying that if I can neither see it with my eyes nor feel it with my hands, then it does not exist? If that were the case, nothing would exist in this world, as everything is in a constant state of flux. There would be nothing for us to discuss.
哈，当然！莫非你想要说，你思想中的阿卡索斯城永恒存在、真实可信，看得见摸得着的城邦，反而不如你的想象那般确定？
Hah, of course! Are you trying to claim that the Icatus in your mind will exist forever, whereas a visible and tangible city is not as much a certainty as the one in your imagination?
无意义的诡辩。你的提问无非是在混淆概念。
A meaningless argument. Your line of questioning is conflating different concepts with each other.
认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.
我们从未见过刻法勒的真身，却笃定它为奥赫玛支撑起了天地；我们不理解欧洛尼斯的话语，却执着相信命定的预言；我们都未经历过死亡，却假定塞纳托斯的存在。

We have never seen the true form of Kephale, yet we are certain that they support the world for Okhema. We do not understand the words of Oronyx, yet we stubbornly believe their prophecy. We have never experienced death, yet we assume the existence of Thanatos.
人总是倾向于那些宏大而虚幻的理念，又不愿去思考其中的含义。
People are always drawn to these grand and fantastic ideals, yet they are unwilling to reflect on their implications.
我并非不愿思考，而是不愿动摇思考的根基。
It is not that I am unwilling to reflect. I am unwilling to shake the very foundation of thought itself.
这位朋友，你旁听我们的论辩有段时间了，想必也是位热爱智慧的学者。有兴趣的话，不妨参与到讨论中来，让在场各位都听听你的高见？

My friend. You have overheard this dispute for some time. You must be a fellow scholar and lover of wisdom. If you are interested, why not join our discussion? We would all be interested in hearing your view.
要不你们先做个自我介绍？
How about you introduce yourselves first?
我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.
阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，如你所见，是位修辞学方面的教师。
Parmenides of Icatus. As you can see, I am a teacher in the study of rhetoric.
教师的名头太过响亮，我倒不喜欢。人们总以为能从我这学到些什么，可我能教给他们的，无非是些思考与谈话的技巧。这算得了什么？

I find the title of "teacher" overly flashy. I do not enjoy it, personally. People always think that I can teach them something, but all I can teach them are the skills of reflection and debate. Does this really count as anything?
照你的说法，逻辑学课堂可就一文不值了，但别忘了，你是从那毕业的。
If that is true, logic classes would be completely worthless. Let us not forget that this was your major.
学生的成就超过老师，是什么稀奇事吗？按你的观点，世界岂不是始终在倒退？
Is it that rare for a student to surpass their teacher? If we follow your view, surely the world would only ever be regressing?
好吧，现在你明白他们俩的主要工作是什么了。
Alright, now you know what their main jobs are.
既然这位智者愿意加入讨论，我们就来选个直观而深奥的论题。阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我先退让一步，将确定论题的权力交付你。
As this wise one has seen fit to join us in debate, let us select a topic that is both intuitive and profound. Parmenides of Icatus, I shall step back and pass the rights of topic selection to you.
好，依我看，我们不妨继续刚才的辩论。理念与现实，究竟何者更为可靠？
Very well. I think that we may as well continue the debate that we were having before: Ideals or reality, which is more reliable?
将其转换为更直接的论题，便是——<color=#dbc291ff>纯粹的「阿卡索斯」是否真实存在？</color>
If we were to convert it into a more direct topic, it would be: <color=#dbc291ff>Does a pure "Icatus" truly exist?</color>
很好的论题。我得说，这个疑问困惑过我很长的时间。被黑潮摧毁后的阿卡索斯城看不见，摸不着，即使去到原先的地点，也只能找到一堆断壁残垣。

A very fine topic. I must say, this question has troubled me for a long time. Having been devoured by the black tide, one can no longer see nor touch Icatus. Even if you go to its location, all you will see is a pile of ruined remains.
就算在覆灭前，城邦的面积与人口也在不断发生变化，你童年时见到的城邦，和青年时见到的必然不同。既然如此，你凭什么断定它就是阿卡索斯？

Even before its destruction, the area and population of the city were undergoing constant change. The city that you saw as a child was undoubtedly different to the one you saw as a youth. If that is the case, how can you conclude that it was indeed Icatus?
秉着简洁的原则，我认为——<color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」并不存在</color>，能确定的只是*有个城邦*，仅此而已。
Based on the principle of simplicity, I think that... "Icatus" does not in fact exist, and all we can be certain of is that there is a city.
我与你恰好相反。「阿卡索斯」不会因为覆灭而消失，我们依旧可以谈论它、怀念它，就好像它仍是个真实存在的城邦似的。
I believe precisely the opposite. Icatus does not simply stop existing because it was destroyed. We can still discuss it and reminisce on it as if it were a city that still truly exists.
当我提起「阿卡索斯」的时候，所有人都知道说的是什么。当包裹寄往「阿卡索斯」的时候，信使绝不会弄错目的地。是我的故乡，这点永远不会改变。
When I mention "Icatus," everyone knows what that is. When you send a parcel to "Icatus," there is no way that the messenger would go to the wrong location. It is my hometown. That will never change.
<color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」必然存在</color>，否则当我们谈论「阿卡索斯」的时候，为何能理解彼此想表达的内容？
<color=#dbc291ff>"Icatus" must exist</color>. Otherwise, when we discuss "Icatus," how could we possibly understand what each other is referring to?
我们双方都阐述了各自的立场。那么，这位智者，你要选择为哪方辩护？
We have both stated our view points. So, wise one, which side would you like to debate for?
这种玩弄文辞的论辩还是少听些为好。渎神的罪名暂且不论，要是因为沉迷驳倒对方，反而损害了思考的能力，就得不偿失了。

These debates of rhetorical wordplay are best avoided. Putting aside the matter of blasphemy for now, if you end up damaging your brain trying to refute your opposition's argument, the victory is still not worth the loss.
哎，辩论才是获取真理的方式。不经由讨论便得到的知识，与盲信有什么区别？
Ah, but debate is the only method to obtain the truth. Is there any difference between knowledge that has not undergone discussion and blind faith?
眼见两人又要为「真理」的定义争吵起来，你赶忙快步离开了现场。
Seeing that both of the men before you are hurtling towards another argument about the definition of "truth," you rush away from the scene as quickly as possible.
阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我要继续刚才的发问。
Parmenides of Icatus, I wish to continue my questioning from before.
奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?
是我先前的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。

I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally come from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.
覆灭前的阿卡索斯，与现今被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯，是否为同一物？
Are the Icatus that existed before its destruction and the Icatus that has now been devoured by the black tide the same thing?
当然。无论何时，那里都是我的家乡。
Of course. No matter what time we speak of, Icatus is my hometown.

异乡的智者啊，莫要被诡辩术迷惑了你的思考。跟从感官的结果固然轻松，但别忘了，理性才是灵魂的主宰。我将为你讲述我的见解。

Wise one from elsewhere, do not allow your mind to be clouded by sophistry. Though it is easy to follow one's senses, do not forget that reason is the master of the soul. Allow me to explain my understanding.
请听。我们所有的知识，都从存在的事物中来。将军看到阿卡索斯，会思考该如何在城墙上布防；农夫看到阿卡索斯，会盘算这里的土壤适合种什么作物。

Listen. All of our knowledge comes from objects in existence. When a general sees Icatus, they will think of how to post defenses along the city walls. When a farmer sees Icatus, they will assess what kind of crops are suited to the earth at that locale.
学者看到阿卡索斯，会联想起它悠久辉煌的历史。但我们都清楚，他们脑海里的阿卡索斯，绝不是「阿卡索斯」，总是在这方面或那方面有些差别。

When a scholar sees Icatus, they will think of its long and glorious history. However, we understand clearly that the Icatus in their minds cannot be "Icatus." It is always different depending on which aspect they are looking at.
那么，若不是我们已经有了关于「阿卡索斯」的知识，怎么能判断出他们的观点不够全面？若是「阿卡索斯」不存在，我们能从何处得到的关于它的知识？
So, if we did not already have knowledge of "Icatus," how could we realize that their views are not comprehensive enough? If "Icatus" does not exist, from where did we gain our knowledge of it?
不错，漂亮的三段论。知识必须从存在的事物中来，我们拥有关于「阿卡索斯」的知识，因此可以推断出「阿卡索斯」必然存在。
Not bad. Textbook syllogism. Knowledge must come from things that exist. We have knowledge of "Icatus," therefore, we can deduce that "Icatus" must exist.
但这个逻辑并非无懈可击。异乡的智者啊，不知你有没有看到其中的疏漏？
However, this logic is not infallible. Wise one from outlands, I wonder if you have seen the flaw in this?
知识并非必须从存在的事物中来，只有依靠感官获得的知识才是如此。你刚才的推论中，已经蕴含了反面例证。
Knowledge does not have to come from things that exist. Only knowledge that comes from the senses is obtained this way. You already mentioned an example that disproves this in your previous argument.
数学，毫无疑问是公认的学科，可关于数学的任何公理都无法从存在的事物中找到。你永远见不到真正的圆形，却不影响我们谈论「圆」的知识。

Mathematics is undeniably a recognized school, yet there is no self-evident truth of mathematics that can be found within objects that exist. You will never see a true circle, yet that does not stop us from discussing knowledge regarding "circles."
逻辑学同样如此。既然使用三段论来论证你的观点，难道你还要否认逻辑规律并不是知识吗？
The study of logic is much the same. As you have used syllogism to prove your point, surely you will not deny that the rules of logic are not true knowledge?
哈！智者的驳论真是毫不留情面。帕门弥德，现在你可得好好想想咯。
Hah! What a merciless rebuttal, wise one! You will have to think about this carefully, Parmenides.
我们真的拥有关于「阿卡索斯」的知识吗？从未接受过数学训练的孩童也能轻松辨认出圆形，并准确地描述出「黎明机器」更大，车盖更小。
Do we truly have knowledge of "Icatus"? A child that has never been educated in mathematics can easily identify a circle, and accurately explain that the "Dawn Device" is larger than a vehicle cover.
难道数学家的知识，和那些小孩子是相同的吗？要真是这样的话，修辞学也不存在了，人们直接在集市里便能学到所有的论辩知识。

Are you saying that the knowledge of a mathematician is equal to the knowledge of such children? If that is in fact the case, then the study of rhetoric also does not exist. People can learn everything they need with regard to debate at their local market.
哈！智者的话语真是一阵见血。帕门弥德，你怕是要砸掉自己的饭碗咯。
Hah! Your words go right for the throat, wise one! Parmenides, you are in danger of destroying your own profession!
「阿卡索斯」当然不存在。你这个结论本身就是错误的。
Of course "Icatus" does not exist. Your very conclusion is incorrect.
所以是为何呢？跳过全部推导过程，直接否认结果，这样的质疑怕是构不成你的驳论。
And for what reason? I fear that circumventing the process of deduction and directly refuting my conclusion do not, in fact, constitute a rebuttal.
果然，我早猜到这样的推论无法蒙混过关。但异乡的智者，你刚才的驳斥也为我提供了新的论证思路。
I knew that it would not be so simple as just presenting my deduction without justification. However, your rebuttal just now has presented me with a new line of thought, wise one from beyond.
数学是最为简洁优美的学科，数学的公理无论何时都不会改变。即便有哪天，现实中找不到任何圆形的东西，「圆」也仍旧存在。

Mathematics is the most simple and beautiful of studies. Its innate truths will never change. Even if there comes a day when there is no such thing as a circular object in existence, the concept of a "circle" will still exist.
「阿卡索斯」正是如此。看不见、摸不着，只能通过我们的理性来认知，规定着所有能找到的阿卡索斯城。可它确实存在，就在某个地方，并且永远不会消亡。

"Icatus" is much the same. It cannot be seen nor touched. It is only recognized through our rational cognition, which regulates all the cities of Icatus that we find. However, it does in fact exist somewhere, and it will never disappear.
若是否定「阿卡索斯」，就相当于推翻所有数学知识，智者可要考虑清楚了。
If we deny the existence of "Icatus," we overturn all knowledge of mathematics. This is something that you must consider carefully, wise one.
这两者并不能简单等同。数学知识在没有人的世界中仍然能成立，可「阿卡索斯」呢？若是没有最初的那批建城者，这个城邦便会变得从未存在过。

You cannot equate these two concepts so simply. The truths of mathematics would still stand to reason in a world where humans never existed, but what of Icatus? If it weren't for its original builders, the city would never have existed in the first place.
数学是阐述必然性的知识，哪怕悬锋城的战士全部改信墨涅塔，圆依旧是圆，不会变成方形。但「阿卡索斯」的存在，必须依赖现实历史。

Mathematics explains absolute and certain truth. If all the warriors of Castrum Kremnos were to suddenly follow Mnestia, a circle would still be a circle. It would not change shape. However, the existence of "Icatus" absolutely relies on real history.
要是你的先祖当时得到了某种神启，将城邦换个名字，「阿卡索斯」就不再存在，怎么能说这个概念可以和数学知识相类比呢？
If your ancestors had received divine inspiration and changed the name of the city, "Icatus" would not exist. How can you say that this concept is comparable to the truths of mathematics?
即便退一步，认可「阿卡索斯」确实是知识，它也绝非数学那样的必然知识。帕门弥德，这个例证你可用得太不恰当了。

Even if we take a step back and accept that we do in fact have knowledge of "Icatus," how can we say that this knowledge is similar to the absolute knowledge of mathematics? Parmenides, this example is not a fitting comparison.
(Rebuttal: You are creating a fictional entity.)
要是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问「奥赫玛」与「悬锋城」是否也该真实存在？「神悟树庭」与「哀丽秘榭」是否也真实存在？
If "Icatus" truly exists, do "Okhema" and "Castrum Kremnos" also truly exist as well? What about "Grove of Epiphany" and "Aedes Elysiae"?
假使有位好事的吟游诗人，在诗歌中虚构了某座城邦，并借助自己的名声让所有人都相信，这就是远古曾存在过的地点，只不过现在被摧毁了。
What if there were a great bard that created a fictional city in their songs and used their fame to convince everyone that it really existed, and it was just destroyed long ago?
那么这座虚构的城邦，是否也有对应的的「概念」？毕竟，按你的说法，阿卡索斯能否找到并不重要，你思想中的那座城邦才更为真实可信。

Does this fictional city then become the same kind of "concept"? After all, according to your argument, it is not whether one can locate Icatus that matters. To you, it is the concept of the city that you have in your mind that is more credible and true.
但谁能保证我们的想法，不是扎格列斯开的某个玩笑呢？
But who can ensure that our thoughts and beliefs are not simply just a trick played on us by Zagreus?
欧洛尼斯执掌记忆权柄，完全有能力虚构你的过往。帕门弥德，别太认真了。
Oronyx holds power over our memories and is completely capable of fabricating our past. Parmenides, you must not place too much weight on such things.
(Rebuttal: You are making a circular argument.)
我们看到了圆形的东西，才得到「圆」的概念。「阿卡索斯」也是这样，但现在你却说，「阿卡索斯」规定着所有能找到的阿卡索斯城。

I have to see a circular object to obtain the concept of a "circle." "Icatus" is the same. However, you are now saying that "Icatus" itself defines the cities of Icatus that we discover for ourselves.
这难道不是倒果为因，陷入了无限循环的推论模式吗？
Are you not confusing cause and effect and creating an endless loop of inference?
智者啊，你似乎到现在都未明白我的论点。「圆」的概念起初便在我们的思想中了，否则该如何说明我们从未见过完美的圆，却能在脑海中构想出来？

Wise one, it seems that you still have not grasped my point. The concept of a "circle" was in our minds from the very beginning. Otherwise, how do we explain our ability to imagine a perfect circle despite never having seen one?
「圆」的知识先于现实的圆形东西而存在，「阿卡索斯」同样如此。
Knowledge of "circles" existed before real objects that are round. "Icatus" is the same.
就到这里吧，智者连续两次驳倒了我的论证，无话可说，确实是位厉害的辩论家。以后还请多与我们交流你的观点。

Let us leave the argument here for now. You have successfully rebuked my arguments twice in a row now, wise one. I have no choice but to admit that you are a great debater. I hope that you will continue to share your perspectives with us in the future.
哈！看起来，你似乎还未完全被说服？
Hah! I see that you are still not entirely convinced?
论辩不过是言语间的游戏，得不出真理，更无法改变信念。
The art of debate is simply no more than a game of words. There is no truth to be gained, nor can it change my beliefs.
我反对你的立场，并非因为坚信「阿卡索斯」真实存在，而是这些概念对知识的传承至关重要。若是按你的做法，对任何事物都抱着否定态度……

My opposition to your view is not because I staunchly believe in the existence of "Icatus." I disagree because these concepts are crucial in the inheritance of knowledge. If we follow your approach and maintain an attitude of denial towards everything...
还有谁会去探究真理，改变世界？怀疑看似绝对正确，却无法带来任何收益。为了向前走，为了更好的生活，我们需要信念。

Who would still go in search of truth and transform the world? Though suspicion can seem absolutely certain, it cannot bring us any benefits at all. We require faith to keep moving forward and create a better life.
并且…若是「阿卡索斯」不存在了，我…阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，该回哪去呢？
What's more... If "Icatus" were no longer to exist... Then where would I, Parmenides of Icatus, have to return to?
我同意帕门弥德的观点。
哈，我就猜到你准会相信他那套言论。要是在奥赫玛公然质疑阿卡索斯的真实性，是要引起众怒的。但没关系，我愿意为我的论点辩护。

Hah, I knew that you would favor his argument. If Okhema were to publicly doubt the truth of Icatus' existence, it would be certain to incite outrage. I do not mind, however. I am willing to defend my theory.
听好了。「阿卡索斯」无法借由感官认知，我们也缺少观察它的方式，无非是人们通过想象编造出的谎言。没有任何实际证据，你该如何证明它的存在？

Listen. Icatus cannot be known through our senses, and we lack any method of observing it. It is no more than a lie created by the imagination of mankind. If there is no real existing evidence, how can you prove its existence?
无法被感官认知的事物就必定不存在吗？盲人看不见你的样貌，耳聋的人听不见你的话语，难道就能因此推断出你并不存在？

If we cannot detect something through our senses, does that absolutely deny its existence? If a blind person cannot see your face and a deaf person cannot hear your words, can we then infer that you do not actually exist?
若是有座城邦，远在翁法罗斯的另一头，从未与奥赫玛有过任何通信，按你刚才的论点，那座城邦的人们便全都消失不见了。
If there were another city on the other side of Amphoreus that had never had contact with Okhema, then according to your logic, the people of this city would disappear without a trace.
诡辩是好奇心与探索精神的大敌，要是将知识局限在感官接触的范围内，那我们永远都无法走出奥赫玛。
Sophistry is the enemy of both curiosity and the spirit of exploration. If we limited knowledge to what we can sense, we would never have been able to set foot outside Okhema.
(Question: Your means of refutation is flawed.)
抛开事实不谈，你的论证方式本身就有问题。想要证明某个事物存在，只用找到一个证据就够了，即便现在没有，也无法否认未来可能会出现。

Putting the facts aside, your method of proof itself is flawed. If you wish to prove the existence of something, you only need a single piece of evidence. Even if that evidence is not presently available, you cannot deny that it could appear at some point in the future.
但想要证明某个事物不存在，需要从根本上进行否定，无论现在或未来，都没办法找到任何证据。因此，这并非事实层面的不存在，而是概念层面的不可能。

However, if you wish to prove that something does not exist, you have to fundamentally deny the possibility — Indicate that there is no possible way for us to ever find evidence of its existence, whether in the present or the future. Therefore, this does not equate to non-existence on a factual level. It equates to conceptual impossibility.
概念的不可能，无法通过事实来推断。
Conceptual impossibility cannot be deduced through reality.
缺乏证据，只能推导出命题不能被证实，却无法证伪该命题。你该回去再跟着老师学学逻辑课了。
If there is a lack of evidence, the only possible deduction is that the proposition cannot be verified, but it also cannot be falsified. You should head back for more logic classes with your teacher.
「阿卡索斯」当然存在，地图上标注着城邦的位置，吟游诗人传颂着城邦的故事，奥赫玛里无数流民都将向你证明它的真实存在。
Of course "Icatus" exists. The city's location being marked on maps, bards singing of stories from the city, and countless refugees coming to Okhema all prove its existence.
That's right. I am one of those refugees myself.
哈，哲学辩论的结果，岂是由人证的多少来决定的？若真是如此，公民大会就将是这世上最富有智慧的机构——他们永远都是对的。

Hah. So a philosophical conclusion is proven simply by the number of people that believe it? If that were the case, then the citizens' assembly would be the most intelligent organization on earth... They would always be correct.
你的这番言论，属实有些太过欠缺思考了。还是仔细想想吧。
These remarks of yours require further reflection. Why not think about this a little more?
不错。异乡的智者果然精通辩论，你成功抓住了这番话里的薄弱环节，但还没有彻底击倒我。我将继续我的论证。
