Not bad. You excel in the art of debate — as expected, wise one from outlands. You have successfully grasped the weaknesses within my assertions. However, you have not completely refuted my argument. Allow me to continue my point.
若是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问——它到底以什么方式存在？
If "Icatus" truly exists, then allow me to ask you... In what form does it exist?
要是它在时间之内存在，那么它就处于流变当中。就连泰坦都会陷入疯狂，就连尼卡多利都会陨落，时间内的事物，该如何永久存在？
If it exists in time, then it is in a state of flow. Even the Titans will descend into madness and Nikador will fall with time. How can anything in time exist forever?
要是它在空间之内存在，那么它必然有固定形状。它是圆形的、方形的、和现在的阿卡索斯城相同的，还是奇形怪状，根本无法被度量？
If it exists in space, then it must have a physical form. Is it circular? Square? Is it the same shape as Icatus is in currently? Or is it another obscure shape that cannot be measured?
要是它在时空外存在，那么我实在想不出能以什么方式来认识它。观察依赖光线，发声需要时间，文字借助形状，时空外存在的事物，是如何被你知晓的？

If it exists outside of space-time, then I truly cannot think of what method I can use to gain knowledge of it. Observation relies on light, sound requires time, and words make use of shape... How can that which exists outside of space-time ever be known?
异乡的智者，请解答我的疑惑——
Wise one from beyond, please enlighten me...
居住在阿卡索斯的人们，自然对城邦有着认识，任何来到过、见过或是听说过阿卡索斯的人，也会形成对应的认识。
Those who live in Icatus will naturally have a cognition of it. Anyone who has been to, seen, or heard of Icatus, will help form the corresponding cognition.
这些认识经过讲述与传承，便成为了关于「阿卡索斯」的知识。
This cognition is described to and inherited by others to become knowledge of "Icatus."
很浪漫的想法，但你似乎并未理解我的发问。人的认知并不可靠，经过转达与记录的信息更加真假莫辨。虚假的东西再怎么叠加，也得不到真实。

A very romantic notion, but it seems that you have not understood my question. The cognition of mankind is not reliable. It becomes even harder to ascertain the verity or falsity of any information that has been passed on or left in record. No matter how many falsehoods have piled up, it does not make them truths.
假使有位学者生活在阿卡索斯，对这座城邦有着充分的了解，他知道城市的面积、人口、统治者、全部历史，甚至所有街道的模样。
Imagine there was a scholar who lived in Icatus. He has a deep understanding of the city and knows its area, population, rulers, all of its history, and even every street and road.
经过详尽的思考，他得出「阿卡索斯」的知识，并教给了其他人。
Through detailed reflection, he obtains knowledge of "Icatus" and teaches it to others.
很超脱的想法，但你似乎并未理解我的发问。就算那位学者拥有瑟希斯的智慧，他所观察到的也仍旧是那时那刻，从他的视角出发的阿卡索斯。

An unconventional line of thought, but it seems that you have not understood my question. Even if that scholar had the intellect of Cerces, he would only be able to observe the Icatus from his point of view at that moment.
以偏概全是知识的大忌，没有人能将自身的想法置于其余人之上。
Generalization is a taboo when it comes to speaking of knowledge. No one can impose their thoughts on others.
时间之外，当然有物存在。我们度量时间，能从一数到十，正是因为在数到后面的数时，前面的数并未消失。有数在先，才能有数在后。

Of course some objects exist outside of time. When we measure time, we can count from one to ten precisely because the earlier numbers still exist by the time I have reached the later numbers. I must count the earlier numbers to reach the latter.
空间之外，同样有物存在。我们衡量空间，必然是测算物体间的距离，比较物体间的位置。我们只能说某物离某物近，某物在某物的旁边。

There are also objects that exist outside of space. When we measure space, we have to measure the distance between objects and compare their locations in space. We can only say that something is close to something else, or that something is beside something else.
离开在先的数，时间将无法被度量；离开作为参照的某物，空间将无法被衡量。那么，时空究竟是囊括所有事物的盒子，还是依附事物才有意义的东西？

Time cannot be measured without numbers preceding it. Space cannot be measured without an object to serve as a reference. So, does that mean that space-time is a giant box that encapsulates all things, or is it something that only has meaning by attaching itself to something else?
无论作何解释，时空都不能成为否定事物存在的理由。
No matter which explanation you choose, space-time cannot serve as a reason to deny the existence of something.
精彩！智者的论辩果然高明，若是你参加公民大会，必定能成为正义的代言人吧。
Wonderful! Your ability to debate is truly brilliant! If you were to join the citizens' assembly, I am certain that you could become an ambassador of justice!
我暂时想不出新的论点，是你们获胜了。但还请注意，我输了，并非意味着你们的立场便是正确的。说到底，辩论无非是驳倒对方的游戏，至于真理……

I cannot currently think of a new argument, so victory is yours. However, please be aware that my loss does not mean that your view is absolutely correct. In the end, debate is simply no more than a game of refuting the other party's arguments. When it comes to the truth...
谁知道它是否存在呢？我能做的，无非是提醒人们对未经思考的事物保持怀疑。无论那是阿卡索斯，是泰坦神明，亦或是…绝对正确的预言。

Who knows if it exists? All I can do is remind people to remain suspicious of any object that has not been thoroughly reflected upon. Whether that be Icatus, the Titans and gods, or even... A prophecy of absolute truth.
世界永远不可知——唯有怀疑，以及我正在怀疑，才是确定无疑的事。
The world can never be fully known — the only things that are free of doubt are doubt itself, and the fact that I am doubting.
您不必担心，我会尽快前往现场。
Don't worry. I'll be there as soon as I can.
好…好孩子，谢谢你。都怪老婆子我太没用，出了城只能是你的拖累……
Great... Good kid, thank you very much. You can blame everything on me for being so useless. I'll just be a burden once we leave the city...
请别这么说，德墨忒尔婶婶。安心等我回来吧。
Please don't say that, Aunty Demetria. You just hold on, and I'll be right back.
…啊，是你呀年轻人。抱歉啊，今天我有些急事，暂时不开张啦……
...Ah, it's you there, youngster. Sorry, but I have something urgent on today, so I'm not opening up for a while...
你是…来自异邦的贵客？我听说过你——能使用欧洛尼斯神力窥探过去之人。
Are you... an esteemed guest from the outlands? I've heard about you... someone who can use the power of Oronyx to observe the past.
我可以雇佣你吗？任务很简单，陪我出城一趟，用你的能力调查一些事情，酬劳好说。
Can I hire you for something? It's an easy job: Accompany me around town and use your powers to investigate a few things. We can haggle about compensation.
哎呀，就算要支付报酬也是我的事情…不过，你愿意听听我们的委托吗？
Come on, I should be the one giving payment... But would you be willing to consider our assignment?
Give me some of the details first.
好…我的女儿波瑟芬妮，半年前跟随女婿哈德斯的探险队一起出城调查，至今未归。
Fine... My daughter Possephone left town about six months ago with her husband — Hadez — and an expedition team, and they have yet to return.
根据探险队其他成员的描述，在他们即将返程时，夫妻俩说要去采集一些样本，就临时脱离了队伍，却并未在约好的时间返回。

Based on reports from other members of the team, just as they were all about to head back, she and Hadez said they wanted to go back for more samples. They split off from the team for just a moment, but didn't make it back to the meeting spot at the agreed time.
队员们怕他们出了什么意外，紧急在附近搜寻起来，却不巧遭遇了黑潮怪物，只能暂时撤离。后来他们又去找了好几次，我也四处打探，但都……

Worried something had happened to them, the other team members frantically searched the area but were unluckily met with monsters of the black tide, which forced them to flee for the time being. They went back many times later, and I've been looking for them everywhere too, but...
然而就在昨天，我做了个梦…梦中我看见他们在争吵，在一个临时搭建的营地里…那或许就是他们当年失踪的地方——这、这想来必定是欧洛尼斯给予我的启示……

And then just yesterday I had this dream... where they were arguing in a makeshift camp they'd rigged together... which might be where they disappeared to back then — i—it had to be a revelation sent to me by Oronyx...
得到这个信息后，德墨忒尔婶婶再次拜托了几个冒险家去寻找，结果…真找到了和梦境里极其相似的地方…没有人的、临时搭建起的营地。

Once she heard about this, Aunty Demetria asked a few more adventurers to go find them, and... they really did find a makeshift camp jury-rigged together just like in the dream... but with nobody in it.
因此我请求赫卡忒帮我去看看情况…无论如何，我都想让自己心里有个交代……
So I asked Hekate to check in on things for me... No matter what, I just need a resolution for myself...
I am duty-bound to do honorable things.
银河球棒侠出马，一个顶俩。
Then step aside for the Galactic Baseballer. I'm as good as two where it counts.
…虽然没太听懂，但年轻人，你这是答应了，对吧？
...I don't really understand what you're saying, but I believe you're in agreement, aren't you, youngster?
谢谢、谢谢…谢谢你们…路上请务必小心，我等你们回来…等你们回来……
Thank you, thank you... Thank you... Please be careful out there. Come back safely... I'll be waiting...
合作愉快。出城前我还需要稍作准备，直接在营地集合吧。
It's a pleasure teaming up with you. I need to prepare a few things before we go, so let's meet up at the camp.
就是这里。我刚刚简单调查了周围，没有危险，也没有新发现。
Right here. I just did a basic check of the perimeter and there's nothing dangerous or any new discoveries out there.
此处位置偏僻，他们留下的东西基本还保持着原样。
We're really remote, and everything that's been left behind here is basically still in its original state.
为了不打扰你的仪式，我没有提前翻找。那么现在开始吧。
I didn't rummage around out of respect for your ceremony. So let's get started on that right now.
你究竟在想什么？！做出这种事情——你难道不知道可能有队员会因此丧命吗？！
What the heck were you thinking, pulling a stunt like that? ...Don't you know that could get someone killed!?
是。我承认这事儿干得不地道，是我对不起他们…但我还不是为了你吗？
Yes. I confess that this wasn't the best idea, and I'm sorry about them... But am I not doing all this for you?
只要再多点资金，我们就有可能在集市拥有更大的店面，过上更好的生活了！
If we just got a little more funding, we could have our own bigger stall at the market and live a better life!
…为了我？别再给你的卑劣找借口了！可笑…在一起这么多年，我竟然到现在才认清你的真面目！
...For me? Stop making excuses for your own despicability! What a joke... All these years together, and I've only just seen your true colors now!
你别再无理取闹了，不就是替换了一些无关紧要的物资吗，我有分寸。
Stop being so unreasonable. It's just replacing some not-so-important supplies. I know when to stop.
再说了，事情都是*拉达曼*主导的，我顶多算个帮手。
And besides, Rhadaman is the one who directed everything. I'm just an assistant at best.
行了，别再揪着这点事不放了——你这种天天待在花园搞研究的，根本不明白现在生活的压力有多大，就不能多体谅我一点吗？

Okay, okay, stop going on about that one thing already — it's people like you who just sit around in the Garden researching all day who have no idea how stressful everyday life has become. Can't you think about me once in a while?
算了，我不想和你吵架，都先各自冷静一下吧。
Forget about it. I don't want to argue with you. Let's both just calm down for a second.
短暂的沉默过后，哈德斯径自离去；波瑟芬妮目送他走远，随即将什么东西藏进了脚下的软垫中。
After a lull of silence, Hadez leaves. Possephone watches as he goes, before stashing something inside a small cushion under her feet.
你拎起软垫，掂了掂，发现这玩意比看起来要更重一些。你努力在不破坏软垫的前提下将它拆开，发现里面是一块<color=#dbc291ff>石板</color>。

You pick up the small cushion and weigh it in your hand to discover that it's heavier than it looks. As you try to open it up without damaging anything, you uncover a <color=#dbc291ff>slate</color> tucked inside.
... No, we can't just sit here on our butts and do nothing...
真是讽刺，我原本就是为了他才进行调查的…却没想到最危险的不是城里，而是他的身边……
How ironic. He was the whole reason I started the investigation... I never thought that the most dangerous place of all wasn't somewhere in the city, but right next to him...
原来神谕里说的「身陷险境」，竟是这个意思……
So this is what the oracle meant by being "in peril"...
即便如此，我依旧不后悔…与其像个傻子似的被蒙骗，不如早些认清他的真面目。
Even so, I still don't regret anything... I just wish I'd seen through his mask a lot earlier instead of allowing myself to get played like a fool.
…振作起来，波瑟芬妮，振作起来…趁他们还没下定决心对你动手……
...Pull yourself together, Possephone. Come on now... before they've decided to do away with you...
只要好好利用那些游荡的泰坦眷属，一定能够找到机会脱身……
So long as I put those wandering Titankin to good use, I'll find a chance to escape...
你沉默地从角落里翻出那个布满泥污的背包，取出了里面属于波瑟芬妮的<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。
Silently, you pull the backpack soaked in mud from out of the corner and fish out Possephone's <color=#dbc291ff>teleslate</color> from within.
…是波瑟芬妮引来的？啧，果然留不得她…咦…奇怪，卷轴怎么没反应……
...So, Possephone attracted them here? Tsk, I really cannot keep her around anymore... Hmm, that's weird, why is the scroll not working...
■■■■■! Rhadaman, you would dare scheme against me...!?
回忆戛然而止，最后停留在你脑海中的，是男人喑哑的嘶吼与绝望的脸。
The memories reach an abrupt end. The last thing that you sense in your mind is the man's hoarse screams and his face of despair.
你俯身，从地上捡起一个破破烂烂的<color=#dbc291ff>卷轴</color>。
You reach down to pick up a tatty old <color=#dbc291ff>scroll</color>.
赫卡忒沉默地阅读起手中的石板，随着时间流逝，她的脸色变得愈发阴沉。
Hekate silently reads the slate in her hand and, as time passes, her face grows ever more somber.
…自去年以来，城中多个探险队的物资相继出现了问题，包括即将过期的应急食物、混着杂草的药物、各种残次品卷轴……

...Ever since last year, we've had problems with many expedition teams' supplies in the city, including emergency rations nearing the expiry date, grass and weeds mixed in with medicinal herbs, and defective scrolls...
我们很早开始就在调查偷换物资的犯人，但始终没有进展。
We started investigating burglaries early on, but never made any progress.
那个拉达曼，和波瑟芬妮一样是生命花园的园丁，平日里的品行端正，没想到……
That Rhadaman was a Gardener in the Garden of Life — just like Possephone. He was always an upstanding kind of guy. I never took him for...
至于哈德斯…啧…我就知道那家伙不是什么好东西！
And as for Hadez... Tsk, I always knew that guy was a crook!
你将方才目睹的情景讲给赫卡忒。只见她唇角抿起，脸色稍显苍白；不经意间，你发现她握着传信石版的手竟微微有些颤抖。
You fill Hekate in on what you just saw. Her lips tighten, and the color drains from her face. You notice her hand holding the teleslate starts quivering.
赫卡忒熟练地将传信石版解锁，翻找半晌，终于发现了一份隐藏文件。
Hekate unlocks the teleslate with an experienced flick and searches around for a while before finally pulling up a hidden document.
文件记录了波瑟芬妮与哈德斯争执的全过程，其中包括波瑟芬妮如何揭露拉达曼的罪行、与哈德斯苍白无力的辩解。
It's a record of the entire dispute between Possephone and Hadez, including how Possephone exposed Rhadaman's crimes and Hadez's weak defense.
好姑娘，波瑟芬妮…真是个勇敢的好姑娘……
Good girl, Possephone... You really are a good, brave girl, aren't you...
我会帮你把这份证据带回去，让所有人都知道……
I'll help you take this evidence back so everyone can know the truth...
你将方才所见转述给赫卡忒，换来对方一阵咬牙切齿的大笑——
You recount to Hekate what you just saw, who replies with a big snarling laugh...
哈、哈哈哈——活该！真是活该！塔兰顿在上…这是他应得的！
Ha... Hahaha... Serves him right! It really does! By Talanton's grace... that's what he deserves!
半晌，赫卡忒稍稍冷静下来，指了指你手中的卷轴。
Hekate later calms down enough to point at the scroll you're holding.
这玩意叫「艾格勒之光」，使用后会有明亮的光团从卷轴中释放，极其瞩目。
This thing is called the "Light of Aquila," and it releases a bright ball of light out of the scroll after you've used it. It's quite bright and noticeable.
由于城外无法使用传信石版，人们通常会使用这种卷轴来传递消息、确认位置。而这张明显是残次品，根本用不了……
Since teleslates can't be used outside the city, people often use these kinds of scrolls to send messages and confirm locations. This one's obviously defective, though, and no use at all...
塔兰顿不会放过任何罪人…他是活该！
Talanton will spare no sinner... He deserves it!
不过…这样看来，拉达曼确实参与其中…恐怕他原本就计划将两个人都除掉吧……
However... Now that I think about it... if Rhadaman was involved... I'm afraid his original plan was to get rid of both the husband and wife...
以上就是全部了？好，我们来稍微梳理一下信息吧。
Is that all there is? Alright, let's go through what we know once more.
首先，波瑟芬妮注意到了探险队里的「劣质物资」问题，一路追查到了拉达曼，并掌握了对方的罪证；但与此同时，拉达曼也得知了此事。

First, Possephone noticed dodgy supplies sent to the expedition team, traced it back to Rhadaman, and secured ironclad evidence of his guilt. However, during this process, Rhadaman came to learn about everything.
察觉到危险，波瑟芬妮跟随哈德斯出城避难，却没想到自己的丈夫也参与其中。
Sensing potential danger, Possephone followed Hadez out of the city to escape and had no idea that her husband was actually caught up in everything.
在外期间，波瑟芬妮得知哈德斯与拉达曼勾结的真相，并因此受到威胁；她偷偷录下证据，想要借助游荡的泰坦眷属吸引他们的注意力并逃脱。但……

While outside the city, Possephone learned the truth about Hadez being in cahoots with Rhadaman, and she was threatened. She secretly recorded some evidence and planned on using wandering Titankin as a distraction to make her escape. However...
总之，营地遭到了袭击，哈德斯想使用「艾格勒之光」求救，却没想到携带的正是无法使用的劣质物资……
Anyway, the camp was attacked and Hadez tried using a "Light of Aquila" to send for help — never realizing that he was in fact using dodgy supplies himself...
以上是我的分析…你还有什么要补充的吗？
That's my analysis of the situation... Anything else to add?
嗯，那回去吧。德墨忒尔婶婶还在等我们。
Okay, let's head back then. Aunty Demetria is still waiting for us.
啊…回来了、你们回来啦…一路辛苦了，怎么样，有找到什么吗？
Ah... You're back, you're back... You've been through so much. How was it? Did you find anything?
...Actually, we did find a few clues out there.
赫卡忒与你对视一眼，将你们在营地的发现一五一十地讲给德墨忒尔。
Hekate shoots you a glance and recounts to Demetria everything you discovered at the camp.
…是、是这样啊…那…那你们说…我的波瑟芬妮……
...I—I see... So then... You mean, my darling Possephone...
老人的声音中带着微不可察的哀痛与恳求。赫卡忒嘴角微微动了动，最终还是向你投来求助的目光——
Traces of almost imperceptible sorrow and pleading color the old woman's words. The corners of Hekate's mouth twitch ever so slightly, but she finally looks up at you for help...
我觉得吧，波瑟芬妮大概率遭了哈德斯的毒手。
I think there is a very strong chance that Possephone was killed by Hadez.
哈德斯见事情败露，所以干脆一不做二不休……
Hadez realized the game was up, so he decided to just go whole hog...
没错，我就是这么认为的。
That's right. That's what I think.
您放心，德墨忒尔婶婶，无论如何我都会继续寻找，把波瑟芬妮给您带回来的。
Don't worry, Aunty Demetria — I'll keep searching for her no matter what. I'll bring your Possephone back for you.
…好…好孩子…波瑟芬妮…谢谢…我的波瑟芬妮……
...Thank you... Good child... Possephone... My Possephone...
老人眼神放空，面色一派恍惚颓然，开始喃喃自语起来。
Her eyes glaze over, and her face is in a daze as she starts mumbling to herself.
让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.
辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.
依我之见，波瑟芬妮应该并没有死在哈德斯手上。
The way I see it, Possephone probably wasn't killed by Hadez.
当然，这并不代表她还活着——只是考虑到老人现在的状态，你并未将这半句说出口。
Of course, this doesn't necessarily mean that she's still alive... But out of consideration for the old lady's condition, you spare her the second half of that thought.
老人的表情中浮现出一丝渺茫的希望，就像暴雨中海面上的一块浮木；而赫卡忒感激的目光更坚定了你让那半句话烂在肚子里的决心。

A glimmer of hope sparks up the old lady's complexion, like a piece of driftwood floating in stormy waters. Hekate's appreciative gaze further reinforces your determination in holding the second half of that thought to yourself.
对…你们也说了，她打算逃出来的…波瑟芬妮这孩子自小就聪明……
Yes... You also said she was planning on making an escape... Possephone has always been a smart one, ever since she was just a little girl...
没错，我就是这么认为的。
That's right. That's what I think.
没错！我相信以她的能力，从那混蛋手中脱身一定不成问题。
Yes! I believe that with her capacities, she'll have no problem escaping from the clutches of that terrible man.
波瑟芬妮一定是因为…某些特殊的原因才至今未归……
Possephone just has her reasons... whatever they are... for why she hasn't made it back yet...
啊——对、对！一定是这样！一定是这样…我的波瑟芬妮还活着……
Ah... y—yeah! That's it! That's definitely it... My Possephone is still alive...
您放心，德墨忒尔婶婶，无论如何我都会继续寻找，把波瑟芬妮给您带回来的。
Don't worry, Aunty Demetria — I'll keep searching for her no matter what. I'll bring your Possephone back for you.
…好…好孩子…波瑟芬妮…谢谢…我的波瑟芬妮……
...Thank you... Good child... Possephone... My Possephone...
老人眼神放空，某种奇异的激动与恍惚之情于她面色中浮现。
Her eyes glaze over and a bizarre, excited, and mesmerized look falls across her face.
让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.
辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.
我觉得无论是波瑟芬妮，还是哈德斯，都被拉达曼算计了。
I think Rhadaman plotted against both Possephone and Hadez.
你们看这个无法使用的卷轴…他明显是有备而来。
Look at this useless scroll... He obviously came prepared.
没错，我就是这么认为的。
That's right. That's what I think.
不仅如此，从去年开始的「劣质物资」事件，恐怕都和他脱不开关系。
That's not all. The cases of the "dodgy supplies" that have been going on since last year are probably connected to him.
拉达曼？我好像听说过他……
Rhadaman? I think I've heard of him before...
这个人是「生命花园」的研究员，似乎还颇有些威望。
This guy's a researcher at the Garden of Life and seems to have made a bit of a name for himself.
…我知道了，谢谢你们，这件事就交给我处理吧。
...I see. Thank you, and please leave this matter with me.
…波瑟芬妮…别怕…我的波瑟芬妮……
老人眼神放空，面色一派恍惚颓然，不住喃喃自语起来。
Her eyes glaze over and her face is in a daze as she mumbles to herself over and over.
让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.
辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.
哎——你听说了吗，拉达曼被卫兵带走了。
Hey... Did you hear about Rhadaman getting arrested by the guards?
拉达曼？他不是出了名的大好人吗，这什么情况？
Rhadaman? Isn't he a bit of a celebrity do-gooder? What's going on?
你知道探险队物资那事儿吧，之前闹得沸沸扬扬的，听说就是他搞的鬼。
Remember all that fuss which went down about the expedition team? Well, I heard he was behind it all.
我骗你干嘛，这事儿可是那位德墨忒尔亲自检举的！
Why would I lie? That's what Demetria herself reported!
嘶…她老人家这么大年纪了，还出面揭发，那估计没跑了。不过真没看出来啊……
Sss... If she still came forward to expose the truth despite her advanced age, I'm guessing it must be true. But I really can't see him as a bad guy...
或许这就叫知人知面不知心吧……
Maybe that's what people mean when they say "You think you know someone"...
就真是「善恶好轮回，塔兰顿饶过谁」！
"The cycle of good and evil goes on eternally, and Talanton will spare no comers!"
天台不愧为约会圣地，你在无意间撞见了一对正在幽会的爱侣。
The rooftop is a must-go for lovebirds, and you accidentally walk straight into a couple's secret tryst.
由于你那过于灵敏的听力，当你意识到应该立即撤离时，一切已经来不及了……
You're particularly sharp of hearing, so by the time you realize you should've escaped, it's already far too late...
宝贝，咱们这样是不是太大胆了？你父母就在下面的市场，只要一点动静，他们就会抬头，然后顺势发现我们……
My dear, isn't this too bold of us? Your parents are right down in the market — just a bit of noise, and they'll look up and spot us...
呵呵，那就叫他们看吧，最好是睁大眼睛看好了，他们引以为傲的宝贝女儿，与他们最不耻的悬锋小子相爱的样子，准叫他们气得当场发疯，哈哈哈！

Teehee, then let them watch as much as they want. The sight of their pride and joy, their darling daughter, falling in love with the Kremnos kid they hate the most... That ought to drive them nuts, haha!
我就喜欢这样的你，你坚持的事，谁也阻止不了。不过城邦间有自己的恩怨，你父母不待见我，我不怪他们。
I just love this side of you — once you've made up your mind, no one can stop you. But there are grudges between the city-states. Your parents dislike me, but I don't blame them.
哼，他俩都没上过战场，满脑子却只有战争留下的仇恨，对你们悬锋族人的恨。
Hmph, neither of them has ever fought in battle, but their minds both bear the scars of war — and hatred towards you and your Kremnoan brethren.
最后的城邦，「奥赫玛」…末日之下，这里应该是庇护所有人的家园，也包括你们。
The last city, Okhema... It ought to be a sanctuary for all in the end times, including for people like you.
对了，上次我说的，一起离开奥赫玛的事，你考虑好了吗？
That's right — have you given any thought to what I mentioned last time... about leaving Okhema?
宁芙…我们讨论过很多次了，这样太危险。等我未来有更大的成就，我们就可以……
Nympha... We've been over this a lot already. It's too dangerous. Once I earn a few more achievements in the future, then we can...
我的傻瓜，厄琉斯，你还不明白吗？！他们的仇恨只与你那悬锋城的血脉有关。
Silly billy, Aelius... Don't you get it!? Their hate is only for your Castrum Kremnos bloodline.
不失去我一次，他们是不会妥协的——
They won't compromise until they lose me at least once...
What are you just standing there for? Go after her!
哎…若真是这般简单就好了……
Oh... I wish it were that simple...
你这个玩弄感情的渣男！
You're a scumbag for playing around with her feelings!
哈？你不明白我们的情况，若真是感情本身的问题就好了……
Huh? You don't know a thing about us. If only the problem were with our relationship...
We're here now, so I'll just listen...
哎，谢谢你愿意与我分担这愁苦……
Hey, thank you for sharing all this with me...
其实，我的出身与宁芙的家庭相互对立…我是悬锋将领的后代，她则来自奥赫玛历史最为悠久的几个权贵家族。
Y'know, I come from a completely different class to Nympha... I'm a descendant of a Kremnos general, and she comes from one of the most powerful and long-lasting noble families in Okhema history.
黄金战争期间，我们两家各自代表着自己城邦的立场，在战场上相互厮杀，双方家族都有不少成员葬身于对方的刀剑下。

During the Chrysos War, our families fought against each other on the battlefield as each represented the banner of their own city. Plenty of members from both families were slain by the other city in the fighting.
即使黄金战争已结束这么多年，即使悬锋孤军已与奥赫玛握手言和，我的家族已随先王政权的崩塌而灭亡…可，这份仇恨从未消失……

And even though the Chrysos War has long finished, even though the Kremnoan Detachment has made peace with Okhema, and even though my family was wiped out with the fall of the old king's rule — none of this animosity has disappeared...
我随万敌殿下抵达奥赫玛的第一夜，就有刺客前来企图夺走我的性命，那时我还只是个懵懂的孩童。后来，万敌殿下向元老院提出抗议，他们才不情愿地收了手。

The first night I arrived in Okhema alongside Lord Mydei, an assassin made an attempt on my life. I was just a child back then... Lord Mydei lodged a complaint with the Council of Elders, and they reluctantly put a stop to things.
背负家族恩怨的我们，明明是这世上最不该相爱的人，却被牵起了金丝线。这一定是墨涅塔的奇迹！赞美墨涅塔！

Burdened by these familial tragedies, we are clearly the most star-crossed of lovers — and yet we are tied together by the golden thread. This must be Mnestia's marvelous miracle! Praise be to Mnestia!
So what were you arguing about today, then?
怕什么，光明正大地告诉他们！
What are you so afraid of? Be up front and open with them!
哎，今天我们正是因此而争吵…
*sigh* That's precisely what we were arguing about today...
非要在我面前秀恩爱是吧?
You want to show off your love, right?
哎，接下来要讲烦心事了…
Huh, this next part is really annoying...
最近，我们私会有些频繁，宁芙的父母似乎察觉到了什么，开始派人暗中跟踪她，或是亲自陪同她一起。
We've been sneaking off a lot lately, but Nympha's parents seem to be onto us and have started sending spies to secretly tail her — or assigning a personal escort to her.
宁芙提出了一个我并不赞成计划：公开我们的恋情，再逃到奥赫玛城外，用舆论向他的父母施压，直到我们的婚事得到同意再返回……

Nympha proposed a plan that I don't agree with: Publicize our relationship, then flee outside Okhema and use public opinion to pressure her parents, only returning once they've agreed to our marriage...
有其巧妙之处，只有我们被逼上如此绝路，才能显得她父母不义。不过城外的安全问题，是我最大的顾虑……
There is a certain cleverness to it. Only by forcing us into a desperate situation can her parents seem in the wrong. However, I'm most worried about our personal safety outside the city...
But it's dangerous outside the city...
哎，她说被逼上如此绝路，才能显得父母不义。但，安全问题是我最大的顾虑……
*sigh* She said that only by forcing us into a desperate situation could her parents be painted as the bad guys. However, my greatest concern is our personal safety...
What if her parents don't even care...
这个计划倒是有其巧妙之处，只有我们被逼上如此绝路，才能显得她父母不义。不过城外的安全问题，是我最大的顾虑……
There is a certain cleverness to this plan. Only by forcing us into a desperate situation can her parents seem in the wrong. However, I'm most worried about our personal safety outside the city...
作为宁芙的伴侣，我的职责除了爱她，更重要的是保护她。城外到处都是游荡的怪物，以我一人之力，我很担心无法护她周全。
As Nympha's partner, my duty is to protect her rather than merely just love her. All those wandering monsters surround the city... I'm worried that I won't be able to protect her by myself.
万一出了事，我没办法向我自己交代……
If anything should happen to her, I'd never be able to forgive myself...
我会等更好的机会。我相信，如果我们是命定中的爱人，事情一定会迎来转机，墨涅塔会守护我们的！
I'll bide my time until a better chance comes along. I believe that if we are indeed destined to be lovers, then things will definitely take a turn for the better. Mnestia will surely watch over us!
厄琉斯！你果然在这儿，大事不妙了。
Aelius! I knew you'd be here. Something terrible has happened.
阿芙罗小姐，发生什么了？
刚刚在市集…宁芙小姐被她父母派来的卫兵强行绑走了。
Just now, in the market... Miss Nympha's parents sent goons to kidnap her and carry her off.
你们的恋情，她的父母已经知道了！
Her parents already know about your affair!
事到如今，你打算怎么办？
It's come to this. What's your plan from here?
It can no longer be kept a secret.
没想到，他们竟然真会对自己的女儿采用强硬手段…阿芙罗小姐，你知道宁芙可能被带到哪儿了吗？
I never expected them to actually take such tough measures against their own daughter... Miss Aphrea, do you have any idea where they may have taken Nympha?
他们离去的时候并没有提到，我也无从猜起。
They didn't say anything when they left, so I wouldn't know where to begin.
宁芙的父母在奥赫玛的势力范围很广…这下麻烦了。
Nympha's parents have a very wide network of influence in Okhema... This is big trouble.
厄琉斯，我刚听其他店主讨论，宁芙家的卫兵，最近在云石市集的附近频繁出现。
Aelius, I just heard some shopkeepers talking about Nympha's family guards. They've often been sighted near Marmoreal Market.
嗯，我去问问各位朋友吧，或许能拼凑出新的线索。谢谢你了，阿芙罗小姐。
Hmm, I'll go check in with my friends, then, and maybe I'll be able to piece together a few clues. Thank you so much, Miss Aphrea.
What do you need, warrior of the outlands?
Nympha. Got any clues about her?
宁芙，我很抱歉。动静很大，她很难过。
Nympha, I'm so sorry. There was a lot, going on, and she was really upset.
奇怪的事…锁链…宁芙的管家，上周订了锁链。
There was something weird... Chains... Nympha's butler, last week, ordered some chains.
Perhaps they were for tying her up?
You Okhemans really know how to play hardball...
我也有种不好的预感…哈托努斯，他们有告诉你这些东西要送去哪儿吗？
I've got a bad feeling about this, too... Chartonus, did they tell you where this stuff was going?
上门提货，已经拿走了。很古怪，过去总送到家里。
They came by, picked it up, already gone. Really weird. In the past, always delivered things, to their house.
我知道了…如果她家里人再找你订了些什么，请告诉我，我的朋友。
I see... If her family puts in any more orders with you, please let me know, my friend.
您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?
Nympha. Got any clues about her?
真令人难过，当时的宁芙一点也不情愿，她是被八个卫兵抬走的。很抱歉，我们没成功拦下他们……
It's so disturbing. Nympha did not want to go at all, but was carried off by eight of their guards. I'm so sorry that we couldn't stop them...
让我想想…前几天，宁芙家的后厨来我这儿订了大量食材，其中有不少名贵的珍品。
Let me see... Several days back, the kitchen staff for Nympha's family placed a massive food order with me, including several expensive delicacies.
这种订购的阵仗，我还只在婚宴上见过…宁芙要结婚了？！
It's the kind of order that you normally only see at wedding banquets... So is Nympha getting married!?
一旁的厄琉斯都快站不住了，险些跪在地上，还好你扶住了他。
Standing off to one side, Aelius can barely stay on his feet. He nearly drops to his knees — but luckily you're there to catch him.
原来宁芙…一直是在骗我吗…我只是来自异邦的玩物吗……
So Nympha... has been lying to me all along...? I'm just some boy toy from the outlands to her...
振作点！我宁可相信「黎明机器」再也不会发光，也不相信宁芙不爱你！
Pull yourself together! There's more chance of the Dawn Device never lighting up again than Nympha not loving you!
预定的送货时间…就是明天。两位，无论那是场什么宴会，你们一定要赶在这之前找到宁芙。
The delivery's scheduled for... tomorrow. No matter what kind of banquet it is, you two must find Nympha before it begins.
手绘陶罐，奇珍古玩，价格不贵，随便看随便瞧。
Hand-painted pots and ancient artifacts, all at reasonable prices. Feel free to take a look around.
Nympha. Got any clues about her?
腐朽的老贵族，连儿女的幸福也要没收。铭记历史令人明智，也令悲剧轮回。
Those depraved old aristocrats are stealing even their children's happiness. Remembering history makes us wise, but also repeats the cycle of tragedy.
前两天，我这儿有笔十分可疑的交易——一个侍卫模样的男人，竟要出手一颗价值连城的悬锋鹰血红项链。
A few days back, I had a really suspicious trade — this guy who looked like a retainer wanting to pawn a priceless pendant made of Kremnos eagleblood.
鹰血红极为罕见，少有的存世珍品也多作为悬锋族人的传家宝，不会出现在普通奥赫玛守卫手上。
Eagleblood is very rare, and the rare extant treasures are mostly safeguarded by Kremnoans, so there's no way it'd be in the hands of an ordinary Okheman guard.
我便问了他一嘴，他只说是城中的贵族赏给他的。我拿给你看看……
When I hit him up about it, he just said some aristocrat in the city gifted it to him. Here, let me show you...
…这？！这条是我送给宁芙的，我母亲的鹰血红项链。我害怕暴露，从不让宁芙戴在身上，她肯定好好藏在家里了。
...This!? That's my mother's eagleblood pendant that I gave to Nympha. I was worried about us getting busted, so I never let Nympha wear it. She must have hidden it very well somewhere at home.
今天的每条线索，都指向一件事——宁芙正在被家人逼迫。
Every clue so far today points to one outcome and one alone: Nympha's family put her under duress.
对这样奇怪的顾客，我多留了个心眼。我的朋友说，此人最近常在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫</color>出没。
I kept a close eye on this bizarre customer. My friend said this guy has been hanging around <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Palace</color> a lot lately.
快去吧，愿这块鹰血红带你见到你所爱之人。
Go, now! I hope this eagleblood can help lead you to the one you love.
这里太大了，很难找到她的去向。还是先调查下过去的记忆，寻找线索吧
It's too big here and impossible to find where she's gone. Let's go over some past memories and try to pull out some more clues.
你们要带我去哪儿？你真打算这样对你的女儿？
Where are you taking me? Are you really going to do this... to your own daughter?
你拒绝了无数出身高贵的奥赫玛青年，没想到竟是为了个悬锋族人？还非得是这个！要不是卫兵将那条项链拿给我看，我都不敢相信他所言为真。

You rejected all those high-born young Okheman boys, but I never thought you were doing that for a Kremnoan! And it had to be this one! I'd never have believed it was true if the guard hadn't shown me the necklace.
我的项链？你们是怎么找到的？快把它还给我！
My necklace? How did you find that? Give it back to me, now!
蛮横的举动，无礼的话语…你变成如今这样，是我们做父母的失职。
Such rude behavior and disrespectful language... Your current behavior is because of our failure as parents.
哼，确实挺失败的。要不是你们的计划败露，我还没法爱上这个险些被谋害的可怜人呢！
Hmph, you sure failed, majorly. And if your plan hadn't been exposed, I'd never have fallen in love with that poor man who was nearly killed!
你…！你若不珍惜自由，那我来替你安排。婚宴开始前，好好反省反省！
Why, you...! If you don't cherish your own freedom, then allow me to make some arrangements. And think about what you've done before the wedding begins, would you!
至于那小子，自然有他好看。
As for that little punk, he's going to suffer.
母亲，听好了。我向「公正之秤」，塔兰顿起誓，预言你们的未来——
Mother, listen to me. I swear by Talanton, the Scale of Justice, and I will predict your future...
你们的血脉将与悬锋城相融，你们的后代将流着纷争的血——
Your bloodline will merge with that of Castrum Kremnos, and your progeny will carry the blood of Strife...
你怎么敢说出这种恶毒的话语？！带她去房间，栓好了！
How dare you say such malicious slander!? Take her to the cell and tie her up!
蛮不讲理的家庭！原来…宁芙一直在承受这样的高压，可她从未和我提起过丝毫。
How unreasonable her family is! So... Nympha has been putting up with such huge pressure at home, but never once let on to me about it.
She never wanted to put any pressure on you.
In-laws like that are super scary...
所以她要让父母失去她一次…
So that's why she wants to make her parents lose her at least once...
我必须…必须为此做些什么。
I have to... I've gotta do something about this.
厄琉斯奋力挥出强而有力的一拳，顷刻锤倒了眼前的守卫…
Aelius throws all his might into a massive punch, instantly knocking down the guard...
Hmph, steal MY necklace again, why don't you?
这就是悬锋人的实力吗…
Is that the strength of a Kremnoan...?
你单挑泰坦眷属也没问题的。
You could solo a Titankin. no problem.
房间内立刻有了动静：带着锁链的脚步声急切奔向门口，很快，传来了熟悉的女声……
There's movement inside the room instantly: Footsteps dragging chains in a hurry towards the door, followed very shortly by a familiar female voice...
我的宁芙，是我来了！我还带了一位帮助我的朋友…真不好意思，我好像还不知道你的名字？
My Nympha, it is I! And I've brought a friend to help me out... I'm so sorry. I don't think I actually know your name.
我开拓者做好事从不留名！
We Trailblazers always perform good deeds anonymously!
也谢谢你，这位勇士{F#小姐}{M#先生}，谢谢你保护我的厄琉斯。
Thank you so much too, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Warrior, for protecting my Aelius.
宁芙，你听我说，我都想好了——
Nympha, listen to me: I've thought this through very carefully...
我们私奔吧！我带你离开奥赫玛，现在、立刻、马上就动身！
Let's elope! Let me take you away from Okhema, right here, right now... Let's just go!
厄琉斯…你怎么突然一下子？
Aelius... What makes you say that all of a sudden?
呼——这是我第一次感觉到，若是继续向现状妥协，我可能真的会失去你。
Well... This is the first time I've ever felt that if things stay as they are, I might really end up losing you.
He thought you were marrying someone else.
他以为你把他的项链卖了。
He thought you pawned his necklace.
他以为你把他当做玩物。
He thought you treated him like a boy toy.
我好像总是理所当然地认为你会属于我，我们的爱是墨涅塔的旨意，真爱之人自会受到泰坦的眷顾。
I kind of always took it for granted that you are mine, that our love was the will of Mnestia, that those truly in love would be afforded favor by the Titans.
时至今日，我才恍然大悟——其实牵起这条金丝的，一直都是你——你的勇敢、你的善良、你的执着……要守护这份感情，我也需要与你一同抗争。

But it's only today that I finally realized... that the one pulling on this golden thread has always been you: Your courage, your kindness, your perseverance... To protect our relationship, I also need to fight alongside you.
厄琉斯，你还记得我们的相遇吗？
Aelius, do you still remember how we first met?
我怎么会忘呢？那天，你来了我的铁匠铺，我们一见如故，一直聊到勤劳的哈托努斯都开始打哈欠。然后，我们每天都期盼见到彼此……

How could I ever forget? That day, you came to my blacksmith shop, and we hit it off like two old friends, talking up a storm until poor Chartonus was yawning. After that, we'd look forward to seeing each other every day...
我从来都没与你坦白过。其实，我从开始就知道父母派人谋害你的事。所以我找到了你，我想为他们的恶行向你道歉……

There's something I've never been honest with you about. I actually knew all along that my parents sent someone to try to kill you. So I wanted to reach out to you and offer up an apology for their evil...
只是没想到，一见面我就无可救药地爱上了你。然后你带我结识了很多异乡的朋友，看到了更广阔的世界……
But I never thought that I'd fall head over heels in love with you as soon as we met. And when you introduced me to so many outlander friends, you opened up my eyes to the bigger world outside...
仇恨就像雪球，滚过千百年，到最后已不在乎最早犯错的究竟是谁。
Hatred is like a snowball: Once it's been rolling for centuries, it doesn't matter who made the first mistake.
上一代的仇恨，会在我们这里终结。
Let the hatred of previous generations stop with us.
So then... we have to go.
对，离开，置身险境，逼迫那些老古板低头认输。我们会凯旋，然后将这场爱情的胜利献予泰坦，但不是向墨涅塔，而是向最公正的塔兰顿。

Yes, leave — to put ourselves in danger and force those stuffy old fogeys to bow their heads in defeat. We will return triumphant, and then dedicate the victory of our love to the Titan — to fair and just Talanton, instead of Mnestia.
我，会随你到天涯海角，我的宁芙……
I will follow you to the ends of the earth, my darling Nympha...
好心的勇士，请留步，我还有最后一件事想拜托你。可以请你先去市集旁的<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>等我们吗？
Kind warrior, please stay a while. I have one final task to ask of you. Could you please go to the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color> beside the market and wait for us there?
我们将从那里乘坐大地兽离开，但离开前，有件重要之物要托付给你……
We'll depart from there by dromas — but before we go, there's something very important I'd like to leave with you...
又麻烦你了，我们一会儿见。
So sorry to bother you once again. We'll see you later.
我们想把这组书信交给你，刚才匆忙整理好的。
We'd like to leave this set of letters with you. We've just been frantically pulling this together.
为了避免像我父母这样的贵族在暗处干预，我们要让奥赫玛听见我们的故事。这些往来的书信就是最好的证明，它们会为我们诉说公正与真情。

We must let Okhema hear our story to avoid pesky interference from aristocrats like my parents. These letters form our best shot at providing evidence, and they'll recount justice and love in our stead.
我想把它们交给见证了一切的你来保管。当合适的时机来临，请替我们公开这些信件。
I want to give them to you, as someone who witnessed everything. When the time is right, please, can you publicize these letters?
或者…万一我们遭遇不测，至少还能成为剧作家们创作时的灵感吧。
Or else... if anything should ever happen to us, at least let us serve as inspiration for playwrights out there.
呼——终于可以光明正大地戴上你送我的鹰血红项链啦！不用再躲躲藏藏的感觉真好。
Whew... I can finally wear the eagleblood necklace that you gave me out in public! It feels so good not having to hide things anymore.
瞧把你开心的。时间不早了，趁被发现前，我们要赶紧上路了。
Just look how happy you are... It's getting late. We have to hit the road now before we're discovered.
那我们先告辞啦，希望未来可以再相见！
We'd better say goodbye, now. Hope to see you again sometime in the future!
我会保护好她的。毕竟，现在才是一切幸福的开始……
I will keep her safe. After all, now is just the beginning of our happiness together...
先去问问铁匠铺的哈托努斯吧，兴许宁芙向他提起过什么。
Go and ask Chartonus at the blacksmith shop. Maybe Nympha mentioned something to him before.
再去问问餐厅老板克瑞斯，市集上的事他都很清楚。
Then, try asking the restaurant owner Kyros. He knows all about what goes on in the market.
再去问问古玩店的西塔罗斯吧，看看能否从交易中获取些线索。
Lastly, try asking Theodoros in the ancient artifacts store. Maybe there will be a clue or two in their recent transactions.
没想到去了云石天宫。宁芙，等着我。
Who would have thought she'd be at Marmoreal Palace. Nympha, wait for me.
哼，你以为能办到吗？这云石天宫四下都是人，总有人会为我通风报信的。
Hmph, you think that's possible? There are people all over Marmoreal Palace. Someone will help me pass messages.
天真的孩子。我说的是<color=#dbc291ff>市集</color>那间房，最危险的地方就是最安全的。
Naïve child. I am talking about that room in the <color=#dbc291ff>market</color>. The most dangerous place is also the safest.
走，我们回市集，掘地三尺我要找到她。
Come, let's go back to the market. I will tear this place apart to find her.
忽然，一阵急促的脚步声接近，将你从这段齁甜的对话中拯救了出来。
Suddenly, a wave of hurried footsteps comes rushing towards you, rescuing you from this sickly sweet conversation.
多好的天气啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}，请问你打算听几个重磅新闻？
What a great day, {F#miss}{M#mister}. How many breaking news alerts do you plan on listening to?
你这都是哪听来的野史？
Where did you hear about these wild rumors?
野史？只要还有一个人没听过，那就是新闻！
Wild rumors? So long as there's one person who hasn't heard of something, it's all news!
都用传信石版了，还卖报纸？
We all use teleslates nowadays. What are you talking about newspapers for?
谁说这是报纸了？纸多费钱啊——我这新闻，每个字都是靠嘴说出来的~
Who said I'm talking about a newspaper? Paper's too expensive — every line of this news is personally delivered by my mouth~
我也有不少新闻，开价吧。
I've got plenty of news myself, too. Name your price.
喂喂，别搞错——我只售卖新闻，不回收新闻。
Hey, don't get me wrong now — I only sell news. I'm not into recycling it.
现在正值开业大减价，一条新闻只要5利衡币，听吗听吗？
We're having a sale to mark the grand opening: One line of news for just 5 Balance Coins. Want to hear one?
女孩楚楚可怜地看着你，一副「卖不掉故事今天就要饿肚子」的模样。
The girl looks at you with puppy dog eyes that seem to say "I'll starve if I don't sell any news stories today."
难道我没有拒绝的选项吗？
Don't tell me there's no option to refuse?
没错，真的有人能拒绝一个楚楚可怜的小姑娘吗？何况你是如此富有，十个故事也负担得起。
That's right, could anyone ever hope to refuse that girl with those puppy dog eyes? Besides, you're so rich now that you can afford the price of ten news items.
嘿嘿，多谢惠顾，那我要开始讲了……
Tee-hee, thank you so much. Well then, I'll begin...
女孩讲了许多离谱的故事，比如尼卡多利曾经爱上塔兰顿、和吉奥里亚互为情敌…也不知道是从哪听来的。
The girl tells a series of outrageous stories, such as Nikador falling in love with Talanton and fighting Georios in a love triangle... Who knows where she got all those from.
这样的故事持续了至少十分钟。或许是奥赫玛的阳光让你没有睡好，你渐渐闭上了眼……
The story lasts at least ten minutes. Perhaps the light in Okhema has been impacting your sleep, but you gradually close your eyelids...
等醒来时，你感觉身体似乎变轻了许多，难道跟孩子打交道真的可以释放压力？
You wake up feeling as though your body is lighter. Can spending time with children really help you take a load off?
过了一会，你才意识到原因……
It takes a while before you fully understand why...
你的钱袋——为了和本地人打成一片，你特意兑换了一些实体的利衡币——已经不翼而飞了。
Your money pouch — you exchanged some physical Balance Coins to try to fit in with the locals — has vanished.
哎呀，年轻人。要来看看今天新采的水果吗？
Hey there, youngster. Wanna see today's fresh fruit?
有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
Did you see a child running this way?
啊，那孩子…嗯，我确实有看到。可惜我眼花，没太看清她的去向。
Ah, that kid... Mmm, I sure did. Unfortunately, my eyesight is no longer the best, so I couldn't really make out which direction she was going in.
听说她是跟着一群外邦人来到奥赫玛的，父母都在途中走散了…「走散」是委婉的说法。
I heard she came to Okhema with a bunch of outlanders, and her parents got "separated" from her along the way... And I'm speaking a euphemism, you understand.
如果要找她的话，不妨把目光抬高一些。我只能说这么多了。
If you want to find her, you might as well set your sights higher. That's all I can say.
你好呀，这位客人——欢迎光临金织裁缝铺，请问有什么需要的吗？
Hey, there! Welcome to Goldweaver tailor! What can I help you with today?
有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
Did you see a child running this way?
一个孩子？是的，我看见她刚才气喘吁吁地爬楼梯来着。虽然不知道叫什么名字，但我对她还算眼熟。
A child? Yes, I saw her puffing hard as she sprinted upstairs. I don't know her name, but I've seen her around a lot.
那孩子每天都忙忙碌碌的，想必是经历过许多事才变得如此持家。如果能帮到她就好了……
That kid's always beavering away at something. She must've been through a lot if she's running household affairs so well. I wish there was a way I could help her...
您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?
有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
Did you see a child running this way?
一个孩子…哦，你是说希瑞雅！那丫头，总是偷吃客人剩下的饭，我印象可深了。
A child... Oh, you must mean Serena! That girl is always stealing leftovers off the table. She makes quite an impression.
我原本还打算请她吃点好的来着，结果她却说躺着吃东西容易积食……
I was going to treat her to something delicious, but she told me she'd get indigestion if she ate while lying down...
咳，扯远了。对，没错，我看见她往城门的方向跑来着，鬼鬼祟祟的，不知道要干什么。
Ahem, but that's getting off track now. Yes, I saw her running towards the city gate and being sneaky about it. I'm not sure what she was up to.
嘿，朋友。来找翻飞自如的好宝贝？你可是来对地方了。
G'day, friend. Looking for some good stuff that floats in a whimsy? You've come to the right place.
有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
Did you see a child running this way?
一个孩子？也许看到了，也许没有，我的记性总是不好…或许几枚利衡币能让我想起来？
A child? Maybe, maybe not. My memory ain't what it used to be... But maybe a few Balance Coins will get it working again?
哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出吉奥里亚的神杵来对付我呢。
Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to bash me around with Georios' scepter.
哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出尼卡多利的兵器来对付我呢。
Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to rough me up with Nikador's weapon.
哎哎哎，冷静！我只是开个玩笑，何必拿出法吉娜的冠冕来对付我呢。
Hey hey hey, chill out! I was just kidding around, no need to use Phagousa's crown against me.
咳咳…我是看见了那孩子，而且我很清楚她一直以来追求的东西。
Ahem... I saw that kid, and I also know exactly what she's looking for all this time.
她的藏身处就在右边高台上，去找吧，她把所有财宝都放在那里了。
She's hiding up high on a platform to the right. Go take a look. That's where she stashes all her precious stuff.
竹筐里摆着几块劣质宝石、一盏拼贴起来的碎陶器、以及其它各种零碎…又多又杂，像是鸟儿拾来筑巢的枝条。
Inside the bamboo basket lies a few cheap gemstones, a pieced-together porcelain vase, and various other loose items... So many things, all mixed together, like birds building up a nest.
这些东西大都值点钱，但不多，勉强能买下一面盾牌与一根长矛。容器的主人似乎只想把它们储存起来，而且已经这样坚持了好些日子。

Most things are worth at least a little money, but not much — barely enough to buy a shield and spear. Their owner seems only interested in collecting things — and has clearly been doing so for some time.
先生，你知道我的爸爸妈妈去哪了吗？我从那天起就没再见过他们了。
Mister, do you know where my mom and dad are? I haven't seen them since that day.
听说你一直在城门前站岗，认识许许多多的人。你一定知道他们去哪了，对吧？
I heard you've been standing sentry at the city gates and know pretty much everyone. You must know where they went then, right?
他们…应该是去了很远的地方。
They... have probably headed off somewhere very far away.
有多远？难道他们背着我偷偷回故乡了吗？我要去找他们！
How far? Don't tell me they went back to our hometown without telling me? I wanna find them!
这…恐怕办不到。奥赫玛外面是很危险的。
I... don't think you'll be able to. It's really dangerous outside Okhema.
我不怕危险，我要爸爸妈妈。我已经和叔叔阿姨们在外面走过一遍了，再走一遍也没关系！
I'm not afraid of danger. I just want my mom and dad. I've been out for a walk outside the city before with the grown-ups, so if I go out again, I'll be fine!
唉…阿卡索斯人，真是和大地兽一样犟……
*sigh* ...The Icatusians are as stubborn as a pack of dromases...
就算你不怕危险，也得先做好准备再启程。你也不希望半途而废吧？
You might not be afraid of anything, but you still need to get yourself ready before you head out again. You don't want to give up halfway, do you?
Get ready? What do you mean by that?
嗯…比方说好多好多钱。有了钱才能买装备、买物资，最好再租几头大地兽，雇一群仆人。
Hmm... like lots and lots of money. You'll need money to buy equipment and supplies, and you should probably hire a few dromases plus a group of attendants.
这就够你操心的了。你知道赚钱不是件容易事吧？
You worry about all that stuff first. You know it's not easy earning money, right?
我、我明白了。我会努力攒钱，直到能去找他们的那天……
I—I understand. I'll do my best to save money until I've got enough to go find them...
在你聚精会神地观看记忆片段时，一阵脚步声从身后传来……
As you watch the memory fragments intently, the sound of footsteps rings out behind you...
The wind sure is noisy today.
…扎格列斯爷爷，我最后一次向你祈祷——请赐我一双飞毛腿吧！
...Granddad Zagreus, I pray to you one last time: Please make my legs lightning fast!
就这？我才刚做完热身运动。
Is that it? I only just finished warming up.
Where are your parents? Do they not discipline you...?
女孩沉默不语，这让你确定了那段记忆的真实性。
The girl stays silent, confirming the veracity of that memory.
她将怀里的东西抛向你——是你丢失的钱袋，里面一分都没少。
She throws the thing she's holding in her arms at you — your lost money pouch. Not a single penny is missing.
我从地上捡的，本想还给你来着…好吧，我承认一开始其实没想还。
I found this on the ground and wanted to return it to you... Fine, I admit that I didn't want to give it back to you at first.
但现在已经无所谓了。攒的钱再多，又有什么意义呢……
But that doesn't matter now. No matter how much money I can save, there's no point...
利波都跟我说了…阿卡索斯早就不存在了！我的爸爸妈妈也……
Lipos told me... Icatus has all gone! And my mom and dad...
吟游诗人从来不说谎。我再也回不到家乡，再也见不到爸爸妈妈了……
A bard never lies. I'll never be able to go back to my hometown... and I'll never see mom and dad again...
女孩小声啜泣起来。阿卡索斯——这听名字就知道凶多吉少的城邦已经从大地上消失了，与一个孩子的期盼一同埋葬。
The girl begins to sob quietly. Icatus — Just from the name the city, you guess it is a place of ill omens. That place has been wiped from the face of the earth and buried alongside a child's hopes.
女孩偏过头，看向下方的集市。很难说她是否想要投身其中。
The girl tilts her head to one side and looks down at the market. It's hard to tell whether she wants to join in.
现在…我又能做些什么呢？我又该做点什么呢？
So now... what can I do? What should I do?
Go turn yourself in to the guards.
去找卫兵自首吧，为你过去的行为付出代价，相信他们不会为难你的。
Go and turn yourself in to the guards, and pay the price for your previous actions. I don't think they'll take it too hard on you.
Go read a ton of books.
去多看看书吧。你脑瓜灵光，又会算数。只要多学点知识，将来应该能养活自己。
Go and read a whole stack of books. You have a curious and bright mind and are handy with numbers. Learn enough so that you'll be able to feed yourself in the future.
去学一门乐器吧。你懂那么多野史，要是会一门乐器，应该能成为不错的吟游诗人。
Go and learn a musical instrument. You know so many rumors and tales. If you learned to play an instrument I'm sure you'd make a fantastic bard.
去学一门手艺吧，比方说织布。就算不擅长这个，只要肯用功，至少自食其力没什么问题。
Go and learn a craft such as weaving. Even if you're no good at it, you'll still be able to support yourself so long as you work hard at it.
Hmm... I understand. I'll give it a try...
女孩缓缓朝着楼下走去，步伐蹒跚，但始终没有倒下。
The girl walks down slowly, her steps stilted, yet never quite toppling over.
我现在正在改过自新，达利安大叔叔负责监督我。有时他会为我做些吃的…味道很好，总算不用捡剩饭吃了。
I've been reinventing myself, and Uncle Dorian has been looking after me. Sometimes he even makes me something to eat... It's really yum, and I don't have to go out foraging for leftovers.
长大以后，我也去当个卫兵吧……
When I grow up, I'm gonna be a guard...
是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟克帖西芬姐姐学习认字。
Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to read with Miss Ctesiphona.
虽然我基础差，总是把字写得歪歪扭扭，但克帖西芬姐姐说我很聪明，只要几个光历年就能比得上大人了。
I've got a really poor foundation and I'm always mucking up my handwriting, but Miss Ctesiphona tells me I'm very clever, and I'll catch up to an adult's level in a couple of Light Calendar years.
长大以后，我要不要也开个书店呢？但学者似乎更受尊敬……
Should I open up a bookstore when I grow up? But I think academics command a little more respect...
是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟弥斯姐姐学习演奏水漫琴。
Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to play the water lyre with Miss Misia.
我的指法不怎么样，但唱得挺好听。弥斯姐姐建议我只学简单的旋律伴奏，把精力放在演唱上。
My technique isn't great, but I can sing pretty well. Miss Misia wants me to focus on just learning simple accompanying melodies, and focus more on singing and performing.
长大以后，我要不要当个歌手呢？吟游诗人似乎也不错……
Should I become a singer when I grow up? Being a bard seems pretty cool, too...
是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟阿芙罗姐姐学习缝纫。
Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to sew from Miss Aphrea.
我不是很擅长这个，经常会戳到手指。好在阿芙罗姐姐总是耐心教导我，她真是人美心善！
I'm not very good at this at all, and I'm always stabbing myself in the finger. Luckily, Miss Aphrea is a really patient teacher. She's such a beautiful, kind-hearted person!
长大以后，我要不要也当个裁缝呢？肯定达不到阿格莱雅大人的水平就是了……
Should I become a tailor when I grow up? I'll never be as good as Lady Aglaea though...
Breaking news! Gather around and listen up!
Another member has been added to the Chrysos Heirs!
…得找那孩子问清楚。或许附近有人看清她逃跑的方向了？
...I have to find and interrogate that kid. Maybe someone around here saw where she ran off to?
这里应该就是那孩子的藏身处，她似乎还没回来？
This must be her hiding place. I guess she hasn't made it back here, yet?
I have never failed to escape before!
There is no way you could catch me!
But even if I did get caught...
用木箱和其他容器简单围成的小家，希瑞雅长久以来的藏身处。
A small, simple home made out of wooden crates and other containers. This has been Serena's hiding place for a long time.
那些来路不正的财物已被尽数归还——她攒了很久，但若要奔向新的人生，这是必要步骤。
Her ill-gotten funds have all been returned... She saved for a long time, but if she wants to be able to start a new life, this is a step that she must take.
听说那孩子藏在<color=#dbc291ff>对面的高台上</color>，我可以从屋顶绕过去。
I hear that kid is hiding on the <color=#dbc291ff>platform opposite</color>. I can go around the roof to get there.
您…我认得您。您是那个最近总是和黄金裔一起行动的异邦贵客！
You... I recognize you. You're that outlander who's always seen with the Chrysos Heir!
太好了，您来了我可就有指望了。
Great, now that you're here, maybe there's hope for me.
What's up? Do you need something?
Sorry, you've got the wrong person.
…大家都说您喜欢开玩笑，看来是真的。
Everyone says you have a playful sense of humor, and it seems they're right.
是这样…我是奥赫玛推理协会的一名成员，听闻树庭在黑潮中惨遭毁灭的消息，就立刻前来调查。
Here's the thing... I'm a member of the Okhema Deduction Society. I rushed here to investigate upon hearing about the Grove's destruction by the black tide.
只是，没想到黑潮造物仍在附近徘徊…我只是一个业余冒险家，没有您和黄金裔那样的力量，凭我自己根本没办法深入调查任何事情。

However, I didn't expect the black tide's remnants to still be lingering nearby... I'm just an amateur adventurer and lack the kind of power you and the Chrysos Heir have to thoroughly investigate this.
你想找我帮忙，调查线索。
You want my help to investigate the clues, don't you?
啊，没错没错！这么说您同意了？
Ah, exactly! Does that mean you'll help?
奥赫玛什么时候有推理协会了？
Since when did Okhema have a Deduction Society?
嗯…您完全没听说过也正常。因为协会里加上我总共也只有四个人。
Well, it's not surprising you haven't heard of it. There are only four of us, including me.
所以…我希望您能伸出援手……
So... I'm hoping you can help...
我想调查的是几位在黑潮里失踪的朋友，他们分别是「莲食学派」的科洛埃、「绳结学派」的尼科马库斯、还有「敬拜学派」的安德烈亚斯。
I wish to inquire about some friends of mine who were lost in the black tide. They are Clio from the Lotophagists, Nicomachus from the Nodists, and Andreas from the Venerationists.
这些人我一个都不认识。
I don't know any of these people.
我听奥赫玛的人们说，您能使用欧洛尼斯的神力……
I heard the people of Okhema say that you can use Oronyx's divine power...
碰见您的时候，我就灵机一动：或许您拿着这几样东西去树庭里转一转，就能通过某种方式知道他们几个的下落了。
I had an idea when I saw you — Maybe you can somehow sense what happened to them if you go take a walk in the Grove with these things on you.
Alright, I'll give it a shot.
太感谢了！我就在这里等着…您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
Thank you! I'll wait here... It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!
我可保证不了能做到什么。
没关系，您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!
看来，这就是实际发生的情况：黑潮无情地从普通人身上碾过，不留下一丝怜悯。
It looks like this is exactly what happened: The black tide swept through, crushing most people without a shred of mercy.
但…刚才看到的这一连串情景，却似乎揭露出了某个奇怪的细节——
But... the scenes I just witnessed seem to highlight some odd details—
树庭同样有驻守的黄金裔，在黑潮来袭时不该如此不堪一击，还有那个黑衣剑士的行为…仔细想来确有些蹊跷。
There was a Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, they shouldn't have fallen so easily to the black tide. And that black-clad swordmaster's actions... they seem rather suspicious upon reflection.
（信息都收集完了，先回去和珀里法斯讨论下吧。）
(All information gathered. Time to head back and discuss with Periphas.)
怎么样？您…这是发现了什么吗？
How did it go? Did you... find anything?
抱歉要告诉你这个坏消息。
I hate to be the bearer of bad news.
没关系，这个结果…我早有心理准备。对普通人来说，很难有谁能从黑潮的包围中全身而退。
It's alright. I was prepared for this outcome. For most people, escaping the grasp of the black tide unscathed is nearly impossible.
不过，稳妥起见，我还是希望您能详细地为我描述一下…发现这些遗物的地点…还有具体的情景。
To be sure, could you describe in detail the locations where these relics were found and the specific events you witnessed?
你将自己刚才目睹的记忆场景转述给了珀里法斯。
You relayed the scenes from your memories to Periphas.
…唉。在最后的时刻，尼科马库斯绝望地和怪物搏斗、安德烈亚斯祈求泰坦的神迹——而被他们尽全力保护的科洛埃小姐，也终究……
...Alas. In their final stand, Nicomachus desperately clashed with the creature, Andreas called out for a Titan's miracle, and Miss Clio, despite their valiant efforts to shield her...
…咦？等等。在你刚才提供的信息中，那个妄图盗取火种的神秘剑士，他看起来毫无怜悯，径直前往了供奉火种的王座——是这样没错吧？

...What? Hold on. From what you just told me, that enigmatic swordmaster who tried to steal the Coreflame seemed ruthless, marching straight toward the Throne where the Coreflame is enshrined — Did I get that right?
我不确定…但这种可能性很高。
I'm not sure... but it seems highly likely.
他…难道不是第一次来树庭？
He's been to the Grove before, hasn't he?
看来，不是只有我觉得他的行动包含疑点。
It seems I'm not alone in finding his actions dubious.
如果这人之前从未来过树庭，我不相信这里错综复杂的结构没有让他产生困惑。
If he had never visited the Grove before, I find it hard to believe he wouldn't be baffled by its intricate layout.
至少第一次过来参观的时候，即使有尼科马库斯带路，我还是因为找厕所而迷失了方向…安德烈亚斯也抱怨过自己是个路痴，在树庭工作了好几年仍然会迷路。

Even when Nicomachus guided me on my first visit, I got lost looking for the restroom... And Andreas, who always complained about being directionally challenged, still got lost in the Grove despite working there for years.
从你收集到的线索来看，要是将那个神秘人的行为与一个抢劫犯类比…说他事先没有踩过点，我不太相信。
From the clues you've gathered, comparing that mysterious person's actions to those of a robber... I find it hard to believe he hadn't scoped out the place beforehand.
可问题是…黑潮怪物真有如此智慧吗？为何他能轻易避开树庭的防备，直抵核心？
But the question is... does the black tide possess such intelligence? How did he manage to slip past the Grove's defenses and head straight for the core?
Does he have the ability to conceal his presence?
这也太可怕了…如果真是这样，或许奥赫玛的防守，其实也形同虚设？
That's horrifying... If that's the case, are Okhema's defenses just for show?
不，这反而说明，他没有这么厉害。如果真是这样，其余火种早就被盗走了。
No, that suggests he isn't all that powerful. If he were, the other Coreflames would have been stolen long ago.
呃…这是个玩笑吗？抱歉，我现在很难笑得出来。
Uh... was that a joke? Sorry, I'm not really in the mood to laugh right now.
Could there be an insider involved?
可恶，情报还是太少了。这里绝对有问题…但缺乏决定性的证据，就很难做出有效的推理。
We're still short on info. There's something wrong here... but without conclusive evidence, it's hard to make a solid deduction.
无论如何，这人一定以某种形式事先了解过树庭的情况，他的行为方式根本不像一个莽撞的抢劫犯，反而像是个对一切了如指掌的刺客。

Regardless, this individual must have scouted out the Grove beforehand. His methodical approach doesn't scream of a careless burglar, but rather hints at a calculated assassin who's thoroughly in the know.
科洛埃、尼科马库斯、安德烈亚斯…树庭的大家…愿你们在塞纳托斯的怀抱中安眠。
Clio, Nicomachus, Andreas... everyone at the Grove... may you rest in the embrace of Thanatos.
至于我们，外邦人——未知的威胁愈发迫近，时刻保持警惕吧。
As for us, the outlanders — the unknown threat is getting closer. Let's stay vigilant at all times.
…防守都被攻破了？怎么回事？！只有黑潮怪物的话，我们明明能撑更久……
...The defenses were breached? What happened!? If it were just the black tide, we could have lasted longer...
那个黑衣剑士…就跟在后面，击溃了所有还在抵抗的人……
The black-clad swordmaster followed closely, overwhelming all those who still dared to resist.
他不是失去理性的怪物，是专程来摧毁树庭的！
He's not just a mindless beast. He was on a mission to obliterate the Grove!
看得出，这里是一个便于防守的地形——如果在两侧布置一些天外世界的激光炮，或许就能达到「一夫当关，万夫莫开」的效果。
This terrain's a natural choke point. Set up some laser cannons from the world beyond the sky on both sides, and we'd have an impenetrable defensive position.
只可惜这里既没有什么好用的防御设施，黑潮的推进方式也远非普通军事力量可比。
Unfortunately, there are no useful defensive facilities here, and the black tide's method of advance is far beyond what ordinary military forces can handle.
牺牲者能做的，不过是用舍生的搏斗拖延极其有限的时间。
The only thing that the martyred can do is to use their lives in desperate combat to delay for a very limited time.
在绝望的洪水淹过人们的脖颈之前，屋顶是他们唯一的希望所在。
Before the flood of despair submerges people up to their necks, the roof is their only hope.
人们会在这里向心中的神明祈祷，像救命稻草一般相信着「信仰之跃」真实存在。
People pray to their gods here, believing in the 'Leap of Faith' as if it were a lifeline, hoping that it truly exists.
残酷的是…即便再坚定的信仰，也注定无法跨越所谓「此在」本身的极限。
The cruel part is... even the most unwavering faith cannot overcome the limits of "this existence" itself.
据说，捉迷藏对一切智慧生命而言都是最古老的游戏。猎人需要隐藏自己接近猎物，猎物也需要隐藏自己躲避敌人。
It is said that hide-and-seek is the oldest game for all intelligent life. The hunter needs to hide to approach the prey, and the prey also needs to hide to avoid the enemy.
——不过，在被黑潮摧毁的区域进行这种思考，似乎过于冷血。牺牲者曾经经历了怎样的惴惴不安与绝望…不堪细想。
— But thinking about such things in an area destroyed by the black tide seems too cold-blooded. What kind of unease and despair did the deceased go through... it's hard to imagine.
好久不见，没想到竟在这里遇到你。
Long time no see. Didn't expect to run into you here.
我曾雇佣你出城调查，寻找德墨忒尔婶婶女儿的线索。
I once hired you to leave the city to investigate, looking for clues about Aunt Demetria's daughter.
…我受那位「金织」女士所托，带队来处理一些事务。
...I was entrusted by that Lady "Goldweaver" to lead the team here to handle some matters.
但兹事体大，之后还请不要随意外传。
But this matter is quite serious, so please don't spread this information casually.
你来这里是有什么事情吗？如果需要，我可以提供一些帮助。
Do you have something to do here? If you need help, I can offer some assistance.
就是帮旁边那位跑个腿。
Just running an errand for the people beside me.
No problem, it's already been solved.
那就好…我知道你实力强悍，但眼下树庭黑潮未消，依旧万分凶险。
That's good... I know you're strong, but right now the black tide hasn't dissipated, and it's still extremely dangerous.
如果没有其他事情，还是早些回奥赫玛吧。
If there's nothing else, you'd better return to Okhema soon.
至于旁边那个赖着不走的家伙，交给我就好。
As for that person who refuses to leave, leave him to me.
等这边的事情处理完毕，我们会将他一同带回去。
Once this is handled, we'll bring him back with us.
So, what are you going to do?
我会尽量和{RUBY_B#比如旁边那位}其他有识之士{RUBY_E#}一起行动，保持团结…「逝者只能停下脚步，但生者还必须前行。」
I'll try to act with {RUBY_B#the person beside me}other smart souls{RUBY_E#} and stay united... "The dead can only stop, but the living must move forward."
It's alright. I've got your back.
…谢谢。你不在这里的时候，我也会尽量和{RUBY_B#比如旁边那位}其他有识之士{RUBY_E#}一起行动。「逝者只能停下脚步，但生者还必须前行。」
...Thank you. When you're not here, I'll try to act with {RUBY_B#the person beside me}other smart souls{RUBY_E#}... "The dead can only stop, but the living must move forward."
将奥赫玛推理协会三位成员的遗物交给珀里法斯
Hand over the belongings of the three members of the Okhema Deduction Society to Periphas
我就在这里等着…您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
I'll wait here... It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!
已经又搜索过一轮了，依旧是…无人生还……
We've searched again... but still... no survivors...
现在还不是松懈的时候，至少我们要先把收尾工作处理好。
Stay focused. We still have cleanup duties to handle.
…所以那家伙究竟是个什么来路？
Remind me... what's the deal with that thing again?
之前完全没听说过！按理说这么强的家伙，不应该啊……
Never heard of that entity before! Strange for someone so powerful to be off the radar...
根据调查结果看来，面对本次黑潮，树庭的学者本应能够有序组织撤离，人员生还率相对较高，但…那位黑衣剑士的出现改变了一切。

According to our investigation, the Grove's scholars could have managed an organized evacuation from the black tide, with many survivors, but... everything changed when that black-clad swordmaster appeared.
啧…真是个棘手的家伙，得赶快将新的调查结果汇报上去。
*Tsk*... he's more trouble than we thought. We should report these new discoveries at once.
果然，他跟着黑潮一起进来了。
I knew it — he rode in with the black tide.
沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了树庭中部。
Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to the Grove's central area.
黑潮难道就不会迷路吗？
Do black tides never lose their way?
沿着黑衣剑士的动向继续搜索。
Keep tracking the black-clad swordmaster's trail.
这个方向…也不能幸免啊。
Not even this area... was safe.
入侵者未免太熟悉树庭了。
The invader seems unusually familiar with the Grove.
沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了那个与他对峙的场所。
Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to where the final battle occurred.
他简直——走了一条最短路线？
He somehow... took the fastest way through?
It's a shame we can't add a control group...
这个波动值似乎不太对。
This fluctuation here doesn't seem quite right.
That's weird. Why can't the results be reproduced?
Why hasn't the device been approved yet?
是你啊，年轻人。谢谢你们帮我把消息带回来，找我有什么事吗？
Ah, young one. Thank you for bringing word of them. What brings you here?
唉…谢谢你，真是个好孩子…要是你现在不忙的话，就陪老头子我聊聊天吧？
Ohh... Thank you, such a kind child... Do you have some time to chat with an old man if you're not too busy?
你说这人啊，就是奇怪。明明之前和那两个丫头也不时常联络，但自从…我反而天天有一肚子话想说……
It's funny how people work. I rarely kept in touch with my two girls before, but now they're... well, I have so many things I wish I could tell them...
你知道吗，那姐妹俩从小就爱惹事…我省吃俭用给她们送进了学堂，想着要是做个学者、多和书籍打打交道，是不是就能稍微消停点了？
Those two were quite the handful growing up... I saved every penny to send them to school, thinking maybe if they became scholars and spent more time with books, they'd settle down a bit.
可她们每次回来，和我聊起在树庭的生活，说的却净是些乱七八糟的玩意…什么「偷读课外读物的小技巧」啊、什么「如何替人签到赚外快」啊……
But every time they came home and told me about life in the Grove, it was nothing but crazy stories... about "secretly reading forbidden books" or "getting paid to fake attendance"...
你说说、你说说，在树庭那种地方，还能把日子过得这么鸡飞狗跳，我怎么就养出这么两个天赋异禀的丫头！
Just imagine — making such a mess even in a place like the Grove! How in the world did I raise two daughters with such special talents for mischief!?
嗨，没事、没事…其实我都想通了。你看，她们虽然并非预言中的黄金裔，但依然活出了自己的人生不是吗？我完全不必替她们感到遗憾。
No, no, it's alright... I've already made peace with it. They might not have been the destined Chrysos Heirs, but they lived life their own way, you know? I'm proud of who they were.
现在唯一可惜的，就是我这把年纪，怕是没办法亲自去树庭走一趟喽。
All I regret is that these old bones won't let me travel to the Grove anymore.
据说小提图斯打听到了他家老头子的消息，前两天已经跟着探险队出发了。
I heard young Titus got word about his old man and left with the expedition team a few days ago.
他也好、我也好，即便明知被黑潮吞噬的人什么都剩不下，却依旧…想要去找找他们最后留下的痕迹……
He's like me — we both know the black tide doesn't leave anything behind, but still... we want to find whatever that's left of them...
I could go on your behalf.
什——真、真的吗？如果可以的话…不行，还是算了吧，太危险了。
What— You mean it? I mean... No, that's asking too much. It's too risky.
非常感谢，年轻人，但请千万别为了我这种糟老头子，置自己的安危于不顾。
I really appreciate it, young one, but don't put yourself in danger for an old grandpa like me.
No worries. I can handle anything.
我实在不知该如何感谢你，年轻人…请务必注意安全，我等你顺利归来！
I... I can't thank you enough! Please be careful out there, and make sure you come back to us safely!
对了…我…我还有个不情之请。如果方便的话，可以拜托你顺带留意一下小提图斯的情况吗？我和他家老头子也算交情不浅，着实有些放心不下。
And... one more thing, if I may. Could you possibly check on young Titus too? His father's an old friend, and I'm concerned.
谢谢你能陪我这么久，我感觉好多了，你要是还有事就去忙吧。
Thanks for staying with me this while. I'm feeling better now. Don't let me keep you if you have things to do.
据说小提图斯打听到了他家老头子的消息，前两天已经跟着探险队出发了。
I heard young Titus got word about his old man and left with the expedition team a few days ago.
他也好、我也好，即便明知被黑潮吞噬的人什么都剩不下，却依旧…想要去找找他们最后留下的痕迹……
He's like me — we both know the black tide doesn't leave anything behind, but still... we want to find whatever that's left of them...
I could go on your behalf.
什——真、真的吗？如果可以的话…不行，还是算了吧，太危险了。
What— You mean it? I mean... No, that's asking too much. It's too risky.
非常感谢，年轻人，但请千万别为了我这种糟老头子，置自己的安危于不顾。
I really appreciate it, young one, but don't put yourself in danger for an old grandpa like me.
No worries. I can handle anything.
我实在不知该如何感谢你，年轻人…请务必注意安全，我等你顺利归来！
I... I can't thank you enough! Please be careful out there, and make sure you come back to us safely!
对了…我…我还有个不情之请。如果方便的话，可以拜托你顺带留意一下小提图斯的情况吗？我和他家老头子也算交情不浅，着实有些放心不下。
And... one more thing, if I may. Could you possibly check on young Titus too? His father's an old friend, and I'm concerned.
谢谢你能陪我这么久，我感觉好多了，你要是还有事就去忙吧。
Thanks for staying with me this while. I'm feeling better now. Don't let me keep you if you have things to do.
你记得自己「阅读」过这段回忆：身为黄金裔的姐姐奋力抵抗，却没能挡住黑衣剑士的一击；而不善战斗的妹妹执起姐姐的剑，站在尚有余温的尸身与怪物之间。

You recall "reading" this memory: The elder sister, a Chrysos Heir, fought courageously but couldn't survive the black-clad swordmaster's blow. Her younger sister, though no warrior, took up the fallen blade and stood guard over her sister's barely-cold body against the monsters.
现在，你想再重温一遍那时的情景吗？
Would you like to revisit that moment now?
为什么…仅仅是一击…黑衣执剑，那是个什么样的怪物…！
One strike... that's all it took... What kind of monster is that black-clad swordsman...!?
…可恶，它离开了…少了阿塔卡玛姐姐，战线已经在逐渐崩溃了……
They've vanished... Without you, Artakama, our defenses crumble... We can't hold...
不…我一定要救你出去，我们不能死在这里。
No! I'm not leaving without you. This won't be our end!
No... Listen to me. Just go...
别说话了，姐姐！你可是黄金裔啊！
Don't talk like that! You're a Chrysos Heir, remember?
从小我就羡慕你的黄金裔身份，一直踩着你的脚印前进…你怎么能倒在这里！
I've spent my whole life chasing your shadow, looking up to your golden blood... Don't you dare give up now!
来，试试把手挂到我的肩膀……
Here, try grabbing onto my shoulder...
…怎么会，黑潮怪物围过来了…什么时候把大家都……
No... When did the black tide monsters... The others... they're all...
叫你走…不肯走…你从小就不听话……
You never listen... just like when we were kids...
姐姐，你还真是五十步笑百步呢。我们两个，哪个不叫老爹操碎心？说起来，小时候还是你带着我到处惹事……
Guess we're both troublemakers, sis. Dad never caught a break with either of us, did he? Remember how you used to drag me into your schemes...
…没关系了，姐姐，都一样的。老爹会为我们骄傲的。
It doesn't matter anymore, sis... We'll all end in the same way. Dad would be proud of us.
黑潮怪物…想要伤害阿塔卡玛，倒是试试看啊！
Back off, you black tide creature! If you want Artakama, you'll have to go through me first!
义愤与悲悯如同两股相向的气流席卷而来，在你周身掀起一阵飓风，并不剧烈，却令你感到有些呼吸困难。
Twin currents of righteous anger and deep compassion clash within you, stirring up an emotional tempest that, while not violent, leaves you struggling for breath.
愿这对姐妹在塞纳托斯的怀抱中得到安眠。
May the girls find their final rest in Thanatos' embrace.
黑潮怪物的尸骸毫无生气地散落一地。此刻它这副安静的模样，让人很难想象其在尚可活动时，是多么的危险与疯狂。
The lifeless remains of black tide monsters lie scattered about. Their current stillness makes it hard to imagine how dangerous and frenzied they were while still active.
人们被黑潮造就的怪物杀死、死后又被黑潮转化为新的怪物——纵然对黑潮与它的造物你已然不再陌生，这样的事实依旧令你感到不安。

Humans are slain by monsters created in the black tide, and they in turn are turned by the tide into new monsters — Though you're now no stranger to the black tide and its offsprings, the thought still sends chills down your spine.
你不由想象，在生命最后一刻，那对姐妹究竟是怀着怎样的心情去面对如此的绝望……
You find yourself wondering what final thoughts crossed these sisters' minds as they faced such utter despair...
一把刃尖破损、但整体尚且完好的剑，剑身上布满黑褐脏污，让人几乎难以分辨其原貌。
A broken-tipped sword, still largely whole, lies coated in stains that mask its original appearance.
你小心翼翼地将其拎起，突然福至心灵——或许在刚刚的那段记忆中，挡在姐姐与怪物之间的妹妹，拿起的就是这把剑？
You pick it up carefully, then it dawns on you — could this be the blade the younger girl raised in her last defiant stand?
你猜你可以将它交还给老费贝尔。不过在那之前，你还记得那位老人的委托——该去找找提图斯了。
You decide to bring this back to Old Fabio. Though first, there's the old man's request to tend to — You should go find Titus.
…嗯？你是…哦，是你啊。你怎么在这？这地方不太安全，最好别停留太久。
Eh? Who's... oh, it's you. What brings you to this place? It's not safe here — best not linger.
Then why are you hanging around?
你以为我想待在这种鬼地方吗？还不是我家那老东西，自己走得倒是轻巧，留下的烂摊子可不少。
You think I want to be in this forsaken place? That old coot may have gone, but he left plenty of loose ends for me to tie up.
啊…？你…唉，谢谢你，朋友。不过别担心，我是跟着探险队过来的，那帮人虽然贵得要死，但保证我的安全还是没什么问题的。
Huh...? You... *sigh* I appreciate it, my friend, but I'm okay — got an expedition team with me. They cost an arm and a leg, but they'll keep me safe.
你说这人，一把年纪了，非得窝在树庭瞎折腾，让他回奥赫玛就跟要了他的命似的。
That stubborn old fool, always clinging to the Grove, treating Okhema like it's poison to him.
现在可好， 就为了跑这一趟，我攒了三年的假期一下子都赔进去了不说，小金库也差不多要见底了……
Now thanks to this little trip, I've burned through three years of saved vacation time, and my poor piggy bank's almost empty...
哎，对了朋友，我听说…你能使用欧洛尼斯的神力，对吧？
Say, my friend — they say you can wield Oronyx's divine power, is that true?
那你能帮个忙吗？帮我找找这附近有没有那个老头子留下的东西——算我欠你个人情，价钱什么的也都好说……
If so, could you help me out? Check if the old man left anything behind — I'll owe you one, and we can discuss payment...
嘶…不好意思，我现在身上只有这些，但之后回了奥赫玛，你要是有什么需要都可以找我帮忙！
S—Sorry... it's not much, but once I'm back in Okhema, just name your price!
千万别推辞，你要是不收下，我也没法安心，真的。
Please, I insist. I won't feel right if you don't take it, really.
拜托你啦，朋友，我等你好消息！
Thank you, my friend! Looking forward to hearing from you!
你记得自己「阅读」过这段回忆：在汹涌黑潮与无尽的怪物来袭之际，老人只身守在友爱之馆，从容而悲壮，试图以书籍的力量对抗塞纳托斯的呼唤。

You recall "reading" this memory: When the raging black tide and its countless monsters came, the old man guarded the Library of Philia all alone, noble yet doomed as he attempted to use the might of books against Thanatos' beckoning.
现在，你想再重温一遍那时的情景吗？
Would you like to revisit that moment now?
…老提图斯，你动作快些，慈爱之庭已经失守，晚了就走不了了。
...Old Titus, you must get moving. The Courtyard of Storge has been lost. You must leave now before it's too late.
呵…你不也不打算逃走么，那刻夏？
Hah... But you're planning to stand your ground as well, Anaxa.
第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?
那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.
年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。

I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.
你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?
那…阿那克萨戈拉斯，你我都明白，像我这般腿脚只能是拖累。你一路护送我至图书馆，身上平添了多少本不该有的伤痕？
Then tell me, Anaxagoras... You and I both know very well that legs like mine will only slow us down. How many unnecessary wounds did you suffer just escorting me to the library?
黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。

The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.
…冥顽不灵。也罢，咱俩的辩论从来都没能分个高低。这最后一次，我让你赢。
...You stubborn old fool. Have it your way. We were never able to decide a victor in our debates. Let's count this final one as your victory.
冥界再见吧，老提图斯…保重。
Let us meet again in the nether realm, Old Titus... Take care.
总算清静了…让我看看，这帮小兔崽子有没有又往典藏里放些大逆不道的东西……
Finally, it's quiet again... Let me see, I wonder if these brats have been sneaking impure content into the collection...
…果然。《一拳神王•艾格勒卷》？哼，换作以前，我见一本销毁一本。
...Just as I expected. One Punch God: Aquila? Hmph, if this were the old days, I'd have burned this on sight.
…《禁忌之恋：树与蝶》？气煞我了，哪个渎神的混账放的？
...Forbidden Love: The Tree and the Butterfly? Damnations, which blasphemous fool put this here?
…也罢。我家那兔崽子小时候也老爱看这种东西，都被我训怕了。
...Whatever. The little brat at home used to love this kind of stuff. I scared that out of him, though.
这最后的时间里，我倒要看看这些学术渣滓到底有什么魅力。
In my final moments, I'd like to see just what is so special about this brain rotting nonsense.
哈哈哈！成何体统，成何体统！
黑潮怪物…别动我们的藏书…！
Beasts of the black tide... I won't allow you to touch our collection!
你将自己在记忆中所见的情形，事无巨细地复述给了眼前的男人。
You tell the man everything you saw in the memory, describing each moment in precise detail.
…呸！什么叫无处可去…就真老糊涂了是吧？瞎话都不会编了……
Nowhere to go? What nonsense! Has he truly lost his mind? Can't even make up a decent excuse...
你知道吗，就他那腿脚——上次我不小心给他那破烟斗弄坏了，老东西撵我撵了整整半个树庭！
And those legs he complains about? Last time I accidentally broke his favorite pipe, he chased me through half the Grove!
这就成拖累了，啊？该犟的时候反而不知道犟了…这个死脑筋，每次吵架的时候，怎么就没见他这么体贴人？
Now suddenly he's a burden? Ha! When he should be stubborn, he gives in... That old fool, where was all this consideration during our arguments?
哈…当初就不该妥协，直接把人绑回圣城得了…花大价钱买到的房子，就在市集和浴场中间，去哪都方便，还特意给他在院子里整了个小图书馆……

Gods, I should've just dragged him back home with me... I got him this perfect house, right between the marketplace and the baths. Premium location, didn't spare any expense. Even built him a private library in the courtyard...
知道用了多少心思、砸了多少钱吗！老东西，就知道浪费！心疼得我声音都打颤了……
All that care... all that money... Do you know how much money I wasted for that, old fool? Gods! It hurts just talking about it...
Why didn't you... *sniff* try staying in that house for once...
男人怒气冲冲的抱怨渐渐化作隐约的哽咽，那声音继而又变为难以遏制的啜泣。
The anger in his voice shatters like glass, grief pouring through as his shoulders shake with silent sobs.
你突然觉得胸口有点不舒服——就像是衣服浸了水、沉甸甸黏在身上的那种感觉……
You suddenly feel a pressure on your chest — like your clothes suddenly all became drenched in water and are sticking suffocatingly to your skin...
哈…哈哈…多谢关心。不用担心，麻烦…让我一个人静静吧。
*bitter, choked laugh* Thanks, really... but I'll be fine. Could you... could you just give me a moment?
我这么年轻，我还不想死！
I'm still young. I don't wanna die!
反物质军团怎么就突然来了，我不会要死在这里吧？爸爸，妈妈，亲爱的…我好想你们。
Why did the Antimatter Legion suddenly come here? I don't wanna die here! Mom, dad, my sweet angel... I miss you so much.
我、我还这么年轻，我还要在空间站发光发热呢，我不想死啊！
I, I'm too young to die! I've got things I still want to achieve on this space station.
Tsk, time to make another loan repayment...
这玩意怎么这么贵啊？我把经费全砸进去了。
Why is this so expensive! I've thrown all my funding at it.
网上还好意思说什么「买新不买旧」。哎，我要是有钱就好了…到时候再买点超导合金，然后我用一份就丢一份……
And they're always spamming you online to "buy new, not second-hand." I wish I were rich... I'd buy loads of superconductors and just throw them away once I'm done with them...
I'd have asked you earlier if I knew.
You've already bought it, so put it to use.
原来你做过这个实验啊，不早说！早知道我就先问你了。
Why didn't you tell me that you've done this experiment before? I could've just asked you.
你是不知道啊，我前两天买了个二手设备，预算直接爆掉了，总感觉买贵了。
I didn't tell you but I bought a second-hand device a couple of days ago and it blew out my budget. I feel like I paid too much.
这玩意对刚需人士来说什么价格都一样。
Any price is the same for someone who really needs it.
反正你买都买了，就凑合着用呗，实验可耽误不得。
Anyway, you've bought it, now so just put it to use. This experiment cannot wait.
哎呦，太好了——年轻人，你可算回来了！风堇小姐才刚来过，得知你独自去了树庭，她很担心你的安全。
Oh thank goodness — you're back, young one! Miss Hyacine was just here, worried sick about you going to the Grove alone.
Are you hurt? Tell me you're alright!
It was no challenge at all!
那就好、那就好，一路辛苦了…所以…你有找到什么吗？
Oh, that's good to hear. You've done well... So... were you able to find anything?
你将在记忆中的见闻转告给了老费贝尔——告诉他阿塔卡玛是如何英勇奋战到生命的最后一刻，库娜涅又是如何举起长剑，坚定守护在姐姐身前的。
You tell Old Fabio everything you saw in the memory — how Artakama fought bravely until her last breath, and how Cynane raised her sword, standing firm to protect her sister.
这位憔悴的老父亲只是沉默地聆听着，将那柄剑紧抱在怀中，任凭浊泪在脸上纵横。
The weary father listens in silence, clutching the sword tightly to his chest as tears stream down his face.
他似乎仍在试图向你道谢，却因泣不成声而只能挤出些许断断续续的含混音节。
He seems to be trying to express his gratitude, but only manages to vocalize broken and confused syllables through his sobs.
这种时候，最好还是让他一个人静静吧。
Best to give him some space with his grief.
That bullheaded old man! Stubborn as a mule!
库娜涅似乎从姐姐的身边拾起了什么…你猜那或许是一把武器。
It looks as if Cynane is taking something from her sister's body... You imagine it must be some kind of weapon.
Oh, Grayie! Good to see you!
嗯，是这样的。在治疗那位来自树庭的伤者时，我发现了一封信，似乎是某位学者给妻子的家书。
Well, you see. During my treatment of a wounded from the Grove, I found a letter that appeared to be from a scholar to his wife.
当时他的伤势太重，我抽不开身，如今稍得了些空闲，便打算亲自将信送过去。
His situation was critical and I couldn't step away, but now that things are quieter, I'd like to personally deliver this letter.
然后我就想起来，灰宝不是和那刻夏老师一起去慰问过那些牺牲者的家属嘛，树庭的悲剧才过去没多久，我有点担心他们的生活状况。
Then I remembered that you and Professor Anaxa checked on the bereaved families before, and since the Grove incident is still recent, I'm worried about these families' situations.
有空的话，能不能替我跑一趟，去瞧瞧其他人呢？
If you're not too busy, could you spare some time to see how they are doing?
不用特意做什么，只要和他们聊几句，了解一下近况就行！拜托你啦，灰宝——
No need for anything formal. Just talk to them and see how they're holding up! What do you say, Grayie? Pretty please—
…老东西…知道我给你准备的房子，花了多少钱吗？你倒是…先住住看啊……
You stubborn old man... Do you even know how much that house cost? Why didn't you... *sniff* try staying in there for once...
I thought you said you're trying to lose weight...
I'm not the same as I used to be!
So do you want garlic salt, or salt & pepper?
我真的快要饿晕了，这就是脑力劳动带来的负担吗？
I'm really starving here. Is this the true burden of mental exhaustion?
可是你昨天还嚷嚷着要减肥……
But you were just hollering yesterday about wanting to lose weight...
昨天的我要减肥，和今天的我有什么关系？
What does my wanting to lose weight yesterday have to do with what I feel today?
…那你要吃蒜香还是椒盐的？我帮你叫点餐机器人过来。
... So do you want garlic salt, or salt & pepper? I'll call the robot waiter over.
Coconut milk lattes are the best!
Taro bubble mango coffee is very nice too!
I'll drink this one this time!
Researcher Who Pretends to Be Excited
咳咳…我再试一次：「椰冻奶盖拿铁最好喝！」
Ahem... let me try again: "Coconut milk lattes are the best!"
没有大问题，但细节可以调优。你跟我学：「芋波香芒啡也超好喝！」
That's pretty good, but it can be fine-tuned. Say it with me: "Taro bubble mango coffee is very nice too!"
Researcher Who Pretends to Be Excited
我大概懂了…「哇！那我这次喝你这个吧！这家的咖啡真是永远都喝不腻！」
I think I get it... "Wow! I'll drink this one this time! I never get sick of the coffee at this place!"
可以了，就这样吧。重申一下价格：喊一句给五个信用点。
Yes, that's the one. Reiterate the price: Shout it out once for 5 credits.
If something should happen to me...
我还是没忍住，一口气买了足足十份商业保险。
I couldn't help myself and bought ten whole insurance policies.
Huh? How come? Are you nuts?
之前军团入侵，我们科有个老哥去世了，这让我有些触动……
Back before the Legion invaded, an old departmental veteran passed away. It really stirred up some feelings...
所以我就买了这么多，还把你名字写在了受益人那栏里。
So I bought all of these and listed your name in the beneficiary column.
万一哪一天，我遭遇不测…你和「小宝」至少还能靠这笔钱好好活下去。
In case something ever happens to me one day... at least you and our Little Precious can use this to keep on living.
别说这种晦气话！呸呸呸！
Don't say such terrible things! Bah!
之前要你写的那份研究报告呢？写得怎么样了？
That report I asked you to write before... how is it?
前天就写完了，但这事吧，哎…说来话长了。
I finished it two days back, but y'know... well, it's a long story.
So what exactly is going on?
我们在开研讨会的时候，正好赶上反物质军团入侵。坐我前面那个老哥身上都挂彩了，我都快吓死了。
Just as we were running a seminar, the Antimatter Legion invaded. The old fella sitting in front of me was wounded in action, and I was scared half to death.
哎，真不容易，你们人没事就好。
