Wow, that's rough. Thank goodness you're okay.
确实，就是感觉有点倒霉，回头还得重写一份呢。
Yeah, just a little unlucky. I need to re-write it.
我觉得你那个结论不太对。
I thought your conclusion was a bit off there.
老实说，我觉得你推导出来的结论不太对啊。
To be honest, I think the conclusion that you derived isn't quite right.
你看你前面引用的文献，这个…还有这个…都是过时的条文。
The literature you cited here, right here... and here... they're all from outdated texts.
停停停，什么叫「过时」？这都是最新的条文，你不信去查查。
Hold on a minute. What does "outdated" mean? These are all the latest up-to-date articles. Go take a look if you don't believe me.
目前为止的确是最新的，但到你把论文发出来，这个时间内可能会改动，所以我说你这个研究不够严谨。

That's right. They are currently the latest, up-to-date articles. But by the time the paper's published they could have been changed — so that's why I'm saying. Your research simply isn't rigorous enough.
C'mon bro, help me out here!
哎，老哥，帮个忙吧！就借我一次，我核验完论文就还你。
Bro, c'mon — help me out here! Just loan it to me once, and I'll just check it against the paper and give it straight back to you.
不行，绝对不行，你要借就老老实实排队。
No way. Absolutely not. If you want to borrow something, wait in line like everyone else.
我这不是急着用嘛！我和你什么交情啊，你都忘了是吧？
I'm in a hurry here! Aren't we supposed to be friends? Have you forgotten that?
光我们应物科，就有不少人在排队轮候呢，这么多人盯着，我怎么敢徇私让你插队。
At our Department of Implement Arts alone, there're loads of people waiting in line. How could I let you cut in when so many people are watching?
行，那我再想想别的办法吧。
Okay, then I'll just have to think of another way.
Looks like it's just gonna fool the foolish.
你说这玩意，它的功效真的有广告上这么神奇？
Speaking of this thing — is it really as miraculous as they say in the ad?
算了吧，一看就知道是智商税。
Forget about it. Looks like it's just gonna fool the foolish.
但这个牌子我知道，做医药起家的，很有名。
But I know this brand. They started out in medicine before making it big.
大牌子又怎么样，越是知名品牌，就越爱搞这种虚头巴脑的！
Who cares what brand it is. The bigger brands are the ones more likely to engage in this stupid hipster stuff!
Have they changed the packet again?
还没降价，我再等等好了。
Still not on sale yet... I'm holding out.
Don't worry. I'm waiting on a new part.
哎，这实验没办法推进下去啊…这都大半个月了，机组还没修好吗？
Ack, my experiment can't go on without it... It's been two weeks already. Can't they fix it?
您老别急啊，我已经问过维修科的人了。
Don't worry about it. I've chased up the maintenance department.
他们怎么说？能给个确切的日期吗？
What did they say? Can you give me an exact date?
机组已经没办法修了，所以我找公司那边定损了，现在申请了一批新设备。您老先休息几天，等机组换新吧。
The part can no longer be repaired, so I went to the IPC and applied for a replacement batch. You should rest up a few days and wait for the replacement to come.
Hello, and welcome to the space station.
Hello, senior. How do you do?
Are you still in the mood to read a book?
What else could I be doing?
都什么时候了，你居然还有闲心看书？
It's getting late. You're still in the mood to read?
那不然呢？休息时间看小说有错吗？
What else? Is it wrong to read while on a break?
不是…你那个实验都被怪物毁了……
No... Your experiment was ruined by monsters...
这有什么，我都没急，你瞎急什么？
So what? I'm in no rush. What are you in a hurry for?
Don't worry about me. I'm worried about you...
还好她不在，难得清净会儿。
Luckily she isn't here. A rare moment of peace and quiet.
我从小就想当个科学家。
I've always wanted to be a scientist ever since I was little.
那你也算是梦想成真了。
Then your dream has pretty much come true.
说出来你别笑我…我从小就立志要当个科学家，在作文里还夸下海口说我要加入天才俱乐部。
Don't laugh at me, but... I've been determined to become a scientist since I was a kid. I even used to brag in my homework about joining the Genius Society.
这有什么可笑的，我小时候还想当大明星呢。
What's so funny about that? I wanted to be a celebrity when I was younger.
想起来的时候，还有点害臊嘛，你看我这一事无成的……
It's still a little bit shameful to think about, especially when you consider how I never amounted to much...
你都来空间站了，也算是实现了小时候的梦想。
Hey. You're on the Herta Space Station. That's basically realizing your childhood dream.
这和我作文里立下的宏愿比，还差得远呢。
It's far from the magnificent aspirations in my homework.
刚来的时候，我还和它合过影。
When I first came here, I took a photo together with it.
说出来你可能不信…在我刚入职的时候，我特地来这里跟它合了个影。
You may not believe me, but... when I first started working here, I came here specifically to take a photo with it.
Well, the thing right in front of you.
It's just a projection, though. So what?
哎，你不懂我是我们家唯一一个坐过飞船的人，拍给家里人看看呗。
Hey, you have to understand — I'm the only one in my family to have ridden in a spaceship before. It's a photo for my family.
那他们现在肯定以你为荣吧。
Then they must be really proud of you right now.
最近这么多人受伤，又要连轴转了。
So many people have been getting injured that we've had to work around the clock.
今天中午连午饭都没时间吃，哎，快忙晕了。
I didn't even have time to eat my lunch today. *Sigh* I'm crazy busy these days.
体检的请到我这里登记。
Please come over here and register for your medical examination.
Is this second-hand radiometer for sale?
五十信用点卖我可以吗？
How about fifty credits? Is that fair?
It's so easy to get tired these days.
That's because you're getting on in age!
你的简报里怎么没有废话。
Why is there never any time for nonsense in your briefings?
... Having nonsense would be the weird part.
但废话可以显得字数多。
But nonsense can sometimes stretch out your word count.
Have you figured out how to express yourself?
What about those public speaking tips I gave you last time?
上次教给你的浪漫情话有效果吗？
Did that sappy spiel I taught you last time work at all?
那些话根本说不出口吧？
You can't say any of those things I taught you?
「你有感觉到震动吗？每次见到你，我的心脏都会疯狂地急速跳动。」这句难道不浪漫吗？不感动吗？
"Can you feel that vibration? Every time I see you, my heart starts pounding like crazy." Isn't that totally romantic? Aren't you impressed?
至少我听完之后，绝对不敢乱动。
Hearing it makes me not want to make any move at all.
还差<unbreak>10</unbreak>个论点我就可以完成这篇报告了……
I'm still <unbreak>10</unbreak> talking points away from finishing this paper...
哼，等着吧！之前的我你们科室爱理不理，发表完这篇奇物报告的我，你们全都高攀不起！
Hmmm, just you wait! You bureaucrats never used to give a hoot about me, but once I've published this Curio research, you'll all be trying to hire me!
How does an innovative new coffee end up making money?
Only <unbreak>10%</unbreak> of the budget has been invested in R&D.
听说你们科室搞了个什么创新咖啡，还赚了不少？
I heard your department has a new coffee start-up, and it's raking in cash?
你偷偷告诉我，到底是怎么做到的吧？
C'mon, tell me your secret. How'd you do it?
其实很简单：我们把研发成本压得很低，把经费花在了别的部分。
It's actually quite simple: We keep our R&D costs low and spend our budget elsewhere.
哼哼，这可不兴外传，主要是宣发…其实就是「病毒营销」！
Hmph, well you can't tell anyone, but it's all about promotion... especially viral marketing!
The notice said that we have to confirm receipt.
But it's too easy for it to get spammed away by other messages...
保持高强度水群就好了。
Just keep posting in our group chat and everything will be fine.
你怎么又没回复群消息？群公告一旦更新，就要回复一次「收到」！！！
Why haven't you replied to the group chat? When the group notice is updated, you have to reply with "Received"!
我们群里那么多人，都回复一个「收到」，关键信息不就被刷上去了？没能及时看群的人很容易错过消息。
There're so many people replying in the chat with "Received" that the key messages get overwritten. People who don't stay glued to the chat risk missing out.
只要保持高强度水群，就不会错过消息！！！
Just keep our text threads going at a high intensity and you won't miss out — will you!?
Just you wait for my masterpiece!
我都来了这么久了，怎么还没能晋升啊？
I've been here so long. Why haven't I been promoted yet?
我这辈子不会就这样了吧？
Am I doomed to do this for the rest of my life?
…哎，我真是服了，来之前以为自己是个天才，命中注定的天才。
Ack... I really am giving up. Before I came here, I had thought I was a genius. A genius chosen by fate.
来了之后才发现我什么都不是…在我最自信的领域，我连黑塔女士的鞋跟都摸不着，呜呜……
But after I arrived, I realized that I am actually nothing... Madam Herta can squash me with her pinky even in my area of research expertise...
简评一下我的最新情诗。
Gimme your thoughts about my latest love poem.
You mean "Your Voice is Like an Alarm"?
Isn't it romantic? Are you touched?
我最近又给她写了几首情诗，你帮我看看感觉如何。
I've written her a few more love poems. Tell me what you think — how does it feel?
……你为什么要把她的声音比作闹铃，把她的身影比作呜呜伯？
... Why do you have to compare her voice to an alarm clock — and her figure to a Wubbaboo?
因为我每次听到闹铃，都感觉自己会在一瞬间内头脑清醒，这意味着她就是我的灵感女神。
Because every time I hear my alarm, my head feels super-clear for a second — which means that she's my muse.
而比作呜呜伯，是为了展示我的学识，毕竟空间站了解这玩意儿的科员可不多。
And as for Wubbaboos, this demonstrates my knowledge, because not many staff aboard the space station understand this stuff.
That's a really... innovative way of coming up with it.
You can't be too much like that. It's not right.
Even us talking is too... y'know.
就是说啊，做人不能太那个。
I'm just saying, you can't be too much like that.
不过话说回来，你觉不觉得咱们说话也有点那个。
But then again, don't you think us even talking is too... y'know?
Hang on. What exactly are we talking about?
Relax. Just give it two slaps and it'll be fine.
Ugh, I think I forgot to save my progress.
... Call the maintenance staff over to take a look.
Yikes, it's not safe here at all.
Let me say a few words...
大家今天表现很棒，下面我简单说两句——
Everyone has done very well today. Let me just say a few words here...
首先是实验用具，你们记得……
First of all, the lab apparatus. You remember...
…我刚刚好像听到我的肚子在咕咕叫？
...I think I just heard my tummy rumbling.
不，你听错了，那是我的肚子在叫。
No, you misheard. That's actually MY tummy rumbling.
您放心吧，每次实验我们都会做好分类工作的。
Don't worry. We categorize every experiment we run.
Youngsters these days really are useless...
人老咯，带不动咯…我感觉我们科的年轻人啊，哎……
I'm old and can't carry everyone on my shoulders... It feels like the youngsters in our department are all — *sigh*...
别这么严苛嘛，我看我们科室的孩子都挺不错呀。
Don't be so harsh. I think the youngsters in our department are all great.
我年轻的时候，做石蜡切片的手艺可比他们差多了。
When I was their age, I was far worse at paraffin sectioning than they are.
哼，一码归一码，我说的是科研能力，不是做实验的动手能力。
Hmph, that's not the same. I'm talking about their scientific research capacity, not their dexterity in manual operations.
Can't you just treat it as a vacation?
我习惯连轴转了，现在一下子清闲了，反而感到很不安。
I'm used to working around the clock, but now that I'm free all of a sudden, I have this real sense of restlessness.
这两天始终定不到实验室，哎，总之就是感觉特别焦虑。
I haven't been able to book a lab the past two days. *Sigh* I'm just feeling extremely anxious about it all.
噢，这有什么，你就当放假不就完了？
Oh, what's the matter? Why don't you just treat it like a vacation?
而且，你现在急也没用啊，超净台都没有你拿什么做实验？等新设备运到再想吧。
Besides, there's no point in being anxious. You still need a clean bench to complete the experiments, right? Just wait until the new equipment arrives.
Hey, I heard your department is looking for some things?
我最近听说，你们应物科在找什么东西，是出什么事了吗？
Someone told me the Department of Implement Arts is looking for some things. What's up?
实验出了点意外，有个奇物在空间站里到处「逃窜」，大家都在找它。
There was a bit of an accident. A curio "escaped" during an experiment, and it's currently fleeing all over the space station. Everyone's still looking for it.
听起来还蛮惨的，不过我没做过这种实验，所以想象不到奇物乱窜是什么情况……
Bummer. I've never run this kind of experiment though, so I can't imagine what it must be like to have something weird scuttling around like that...
哥们，你给我发的那个报告我看过了。
Dude, I read the report you gave me.
你给我透个底吧，那个星球安全吗？这事到底靠不靠谱？我想去考察考察。
Gimme the inside scoop! Is that planet safe? Is this business reliable or not? I'd like to go and investigate for myself.
呃，这个…我不好说…因为目前只有文字资料。
Er, that's... I can't really say... Because there's only written evidence about it at the moment.
我建议你再观望观望吧，要是有了什么实质性进展，我第一个通知你。
I suggest you just wait and see. If there're any substantial developments, I'll notify you in the first instance.
没有，你先把这个理论吃透……
No, you have to get to grips with this theory first...
我看你早就做完实验了，那正好，分点那个给我，我拿去配胰酶。
Looks like you finished your experiment ages ago. That's good. Just give some of that to me and I can go make some trypsin.
什么那个？能配胰酶的试剂不少，但你要的是哪个？
Some what? There are lots of reagents that can make trypsin. Which one do you want?
就…那个溶剂叫什么来着？就是你常用的那个，借我用点呗。
Just... what's that solvent called again? You know, the one you're always using. Give me some of that.
问就是没有。你还是先把这个理论研究透了，再申请实验吧。
Don't have any, sorry. You should really get a firm grasp on this theory first, and then apply to do the experiment.
你忘了你上次放错试剂，毁了多少培养皿了？
Did you forget how many petri dishes you ruined last time by messing up the reagents?
I still don't really get it...
...That's not the right conclusion to derive here.
前辈，我还是不太明白，为什么我算出来的和你算的差这么多？
I know you're my senior, but I still don't get why my calculation is so different from yours.
应该是模型的问题。我认为你现在这个太复杂了，中间好像丢失了一段数据，结果自然不对。
I think it's a modeling error. Yours is far too complex, and I think there's a section of missing data in the middle — naturally it's wrong.
咱们科有位前辈，他设计的那个神经网络比你现在用的模型简单。你可以用他的那个试试。
There's a senior researcher in our department who designed a way simpler neural network than the model you're using. Why don't you try his instead?
Alright, let me make a note.
除了故障区域都没问题。
Yes, this place is all good except for the faulty areas.
主控舱段是没问题了，接下来的呢？都检查完了吗？
The master control zone is looking good. What's next? Have you checked everything?
嗯，按着操作手册上的流程，全部检查过了。
Yeah, I've checked over everything according to the manual's workflow.
但我看屏幕上…你看这里，这个舱段你们也确认过了？那怎么还亮着警示灯？
But on the screen here... look at this. Have you confirmed this zone yet? Why is the warning light still on?
这个地方是故障区域，机组坏了，没法儿接收信号。所以我特意标记了一下。
This is a faulty area with a broken unit, and it's a dead zone for signals. That's why I've deliberately marked it out.
嗯，那就好。你也别怪我啰嗦，毕竟刚被「军团」入侵过。我们还是谨慎点为好。
Ah, that's good then. Don't hold it against me for being pedantic. We've only just survived a raid by the Legion. Let's keep going at it with caution.
I think I've heard of that too.
在那个深夜，我刚轮值完，突然感觉人好冷，心也好冷……
It was in the middle of the night. I had just finished my shift when I suddenly felt a chill down to my core...
…可空间站里不都是恒温的吗？
...But doesn't the space station always maintain a constant temperature?
你别打岔！总之就是突然感到很孤独很心寒，所以我就去找「螺中笑声」了。
Don't cut me off! Anyway, I suddenly felt so lonely and cold, so I went looking for the Crackup Conch.
嗯，毕竟幽默是带走寂寞感的良药嘛…然后呢？
Mmmm, I guess humor really is the antidote to loneliness... then what?
然后我并没有听到笑话，反而是听到一个声音不断挖苦我。我怀疑是有什么东西躲在门后…总之事情就是这样了，非常恐怖！
Well, instead of hearing a joke, all I could hear was this voice roasting me. I thought there might be something hiding behind the door... Anyway, that's how it happened. Totally freaky!
我好像听谁说过…说是…「螺中笑声」感染了病毒就异变了？
I think someone once told me... that the Crackup Conch got infected with some kind of virus?
谁知道呢，总之听起来还蛮危险的。
Who knows. In any case, it sounds pretty dangerous.
这得看「公司」那边的安排。
Master, what are we gonna do!?
Don't worry. I'll take a look.
师傅，师傅！您快看，跑出来的结果好奇怪啊！这要怎么办啊？
Master, master! Look here, the result is totally weird! What are we gonna do?
哎哟别急，让我先看看…唔，好像没什么…等等，这是……
Okay, take it easy. Let me have a look... Well, looks fine to m—hang on. This is...
我说你小子，这串数据还没跑完呢，慌什么。
Kid, I told you this data string hasn't finished running yet. Don't panic.
我看这图表有点奇怪，所以就…不好意思！
This graph looked strange, so I... I'm sorry!
砰——你感到一阵天旋地转，耳朵嗡嗡作响。清晰的理性离你远去，只觉得视野里有个模糊的人影在朝这边招手，那就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吗？

Bang — You feel a sudden dizziness, your ears ringing loudly. Clarity and reason slip away as you notice a blurred figure waving at you from a distance. Could that be {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}?
据说翁法罗斯在最繁盛的时候，曾有超过<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽在这片土地上栖息，多么惊人的数字啊。所以，你知道这意味着什么吗？
It's said that during its prime, Amphoreus was home to over <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases. What an astounding number! So, do you know what that means?
This was a paradise for dromases!
每位泰坦要打<unbreak>100</unbreak>只大地兽。
为什么大地兽当不了泰坦？
噢，天哪，那个人影还在朝你招手，并且变得愈发清晰，你依稀辨认出它正呼唤你过去。
Oh dear, that figure is waving at you now, growing clearer by the second. You vaguely recognize it as if it's calling you over.
好吧，你决定不再畏惧，人总是会有那么一天的，别害怕——来吧，甜蜜的死亡！
Fine, you decide not to be afraid anymore. After all, everyone has their day. Don't be scared — come, sweet death!
活着？如果思考便意味着存在，毫无疑问你是活着的。可刚才明明，你的思绪已经离你远去，你看见塞纳托斯在朝你招手…到底是怎么回事？
Alive? If to think is to exist, then undoubtedly, you are alive. But just now, your thoughts had clearly drifted far away. You saw Thanatos beckoning to you... What's going on?
哎呀呀呀，真是对不起。这头大地兽发疯跑了出来，撞倒了您，没什么事吧？
Ah, my apologies! This dromas just went mad and dashed out, knocking you down. Are you alright?
Were you the one calling me just now?
我…嗯，怎么说呢，算是这头大地兽现在的饲养员吧。不好意思，我从云石市集追到云石天宫，才总算赶上它的步伐，可没想到还是出现了受害者。

I... Well, how should I put it? You could say I'm currently this dromas's caretaker. Sorry about that. I chased it all the way from the Marmoreal Market to the Marmoreal Palace, and I still couldn't catch up to it. But I didn't expect it to cause harm along the way.
好险好险。要是撞到老人就要出大事了，就算踩到奇美拉也很麻烦啊！
That was close! If it had collided with an elder, it would've been disastrous. Even if it trampled a chimera, it'd be a huge mess!
所以我是被大地兽撞了？
So I got hit by a dromas?
And now it's no big deal?
我看您身体健康，精神抖擞，还有心情和我聊天，肯定没问题！但…哎，这可怎么办啊？
I see you're in good health, full of energy, and even in the mood to chat with me, so you must be fine! But... oh dear, what am I going to do?
失控的大地兽，在热闹的城邦里狂奔，总有天要出事的。可它的力气太大，工坊的栅栏挡不住它，速度又太快，普通人根本追不上…谁能帮帮我呀？！

A rampaging dromas running wild in a bustling city-state is bound to cause trouble someday. But it's too strong for the workshop fences to hold it back, and it's too fast for an ordinary person to catch... Who could help me?
很明显，你注意到这位饲养员正偷偷用眼角的余光瞟你，似乎早有打算。
It's quite obvious that this caretaker is sneaking glances at you, as if he already has something in mind.
Are you trying to dump this on me?
哎，怎么能算找麻烦，奥赫玛的公民们都知道异邦的客人神通广大，说不准您稍微拜拜{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，就能想出什么好法子了呢？

Oh, how could it be considered dumping? The citizens of Okhema all know how capable guests from outlands are. Perhaps if you prayed a bit to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, you might come up with a brilliant solution!
再说，事情可不能这么算了，您被大地兽给狠狠地撞了，当然要赔偿！
Besides, we can't just let this slide. That dromas hit you hard, so compensation is definitely in order!
But I refuse to deal with this!
哎，可事情不能就这么算了，您被大地兽给狠狠地撞了，当然要赔偿才行。
Well, we can't just let this slide. That dromas hit you hard, so compensation is definitely in order.
不光是您，我也想要赔偿。就在前几天，我按惯常的时间来到工坊，准备开始今天的工作。您猜怎么着——栏里的大地兽突然多出来了一头！
It's not just you, even I want compensation! Just a few days ago, as I arrived at the workshop at my usual time to start the day's work, guess what? There was suddenly one more dromas in the pen!
我寻思着这大地兽也不是什么地里的作物，怎么能凭空出现的。可它来都来了，我也不好赶出去，就这么先喂着了。但事情没这么简单……

I figured, this dromas wasn't exactly a crop from the field, so how could it appear out of thin air? But now that it was there, I couldn't just drive it away, so I've been feeding it for now. But it's not that simple...
<size=28>每天固定时候，固定在这条路上，它都要跑上好几个来回！这谁受得了啊？！</size>
<size=28>At the same time every day, on this very road, it runs back and forth several times! Who can endure this!?</size>
正常，现在人都到处发疯。
Well, it's normal — everyone's going crazy these days.
不瞒您说，以我照顾大地兽这么多年的经验，我猜测啊…<color=#dbc291ff>这头大地兽准是失恋了。</color>
To tell you the truth, with my years of experience caring for dromases, I suspect... <color=#dbc291ff>this dromas must've had its heart broken.</color>
正当你还在消化这些信息时，那头疯狂的大地兽再次从你们的面前飞奔而过。
Just as you're trying to process this information, the rampaging dromas dashes past you again.
从大地兽的这声嘶吼中，你听出了五分惆怅、三分无奈，还有两分对身旁人类的不屑。好吧…就算是为了赔偿金，你也得想办法搞清楚它的来历。

From its roar, you can hear five parts sorrow, three parts resignation, and two parts disdain for the humans nearby. Alright... even if it's just for the compensation, you'll need to figure out its origin.
但首先，你需要先让它安静下来。
But first, you need to calm it down.
「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
"Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"
听城门口的卫兵说，那头失恋的大地兽最近疯跑的频率越来越高了，还吓到了不少客人。所以，您想到什么好法子了吗？
The guards at the city gate mentioned that the heartbroken dromas has been running wild more frequently, scaring plenty of visitors. So, have you thought of any solutions?
...Bring in another dromas and call it a day!
嗯。听起来没什么问题，好在我们的时间还很多，可以慢慢尝试。
Hmm, sounds reasonable enough. Luckily, we've got plenty of time to test these methods one by one.
那就拜托您了！要是找到了这头大地兽原本的主人，我非得让他给您道歉！
I'll leave it to you! If we find this dromas's original owner, I'll make sure they apologize to you properly!
能让他帮我清洗浴池吗？
Can they help me clean the bathhouse?
Make them mimic a chimera's call.
行，怎么样都依您！到这个点，它应该返回工坊了，我们先去解决问题吧。
Sure, whatever you want! By this time, it should've returned to the workshop. Let's head over and deal with it.
俗话说得好：没有一顿红土解决不了的大地兽，要是有，那就再给它来一顿。
As the saying goes: There's no dromas a meal of redsoil can't handle. If there is, give it another meal.
靠着这位饲养员先生的关系，你从大地兽工坊里弄来了成堆的红土。要是那<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽全都在场的话，或许还能吃完——可惜在不得。
Thanks to the caretaker, you manage to procure heaps of redsoil from the Dromas Workshop. If all <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases were present, they might've finished it all — but alas, they're not.
(Now it's time to feed this dromas.)
加油！异邦的客人，要带着虔诚的心来认真喂食才行啊！
You can do it, outlander! You must feed it with a sincere heart!
尽管听不懂大地兽的语言，但你似乎感受到了它的喜悦…如果不是错觉的话。
Although you don't understand the dromas's language, you seem to sense its joy... if it's not just your imagination.
尽管听不懂大地兽的语言，但你似乎感受到了它对你的不屑…希望这是你的错觉。
Although you don't understand the dromas's language, you seem to feel its disdain towards you... hopefully, that's just your imagination.
失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.
哎，看来这个办法根本没奏效啊。
Well, looks it doesn't work at all.
不，只是到时间了。去老地方看看吧，它准在那。
No, it's just that the time has come. Let's check its usual spot. It'll surely be there.
你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.
大地兽疯跑了几圈后，慢悠悠地回到了工坊……
After a few laps, it leisurely returns to the workshop...
…对大地兽说「我爱你」就可以吗？那我很擅长哦。
...Would saying "I love you" to the dromas work? I'm pretty good at that.
倒不用做到这个程度，就是对着它弹弹琴，唱唱小曲，让这头大地兽的心情变好。
No need to go that far. Just play some tunes or sing a little to cheer it up.
加油！我知道你们很会辅助队友，要带着虔诚的心来认真弹唱才行啊！
Come on! I know you're great at supporting others. Do it sincerely and earnestly!
Alright, I'll give it a shot.
「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
"Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"
「离愁时是我视力最差的时候，放眼望去，满街都是她的影子——」
"When the Parting Hour clouds my vision, everywhere I look, I see her shadow —"
失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.
哎，看来这个办法也没用啊。
Well, looks it doesn't work at all, either.
发生什么事了？为什么这头大地兽听到我的歌声就逃走了，唱得有那么差吗？
What happened? Why did the dromas run away when I started singing? Was it really that bad?
和你没关系，只是到时间了。去老地方吧。
No, it's just that the time has come. Let's check its usual spot.
你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.
大地兽疯跑了几圈后，慢悠悠地回到了工坊……
After a few laps, it leisurely returns to the workshop...
嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
加油！全奥赫玛最美的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真讨好它才行啊！
Keep it up! Okhema's most beautiful dromas deserves your utmost effort to win its heart!
…这不是虔诚就能解决的事吧？
...This isn't something sincerity can solve, right?
我看它们的进展挺不错的。
失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.
Let's go and check the usual spot.
你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.
完了，万策尽了，能用的办法都用过了，可那头失恋的大地兽仍旧义无反顾地在道路上狂奔，不由得让我想起了曾听过的一首民谣……
It's hopeless — we've tried every idea, and yet the heartbroken dromas continues to sprint down the road with reckless abandon. That reminds me of an old ballad I once heard...
啊，我的脚步跌跌撞撞，只为奔向你——
Ah, my steps stumble and stagger to run towards you—
The power of love, isn't it amazing?
你瞧，它又来了。我都懒得去拦…咦，这次还不一样？
Look, it's coming again. I don't even bother stopping it anymore... Huh? Something's different this time.
失恋的大地兽再次从你们面前呼啸而过，只不过现在多了好几个跟在后面的人。
The heartbroken dromas charges past once more, but now it's followed by several people trailing behind.
列队！齐步跑！紧跟殿下的步伐！
Line up! March in step! Keep pace with His Highness!
机会啊！好不容易找到和它相关的人了，走，我们去把他们拦下来。
This is our chance! We finally found someone connected to it. Let's stop them.
砰——你再次感受到了天旋地转的滋味。但还未等你倒下，便被结实的胳膊扶住了。
Bang — You feel the world spin once again, but before you can fall, a strong arm catches you.
抱歉啊，我们在这里跑操，不小心撞倒了你。没什么大事吧？
Sorry about that. We were jogging here and accidentally knocked you over. Are you alright?
喂，对奥赫玛人这么友善干嘛？他们在排挤悬锋人的时候，可没这么好的语气！
Hey, why are you being so kind to these Okhemans? When they were ostracizing the Kremnoans, they weren't using such nice words!
但确实是我们有错在先，若非是科可波阁下奔跑的速度过快，这位公民也不会受伤。
True, we were at fault first. If not for Kokopo's incredible speed, this citizen wouldn't have been injured.
悬锋人不会停下。击碎挡在前方的所有东西，是流淌在我们血液里的本能！
Kremnoans don't stop for anyone. Breaking through everything in our path — that's what flows through our veins!
好吧，你想你已经明白这群人的身份了。
Alright, you think you've figured out who these people are.
你知道的，万敌是我兄弟。
You know, Mydei is a brother to me.
So Mydei leaves, and now you're stirring up trouble!?
咦？！啊…原来你是殿下的朋友，那就好说话了。对不起，是我们的错。
Huh!? Oh... so you're a friend of His Highness? That's different. Sorry, this was our mistake.
那又如何？殿下是交代过我们要和奥赫玛人友善相处，可这难道意味着我们要步步退让，苟且偷生，丢掉悬锋人的尊严和荣耀吗？！
And what of it? His Highness instructed us to treat the Okhemans amicably, but does that mean we must retreat with every step, live dishonorably, and abandon the dignity and glory of the Kremnoans!?
先就事论事吧。殿下的朋友，自然也是我们的朋友。别失了礼数，让异乡客人以为我们是只懂得作战的莽夫。

Let's focus on the matter at hand. A friend of His Highness is naturally our friend as well. Don't lose your manners, or the foreign guest might think we're nothing but brutes who only know how to fight.
所以…呃，我插句话，你们就是这头大地兽的主人？
So... uh, let me interrupt. Are you the owners of this dromas?
不是。科可波阁下的主人从来只有一位，那便是万敌殿下。
No. Kokopo belongs to only one master, and that is His Highness, Mydei.
详细地说，科可波阁下的全名为「悬锋猛兽•科可波三世」，乃是陪伴过万敌殿下四处征战的坐骑，骁勇善战，勇冠三军，锐不可当。

To be precise, Kokopo's full name is "The Fierce Beast of Kremnos: Kokopo III." It was the loyal steed of Lord Mydei, accompanying him through countless battles — valiant, peerless in combat, and utterly unstoppable.
只是，我们的王离开后，科可波阁下的性情，也因深重思念而变得反常……
But ever since our king left, Kokopo's temperament has grown erratic, burdened by profound longing...
确实。古语说道，孤独是足以致死的疾病，想必科可波阁下也是念主心切，外加不适应城内的安逸环境，才会做出这等狂放的行径吧。

Indeed. The old saying goes, "Loneliness is a fatal ailment." It seems Kokopo, too, longs deeply for its master. Struggling to adapt to the tranquil life within the city walls has only exacerbated its restlessness.
呵，我们…这些被留下来的悬锋人，也何尝不是如此呢？
Heh. And we, the Kremnoans left behind — aren't we the same?
So what are you doing now?
We... made a fool of ourselves in front of you.
古语说，孤独是足以致死的疾病，想必科可波阁下也是念主心切，外加不适应城内的安逸环境，才会做出这等狂放的行径。

The old saying goes, "Loneliness is a fatal ailment." It seems Kokopo, too, longs deeply for its master. Struggling to adapt to the tranquil life within the city walls has only exacerbated its restlessness.
呵，而我们…这些被留下来的悬锋人，也何尝不是如此呢？
Heh. And we, the Kremnoans left behind — aren't we the same?
悬锋人生来便与征战相伴，兵器是我们的手足，盔甲是我们的华服。可现在，让我们放下所有荣耀，拿起锄头与算盘…我没法轻易做到。

Born into a life of war, weapons are like our limbs, and armor is our finest attire. But now, we Kremnoans are told to put down our glory, pick up hoes and abacuses... It's not something I can easily accept.
对故乡的眷念，对价值的渴求，对王的依赖，还有被迫融入死敌城邦的隔阂…我们只有继续跟在科可波阁下的身后奔跑，才能稍微化解心头的苦闷。

Yearning for our homeland, for meaning, for our king... Being forced to integrate into the city of our enemies — there's a gap too wide to bridge. Only by continuing to run after Kokopo can we soothe the turmoil in our hearts.
就好像，大家仍在随殿下作战那般……
It's as if... we're still following His Highness into battle...
哎，身处和平环境的人们，又如何能明白这样的心境呢？他们只会觉得悬锋人好斗、扰民、性情暴躁，动不动就将「战死」挂在嘴边，却不知道……

Also, how could those who've always lived in peace understand this? To them, Kremnoans are just belligerent troublemakers, prone to anger and always talking of "dying in battle." But they don't realize...
在这样的世界中，能平静活着便是种奢侈。而悬锋的王为他们扛起了重量。
In such a world, being able to live peacefully is a luxury. And the King of Kremnos bore that weight for them.
是啊，这种「纷争」的后遗症，总需要时间去克服。只不过……
True. It's just the scars of Strife — something that takes time to heal. However...
Got it, you're just looking for a substitute.
不如说是「纷争」的后遗症吧，总需要时间去克服。只不过……
More like the scars of Strife... but it takes time to heal. But...
不用克服，悬锋人会找到自己的道路。走吧，科可波阁下，我们回家。
There's no need to heal. We Kremnoans will find our path. Come on, Kokopo, let's go home.
去找我们的王，去需要我们的地方。这里不欢迎，我们离开便是。
Let's find our king, and go to where we're needed. If we're unwelcome here, then we'll leave.
——奥赫玛的城门口，我会带着科可波阁下在那等你们，想随我返乡的，就自己来吧。悬锋城不会拒绝勇士，但也不欢迎懦弱之徒。
At the gates of Okhema, I'll wait with Kokopo. Come to join me if you want to return. Castrum Kremnos welcomes warriors but does not tolerate the cowards.
啧，悬锋族人的命运确实可悲可叹。但现在，我总算搞明白了一件事——
Tch. The fate of the Kremnoans is indeed tragic and lamentable. But now, you finally realize one thing —
You forgot to ask them for money?
And I even got hit twice.
原来…<color=#dbc291ff>那头大地兽的恋爱对象，就是万敌啊！</color>
So... <color=#dbc291ff>that dromas' true love is none other than Mydei!</color>
要不…再想想？返乡的路途遥远，城外还有游荡的怪物，我担心你们的安全。
Maybe... think it over again? The journey home is long, and there are monsters outside the city. I'm worried about your safety.
别想了！我就算死在外面，也不愿在异邦的庇护下苟且偷生。悬锋的古训都被你们丢到脑后了吗，在那温热的浴池里泡得软烂不堪了吗？！

No more thinking! I'd rather die outside than survive under the protection of a foreign land. Have you forgotten the ancient creed of Kremnos? Have you soaked in those warm baths so long that you've gone soft!?
可这是王的意志！你要公然违背万敌殿下的命令吗？
But this is the will of our king! Are you going to openly defy Lord Mydei's orders?
殿下选择独自返乡，成为整个翁法罗斯的守护者，不就是希望我们能过上和平的生活，不必再与刀剑为伴吗！为什么非得要为那传统流血才行？
His Highness chose to return home alone and became the Guardian of Amphoreus so that we could live peacefully, free from the company of blades. Why must we bleed for tradition to prove ourselves?
那你倒是告诉我，该怎么在这活下去啊？！我只学过挥剑的本事，菜刀我使不来，更受不了向客人谄媚的生活。我是战士，不是个卖笑的！
Then tell me — how do we live here!? All I know is how to wield a sword. I can't handle a kitchen knife, let alone a life of flattering guests. I'm a warrior, not some grinning entertainer!
不管有多少人愿意跟上来，我已经决意要回家了。走，科可波阁下。
No matter how many choose to follow, I've made up my mind — I'm going home.
既然…我们都将科可波阁下视作殿下的化身，离开了大地兽的帮助，你也难以抵达悬锋城，不如…未来的路，就交由它来决定吧。
Since we all regard Kokopo as His Highness's embodiment, you won't reach Castrum Kremnos without its help. Perhaps... let it decide the path ahead.
异乡的勇士，万敌殿下的同伴，请你为悬锋族人见证此行的结局——
As a warrior from the outlands, a companion of Lord Mydei, please bear witness to our choice —
这是什么新型的占卜仪式吗？
Is this some new kind of divination ceremony?
科可波阁下，听我诉说——我知道悬锋族人在奥赫玛过得极为不易，也深知适应绝非一朝一夕便能完成，但这是我们必须走的路。
Kokopo, hear my plea — I know the Kremnoans struggle in Okhema, and adaptation isn't something achieved overnight. But this is the path we must walk.
悬锋的王在遥远处浴血奋战，我们理应支持他的决定，为他免除后顾之忧。
The King of Kremnos is far away, shedding blood for us. We should respect his will and ease his burdens.
现在返乡绝非勇猛之举，反而是懦弱的行径——那是从殿下委托的重任前、从新的战场中逃走，拒绝改变，贪图舒适，害怕无法掌控的未来。

Returning home now isn't an act of courage, it's one of cowardice — an escape from His Highness' entrusted mission, from this new battlefield. It's a refusal to change, a retreat into comfort, a fear of an uncontrollable future.
悬锋人的字典里，没有*恐惧*二字。以前没有，往后也不应该有。这才是我们的传统，我们能自称为「悬锋族人」的根基。
In the Kremnoan creed, there is no fear. There never was, and there never should be. That is our tradition, the foundation of our identity as Kremnoans.
科可波阁下，请做出你的判断吧——
大地兽望向故乡的方向，发出低沉的悲鸣，可回应它的只有淡漠的云，以及空洞的风。
The dromas gazes towards the direction of its homeland, letting out a low, mournful cry. But the only response is indifferent clouds and hollow winds.
不知道在这里，它能否听到悬锋城内正响起的厮杀声？在深沉的睡眠中，它是否也曾梦到过与主人共同征战的时光？是否仍觉得心神激荡，想再回到那个时候？

Here, can it still hear the sounds of battle ringing out in Castrum Kremnos? In its deep sleep, has it dreamed of warring alongside its master? Does it still feel the stir of its soul, yearning to return to those days?
大地兽望向身后的悬锋族人，那是曾随它的主人出生入死过的战士。可无论如何用荣誉和尊严做包装，他们都是活生生的、会受伤会流血的人们。

The dromas turns to look at the Kremnoans behind it — warriors who had fought alongside its master. No matter how they dressed their wounds in honor and pride, they are still people who bled and felt pain.
它和他们都还有很长的路要走，长到连{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}都难以给出准确的衡量。因为生活绝非神的权能，而是人的意志。
They have a long road ahead of them — so long that not even the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#} could measure it precisely. Because life isn't divine providence — it's human resolve.
加油！失恋的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真做决定才行啊！
Come on, heartbroken dromas, you've got to make a serious decision with a sincere heart!
Hey, read the room, will ya!
瞬间，清亮的啼鸣打破了现场的沉寂。
In that instant, a clear cry pierced the silence.
嗡嗡！呜嗡！呜呜嗡！呜嗡嗡！呜嗡嗡！呜——
Grumph! Grumph! Grumphhh! Grumphhh! Grumphhhh! Grumph —
大地兽做出了选择。它转身朝向奥赫玛的城门，头也不回地走去。
The dromas has made its choice. It turns toward Okhema's gates, walking away without looking back.
这样么。第二次命令，我也没有继续违抗的道理了。到此为止吧。
So that's it. The second command — I have no reason to disobey further. It ends here.
或许你可以去工坊找份新工作，陪科可波阁下散步的活可不是谁都能干的。
Perhaps you can find work in the workshop. Walking Kokopo isn't a job just anyone can do.
希望所有悬锋人，都能顺利找到自己的新生活。尽管很困难，但若是从最开始就想着逃走，逃回熟悉的地方，必然不会有改变。
May every Kremnoan find a new life. Though it's difficult, fleeing back to familiarity from the start ensures no change will ever come.
也感谢你的见证，愿{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}捍卫你。
And thank you for witnessing this. May the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} watch over you.
呜呜…失恋的大地兽，你好温柔……
Oooh... heartbroken dromas, you're so gentle...
呜呜…太感动了，太好哭了，我终于明白了——
Oooh... I'm so moved, so tearful... I finally understand —
不会还要讲大地兽的爱情吧？
Are we about to hear more about the dromas' love story?
原来…<color=#dbc291ff>那头大地兽的恋爱对象，是悬锋城啊！</color>
Turns out... <color=#dbc291ff>the dromas' true love is Castrum Kremnos!</color>
你是来探望科可波三世的吧？来得正好，看——那些悬锋人给它准备了什么！
You're here to check on Kokopo III, right? Perfect timing — look what the Kremnoans have prepared for him!
你惊奇地发现那头号称「全奥赫玛最美」的大地兽再次出现在了工坊里，而科可波三世则站在它身旁，用充满柔情蜜意的语气轻哼着。
You're surprised to find the dromas once hailed as the most beautiful in all Okhema back in the workshop, with Kokopo III standing beside her, humming in a tone filled with tenderness and affection.
…好吧，是你最讨厌的，歪歪腻腻的幸福模样。
...Well, it's that disgustingly sweet image of happiness you hate the most.
不管悬锋人的问题能否得到处理，但至少你解决了一头失恋大地兽的烦恼，不是吗？
No matter whether the Kremnoans' issues are resolved, at least you've helped this heartbroken dromas find some peace, haven't you?
科可波三世，你一定要幸福啊……
Kokopo III, you must be happy...
科可波阁下，在这过得还习惯吗，要不要再给你找点红土来？
Kokopo, is life here to your liking? Should I bring you more redsoil?
哼，还是悬锋城的土质尝起来更美味，对吧？
Hmph, but Kremnos' soil must taste better, right?
（那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
(Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)
We must obey the king's command.
But I quite like the baths...
我擅长替任何人代写情诗，有需求的话，随时来找我就好哦。
I specialize in ghostwriting love poems. If you need one, feel free to come and ask anytime.
蕾莉亚！我亲爱的，噢！你那美丽的双眸怎么不再闪动着明媚的光？
Lelia! My love! Oh, why have those beautiful eyes of yours lost their radiant glow?
埃德加…我…这一生过得很幸福。
Edgar... I... had a wonderful life.
发生什么事了，是啊，我也曾想这样大声地问！
"What happened?" *bitter laugh* I asked myself the same question that day, screaming it until my voice gave out.
Why are you just standing by and watching?
是啊，你们这些铁石心肠的看客！为什么只是看着！
Yeah, you heartless or something? Why are you just watching!?
不行！今天谁都不许离开！我要残酷的命运血债血偿！
No! No one is leaving today! I want the cruel fate to pay my debts with blood!
从出生起，我被丢弃在海岸礁石之上；自记事起，我便度过了痛苦的童年时光！
From birth, I was abandoned on a rocky shore. For as long as I can remember, my childhood is miserable!
后来我接受了悬锋城最严厉的选拔，却目睹与我交好的战士们都在战场上死去！
Later, I underwent the harshest trials in Castrum Kremnos, only to witness my comrades fall one by one on the battlefield!
在黑夜的纷乱中，我杀死了一位瘦削的老妇！
In the chaos of the night, I killed a frail old woman!
后来我才知道，那是我从未谋面的母亲！啊——！
Only later did I learn she was my estranged mother! Ahhh—!
而如今我又惨遭陷害，亲手杀害了心爱的妻子，啊！我的手上满是悔恨的鲜血！
And now, I've been entrapped, forced to murder my beloved wife! Ah! My hands are soaked in regretful blood!
是神明！是那些高高在上的泰坦！
是神明！害我众叛亲离，妻离子散……
The gods! They've left me isolated, betrayed, and bereft...
你这丑恶的神明！我为你奉献了一切！你曾经多少次舐过我的祭品！
You despicable deity! I gave you everything! How many times have you enjoyed my offerings!
我曾在庄严的夜里，在烈火祭坛上献上食物，那是不能与别的泰坦共享的祭礼！
I once, in solemn nights, placed food upon the blazing altar, offerings not to be shared with other Titans!
哎，你这熟睡的神明，从不怜悯我的痛苦！
Yet you, slumbering deity, show no pity for my suffering!
为什么神明要将这*不公平的命运*加诸于我的身上？
Why must the gods impose this unfair fate upon me?
我不知道，我只是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}祝福的旅人。
I don't know... I'm just a traveler blessed by {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}.
And you, what do you say?
我不知道，我只是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}祝福的诗人。
I don't know... I'm merely a poet blessed by {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}.
我是阿基维利祝福的无名客。
I am one of the Nameless blessed by Akivili.
...Do we even have a Titan called that?
因为神明很器重你，这是试炼。
Because the gods value you. This is a trial.
它凭什么给我试炼，我不要试炼！
What gave them the rights to make me go through trials? I don't want trials!
突然问我为什么，我不知道啊…
Why do you ask me so suddenly? I don't know!
没人能告诉我为什么！我好恨！我好恨啊！
No one can tell me why! I hate it! I hate it so much!
神明为什么要创造这样无情的世界，我恨创造出这样世界的神明……
Why did they create such a merciless world? I hate those who made this world...
I want to slay the gods!
…埃德加怎么跑了？剧本上没有写这段啊？他这人，戏好多……
...Why did Edgar run off? This wasn't in the script. He's always being so dramatic...
他要干什么？我们还是赶紧追上去吧，那家伙好像还没从戏里出来！
What's he up to? We should catch up! He doesn't seem to have snapped out of the role!
什么情况，还排练不排练了？
What's going on? Are we still rehearsing?
伊俄那家伙大嚷着「我要弑神」就冲出去了…不会出事吧？
Eio stormed off yelling, "I want to slay the gods!"... This won't end well, right?
…看起来今天也排练不了了，我先走了。
...Looks like rehearsal's over for today. I'm leaving.
住手啊！伊俄，你是否清醒？
Stop! Eio, do you know what you're doing?
不要叫我伊俄，我是埃德加！我要向不公平的命运作出反抗，我要弑神！
Don't call me Eio. I'm Edgar! I'll defy unfair fate and slay the gods!
你找错神了，刻法勒在另一边！
You're chasing the wrong god. Kephale is on the other side!
刻法勒？刻法勒从来没有给我残酷的命运。
Kephale? Kephale has never given me a cruel fate.
这又是什么泰坦，我没见过…
Another Titan? I haven't seen this one before...
我不是泰坦，我怎么可能是泰坦！
I am no Titan! How could I be a Titan!?
闭嘴！满口谎言的伪神，我早已受够了命运的摆弄！
Shut up! You deceitful false god, I'm done with fate's manipulation!
你夺走了我的战友，你夺走了我的母亲，还有妻子，你好狠的心！
You took my comrades! You took my mother! You even took my wife! You heartless monster!
说归说，闹归闹，别拿生命开玩笑。
Say and do what you will, but don't play games with lives.
说时迟，那时快。路过的圣城卫士达利安，与你一同阻止了伊俄。
In the nick of time, passing Holy City Guard Dorian helped you stop Eio.
认识。我是剧作家，他是演员。按理来说，他正在排练《被缚的埃德加》……
Yes. I'm a playwright, and he's an actor. By right, he's rehearsing The Shackled Edgar...
我是《被缚的埃德加》的主演伊俄，剧中扮演的就是埃德加。
I'm the lead actor, Eio, playing Edgar in The Shackled Edgar.
所以，刚才，是在干什么？演戏？
So, just now — was that acting?
怎么可能是演戏？我刚才差点被这混蛋掐到断气。喂，伊俄，你得给我个说法！
How could it be acting? That lunatic nearly strangled me! Hey, Eio, explain yourself!
我只是太入戏了…太过于投入了，你懂吧？就是情绪上来了，收不住。
I was just too deep into the role... too immersed. You get it, right? The emotions just overwhelmed me.
你收不住情绪，关我什么事？我刚打算休息一会……
What does your lack of control over your emotion have to do with me? I was just about to take a break...
你想嘛，「我」在戏中不是被命运左右，失去了至亲血肉，对神明感到了失望，对吗？
Think about it: In the play, "I" am manipulated by fate, losing my blood relations and loved ones. Disillusioned with the gods, isn't that right?
「我」那时应该神志不清，被仇恨蒙蔽了双眼，内心扭曲，一心想要反抗神明，对吗？
By that point, "I" should be deranged, blinded by hatred, twisted inside, and intent on defying them, correct?
然后，「我」就要把创世神，也就是创作《被缚的埃德加》的剧作家，给杀了，对吗？
Then, "I" should kill the creator, the playwright of The Shackled Edgar, right?
Yes, of cour— wait a minute, as if!
剧本，不就是，他的命运吗？剧作家，就是他的创世神。
A script is his fate, and the playwright is the creator.
早在伊俄还在合唱队时，我就觉得他脑袋有问题了。
I suspected Eio wasn't all there even back when he was in the choir.
I've seen this kind of avant-garde work before...
我写的这出悲剧可不是那种故事。
What I've written here is not a simple avant-garde tragedy.
So, is that it? Case closed?
不行，我不能就这样结束…也不能让你这山之民大个子来主持公道。
No, I can't just let this end... nor will I let you, a towering Mountain Dweller, act as the arbiter of justice.
…这位朋友，我看你既不认识我们，也不涉及利益相关。你古道热肠，定能在这种「未有先例之事」上赏罚分明。而你的决断，我们俩皆能信服。

...My friend, you appear to know neither of us, nor do you have any stake in this. With your impartiality and sense of justice, you're the perfect choice to rule on this "unprecedented matter." We both agree to trust your decision.
我想让你担任「一日{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}」，主持审判。
I propose you serve as the One-Day {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, to preside over this trial.
我愿意接受符合{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}精神的裁判。
I'll accept a judgment in line with the spirit of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}.
嗯？你不知道吗？圣城中发生纠纷时，并非所有事务都劳烦元老。双方同意时，我们会找来「一日塔兰顿」来担当仲裁，解决纠纷。

Huh? You've never heard of it? In the holy city, not every dispute requires the elders' intervention. When both parties agree, we appoint a One-Day Talanton — a neutral party to mediate and settle disputes.
「一日塔兰顿」必须是纠纷双方都能信服的公道之人。向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}起誓后，双方也必须接受「一日塔兰顿」的裁决。
This arbiter must be someone trusted by both sides to be fair. Once they swear in the name of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, both parties are bound to accept their verdict.
有意思，就让我来审判吧。
Well, this sounds intriguing. Very well, I'll serve as the judge.
That works for both of them.
首先声明，我不打白工的。
But first, let me be clear — I don't work for free.
我们承诺向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的代言人支付合理报酬。
We promise to offer fair payment as representatives of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}.
你们二位，各自准备辩词，灰发{F#女士}{M#男士}，你来裁判。我们在辩场见。
Good. Then you two, prepare your arguments. Gray-haired {F#lady}{M#gentleman}, you'll be the judge. We'll meet at the trial grounds.
今日，于排练场中，演员伊俄，试图谋害编剧，事件——
Today, in the rehearsal hall, actor Eio stands accused of attempting to murder the playwright. This case—
将由，「一日塔兰顿」{NICKNAME}公平裁决。各位，请庄严宣誓——
—will be fairly judged by One-Day Talanton, {NICKNAME}. Everyone, please commit to a solemn oath...
In the name of Talanton, I solemnly swear...
我第一次当泰坦，没经验…
First time being a Titan here, kind of new to this...
以塔兰顿之名，我们在此庄严宣誓——我们将手持天平与宝剑，接受众神和众人的监督，不欺骗，不隐瞒，维护律法和秩序。

In the name of Talanton, we solemnly swear: We shall uphold justice with scales and sword, under the watchful eyes of gods and mortals alike. We will not deceive, we will not conceal, and we will protect the law and its order.
双方就位，请为自己辩护吧。
Both sides are now ready. Present your cases.
当时，我只是演戏太过投入了。气势汹汹的，就像是被什么附身了，这不能怪我啊。
At the time, I was simply too immersed in the performance. It was like... something possessed me! I am not at fault here.
别扯什么附身，不是你，还能是谁呢？{NICKNAME}大人与达利安是亲眼所见。
Don't give me that "possessed" nonsense. If it wasn't you, then who else could it be? {NICKNAME} and Dorian both saw it with their own eyes.
我反对！我没有伤害你的理由，但是《被缚的埃德加》的埃德加有！
I object! I had no reason to harm you, but Edgar in The Shackled Edgar certainly did!
是你的剧情设置让埃德加家破人亡，他对此感到不满，想要报复，有充分的犯罪动机！
It's your plot that drove Edgar's family to ruin! His resentment towards you gave him plenty of motive for revenge!
我反对！埃德加应该不知道创世神在哪里！
Objection! Edgar shouldn't even know where the creator resides!
你告诉他…我反对！再说了，《被缚的埃德加》的世界观是一个多泰坦的世界观。
You... told him? Objection! Besides, the world of The Shackled Edgar is polytheistic.
一个神明（编剧）左右不了这个世界！
One god (playwright) can't control the whole world!
神明的职责各不相同，你的罪过与其他泰坦无关。
Each deity has its own responsibilities. Your sins don't concern the others.
可编剧根本没有什么发言权。
But playwrights don't even have much say in the script.
没错，你们演员也参与创作，你为什么不对自己动手呢？
True, actors do contribute to the creative process. Why not direct your fury at yourself?
别管我，我的脑子正在烧烤…
Leave me alone, my brain is still trying to make sense of it...
你，「一日塔兰顿」，应当头脑清晰。
You, One-Day Talanton, are supposed to keep a clear head.
*唐突地清嗓*发言快结束了，你要仔细分辨。
*Suddenly clear throat* The address is almost over, be sure to make good judgment.
我承认这里存在着一些悖论，但按常识来说，埃德加不会认知到剧本外的世界。
I admit there are some paradoxes here, but by common sense, Edgar wouldn't be aware of a world beyond the script.
只有你伊俄能认知到剧本外的世界，所以动手的就是你，伊俄！
Only you, Eio, have such awareness. Thus, you're the one who acted!
不，观测是取决于第三者的。
No, observation depends on the third party!
我，伊俄，同时认识你忒斯庇斯，和《被缚的埃德加》的埃德加。反过来说，埃德加能借助我，伊俄，认识你《被缚的埃德加》的编剧，忒斯庇斯。
I, Eio, am connected to both you, Thespis, and The Shackled Edgar. Therefore, Edgar, through me, gains awareness of his creator, Thespis.
我反对！你就是伊俄，你不是埃德加！你不能替埃德加发声。
Objection! You are Eio, not Edgar! You can't speak on Edgar's behalf.
「我是谁」这个问题一直很有争议，这是由他人决定的吗？还是自己决定自己是谁？
The question of "Who am I?" has always been debated. Is identity decided by others? Or by oneself?
我反对「他人决定论」，否则，你说我是猪，我就真的是猪了吗？
I reject the idea that identity is determined by others. Otherwise, if someone called me a pig, would I really be a pig?
换言之，人只能自己决定自己是谁。我认为我是伊俄，我也可以认为自己是埃德加。
In short, one determines their own identity. I see myself as Eio, but I can also choose to see myself as Edgar.
…别扯那些了。你只是想说，埃德加应该接受惩罚，而伊俄无罪？
...Enough philosophy. Are you just arguing that Edgar should be punished, while Eio is innocent?
可你要是真的杀了我，剧情就不存在了，埃德加也就不存在了，就只有你伊俄了！
But if you had actually killed me, the story would cease to exist, Edgar wouldn't exist, and only you, Eio, would remain!
真到那时，你还能如此狡辩吗？
Could you still twist logic then?
Fortunately, it didn't come to that.
尊敬的，「一日塔兰顿」，{NICKNAME}大人，公正的裁断，请做出。
Honorable One-Day Talanton, {M#Sir}{F#Madam} {NICKNAME}, please deliver your just verdict.
Eio, the full responsibility is yours.
我，我明白了，我接受全责。
I understand. I accept full responsibility.
伊俄，你和埃德加各一半责任。
Eio, the responsibility is shared — half yours, half Edgar's.
从犯之责，我明白了，我接受。
As an accomplice. I understand. I accept.
Thespis, the full responsibility is yours.
是我挨了一顿打，我还要负全责吗？我以为我们在讨论对伊俄惩罚的轻重……
What? I took the beating, and now I'm to blame? I thought we were discussing how to punish Eio, not me...
It's your fault for writing something so terrible.
It's your fault for writing something too brilliant.
Both of you deserve fifty lashes.
好吧，谁让我也宣誓了呢。
Well, I did swear an oath, so... fair enough.
感谢您的公平裁决，「一日塔兰顿」{NICKNAME}大人。
Thank you for your fair judgment, Honorable One-Day Talanton, {M#Sir}{F#Madam} {NICKNAME}.
一场小小闹剧就此结束，围观人群散去…你注意到「神礼观众」似乎意犹未尽。
The commotion ended, and the crowd dispersed... but you notice the Theoros seems far from satisfied.
「一日塔兰顿」阁下，真是有趣的裁判。
{M#Sir}{F#Madam} One-Day Talanton, an intriguing verdict indeed.
我听说，曾有一名铁匠日夜钻研雕刻技艺，有一天他梦见了一位完美的少女，于是他用象牙雕刻出了一座栩栩如生的少女雕像。
I once heard of a blacksmith who devoted his life to perfecting the art of sculpture. One night, he dreamed of a flawless maiden. Inspired, he carved a lifelike ivory statue of her.
后来{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}垂怜他，神明用奇迹为那座雕像赋予了生命，并让他们二人结为夫妻，过上了幸福的生活。
Moved by his passion, {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} blessed the statue with life, and they became a happy couple.
我好像听说过这样的故事。
I've heard a story like that before.
所以，为什么说起故事来？
So why are we talking about stories now?
呵呵，我更喜欢这种创造者与造物和谐共存的故事。
Heh, I just prefer tales where creators and creations live in harmony.
创造者若投来的是爱，造物便会回应爱。若创造者投来的是遗忘，造物便会回应遗忘。
When a creator offers love, their creation responds with love. But if the creator casts them aside, the creation answers with oblivion.
...It's late. I should take my leave.
（「一日塔兰顿」…不就是公益法官吗？帮忙就帮到底吧……）
("One-Day Talanton"... Isn't that just a fancy name for a public interest judge? Guess I'm in it for the long haul...)
(...Why are there so many people here?)
（虽然过程莫名其妙的…至少「一日塔兰顿」的奖励还不赖。）
(At least the reward for this odd role isn't half bad.)
啊，和{F#女士}{M#先生}您报一报喜，我已经不会再小偷小摸啦，现在也不用缩在箱子里睡觉了。
Ah, {F#miss}{M#mister}, I wanted to share some good news — I'm not stealing petty things anymore, and I don't have to curl up in a box to sleep now.
云石市集的大家很照顾我，我现在过得很开心，只是……
Everyone at the Marmoreal Market has looked after me. I'm quite happy nowadays, but...
{F#女士}{M#先生}不记得我了吗…我叫希瑞雅，之前偷拿过你的钱袋。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you don't remember me? I'm Serena, and I once stole your pouch of coins.
自从上次的事以后，大家的帮助让我很开心，我也在努力改变自己，只是……
Since that incident, I've been so happy with everyone's help, and I'm striving to change myself. But...
我听说，在比云石天宫还要高的山上，有很多人聚在一起，决定了奥赫玛的未来。
I heard that on a mountain even higher than the Marmoreal Palace, many people have gathered to decide Okhema's future.
市集的大家都在谈论这件事。虽然大家很信任阿格莱雅大人，但也有不好的传言。我感到害怕……
Everyone in the market is talking about it. Though they trust Lady Aglaea, there are also ominous rumors. It scares me...
奥赫玛，会不会也像阿卡索斯那样，变成一个黑漆漆、乱糟糟，可怕怪物遍地走的地方？
Will Okhema become like Icatus — dark, chaotic, full of terrifying monsters everywhere?
所以，我想去拜访一下伟大的刻法勒。据说正是因为它的庇佑，圣城才能挺立至今…也许只要和它说说话，我就不害怕了。
That's why I want to visit the great Kephale. They say the holy city stands to this day thanks to their protection... maybe if I talk to them, I won't be afraid.
但守卫大叔不让我进去……
But the guard won't let me in...
{F#女士}{M#先生}，你是奥赫玛的大英雄，肯定能进出云崖。你可以带我去刻法勒的身边吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you're Okhema's great hero, so you must be able to come and go at Dawncloud. Could you bring me to Kephale?
Rules are made to be followed. Let's not go.
嗯…我就不添麻烦啦，但我想再待一会儿，说不定有其他办法能进去……
Mmm... I won't be a bother, but I want to wait a little longer. Maybe there's another way in...
那个，可以拜托你去和守卫大叔沟通一下吗，他看上去有些凶，我不敢过去……
Um, would you mind talking to the guard? He looks kinda scary, and I'm too scared to approach...
{F#女士}{M#先生}，你是改变心意了吗？
Rules are made to be followed. Let's not go.
嗯…我就不添麻烦啦，但我想再待一会儿，说不定有其他办法能进去……
Mmm... I won't be a bother, but I want to wait a little longer. Maybe there's another way in...
那个，可以拜托你去和守卫大叔沟通一下吗，他看上去有些凶，我不敢过去……
Um, would you mind talking to the guard? He looks kinda scary, and I'm too scared to approach...
你好，{NICKNAME}贵宾，请问有什么能帮到您？
Good day, distinguished guest, {NICKNAME}. How may I help you?
You— have you heard my story?
当然，您是元老院专门嘱咐过、记录在册的贵宾。听说您和其他黄金裔一同击败了尼卡多利，我哪敢怠慢呢。
Of course. You're a VIP the Council of Elders specifically mentioned and recorded. I heard you and the other Chrysos Heirs defeated Nikador — there's no way I'd slack off around you.
帮我个忙，我想带个人进去。
Do me a favor: I want to bring someone in.
I want to bring someone in.
贵宾，您说的是那个小女孩吗？
Distinguished guest, are you referring to that small girl?
这…恕难从命，我们也有职责在身，不能随意给平民放行，还请贵宾理解一二……
This... my apologies, but we have our duties. We can't casually allow civilians through. I hope you understand...
Try confusing him with a trick.
其实，那个小女孩可不是平民……
Actually, that small girl isn't just some ordinary civilian...
她是元老院凯妮斯的孙女！
She's the granddaughter of Elder Caenis!
凯妮斯大人的孙女？嗯…硬要说的话，她看上去确实和那位大人有些相像……
The granddaughter of Lord Caenis? Hmm...if you insist, she does look a bit like that esteemed figure...
可要是你说的属实，她的名字和相貌应该早就记录在贵宾册里了。
But if what you're saying is true, her name and appearance should already be recorded in the VIP register.
骗不到他，得想想别的办法……
We can't fool him. We need another approach...
She's a Chrysos Heir from the outlands.
她是来自阿卡索斯的黄金裔！
She's a Chrysos Heir from Icatus!
阿卡索斯？印象里是早已覆灭的遥远城邦吧。
Icatus? If memory serves, that's a distant city-state long since fallen.
对不起，贵宾，就算是异邦的黄金裔，也得经元老院认可方能进入。
I'm sorry, honored guest. Even if she's a foreign Chrysos Heir, she needs the Council of Elders' approval to enter.
骗不到他，得想想别的办法……
We can't fool him. We need another approach...
她是继承扎格列斯之力的半神，跑得飞快的神偷，黄金裔赛飞儿！
She's Cipher, a demigod who inherited Zagreus's power, a lightning-fast master thief and Chrysos Heir!
赛飞儿，这个名字我有印象，确实是背负着神权的黄金裔，她的画像也有记录在册，容我看看。
Cipher... I do recall that name. She's indeed a Chrysos Heir endowed with divine authority. Her portrait should be on file — let me check.
守卫打开随身携带的贵宾册，找到赛飞儿的画像，又看了看几步开外的希瑞雅，皱起眉头。
The guard opens his VIP register, finds Cipher's portrait, then glances at Serena a few steps away and frowns.
Yes, she's only eight right now.
Right. She wasn't that slim in those days.
Honored guest {NICKNAME}, please don't toy with me...
你将希瑞雅的愿望如实讲给了守卫。他看上去有些动容。
You tell the guard about Serena's wish honestly. He seems somewhat moved.
我明白了…但是贵宾，你要知道，刻法勒已经陷入长眠，许久不曾给出回应了。
I see... But, honored guest, you should know that Kephale has long been in a deep slumber, and hasn't responded in ages.
而且不管怎么说，规矩就是规矩。哪怕看在贵宾你的面子上放她进去，这里人多眼杂，难免会被发现……
Also, rules are rules. Even if I let her in out of respect for you, there are so many people around that someone would surely notice...
不如这样，贵宾：明天的门扉时，你再带这个小女孩过来。那会儿人少，只要你快去快回就不会出问题…但愿吧。
Let's do this, honored guest: Come back tomorrow at the Entry Hour with the girl. Fewer people will be around then. As long as you're quick, there shouldn't be any trouble... hopefully.
你将守卫的建议告诉希瑞雅，并与她约定明天门扉时碰头。
You pass the guard's suggestion on to Serena, and agree to meet her tomorrow at the Entry Hour.
{F#女士}{M#先生}，真是麻烦你了，要陪我起个大早…守卫大叔说得没错，这会儿人确实少了许多，幸好跟他打过招呼了。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, sorry for making you get up so early... The guard was right, there are definitely fewer people now. Good thing we talked to him ahead of time.
不过他今早不在，也没见其他人把我们拦下来…{F#女士}{M#先生}，我们该往哪走？
But he's not here this morning, and nobody else stopped us... {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, where should we go from here?
女孩打量着四周的壮景，眼里充满了好奇。你突然意识到，今天过后，她可能再也没有机会拜访黎明云崖了。
The girl takes in the grand scenery with curious eyes. You suddenly realize that after today, she might never get another chance to visit Dawncloud.
机会难得，我带你稍微逛逛吧。
This is a rare opportunity. Let me show you around a bit.
好呀！我不认得路，要麻烦{F#女士}{M#先生}你带路啦。
Great! I don't know the way, so please lead on, {F#miss}{M#mister}.
哇，好壮观的壁画…比刻法勒广场的那幅还要大！
Wow, what a spectacular mural... it's even bigger than the one at Kephale Plaza!
{F#女士}{M#先生}，这上面讲的是什么呀？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, what's the story behind this mural?
A small brazier roasting big-eyed cuties.
听不大懂呢…但是这个大眼睛指的应该是艾格勒吧？我这些日子读了许多泰坦的故事，勉强认得出来。
That's kind of hard to grasp... but that big eye must be Aquila, right? I've read a bunch of Titan stories lately, so I can sort of recognize it.
感觉艾格勒的光特别亮、特别烫，人们都很害怕的样子……
Aquila's light feels so dazzling and scorching, it looks like everyone's really afraid...
这张壁画描绘的是…刻法勒接过黎明机器的场景？我好像在克帖西芬姐姐的书画集里看到过……
This mural depicts... Kephale receiving the "Dawn Device"? I think I saw that in Miss Ctesiphona's art collection...
据说，黎明机器是艾格勒赠送给刻法勒的礼物，艾格勒把许多光芒都塞进了这颗巨大的机械球里。
Supposedly, the Dawn Device was a gift from Aquila to Kephale — Aquila stuffed lots of radiance into that huge mechanical sphere.
在艾格勒闭上所有眼睛、令世界坠入黑暗之后，刻法勒从自己的王座上起身，为世人背负起最后的黎明……
After Aquila closed all their eyes and plunged the world into darkness, Kephale rose from their throne to shoulder the world's final dawn...
{F#女士}{M#先生}，你发现了吗：刚才那幅壁画里，许多人跪在地上表示臣服；而这幅壁画里，人们却自然地伸出手分享光明。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, did you notice? In the previous mural, lots of people knelt down in submission, but in this one, everyone naturally reaches out to share the light.
也许这暗示了两任烈阳之间的差别——艾格勒的光照曾经耀眼无情，而如今刻法勒的黎明却更加温暖柔和……
Maybe it's hinting at the difference between the two suns — Aquila's light was once harsh and merciless, while Kephale's dawn seems warmer and gentler...
No way... Are you for real?
谢谢你的夸奖！要是过会儿，刻法勒真的能回应我就好啦……
Thanks for the compliment! I really hope Kephale will respond to me soon...
Wow, a natural-born talent for priesthood!
谢谢你的夸奖！要是过会儿，刻法勒真的能回应我就好啦……
Thanks for the compliment! I really hope Kephale will respond to me soon...
呃，你可能有点过度解读…
Uh, you might be reading too much into it...
啊，对哦，谦逊也是重要的美德呢！要是过会儿，刻法勒能亲自告诉我一些答案就好啦……
Ah, you're right — humility is an important virtue, too! If only Kephale could personally give me some answers soon...
好漂亮的广场…周围能看到好多泰坦的符号，我都还认不全呢。
What a beautiful plaza... I see so many Titan symbols all around, and I don't recognize them all yet.
刻法勒也离我们好近…我们在这里说话，它能听到吗？
Kephale's so close to us... If we talk here, can they hear us?
呵，连如何向刻法勒行礼都不明白的稚童，还妄想让泰坦回应叨扰？
Heh, a clueless child who doesn't even know how to pay respects to Kephale, yet still thinks a Titan will answer her trivial chatter?
小女娃，我问你，你知道什么是刻法勒祭仪吗？
Young girl, let me ask: Do you know what the Kephale ritual is?
{F#女士}{M#先生}，和刻法勒说话需要学习什么复杂的仪式吗？我从没有听说过……
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, do I really need to learn these complicated rituals to talk with Kephale? I've never heard that before...
呵，小女娃，你尽可以向我请教，别被邪魔外道带歪了信仰。
Heh, little girl, you're free to ask me anything. Don't let these heretical outsiders lead your faith astray.
信仰心可没有贵贱之分。
Nobility matters not when it comes to faith.
可笑，我在这里主持了几十年的祭仪，没人比我更懂刻法勒。
Ridiculous! I've presided over the rituals for decades — no one knows Kephale better than I do.
老爷爷，市集的大家才不是邪魔外道！大家都跟我说，只要诚心和刻法勒对话，它就一定能听到！
Grandpa, the people at the market aren't heretics! Everyone says as long as we speak earnestly to Kephale, they'll definitely hear us!
可悲，如此稚童，竟已染上了顽固的恶习。正好，时候还早，我就以刻法勒大祭司的身份来矫正后辈吧。
How sad, that such a young child has already picked up these stubborn bad habits. Fine, since it's still early, I, the high priest of Kephale, shall enlighten the next generation.
Bullying someone so much younger... have you no shame?
Old-timer, go ahead — straighten us out with all your might!
呵，我可不会被你这样的小辈激怒。信仰一事，本就无关年纪大小。
Heh, someone like you can't provoke me. Faith has nothing to do with age.
小女娃，我考你一考：刻法勒的祭仪有三个流程，怎样做的？
Little girl, let me test you: The Kephale ritual has three steps. How is it performed?
将供奉放在祭坛，双手合十，诚心诵念三遍祷词。
Place the offering on the altar, fold your hands, and recite the prayer three times with sincerity.
你推崇的所谓平民祭法，连有价值的供奉都不舍得拿出来，刻法勒怎么可能给予回应？
This "civilian's rite" you favor doesn't even provide a valuable offering. Why would Kephale respond to that?
可是，大家平常都不容易，如果还要花钱买供奉……
But everyone already struggles day to day — now they'd have to spend money on an offering...?
小女娃，那不过是他们为自己的吝啬狡辩罢了。供奉乃是牺牲，没有牺牲还奢谈什么信仰？
Girl, that's just their excuse for being stingy. An offering is a sacrifice — how can you call it faith with no sacrifice?
老爷爷，我想请问，刻法勒和我们…究竟是什么关系呢？
Grandpa, may I ask what exactly the relationship between Kephale and us is?
哈哈哈！居然有人问我刻法勒和我们是什么关系？
Hahaha! Someone's actually asking me what Kephale has to do with us?
看呐，它高居云崖之巅，向奥赫玛的每一个人投去注视。我们的一切都因它的注视才得以存在。如此尊神，怎能不拜，怎能不为它献上牺牲？
Look, they sit atop Dawncloud, gazing upon every soul in Okhema. All that we are exists because of their watchful eye. A god so revered — how could we not worship and sacrifice to them?
可是，翁法罗斯的每一位吟游诗人都会说，刻法勒是全知的父、是众生的守护神。
But every bard in Amphoreus says Kephale is the all-knowing father, the guardian deity of all beings.
我不明白全知的父意味着什么…但是，它也像所有真正的爸爸一样，不会向自己的孩子索要东西。
I don't quite know what "all-knowing father" means... but like every real dad, they wouldn't demand anything from their children.
我听说，爸爸为了保护我离开阿卡索斯，高举着一块门板、在人群的后面拦着可怕的怪物。
I heard that my dad left Icatus to protect me, holding up a door plank behind the crowd to block terrifying monsters.
现在的刻法勒…不也正是为了它的造物们免遭黑暗，才高举黎明机器的吗？
Isn't Kephale doing the same now — raising the Dawn Device to keep their creations safe from darkness?
我不知道拜见尊神应该遵循何种礼仪。我只知道，见到爸爸，只要真诚地说话…就一定能得到温柔的抚慰。
I don't know what rituals you follow when meeting a god. I just know that if I speak sincerely to my dad... I'll always receive his gentle comfort.
<size=28>爸爸才不会对自己的孩子冷眼相看！</size>
<size=28>A father would never greet his children with a cold shoulder!</size>
呵，你以为我会被稚童的胡言乱语扭曲信仰么？祭仪该有的步骤，我一样都不会少做！
Heh, you think a child's naive rambling will warp my faith? I'll go through every proper step of the ritual!
刻法勒和你们是什么关系？
刻法勒…当然是众生的父亲了。
Kephale... obviously the father of all living beings.
对不起，{F#女士}{M#先生}…刚才有点没忍住。
Sorry, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}... I lost my composure just now.
不过我活这么大，早就学会了如何平复心情。现在的我已经完全振作起来了！
But I've been around long enough to know how to calm myself. I'm totally fine now!
嘿嘿…我可觉得自己已经是个大人了呢~
Hehe... I think I'm already an adult!
不怪你，怪刚才那个老头。
It's not your fault — blame that old man from before.
…等下次见到那个老爷爷，还是和他道个歉吧。他也只是活在自己的世界里……
...Next time I see that old man, I should still apologize to him. He's just living in his own world...
抬头就能看到刻法勒…虽然很高、很冷，但一伸手就能摸到黎明机器的光芒。
If you just look up, you can see Kephale... They're so tall and cold, but if you stretch out your hand, you can touch the light of the Dawn Device.
在这里说话…刻法勒一定能听见了吧。
If we speak here... surely Kephale can hear us now, right?
伟大的刻法勒啊，背负那么大的黎明机器，你一定很累吧……
O mighty Kephale, bearing that enormous Dawn Device — surely you must be exhausted...
可是，我想恳求您，千万不要把奥赫玛的光明丢下……
But I beg of you, please don't abandon the light of Okhema...
希瑞雅大声地祈祷着。知晓泰坦真相的你很清楚，刻法勒并不会真的回应她。
Serena prays aloud. You, knowing the Titan's truth, are well aware that Kephale won't truly answer her.
直到你听见一个浑厚低沉的嗓音传来……
...Until you hear a deep, resonant voice approaching...
Ah... this sound, are you Kephale?
是我，全世之座，众生之父，永昼的背负者。
It is I, the Throne of Worlds, Father of All Beings, and Bearer of Eternal Day.
孩子啊，不要害怕——我会为你们背负这沉重的黎明，将漆黑的凶潮隔绝于圣城之外——直到永远。
Child, fear not — I will carry the burden of this heavy dawn, shielding the Holy City from the tides of darkness... for all eternity.
太好了，刻法勒大人！…请再多陪我一会儿吧，我还有好多好多话想说给你听……
That'd be wonderful! Great Kephale... Please stay with me a little longer. I still have so much to tell you...
事有蹊跷。你从没见过这么不「谜语人」的泰坦，而且……
Something's off. You've never met such a straightforward Titan before, and...
The voice is coming from way too close.
果然，不出你所料，说话的不是刻法勒——而是那名守卫。
Just as you suspected, it's not Kephale speaking — it's the guard.
他拿着一枚石制扩声器，压低声音，努力扮出一位泰坦该有的威严和仁慈。
He's holding a voice amplifier made from stone, lowering his voice to imitate the majesty and compassion of a Titan.
呜呜，我知道爸爸妈妈已经回不来了…我会努力长大，成为一个坚强的人…但实在坚强不起来的时候，可以拜托刻法勒大人听我倾诉吗？
*sob* I know Mom and Dad aren't coming back... I'll try to grow up strong... But when I just can't be strong... Can I confide in you, great Kephale?
当然，刻法勒会平等地聆听每一位子民的祈求。
Of course. Kephale would listen to people's prayers equally.
这种时候…还是不要打搅为好呢。
At times like this... maybe it's best not to interrupt.
{F#女士}{M#先生}，久等啦。刻法勒大人真的很好，耐心地听我说了好多话。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, thanks for waiting! The great Kephale was really kind and patiently listened to everything I had to say.
现在我心里暖洋洋的，一点也不害怕了！
Now, my heart feels all warm and fuzzy. I'm not scared at all!
从今天起，你也是小太阳！
From today onward, you're a little ray of sunshine!
嘿嘿~那我要把今天从刻法勒大人那儿感受的温暖带回市集，与大家一同分享！
Hehe~ Then I'll take the warmth I felt from the great Kephale today back to the market and share it with everyone!
好羡慕你，能和泰坦说话。
I'm so jealous you got to speak to a Titan.
没关系，{F#女士}{M#先生}，像你这样的大英雄，一定有机会和它说上话的。说不定到时候，刻法勒大人反而会紧张呢！
It's okay, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Someone as heroic as you will definitely get a chance to speak to them someday. Who knows. Maybe the great Kephale will be the one getting nervous then!
谢谢你一路陪我爬到这里…时候不早啦，{F#女士}{M#先生}，我们一起回去吧！
Thank you for climbing all the way up here with me... It's getting late, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Let's head back together!
{F#女士}{M#先生}，又见面啦！谢谢你带我去见刻法勒！
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, we meet again! Thanks for taking me to see Kephale!
市集的朋友们听说我的经历之后，都露出了特别欣慰的笑容。刻法勒大人一定也保佑了他们吧。
When my friends at the market heard about what I had been through, they all smiled so warmly. I bet Kephale blessed them, too.
现在，大家都对奥赫玛的未来更有希望啦！
Now, everyone feels more hopeful about the future of Okhema!
啊，是你啊，{NICKNAME}贵宾。有什么能帮到你？
Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Anything I can help you with?
Gotta hand it to you, buddy — your acting skills are top-notch.
Huh, who knew Kephale was this young?
我想当一日刻法勒，能安排吗？
I wanna be Kephale for a day. Think you can make it happen?
那姑娘总是能碰上好心人…
That kid's luck is something else... always meeting kind people.
哈哈，果然被贵宾发现了。这件事还请你替我保密…善意的谎言，有时候也很有必要。
Haha, you caught me. Please keep it a secret... Sometimes, a little white lie is just what's needed.
Huh, you really get it, don't you?
你这么做，有什么理由吗？
我小的时候，奥赫玛可不像现在这样太平，三天两头都有纷争眷属袭击城墙。前一天还见过的人，可能第二天就……
When I was little, Okhema wasn't as peaceful as it is now. Attacks on the city walls by Strife Titankins were almost a daily thing. One day you'd see someone, and the next...
我父亲是一名圣城守卫。每当战事吃紧，他就会拿上头盔和长矛，一整宿都不回来。而我只能独自留在家中，把自己埋进被子里，试图隔绝窗外纷争眷属的尖啸声…

My father was a guard of the holy city. When battles were fierce, he'd grab his helmet and spear and wouldn't come back all night. And I'd be left alone at home, burying myself under the blankets to drown out the screeching of the Strife Titankins outside...
在某个安静的幕匿时，我对着窗外的刻法勒神体祈祷，突然听到了它的回应。
One quiet Curtain-Fall Hour, as I prayed to the statue of Kephale outside the window... I heard them respond.
它说：我是刻法勒，全世之座、众生之父，永昼的背负者。孩子啊，不要害怕……
They said: I am Kephale, the Throne of Worlds, Father of All Beings, Bearer of Eternal Day. Child, fear not...
刻法勒的宽慰给了我勇气，让我得以在纷争的尖啸中入睡。直到某天，我照例向刻法勒祈祷，却没有得到回应……
Kephale's comfort gave me courage. It helped me sleep amidst the chaos. But one day, when I prayed to Kephale as usual... there was no answer.
第二天清晨，我才得知，父亲在昨日的圣城保卫战中牺牲了。
The next morning, I found out... my father had fallen in battle defending the holy city.
其他守卫把这枚石制的扩声器交给了我。这是在父亲的身上发现的，是他的号角、他的乐器……
The other guards handed me this stone voice amplifier. They found it on my father... it was his horn, his instrument...
也是他以刻法勒之名，用另一种方式陪伴孩子的证明。
It was proof that, in the name of Kephale, he stayed by his child's side in his own way.
贵宾，你说…刻法勒真的能听到我们说话吗？
Dear guest... Do you think Kephale can really hear our prayers?
Oh, the great sky father, Kephale...
Will you drive away my fears?
Too bad that I can't meet you in person...
黎明云崖，有什么值得一看的景色呢……
Is there anything worth seeing at Dawncloud...
抓紧时间，沿路带她多走走吧。
Hurry up, and take her for a walk along the way.
Can we really go up here?
啊，离刻法勒越来越近了……
Ah, we're getting closer to Kephale...
好大的湖面呀！它会不会曾经是刻法勒大人的镜子…或者洗脸池？
What a huge lake! Could it have been the great Kephale's mirror... or maybe their washbasin?
「长长的直阶，通往全世的座前。」——原来画本里说的都是真的！
"The long straight stairway leads to the Throne of Worlds" — So the picture book was telling the truth!
究竟是为什么呢？难道…是怕我抢走他的风头？
Why is that, exactly? Could it be... that he's afraid I'll steal his spotlight?
——哦，是你啊，我的崇拜者。抱歉，今天不能给你签名。
—Oh, it's you, my admirer. Sorry, I can't give you an autograph today.
Darn it, no autograph this time?
今天我的确没有签名的兴致。
I'm really not in the mood to sign autographs today.
哦？面对我这个「竞技场英雄」亲笔签名的诱惑也无动于衷吗？你这家伙，有点胆识。
Oh? Completely unfazed by the temptation of a personal autograph from the "Arena Hero"? You've got some guts, I'll give you that.
不过话说回来，今天我的确没有签名的兴致。
But that being said, I'm really not in the mood to sign autographs today.
黑潮肆虐，不少人还被困在各处，在危险中呼唤着我的名字！作为蝉联三届「奥凯纳斯运动会」掷铁饼冠军的竞技豪雄，我怎么能视若无睹？

The black tide is raging, and many people are still trapped in various places, calling my name in distress! As a three-time consecutive "Okeanas Games" throwing champion and a true warrior of competition, how could I stand idly by?
可是克拉特鲁斯那老顽固，吩咐卫兵不准任何人外出——尤其是我。
But that stubborn old Krateros has ordered the guards not to let anyone go outside, especially me.
哈哈，不过也情有可原啦。毕竟我要是死了，那可是全人类的损失啊。
Haha, but I guess it's understandable. After all, if I were to die, that would be a loss for all of humanity!
I'll help you ask about the situation.
太好了！下届「奥凯纳斯运动会」，我会邀请你坐在掷铁饼比赛的第一排，近距离感受铁饼迎面而来的冲击感！
Awesome! For the next "Okeanas Games," I'll invite you to sit in the front row of the discus throw event. So you can experience the thrill of a discus flying straight at you up close!
Haha, it's no trouble at all.
这种感觉还是不要体验了。
I'd rather not experience that feeling.
你这家伙又来了？就算你这回带上{NICKNAME}阁下一起，我也不会答应你。
You again? Even if you brought {NICKNAME} along this time, I still won't agree.
光是守住这里就已经十分勉强，更别提抽出人手外出搜救。任由平民独自外出和送死无异，这也是为你着想。

Just holding this place is already a struggle, let alone sending people out for rescue missions. Letting civilians go out alone is no different from sending them to their deaths, this is for your own good, too.
平民？我早就说了，我才不是什么「平民」。
Civilians? I've already told you, I'm no "civilian."
我给你讲了我的辉煌战绩，给你看了我健硕的肌肉…我甚至给了你我的签名！
I've told you all about my glorious achievements, shown you my strong, well-built muscles... I even gave you my autograph!
那、那是你硬塞给我的吧？！
Th—That was that thing you forced on me, wasn't it!?
抱歉，柯库翁阁下。我认可你在竞技场上的成就，但竞技和战斗不是一回事。我不希望任何人白白送死。
Sorry, Lord Glykon. I acknowledge your achievements in the arena, but competition and real combat are not the same thing. I don't want anyone to throw their life away needlessly.
What if I go with him?
如果是{NICKNAME}阁下您一起…您的实力，我自然信任。
If it's you, {NICKNAME}, going with him... I naturally trust your strength.
太好了，{NICKNAME}！下届「奥凯纳斯运动会」，我会在获奖致谢辞里第一个感谢你。是不是很受宠若惊？
Fantastic, {NICKNAME}! In the next "Okeanas Games," I'll make sure to thank you first in my victory speech. Feeling honored?
Make sure to fill an entire page with it!
卫兵报告，对面圣殿有避难者呼救。那里构造和此处相似，清理盘踞其中的怪物，或许便能建立起一处安全的避难所。

The guards have reported that there are refugees calling for help from the temple across the way. Its structure is similar to this place. If we clear out the monsters lurking inside, we might be able to establish a safe shelter there.
至少还有两波黑潮即将来袭，去救下难民，赢得你们渴求的荣耀吧，千万小心。
At least two more waves of the black tide are approaching. Go rescue the refugees and claim the glory you seek, but be extremely careful.
Help... I don't think I can make it...
别说这种傻话，兄弟！我们不是约好了要一起站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点吗？
Don't say such foolish things, brother! Didn't we promise to reach the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together?
这些年摆摊攒下的积蓄，我藏在了…藏在了……
The savings I've gathered from running my stall all these years... I hid them... I hid them...
At least finish what you were saying!
Have no fear, for I am here!
英雄总在最后一刻救场！
Heroes always arrive at the last moment to save the day!
啊，是您！{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}开眼，终于有救了！
Ah, it's you! {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} has opened their eyes — salvation is finally here!
真是贵人多忘事啊！我们在云石市集摆摊卖矛和盾的时候，还成天看您在街上溜达呢。
You really do forget people easily! Back when we were running a stall selling spears and shields at the Marmoreal Market, we used to see you strolling around the streets all the time.
再坚持一会儿，希望就在眼前了！
Hold on a little longer, hope is right in front of us!
I... really have a bit of... a fear of heights... ugh!
呃，这只是二楼啊！你这个样子，以后怎么站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点？
Uh, this is just the second floor! With you acting like this, how are you ever going to reach the top of the Okhema marketplace?
So it's just a fear of heights?
演出了身受重伤的样子。
You sure acted like you were seriously injured.
呵呵，你们不必再要强了，真正的强者已经到场。我们会像捏住铁饼一样把怪物捏个稀碎，对不对，{NICKNAME}？
Hehe, you don't have to keep pretending to be strong. The real champion is here. We'll crush the monsters like we're holding a discus, right, {NICKNAME}?
是的，即将到来的是战斗环节。好在你身边的伙伴个个身怀绝技，你或许可以求助于他们？
Yes, the battle phase is about to begin. Fortunately, the surrounding companions are all skilled in their own ways, you might want to ask for their help?
没错，热血贲张、拳拳到肉的战斗才是英雄的浪漫，你的球棒渴望着一场酣畅淋漓的战斗。
That's right, the passionate, intense battles with every punch landing are the true romance of a hero. Your bat is craving for a thrilling, full-on fight.
这您就问对人了，我别的没有，就是鬼主意多。
You've come to the right person for this, I don't have much, but I sure have a lot of clever ideas.
现在我居高临下，如果您能把怪物们引到这里，我就可以用货箱把它们砸晕。
Now that I'm in a high position, if you can lure the monsters here, I can use the cargo box to knock them out.
不过这要考验您的身法。假如不慎被追上，恐怕就免不了一场苦斗了。
But this will test your agility. If you're not careful and get caught, it's bound to turn into a tough fight.
您自由发挥就是，我会做好准备，依照您的步调行动！
You take the lead, and I'll be ready to follow, acting in sync with your moves!
还是想想更可靠的办法吧。
Maybe we should think of a more reliable plan.
让怪物见识见识人类的极限！
Let's show the monsters the power of humanity!
Let me think it over again.
为了捍卫竞技场英雄的荣耀，短暂的沉思后，柯库翁冲了出去。
To defend the honor of the arena hero, after a brief moment of contemplation, Glykon charged out.
神殿中的怪物都被扫荡干净，克利克搀扶着刻牢刻走下了楼梯。
The monsters in the temple were all wiped out, and Kilik helped Kelok down the stairs.
克利克瞅准机会丢下货箱，被砸中的怪物们应声倒地。你和柯库翁一拳一个，将圣殿中的怪物扫荡了个干净。

Kilik seized the opportunity and dropped the cargo box, crushing the monsters it hit, causing them to collapse. You and Glykon each took down a monster with a punch, clearing out the remaining creatures in the temple.
克利克搀扶着刻牢刻走下了楼梯。
Kilik helped Kelok down the stairs.
「呃啊！喝——呃啊！看打！」远处传来缠斗声。
"Ugh! Hah—ugh! Take that!" The sounds of a struggle echoed from the distance.
不忍卒看的残酷战斗结束了，柯库翁一瘸一拐地回到你身边。
The brutal battle, too hard to watch, finally ended, and Glykon hobbled back to your side, limping.
哈哈，有点棘手，不过不是我的对手。
Haha, it was a bit tricky, but they were no match for me.
神殿中的怪物都被扫荡干净，克利克搀扶着刻牢刻走下了楼梯。
The monsters in the temple were all wiped out, and Kilik helped Kelok down the stairs.
呼，多谢两位，能踩在地面上，感觉好多了。
Phew, thanks to both of you. Being back on solid ground feels so much better.
What are you guys doing here?
哈哈，自从我们不做卖盾贩矛的生意之后，就在构思一些新的小玩意儿。
Haha, ever since we stopped the spear-and-shield business, we've been coming up with some new little gadgets.
这次我们想到的好点子是——黎明机器灯罩！让您的蜡烛如黎明机器般散发光辉~所以，就来圣殿谈合作了。
The great idea we've come up with this time is Dawn Device! Let your candles shine with the brilliance of a dawn machine. So, we came to the temple to discuss a partnership.
不过，还没轮到我们觐见祭司，天灾就降临了。大家慌不择路，大多跑进圣殿的后厅，我们跑上了二楼…那种事，实在不想再经历一次了。

However, before it was our turn to meet with the priest, the disaster struck. Everyone panicked and fled, most of them running into the back hall of the temple, while we made our way to the second floor... I really don't want to go through that kind of thing again.
后厅里还有着其他避难者？至少还有两波黑潮袭击，如果它们冲进后厅，可就糟糕了。
Are there other refugees in the back hall? There are still at least two waves of the black tide coming. If they break into the back hall, things could get really bad.
我们也来帮忙！世界都要重启了，最后的时刻不疯狂一把，未免也太亏了。大不了来世再见嘛！
We'll help too! The world is about to reset, and if we don't go all out in these final moments, it'd be such a waste. Hey, worst case scenario, we'll meet again in the next life!
You guys should go take shelter across the way first.
呵呵，我们先去避难？临阵脱逃可不是我们的作风！哪怕是卖假货被抓，我们也是坦坦荡荡，从不退缩。
Hehe, go take shelter first? Fleeing in the face of danger is not our style! Even if we were caught selling counterfeit goods, we'd face it head-on without hesitation.
再说了，世界都要重启了，最后的时刻不疯狂一把，未免也太亏了。大不了来世再见嘛！
Besides, the world is about to reset. If we don't go all out in these final moments, it'd be such a waste. Hey, worst case scenario, we'll meet again in the next life!
算了，再创世之后再相见吧。
Never mind, we'll meet again after the Era Nova.
喂，反正世界都要重启了，最后的时刻不疯狂一把，未免也太亏了。大不了来世再见嘛！
Hey, anyway, the world is about to reset, and if we don't go all out in these final moments, it'd be such a waste! Hey, worst case scenario, we'll meet again in the next life!
而且，必须要报仇雪恨…可恶的怪物，害得我们的翻本计划全泡汤了！
And we must avenge ourselves... those stupid monsters ruined our whole plan to make a comeback!
我也要报仇…可恶的怪物，我想好说服祭司的说辞全没用了！
I want to get my revenge too... those blasted monsters ruined all the reasoning I had prepared to convince the priest!
我也要报仇…可恶的怪物，我还没赢得掷铁饼项目的第四枚个人金牌！
I want to get my revenge too... those bloody monsters, I still haven't won my fourth individual gold medal in the discus event!
Do any of you have a brilliant plan?
人手和物资都不充裕，即便有如我这样的强者坐镇，恐怕也很难挡住黑潮啊。
We're short on both manpower and supplies. Even with someone as strong as me in charge, it's going to be tough to hold off the black tide.
我们之前被元老院没收的假货…呃，货物，就放在附近，我们可以把它取来。
The counterfeit goods... uh, the merchandise that was confiscated by the Council of Elders before, are nearby. We can go retrieve them.
其中有一些武器，可以武装灾民，还有一些防具，可以堆成街垒……
There are some weapons among them that we can use to arm the refugees, and some armor that can be stacked to make barricades...
呵呵，没错，就是以吉奥里亚指甲制成，什么都能抵挡住的「最强之盾」——
Hehe, that's right, the "strongest shield" made from Georios' nails, capable of withstanding anything—
以及以尼卡多利长矛铸造，什么都能击破的「最强之矛」！
And the "strongest spear," forged from Nikador's pikes, capable of piercing through anything!
Sounds like counterfeit goods to me!
You sure have a lot of stock left.
嗨，现在可不是挑三拣四的时候！
Hey, now's not the time to be picky!
库房不远，在我们回来前，请务必守住这里！
The storage room isn't far. Please hold the line until we get back!
刻牢刻和克利克钻进草丛不见了，远处传来令人悚然的呼号，随后，泛着刺目红光的黑色乱流汹涌而来。

Kelok and Kilik disappeared into the bushes, vanishing from sight. In the distance, a chilling howl echoed, followed by a surge of black turbulence, glowing with an ominous red light, rushing forward.
Another wave of the attack has begun.
呵呵，讨打！我们会像掷链球一样把怪物抛进水沟，对不对，{NICKNAME}？
Hehe, time for a beating! We'll toss these monsters into the ditch like we're throwing a hammer, right, {NICKNAME}?
是的，又是战斗环节。好在你身边有一位超越了人类极限的可靠伙伴，或许你可以向他请求帮助。
Yes, it's another battle phase. Fortunately, you have a reliable companion by your side, someone who has surpassed human limits. Perhaps you can ask for their help.
他原本就是为此而来的，不是吗？
He came for this exact reason, didn't he?
你突然想起来自己好像还缺些养成材料。你知道的，养成材料永远都不会嫌太多。
You suddenly remember that you still need some upgrade materials. You know how it is. There's no such thing as too many upgrade materials.
你可以询问克利克，可克利克已经不在你身边了。
You could ask Kilik, but Kilik is no longer by your side.
不能每次都指望他人的相助，明白这一点，就已经踏出了成长的第一步。
You can't always rely on others for help. Understanding this is already the first step toward growth.
Go for it! Charge in with your bodybuilding form!
Let me think it over again.
为了捍卫竞技场英雄的荣耀，短暂的沉思后，柯库翁冲了出去。
To defend the honor of the arena hero, after a brief moment of contemplation, Glykon charged out.
你如砍瓜切菜般将怪物收拾干净。
You cut through the monsters like slicing through melons and vegetables, effortlessly clearing them out.
嚯，好身手。如果你去参加摔跤比赛，恐怕连我也要暂避锋芒。
Impressive moves there! If you ever entered a wrestling competition, I'd have to step out of your way.
等你先休息一阵子，我们再制定下一步计划吧。
Why don't you rest a bit? We can work out our next steps afterward.
「呃啊！噢唔——呃啊！别打这里！」远处传来缠斗声。
"Ugh! Oww — Argh! Not that spot!" The sounds of combat drifted from the distance.
不忍卒看的残酷战斗结束了，柯库翁一瘸一拐地回到你身边。
The brutal battle, too hard to watch, finally ended, and Glykon hobbled back to your side, limping.
哈哈，有点棘手，不过，咳——不是我的对手。
Haha, that was a bit tough, but uh... *coughs* they were no match for me.
I must say, I'm truly impressed!
我真心想要你的签名了。
I'd love to get your autograph now, seriously.
咳——我、我先休息一阵子，待会儿再制定下一步计划……
*coughs* I need to... catch my breath for a bit. We can plan our next move afterward...
等他们回来的这段时间里，我们也不能闲着。
We can't just sit around doing nothing while we wait for them to come back.
挑战人的极限，捍卫人的尊严，「奥凯纳斯精神」绝不允许我们向神明摇尾乞怜。
Pushing human limits and upholding human dignity — the Okeanas spirit forbids us from begging the gods for mercy.
Let's pursue and hunt them down!
呃…还是不要采取这么激进的战术吧？
Um... should we really take such an aggressive approach?
附近原本便存放着一些盾牌，在那两个小贩回来前，我们可以先用它们搭个简单些的壁垒。
There are shields stored in the vicinity. Let's use them to construct a basic barricade before those two merchants get back.
你和柯库翁将盾牌摆放好。
You and Glykon go set up the shields.
嗯…效果还可以。等他们带着盾牌和矛回来，就不必担心黑潮的袭击了。
Hmm... looks good enough. When they come back with shields and lances, we'll be safe from the black tide's intrusion.
Hope they make it back in one piece.
别对他们的货抱太大希望。
Don't expect too much from their merchandise.
我好像听见了什么声音。是不是他们到了？
I think I heard something. Have they arrived?
你们侧耳倾听，可那并非小贩们的交谈，而是更尖锐、更密集的号叫。
You listen carefully, but instead of merchant chatter, you hear shrill, intense cries.
黑色乱流沿着街巷汹涌而来，又一次袭击来临了。
Black turbulence surges violently through the streets. Another attack is upon you.
呵呵，不通人性的野兽，你们要是听说过我的名字，一定会望风而逃。
Hehe, you senseless beasts. If you knew who I am, you'd be running for your lives.
我们会像驾战车一样将它们通通碾碎，对不对，{NICKNAME}？
We'll crush them all like riding a chariot, right, {NICKNAME}?
呼哧，呼哧…这帮怪物…怎么像追着要签名的崇拜者一样不依不饶！
Huff, huff... These creatures... chasing me like fans desperate for an autograph!
I just... can't go on fighting anymore...
向对面圣殿的守卫呼救。
Call out to the guards at the temple across the way.
仓促间，你看见对面的守卫也在袭击中苦苦支撑。
In the chaos, you see the guards there struggling against the attack as well.
黑潮怪物仍源源不断地聚拢过来，眼看即将闯入中庭。正在此时，门外一道声音传来——
The black tide creatures continue to gather in waves, about to breach the courtyard. Just then, a voice comes from outside—
当黑潮淹没最高的山峰，填平最深的沟壑，能够承载我们最后的希望，开启新的纪元的，唯有它——「最强之盾」！
When the black tide swallows the tallest mountains and levels the deepest valleys, only one thing can bear our last hope and herald a new era — the Strongest Shield!
当黑夜取代最后的黎明，侵吞一切光芒，能够破除邪恶的威胁，守护整个世界的，唯有它——「最强之矛」！
