When the Night overtakes the last Dawn, devouring all brightness, only one thing can banish evil threats and safeguard the whole world — the Strongest Lance!
放心吧，我们会把它们送到你们的手上！
Rest assured, we'll deliver them to you!
Are you sure you can do this?
曾有客人问我们，如果用「最强之矛」攻击「最强之盾」会发生什么。尝试的结果是，两者都一同化为齑粉。
A customer once asked what would happen if the Strongest Lance were to strike the Strongest Shield. We tested it — both items pulverized each other into dust.
但是，矛和盾本不该相向。当它们调转方向面向共同的敌人时，又会发生什么呢？
But lance and shield were never meant to oppose one another. What do you think would happen if they turned together to face a common enemy?
两位小贩背起行囊，左手持矛，右手持盾，朝中庭冲来——
The two merchants lift their packs, gripping lances in their left hands and shields in their right, charging into the courtyard—
锋刃击碎长矛，打破盾牌，最后刺入身体。
A blade shatters lances, breaks shields, and finally pierces flesh.
就这么顶着刀锋和箭矢，他们冲进中庭，摔倒在地。
Facing blades and arrows, they charge into the courtyard and collapse to the ground.
两人这么说着，含笑着闭上了眼睛。
With their last words, they close their eyes with peaceful smiles.
What on earth are they sacrificing themselves for!?
Do they just want to die so badly?
再创世不是用来任性的啊！
Era Nova is not meant for recklessness!
这、这种有点好笑又有点难过的情绪，是怎么回事！
Wh—What's with this funny yet sad feeling!?
{NICKNAME}，没时间为他们悲伤了，反正再创世之后又会相见的。我拦住它们，你用他们带来的货物加固壁垒！
{NICKNAME}, no time to grieve for them now. We'll meet them again in the Era Nova. I'll hold them off while you reinforce the barricade with the goods they brought.
柯库翁拾起小贩行囊中的矛和盾，阻拦住黑潮造物。你也赶忙用它们继续完善壁垒。
Glykon takes up the lance and shield from the merchants' belongings to hold back the Black Tide Creatures. Meanwhile, you rush to enhance the barricade with the remaining items.
当最后一个黑潮造物被消灭，壁垒也完成了。
The last of the Black Tide Creatures is vanquished just as the barricade is completed.
啊，是您。我在对面目睹了你们的战斗，真是千钧一发啊！我们也想赶来支援，可惜也被黑潮的袭击牵制住了。
Ah, it's you. I saw your fight from across the way — that was a close one! We tried to come help, but the black tide had us cornered as well.
现在好了，多亏那两位英雄带来的矛和盾，我们能用更少的人手守住这里了。
Things are looking up now, thanks to the lance and shield those two heroes delivered. We can now defend this area with a smaller force.
但愿他们能安享轻柔的沉眠。
May they fall into a pleasant slumber.
此前在后厅中避难的公民大部分安然无恙。虽然有些捉襟见肘，但克拉特鲁斯阁下让我们带了些物资和药物过来，伤者已经得到了治疗。
Most of the citizens sheltering in the back hall are safe. Despite our limited supplies, Lord Krateros sent provisions and medications, and we've treated all the wounded.
也有被困他处的公民前来避难，我们会好好照顾他们，直到新世界来临。
Some citizens trapped elsewhere have also come seeking shelter. We'll take good care of them until the new world arrives.
呃，说实话，这批军备的质量实在不敢恭维。
Uh, honestly, the quality of this batch of arms leaves much to be desired.
不过这种紧要关头，能找到它们就已经谢天谢地了。能撑一时是一时吧。
But in these desperate times, we're thankful to have found them at all. They'll last as long as they can.
I have nothing else to ask.
向天父起誓，我们一定全力以赴，不让诸位的努力白费。
By the sky father, we will do our utmost not to let everyone's efforts go to waste.
啊，是你，{NICKNAME}。咳…我感觉…有点不舒服……
Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Ahem... I'm not... feeling so great...
Haha... I don't... have much energy left...
克拉特鲁斯那老顽固，我就说我们能行吧！咳——
That old stubborn Krateros, I said we could handle it! Ahem—
刚才我们的战斗，是我最精彩的一次登场。也多亏了那两位小贩，没有他们，我们守不住圣殿。
That battle was my most impressive showing ever. And we also have those two merchants to thank — without them, the temple would have fallen.
恐怕他们只是觉得好玩而已…
I think they just did it for the thrill...
即便灵魂真的会去往再创世后的世界，但这一刻，死亡带来的恐惧和伤痛仍是真实的。
Even if souls really do travel to the world after Era Nova, the fear and pain of death at that moment remain real.
不管出于什么原因，也不管用了什么方式…豁出性命，让更多人免于死亡的折磨，都是一件高尚的事。
Whatever their reasons, whatever their methods... sacrificing one's life to spare others from the torment of death is a noble deed.
但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你们也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!
商贩汇聚，征战不休的城邦也放下兵戈。
The merchants convene, and constantly warring city-states pause their conflicts.
街巷、圣殿的廊柱都挂满鲜花，说着不同城邦方言的人们支起帐篷，赞美彼此健美的身体，角逐月桂花环……
Streets and temple columns are adorned with flowers, people speaking different dialects raise tents, praise each other's athletic bodies, and compete for laurel wreaths...
Don't forget to mention me in your speech.
啊，这不是{NICKNAME}吗。你来探望我们啦？
Ah, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! Are you here to visit us?
Oh, didn't you guys sacrifice yourselves?
卫兵说你们安享沉眠了。
The guard said that you've fallen into slumber.
卫兵大人的意思是「大家小声点，别吵着两位英雄睡觉」。
Mr. Guard meant to say, "quieten down, everyone, don't wake those two heroes from their sleep."
哈哈，刚才气氛都到那个份上了，不说点悲壮的话，都有些下不来台了。
Haha, the atmosphere was so intense back then, it'll be awkward not to say something tragically stirring.
那之后，柯库翁哭天抢地地把医师喊过来，其实只受了点轻伤这件事更是说不出口了。
After that, Glykon called for a healer, all while in anguish. That made it even harder to say that our injuries weren't severe at all.
你们没事，实在是太好了。
I'm glad you guys are okay.
下次还是慎重行事些为好。
It's better to be more cautious next time.
搞笑角色血条一般都很长。
Comedic relief characters tend to live longer.
医师帮我们包扎了伤口，嘱咐我们好好休息。我的胳膊上挨了两剑，千万别留下病根啊，我还指望着用它搬货呢。

The healer helped to dress our wounds and instructed us to get plenty of rest. I was cut by a blade twice in the arm, and I really hope that doesn't leave any lasting side effects. I still need it to move goods.
我是膝盖上中了一剑…下回摆摊被卫兵大人撵，会不会影响逃跑的速度啊？
I took a blade to the knee... Will it affect how quickly I can escape the next time Mr. Guard chases after me for peddling?
Why are you still thinking about selling your goods?
You have to adapt to your role as a hero.
哼哼，这点小插曲， 不会动摇我们的决心。
Heheh, that's merely a trifle. It won't sway us.
毕竟，我们是要站上奥赫玛小贩业顶点的男人啊！
After all, we're the men who will stand at the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together!
这么一来，我们的「最强之矛」和「最强之盾」也算打响名头，销路不愁了吧！
With that, we've made a name for ourselves as "the Strongest Lance" and "the Strongest Shield"! That'll surely boost our sales!
我记得这边有一些盾牌，把它们扛上！
I remember there are shields over here, grab them!
不错，够结实。把它放在门口吧。
Hmm, they seem sturdy enough. Put it by the doorway.
一时疏忽，你还未抵达廊下便被怪物撵上。好在你将身一扭，躲过了袭击！
With a momentary lapse, the creatures catch up to you before you reach the corridor. Fortunately, with a quick twist, you dodge their attack!
必须把怪物引到二楼廊道下方，再试试看吧。
I need to lure the creatures to the area beneath the second-floor corridor. Let's try again.
There's a shield here too. Stack it up as well.
{F#女士}{M#先生}，你来得刚好，能帮我作个证吗？他们都不相信我说的话。
{F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, perfect timing! Can you vouch for me? They don't believe what I said.
作证？你又做什么坏事啦？
Vouch for what? What've you nicked now?
放心放心，我再也没干过小偷小摸的事了。
Cross my heart! No more sticky fingers, promise!
自从接受了刻法勒的信仰，我现在是全新的希瑞雅了。每天晚上我都在梦里重游云崖，一遍遍观览那些好大好大的壁画。
Since finding Kephale's light, I've become a brand-new me! Every night I spirit-walk Dawncloud, memorizing those cathedral-sized murals.
是我呀！希瑞雅。我…偷过你的钱袋，还编过一些故事，撒过一些小谎……
It's me, Serena! Your former purse-liberator? Occasional fibber?
不过嘛，我现在天天都在做好事，期盼着到了再创世，我能成为一名真正的刻法勒祭司！
But now? Daily do-gooder! In the Era Nova, I'll be a proper priestess of Kephale!
可是，这两个小鬼，竟然敢说…刻法勒的庇佑会失去效力，圣城里的大家只能白白等死。真是气死我了！
But these ankle-biters claim... Kephale's shield's failing. That we're sitting ducks here in the holy city. I cannot bear it anymore!
这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，你来得刚好，听说你是黄金裔大人们的贵客，请你告诉他们两个——
{F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, you got here at the perfect time. I've heard that you're the distinguished guest of the Chrysos Heirs! Tell these two:
虽然奥赫玛现在面临危机，但天父刻法勒还在庇护着我们所有人，是这样的，对吗？
Okhema's struggling, but Sky Father Kephale's still got us. Yeah?
我叫希瑞雅，来自一个名叫阿卡索斯的城邦。阿卡索斯它…已经被黑潮淹没了。但我相信，奥赫玛一定不会重蹈覆辙！
Serena of Icatus. My home... consumed by the black tide now. But Okhema? Different story!
Kids! Why aren't you at the shelters?
没救了，奥赫玛已经没救了。比起被怪物杀死，不如让我被陨石砸死算了。
We're doomed. Okhema's doomed. But I'd rather get crushed by meteors than killed by monsters.
说什么呢，亚森！不许垂头丧气的，我们脚下站着的地方明明很安全。
Yason! No giving up! We're standing on safe ground. Obviously!
赞美仁慈的父！瞧，这位{F#女士}{M#先生}的担保和我说的一样吧？
Praise the merciful Father! See? the {F#young madam}{M#young sir} agrees! Told you!
可是，这两个小鬼，竟然敢说…刻法勒的庇佑会失去效力，圣城里的大家只能白白等死。真是气死我了！
But these ankle-biters claim... Kephale's shield's failing. That we're sitting ducks here in the holy city. I cannot bear it anymore!
希瑞雅，你说你在黎明云崖听到了天父的回应，你能再说一遍回应的内容吗？
Serena, you said you heard the sky father's response at Dawncloud. Can you tell us what they said again?
当然！这些天来，我一直背诵着，一字不差。
Of course! I've spent the last couple of days inscribing every word into my mind.
<color=#dbc291ff>「——我会为你们背负这沉重的黎明，将漆黑的凶潮隔绝于圣城之外——」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"— I will carry the burden of this heavy dawn, shielding the Holy City from the tides of darkness..."</color>
是先前在神山上，天父的声音清清楚楚告诉我的。
Clear as day — the sky father's voice on the peak of the holy mountain.
可我们也看得清清楚楚，它肩负的「黎明」已经不再亮着了啊。
But we can clearly see that the "Dawn" on their shoulders isn't shining anymore.
要么是天父的神谕出了错……
Either the sky father made a mistake...
不可能！神谕绝对不会错的。
Blasphemy! The prophecy can't be wrong.
那就是——希瑞雅，你其实根本没有去过黎明云崖，都是你编出来骗我们的吧？
Then... Serena, you've never actually been to Dawncloud, have you? It's all a bunch of lies you made up to fool us?
Oh no... We have a mini-Cipher here.
The prophecy does indeed have falsehoods.
Please don't resort to violence. We can talk things through.
希瑞雅，没必要为大家做到这个地步。谎话说太多，到了新世界你就当不上刻法勒的祭司了。反正我也做好了去见塞纳托斯的准备……
Serena, there's no need for altruism. Lies will only dash your hopes of becoming a priestess of Kephale in the new world. I'm ready for Thanatos' embrace...
呸呸呸！你不准说了。你们两个…是不是非要亲耳听到才肯相信？
Hey! Stop talking! You two... Do you need to hear it yourselves to believe it?
唉！要是能找到上次放我进云崖的好心守卫叔叔，偷偷和他打个招呼就好了。只是，那次已经够麻烦他了，我不想影响到他的工作。

Ugh! If only we can find that nice guard who smuggled me into Dawncloud last time... I would like to sneakily say hi to him. Just... I think we troubled him enough last time. I don't want to disturb his work.
{F#女士}{M#先生}，我恳求你，能和云崖的其他守卫通融一下，带上我、亚森、拉缇娜我们三个，去到刻法勒的巨像前，再祈祷一回吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I'm begging you. Can you come to some kind of agreement with the other Dawncloud guards and bring me, Yason, Lathena to perform one last prayer at the Colossus of Kephale?
我想让他们知道，刻法勒的声音有多么坚定、温暖，奥赫玛绝对不会被黑潮攻陷，背负世界的泰坦从没有忘记过我们这些平民。

Let them feel the determination and warmth in Kephale's voice, let them be convinced that Okhema will stand tall against the black tide, and the Titan who bears the world has never forgotten about us.
Three stowaways? You're really going to do this to me?
呜！没关系，我还有办法，一定还会有别的办法的。
Hmph! Fine. I got some other plans. There's got to be some other ideas we can use.
没问题，我帮你问问守卫。
Sure. I'll ask the guard for you.
太好啦！要是能再去一趟，我一定会看好他们，快去快回，绝不到处乱跑。
Great! If we make another trip, I'll definitely keep a close eye on them. We get in and get out, no detours at all.
那我们就在这里乖乖等着，等你的好消息。
We will be waiting here for your good news.
我想让亚森和拉缇娜也能去到黎明云崖，聆听到刻法勒的神谕，可以拜托你和云崖的守卫说说情吗？
I want Yason and Lathena to hear Kephale's prophecy at Dawncloud. Could you please sweet-talk the guards?
呜！没关系，我还有办法，一定还会有别的办法的。
Hmph! Fine. I got some other plans. There's got to be some other ideas we can use.
没问题，我帮你问问守卫。
Sure. I'll ask the guard for you.
太好啦！那我们就在这里乖乖等着，等你的好消息。
Great! We will be waiting here for your good news.
你当然知道，所谓「刻法勒」的回应，是女孩口中「好心的守卫叔叔」假扮的。
As you know, the supposed response from "Kephale" was done by "Mr. Nice Guard," who the girl told you about.
一个谎言需要无数个谎言来圆…要实现孩子们的心愿，恐怕需要再次找到这个守卫，和他事先串通好。
A lie needs to be helped up by infinitely more lies... Looks like you gotta find the guard again and deal with him in advance.
他有着一张奥赫玛最常见、最普通的面孔，和千千万万个圣城守卫一样。你很难在人群中找到他。
He's got that extremely common and very ordinary face for an Okheman, just like all the countless other guards in the holy city. You'll be hard-pressed to find him in a crowd.
你们接受了他的帮助，却忘记了问一句这位好心人的名字。
You accepted his help but forgot to ask this nice guy his name.
想不起来了…先去黎明云崖转一圈看看吧。
I'm drawing blanks... Let's case Dawncloud first.
你知道，刻法勒已经不再言语很久，女孩听到的回应没有那么简单，这个忙帮起来势必有点麻烦。
You know, Kephale's been silent for ages. The reply the girl hears shouldn't be that simple. This bit of aid might turn into quite the hassle.
但孩童诚挚的目光让人无法拒绝，你计划先找到她口中那位「好心的守卫叔叔」，打听一下消息。
But the sincere gaze of a child is a hard thing to resist. You plan to find that "Mr. Nice Guard" she talked about first and get some details.
去黎明云崖转一圈看看吧。
战火已经烧到了奥赫玛。阁下虽然武艺高强，但若没有要紧的事，还是别在外面闲逛了，速去避难吧！
The war's already reached Okhema. You might be pretty skilled and powerful, but if you don't have anything urgent that's keeping you out here, it's best not to linger outside and find shelter!
这名守卫的语气和他的盔甲一样坚硬，看起来并不是会轻易心软的类型。
The guard's tone is as tough as his armor. He doesn't seem like the type to go tender easily.
呃，一位「好心的守卫叔叔」？还有什么别的信息吗？
Uh, someone called "Mr. Nice Guard"? You got any other details?
（再多的信息就暴露了，希瑞雅不想给那位守卫带来麻烦……）
(If you give any more details, you'll expose things. Serena doesn't want to cause that guard more trouble...)
Tell him of the children's request.
不，这可不行！现在都乱成什么样了，孩子们就该好好待在安全的地方。
What? Absolutely not! Look at the sorry state of things, the kids should stay where they're safe.
Find a topic to use as a probe for information.
Ahem. You don't look like you're from around here!
今天执守的卫兵换人了吗？
Did today's guard rotation get changed?
阁下眼熟的或许是我的同僚吧？十多年来我们一直轮换值守同一班岗位。
The one you're familiar with might be my colleague, maybe? We've been on the cycling in and out on the same post for more than a decade.
但现在情况危急，圣城卫队抽调了一大批人去抵抗黑潮，这里只留下了小部分卫兵负责维护治安、疏散公民。
But the situation is critical. The holy city guards transferred a bunch of people to hold back the tide. There's only a small group left here to maintain order and evacuate the civilians.
我的同僚，他也被调去了前线…哎！我本想和他交换一下，他却怎么也不肯，只是让我安心留在这里，说前线的事情交给他就好。
My colleague got deployed to frontline... I'd switch with him, but he refused. He just told me to stay here and leave the frontlines to him.
我知道，他父亲也是一名圣城卫兵，杀死过黑潮怪物…他一直想做同样的事，好证明自己也有能力保护家人与奥赫玛。
I know. His father was a guard of the city too, slaying monsters of the black tide... He always wanted to do the same thing, to prove he had the strength to protect his family and Okhema.
圣城有你，才是真的了不起。
The holy city's only holy because it's got you in it.
汗流浃背了，阁下夸他就好，我也没做什么。
Heh. You got me acting up a cold sweat here. You can just praise my friend. I didn't do much.
从刻法勒广场到圣城门口那段，是抵御黑潮入侵的重要防线。这批卫兵应该都被派驻在那里了。
From Kephale Plaza to the city gates — the main black tide defense line. This batch of guards might all be deployed there.
真希望他们平安归来，这回我无论如何也要跟他换个班。
Hope they make it back in one piece. This time, I'm swapping shifts with him no matter what.
（去他说的地方找找吧，说不定还能帮上卫兵们的忙……）
(Go to the place he talked about. Maybe you can lend the guards a hand even...)
年轻的卫兵倒在地上，肢体已然僵硬，无法再挥舞起哪怕是最轻的一把武器。
A young guard lies stiff on the ground, his limbs completely rigid, never to lift even the lightest weapon ever again.
他身上没有任何铭牌和遗物，无从辨认生前的身份。你叹了口气，为他阖上了眼皮。
No nameplates or relics. Nothing to even identify him with. You sigh, closing his eyelids.
这名卫兵盔甲下的身体遭到了黑潮的侵蚀，在漆黑的死灰蔓延至心脏的位置前，他因负伤过重停止了呼吸。
The guard's body beneath his armor has sustained black tide corruption. Even before the darkness spread to his heart, he passed from the severity of his injuries.
没有被黑潮彻底侵吞理智，沦为怪物，或许是命运对他最后的仁慈。
Not being completely consumed of rationality by the black tide and turned into a monstrosity might be fate's final mercy for him.
你抱着最坏的预感试探了他的鼻息，果然已无生命迹象。他胸口的铭牌上刻着几个模糊的字：斐…第…斯？
You check his breathing with the worst case scenario in mind and confirm the absence of life in his body. His nameplate on his chest has a few blurred words inscribed there: Phe...d...es?
「呲啦——」一声，有什么动静从它的盔甲下传出。你仔细检查，发现源头是一枚石制的扩声器。
"Click..." A sound comes. A disturbance resounds from beneath his armor. You check carefully, and discover the source to be a stone-made voice amplifier.
斐第斯，还在摆弄你那个扩声器吗？我记得那是你父亲的遗物？
Phedes, still fiddling with that amplifier? I remember that was something that belonged to your father.
是啊…我小时候，他最喜欢用扩声器假扮各种声音逗我玩。
Yeah... He liked to use it to play pretend... making voices for me when I was small.
父亲战死后，我一直收藏着它，本以为再也派不上用场了。想不到我也有故意用它来捏造假声的时候，那天在黎明云崖上……
After he died in battle, I kept it. I thought it would never come in handy again, but it turns out I ended up mimicking voices with it sometimes too... And that day, at Dawncloud...
虽说是个情急之下的意外，但看那孩子开心的模样，我觉得这谎撒得很值。真希望她现在还相信着啊！
It was just an unexpected moment born of desperation, but seeing how happy it made the kid, I thought it was a worthwhile lie. I really hope she's still keeping the faith now!
嗯…如果我说，我假扮了刻法勒，你信不信？
Hm... If I said I impersonated Kephale, would you believe me?
哈哈哈，别逗了，你是不是看现在战事紧张，故意说笑话让我们心情轻松轻松。
Ha! Stop joking around. Say, you're not deliberately jesting to lift our moods with how desperately the war's going, right?
——糟了，看那边，黑潮怪物又来了！
Oh no! Look there! Black tide monsters incoming!
这是第几波了…走吧，准备作战。可不能让圣城的孩子们失去笑容啊！
Which wave of battle are we on now... Let's go. Let's get ready. We can't let the kids of the holy city lose their smiles!
是这么回事啊…我明白了。
So that's how it was... I understand.
斐第斯，斐第斯，放我们进入负世祭坛，又假扮刻法勒回应希瑞雅的「好心的守卫叔叔」，原来是叫这个名字。
Phedes, Phedes... Oh, "Mr. Nice Guard" who sneaked us into the Worldbearing Altar and impersonated Kephale for Serena — that was his name.
是这么回事啊…我好像猜到了。
So that's how it was... I think I guessed it right.
希瑞雅听到的「刻法勒」的回应，是这个叫斐第斯的守卫用扩声器假扮的。恐怕他就是那个「好心的守卫叔叔」。
The "Kephale" voice Serena heard was impersonated using Phedes' amplifier. It unfortunately appears that you just found "Mr. Nice Guard."
沉思之际，一阵绝望的悲泣从旁边传来……
As you sink deep into your thoughts, a despairing wail comes off from the side...
全知伟大的天父啊，看看这些可怜的卫兵，看看你的子民吧！为什么永恒的圣城会出现死难者，难道你抛弃他们了吗？
All-knowing sky father! See your fallen guards, your people! Why does death stain the holy city? Have you abandoned them?
再创世…我们的再创世，我一直笃信，我们所有人都会在安谧的梦乡中迎来那片温暖、光明的未来。
The Era Nova... Our Era Nova... I always believed that we would awaken to that warm, radiant future in tranquil dreams.
可是，为什么你背负的黎明机器不再发出光芒了？大司铎大人不是说它会照拂圣城…直到永远吗？
But why does your Dawn Device darken? Didn't the chaplain say it would protect us till... forever?
祭司的悲泣声渐弱，你心知「照拂圣城，直到永远」是赛飞儿的谎言。谎言被戳破、信仰崩塌带来的后果，希瑞雅能接受吗？
The priest's sobs fade. You know the "eternal protection" was a lie that Cipher's created. When truth is revealed and faith shatters, will Serena be able to handle the following consequences?
不能让孩子们失去笑容！
We can't let the kids lose their smiles!
是啊，你想起了斐第斯留下的最后一句话——「可不能让圣城的孩子们失去笑容啊！」
Yes, indeed. You recall Phedes' last words — "We can't let the kids of the holy city lose their smiles!"
一个计划从你心中浮现：捡起斐第斯的石制扩声器，把事情的原委告诉那位正直的守卫，恳请他带孩子们来到刻法勒的神像前……
A plan forms in your mind: You take Phedes' stone-made amplifier and tell that upright guard the whole story, asking him to bring the children before the colossus...
然后用你的谎言，亲自完成孩子们、也是斐第斯最后的心愿。
And then you use your lies to complete the children and Phedes's final wish.
第二天，门扉时分，你事先清扫了云崖上徘徊的怪物，来到了刻法勒的神像前……
The next day, after clearing the monsters roaming Dawncloud at Entry Hour, you stand before Kephale's statue...
时间刚刚好，希瑞雅他们还没到，我先去后面藏起来。
Perfect timing. I'll hide before Serena and them arrive.
站在这里，身形足够隐蔽，你摸了摸口袋里那枚石制的扩声器，想象着「好心的守卫叔叔」藏身在此回应希瑞雅的场景，做好了准备。
Standing there, you're well concealed enough. You grip the stone amplifier in your pocket and think of how "Mr. Nice Guard" responded to Serena hiding here. Then, you prepared yourself.
一阵脚步声传来，在守卫的看护下，希瑞雅、亚森、拉缇娜三人来到了巨像前……
Footsteps approach. Under a guard escort, Serena, Yason, and Lathena arrive and stand before the Colossus...
…孩子们，出于 {NICKNAME}阁下的恳请，这回破例带你们来黎明云崖，观仰泰坦的神体。
...Kids, by {NICKNAME}'s sincerest request, we will make an exception and allow you into Dawncloud to behold the Titan's sacred form.
任意外出原本是非常危险的，我本来计划遇到怪物就回去，好在——感谢刻法勒的庇护，一路上我们都没有碰到怪物。
It's extremely dangerous to wander out recklessly, so I intended for us to return the moment we encounter any monsters. But thanks to Kephale's divine providence, we didn't cross paths with any.
（咳咳，是啊…幸亏我路上先清扫了一遍……）
(Ahem... Yeah... Thankfully I cleared out the roads first...)
抓紧时间吧，你们可以每人向泰坦祈祷一会儿。
Don't waste time. You can all pray to the Titan for a while.
谢谢叔叔！好壮观啊，希瑞雅，原来你真来过黎明云崖？
Thanks, mister! It's an amazing sight! Serena, you really came here before?
都说了我没骗人，你们祈祷吧！先说好，要虔诚，心怀信仰…天父一定会像当时回应我那样，认真地回应你们的心愿。对吧，守卫叔叔？

Told you I wasn't lying! Go ahead and pray now! Oh, and you have to do it with piety and devoted faith... The sky father will definitely respond to your wishes as genuinely as he did mine. Ain't that right, Mr. Guard?
黎明机器…好大，好近，它会不会从天上砸下来？砸中我们？
Dawn Machine... So big. Will it fall on us?
刻法勒也不想回答这种，呃，有点蠢的问题吧。
Kephale won't answer such... stupid questions.
小心哦！泰坦举久了也会累。
「——人子啊，黎明机器的确沉重，饶是我的肩头也感到负累，但放心，在你们看不到的地方，我还有一只手在稳稳地托着它——」
"—Children of humanity, the Dawn Device indeed weighs heavy, even my shoulders. But worry not, for where you cannot see, I still have a hand steadily bearing its weight—"
不会的，法律禁止高空抛物。
Nah. It's against the law to litter from on high.
「——无需担忧，我曾和律法之泰坦立下誓约：我拥有庇佑世人、承载此世全部记忆的权能，代价则是背负世上最沉重的事物，在有人接过权能之前不得脱手——」

"—Worry not, I swore with Law Titan: I shall protect all of humanity and wield the authority to every memory in this world. The price will be to bear the heaviest burden until another takes the mantle—"
笨蛋亚森！什么问题啊，白白浪费了一次祈祷的机会，换我来。
Dummy Yason! What kind of question is that? You've wasted a chance to pray! My turn.
刻法勒，我们的天父，我诚心向你祷问。现在的奥赫玛，万帷网变慢了，消息真真假假，好像到处都在打仗，乱糟糟的，那些山崖上，还冒出了一些奇怪的虚影……

Sky Father Kephale, I ask you sincerely: Okhema and the World Wound Web have slowed. Be the news true or false, but everywhere seems to be at war, chaos reigns, and on the cliffs, stand strange shadows...
大家都说这是因为再创世要来了，我想知道，您要怎么庇护我们？
Everyone said that's because Era Nova is coming. What I want to know is: How will you protect us?
会伸出手把我们接应到新世界吗？还是说，在我们死了很久以后，吹一口气让我们重新复活？我很害怕死，我、我希望是前面那种……

Will you reach out and take us to the new world? Or it's like, after we've been dead for a long time, you'll breathe a breath and resurrect us? I'm very scared of dying, so I—I hope it is the first...
希瑞雅，你听到什么了吗？我怎么一点儿声音也没听到。
耐心等等嘛！天父又不是卖报的报童，要到处大声吆喝。
Be patient! sky father's not a town crier, loudly screeching their cries.
Don't fear death. It's just sleep.
「——我曾造访过塞纳托斯的冥府，那是一片宁静的花海，所有灵魂都会化作花种，得到死亡泰坦的温柔照拂——」
"—I visited Thanatos's netherworld. There was a sea of tranquil flowers, where all souls will become floral seeds to receive the care and light of the Death Titan—"
「——别惧怕死亡，率先离去的死者，只是提前一步去了花海——」
"—Fear not death. The ones who departed earlier are but early arrivals at the sea of flowers—"
「——孩子们，不妨把眼前的灾难视作一场梦境，等噩梦醒来，无论生者还是死者，都会在新世界重逢——」
"—Treat this disaster as a nightmare, children. When you wake, all will reunite in the new world, be they living or dead—"
Come, all of you, stand upon me. There is space.
「——咳，我生有伟岸的身躯，是为了在末日的灾厄来临、世界坍塌时，把我创造的人子们接引到我的双手和肩背上，一同带往再创世——」

"—Ah, I was born with a mighty body, so that when the apocalypse comes and the world collapses, I can carry the children I created with my arms and on my shoulders, so that we might march toward Era Nova together—"
「——你们只需要暂且藏身在安全之处，我许诺：黑潮绝不会侵没圣城，如同我的身躯永远坚屹在此——」
"—So long as you find a safe place to hide, I promise this: The black tide won't breach the holy city, just as my body will stand here eternal—"
好了，孩子们，祈祷的时间结束了，记住天父赐给你们的回应了吗？
Alright, children, prayer time's over. Remember how the sky father replied to you?
嗯！陨石和黎明机器都不会砸中我。
Yeah! Neither meteors nor the Dawn Device will fall on me.
奥赫玛的大家，也都会好好地迎来再创世。
Everyone in Okhema will definitely reach the Era Nova safely.
不错，聆听过天父回应的孩子，是被选中的人，回去和你们的家人待在一起，安心躲过末日吧！
Good. Now you're all the chosen children who heard from the sky father. You should be with your families and stay safe and at ease during the apocalypse.
{F#女士}{M#先生}，刚才回应我们的声音，是你吧？
{F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, it was you who responded to our voices just now, right?
开什么玩笑呢？是刻法勒。
Are you kidding? It was Kephale.
真的吗…我们现在再祈祷一次，天父还会回应我们吗？
Really... If we pray again now, will the sky father still respond to us?
Alright. You saw right through it. It was me.
果然，我从前骗过{F#女士}{M#先生}你，这回却被你「骗」了一回呀！
Figures. I deceived you before, {F#miss}{M#mister}, but now you "tricked" me!
{F#女士}{M#先生}，能对我说实话吗？我什么都能接受。上次回应我的声音，也不是真正的刻法勒，是上次那位好心的守卫叔叔吧！
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, tell me the truth. I can handle that. Was that voice last time also fake? It wasn't really Kephale either, right? It was Mr. Nice Guard, right?
都瞒不过你啊，小机灵鬼…
You're hard to fool, you witty thing...
其实…刻法勒的声音是怎么回事，还有好心的守卫叔叔是谁，我全都知道。不太会骗人的人…瞒不了别人太久。
Actually... I know about Kephale's voice, who Mr. Nice Guard is, all of it. Bad liars... can't really keep the lie for very long.
我…大家为我，做了这么多事情。一直保护着我们的，不光是遥远的泰坦，还有身边的人。
I... Everyone did so much for me. The ones who protected me aren't just the distant Titan, but also those around me.
那你，却又来祈祷了一次…？
Then why did you come to pray again?
嗯，毕竟亚森和拉缇娜他们还不知道嘛！
Yeah, because Yason and Lathena still don't know yet!
我受过那么多人的照顾，也想照顾照顾比我小的两个小鬼。
So many people have looked after me, so I wanted to look after two kids who were even smaller than me too.
记得第一次听到刻法勒的回应时，我激动地快要哭出来。如果他们两个能听到，一定也会相信——神谕中的再创世会到来，我们都会得到负世泰坦的庇护。

I almost burst into tears the first time I heard Kephale's voice. I want them to hear it, too, so that they believe. So that they know when the Era Nova in the prophecy comes, we'll be protected by the Worldbearing Titan.
还有，我可是希瑞雅啊！睡过破木箱、靠偷东西把自己养活的希瑞雅，不管神谕会不会实现，我一直都很想努力地活下去。
Plus, I'm Serena! I've slept in busted wooden boxes, and kept myself alive by stealing. Don't matter if the prophecy comes true or not, I've always done my best to keep surviving.
回到云石市集后，我还是会告诉所有的大人和孩子们：刻法勒的回应是真的，天父要我们抱着希望，直到末日的最后一天…然后，大家会再次重逢。

Back at the Marmoreal Market, I'll tell all the adults and kids: Kephale's reply is true, the sky father wants us to hold on to hope, till the last day of the apocalypse... And then, we will all meet again.
谢谢你{F#女士}{M#先生}，相信我们也会在「再创世」再相见的！
Thank you, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}. We'll meet again in the Era Nova!
嗯，我带你回安全的地方吧！
天父根本不会庇护我们…
我也有机会听到神谕了？
I got a chance to hear the prophecy too?
刻法勒的声音，会像老爷爷吧…
Maybe Kephale sounds like an old grandpa...
What should I ask this time?
这里…刚刚发生过一场战斗？
Did a battle just happen here...
结束了，呃，希瑞雅…竟然还没走？悄悄躲着她离开吧！
It's over. Huh? Serena... is still here? Better sneak away from her quietly!
{NICKNAME}, I... I have a rather awkward request...
我给阿波罗尼写了一封信，可以拜托你帮、帮我送给他吗？
I wrote a letter to Apollonius, c—could you help me deliver it to him?
Got some tea? Hey, spill it!
Are you planning to confess to him?
啊，阁下，不要说、说得那么直接啊……
Ah, {NICKNAME}, p—please don't be so... so direct...
嗯…个中缘由，{NICKNAME}说、说不定已经猜出来了。
Hmm... you m—might have already figured out the reason why.
不知道您愿不愿意帮我这个忙呢……
I was wondering if you'd be willing to help me out...
No problem, it's a piece of cake.
真、真的吗！太谢、谢谢你了！
Here's my letter. Thanks for your help, {NICKNAME}.
但、但不许看！不然，我、我真的会找个地缝钻进去，再也不出来了……
B—But don't look! Otherwise, I—I'll seriously find a crack in the ground to crawl into and never come out again...
我不擅长应付这种，找别人吧。
I'm not good at this kind of stuff, ask someone else.
Oh, w—well then, sorry to bother you, {NICKNAME}...
...Ah, {NICKNAME}! H—Have you had a change of heart?
Dux Carminum, I'm dying to hear the tea.
真、真的吗！太谢、谢谢你了！
我不擅长应付这种，找别人吧。
I'm not good at this kind of stuff, ask someone else.
Oh, w—well then, sorry to bother you, {NICKNAME}...
（这封信…想必就是维吉妮娅送给阿波罗尼的情书了。）
(This... must be the love letter Verginia wrote to Apollonius.)
你举着信件，在人群中寻找着阿波罗尼的身影，忽然有人拍了拍你的肩膀。
Holding the letter, you search for Apollonius in the crowd, when suddenly someone taps you on the shoulder.
哟，贵客！怎么样，在宴会上喝得可算尽兴？
Hey, honored guest! So, did you drink to your heart's content at the party?
要是闲着，不如来和我们…嗯，你手里拿着的是什么？
If you're free, why don't you join us... hmm, what's that you're holding?
八卦是人们不变的天性。你将维吉妮娅托你给阿波罗尼送信一事如实相告……
Gossip is a constant in human nature. You told the truth about how Verginia asked you to deliver a message to Apollonius...
哈哈！小维吉妮娅一向藏不住心思，只是未曾将其挑明。
Haha! Little Verginia has always worn her heart on her sleeve, even if she never said it out loud.
这回她终于要正面出击了吗…真叫人兴奋哪！
Is she finally going to make her move... This is so exciting!
以前，维吉妮娅曾作为外交使者前往树庭，目睹阿波罗尼独辩四贤人。
Once, Verginia visited the Grove as a diplomatic messenger and witnessed Apollonius debating against four Sages.
那回，他少有地发怒了：「既然你们较之世界命运更在乎瑟希斯的存亡，我便先毁了它的神体！」
That time, in a rare display of anger, he declared: "Since you care more about Cerces' survival than the world's destiny, I shall destroy their divine form first!"
他抄起投石索，将沉石向瑟希斯的神体掷去，吓得其余贤人抱头鼠窜。
He grabbed a sling and lobbed a heavy stone at Cerces's divine form, sending the other Sages scurrying away in panic.
小维吉妮娅也被吓到了，很久没敢和他搭话。但在相处以后，才知道阿波罗尼是个格外温厚的家伙。
Little Verginia was also scared and didn't dare talk to him for a long time. But after getting to know him, she discovered that Apollonius was actually an exceptionally gentle fellow.
她写的每一首诗，阿波罗尼都会细细装裱，并给予她鼓励。
Apollonius would carefully frame every poem she wrote and give her encouragement.
不过那家伙，待谁都是这样温和热情，真是不开窍啊。
But he is so warm and friendly to everyone, he's completely clueless.
有我帮忙，顽石也得开窍。
With my help, even a rock would get a clue.
嗑学家们，放心交给我吧。
其实，我们并非看不见小维吉妮娅心中柔软之处，只是无从触及。
To be honest, we can see the tenderness in little Verginia's heart... we just can't reach it.
上个月，小维吉妮娅用悬锋古语给拉比努斯写了首赞美诗，他竟然念反了！
Last month, little Verginia wrote a Praisesong in Ancient Kremnoan for Labienus, and he read it backwards!
你这天空蛮夷笑什么？她精心给你挑选的头巾，你居然绑在杖上当战旗！
What are you laughing at, you sky barbarian? She carefully picked out that headscarf for you, and you went and tied it to your staff like a battle flag!
...Anyway, esteemed guest, I'm really counting on you.
我们…不，我…该怎么办好呢……
What should we... no, what should I... do...
啊，{NICKNAME}阁下，抱歉，我想事情的时候会有些入神。
Ah, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, my apologies. I tend to get lost in thought sometimes.
曳石爵，有一封给你的信。
Dux Helkolithist, there's a letter for you.
看这信纸的折法，是小维吉妮娅吧，一定又写了漂亮的新诗……
Looking at how this letter is folded, it must be from little Verginia. She must have written another beautiful poem...
阿波罗尼展开信笺，细细阅读了一番。
Apollonius unfolds the letter and reads it carefully.
Thank you for delivering the letter.
你看了信，都没情感波动吗？
Did you read the letter and feel nothing at all?
你这呆瓜，是有什么心事吗？
You silly goose, is something on your mind?
阁下如果不嫌弃的话，我为你讲些小维吉妮娅的往事吧。
If you don't mind, I'd like to tell you some stories about little Verginia.
她是个爱打扮爱写诗的姑娘，经常和金织爵讨论服饰，也经常和命运爵共写歌谣。
She's a girl who loves to dress up and write poetry, often discussing fashion with Dux Goldweaver and frequently composing ballads with Dux Fatorum.
只是，她的天性从小得不到包容。她害怕打仗，害怕震耳欲聋的吼声，害怕金属交击的脆响……
However, her nature was never accepted since childhood. She feared battles, feared the deafening roars, feared the crisp clang of clashing metal...
那些宏伟的诗篇，在悬锋城只是擦拭锋刃的废纸。
Those grand poems are just scrap paper for wiping blades in Castrum Kremnos.
遭部族驱逐后，小维吉妮娅加入了逐火，这才找到自己的归身之处。
After being banished from her tribe, little Verginia joined the Flame-Chase Journey before she finally found a place to belong.
她是如风一般的诗人，能去到任何想去的地方，也能在任何地方逗留。至于我……
She's a poet like the wind, free to go wherever she wants and linger wherever she pleases. As for me...
…阁下，你先回去吧，就说我还在考虑。拜托你了。
...You should head back. Just tell her I'm still thinking about it. I'm counting on you.
你将阿波罗尼的回应告诉维吉妮娅，她看上去有些失落，但在你的安慰下很快振作了。
You tell Verginia about Apollonius's response. She looks a little let down, but quickly cheers up after your consolation.
When the next Entry Hour arrives...
阿波罗尼失踪了？什么时候？
是的…昨天{NICKNAME}阁下送完信回来，我才决定鼓起勇气和他当面表达清楚。
Yes... After {NICKNAME} came back from delivering the letter yesterday, I finally decided to gather my courage and tell him face-to-face.
但是，哪里都找不到阿波罗尼的身影，用传信石版也、也联系不上他……
But Apollonius was nowhere to be found, and I couldn't even reach him through the teleslate...
那家伙，该不会是潜逃了吧？
That idiot, did he just run away?
当务之急，是分头把他找到。{NICKNAME}贵客，实在不好意思，得拜托你也搭把手了。
The most urgent matter now is to split up and find him. {NICKNAME}, I'm terribly sorry, but I'll have to ask for your help with this too.
城下的古遗迹里有一台雅努斯迷津，对阿波罗尼最后的目击记录就在那附近。
There's a Janus' Maze in the ancient ruins below the city, and the last sighting of Apollonius was recorded around there.
也许凭借贵客岁月祭司的力量，能够找到阿波罗尼的踪迹吧。
Perhaps with your power as a Priest of Time, we can track down Apollonius.
记得友爱之馆录有这雅努斯迷津的使用方法，让我回忆回忆……
I remember the Library of Philia has records about how to use Janus' Maze. Allow me a moment to recall...
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我——「于梦中惊觉的悬石，该去往何方？」
{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide me — "Where should the floating stone that awakens from dreams go?"
门径的导引是——「欢宴之出口，虚妄的边境」……
The guidance from the Gate is — "The egress of banquets, the border of futility"...
果然…雅努斯并未指引我，只是坚定了我心中的选择…那便无需再犹豫了。
As expected... Janus didn't guide me, but rather reinforced the choice I had already made in my heart... No need to hesitate any longer.
「欢宴之出口，虚妄的边境」…他是想，离开斯缇科西亚？！
"The egress of banquets, the border of futility"... Is he planning to leave Styxia!?
身为幻境的一部分，脱离幻境一定会消失的…必须赶紧阻止他！
As a part of the illusion, he'll vanish if he leaves... I must stop him quickly!
看起来这台雅努斯迷津还能够继续使用，不过只能等有机会再回来探索了。
Looks like this Janus' Maze is still operational, but we'll have to come back and explore it another time.
当初打算离开树庭的时候，似乎也是这样的心情呢。只是，这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久啊。
I had the same feeling back when I first planned to leave the Grove. But this time... I can't believe I hesitated for so long about running away.
You'll die if you leave this place!
享受这场无休的宴会，不好吗？
Why not enjoy this never-ending party?
啊，{NICKNAME}阁下…真不愧是你，能在这里找到我。
Ah, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I knew you would be the one to find me here.
但你的反应，再度证明了雅努斯迷津为我揭露的真相——
But your reaction reaffirms the truth that Janus' Maze revealed to me—
这场欢宴是一场幻境，而我是幻境的一簇泡沫。一旦离开此处，我就会消失得无影无踪。
This banquet is but an illusion, and I am merely a bubble in this fantasy. Once I leave this place, I will vanish without a trace.
If you knew that, why did you...
因为我是一位贤人，我是凯撒的参谋，我是逐火的黄金裔。
It's because I am a Sage, the Imperator's Advisor, and a Flame-Chasing Chrysos Heir.
在畅饮蜜酿之时，我脑中掠过一缕针扎般的念头——逐火之旅果真能如此完美么？一场欢宴，果真能承载翁法罗斯那悲惨的命运么？

As I indulged in the honey brew, a needle-sharp thought pierced my mind — could the Flame-Chase Journey really be this perfect? Could a mere banquet truly bear the weight of Amphoreus's tragic destiny?
贤人一旦产生了这样的忧虑，则无法安享欢宴，并必然踏上追求真相而自毁的道路。
Once a Sage harbors such worries, they can no longer enjoy the banquet, and will inevitably embark on a self-destructive path in pursuit of truth.
想想朋友们，想想维吉妮娅……
Think about our friends, think about Verginia...
…抱歉，阁下，正因为我想着他们，才必须离开这里。
...I'm sorry, but it's precisely because I care about them that I must leave this place.
此前我同你说过，维吉妮娅是风一般的诗人。而我…我是山崖上的一枚顽石。
As I told you before, Verginia is a poet like the wind. And I... I am but a stubborn boulder on a cliff.
顽石对微风的轻拂无动于衷，只因它心系世界的命运……
The stubborn boulder remains unmoved by the gentle breeze, for its heart is bound to the world's destiny...
如今，风已有归处。不只是她，还有塞涅卡、拉比努斯…一路走来，他们都太辛苦了。
Now, the wind has found her place. Not just her, but Seneca, Labienus too... they've all been through so much on this journey.
用这场宴会作为他们的终点，一定是<color=#dbc291ff>那位伙伴</color>的仁慈。
Making this banquet their final destination must be <color=#dbc291ff>that companion's</color> act of mercy.
Hysilens, the master of the feast...
原来，你已经知道这么多了。
So, you already know this much.
是的。自产生疑虑至今，我已经知道得太多太多。我是宴会中的杂音，我眉间的忧愁会让我爱的人们也失去笑容，甚至将他们也拽出这方美景……

Yes. Since doubts first arose, I've learned far too much. I'm a discordant noise at a party — the worry between my brows steals smiles from those I love, even dragging them away from this beautiful scene...
这便是理性的顽石必须滚落山崖的原因——它不忍打扰另一侧，那微风吹拂的静谧湖面。
That's why the stubborn boulder of reason must tumble down the cliff — it can't bear to disturb the serene lake surface on the other side, where gentle breezes blow.
可你消失了，他们该怎么办……
But what about them if you disappear...
关于这点，或许是最不用担心的。
That's probably the least of our worries.
这本是一场完美的、无休的宴会，无人会哭泣、无人应哀愁，唯有蜜酿沁人心脾、唯有欢歌引人酣醉。
It was meant to be a perfect, endless banquet, where no one would cry or grieve, where only honey brew would warm the heart, and only joyous songs would entice the soul.
正如那传说中的再创世。你说对吗…海瑟音？
Just like the legendary Era Nova. Isn't that right... Hysilens?
阿波罗尼，你这家伙跑哪里去了？让我们一通好找。
Apollonius, where have you been? We've been looking all over for you!
抱歉，我脑子还有些涨，兴许是蜜酿喝得昏过去，不知道在哪儿睡着了吧。让各位操心了。
Sorry, my head's still a bit woozy. Must've passed out from too much honey brew and dozed off somewhere. Thanks for worrying about me.
听说也劳{NICKNAME}阁下你费了些劲，请容我郑重向你致歉。
I heard you went through quite some trouble, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please allow me to offer you my sincere apologies.
我当然是阿波罗尼，树庭贤人、逐火军参谋，这确凿无疑。
I am, without a doubt, Apollonius, Sage of the Grove and advisor to the Flame-Chasers.
嗯，当然没事，我还想接着与大家欢享这场盛宴呢。
Hmm, of course I'm fine. I'd love to keep enjoying this banquet with everyone.
阿波罗尼，也记得向小维吉妮娅道个歉。她还以为你是不知道怎么面对她才闹失踪，自责了好一会儿呢。
Apollonius, don't forget to apologize to little Verginia too. She thought you went missing because you didn't know how to face her and has been blaming herself for quite a while.
我、我并没有自责，阿波罗尼也无需道歉。只是，我想在大家的见证下，再、再、再试一次……
I—I'm not blaming myself, and Apollonius doesn't need to apologize. It's just that, I want to t—t—try again... with everyone here as witness...
阿波罗尼，请允许我为你朗诵一首赞诗吧。这是我…在心底深埋了许久的诗。
Apollonius, please allow me to recite a poem of praise for you. This is a poem that I've... kept buried deep in my heart for so long.
维吉妮娅闭上眼，定神半晌，再度睁眼时气场已截然不同。
Verginia closes her eyes and remains focused for a while. When she opens her eyes again, her demeanor has completely changed.
「树影衬着智者的背影，像一颗巨石在背负年轮。」
"The shadow of a tree frames the sage's back, like a boulder bearing the rings of time."
「鸟儿的歌是穿林的风声，却绕不过他嶙峋的裂痕。」
"The bird's song is a whisper of wind through the forest, but it cannot pass the fractures in his form."
「他的重量，压住了鸟儿的翅膀…和萌动的心。」
"His weight presses down on the bird's wings... and the stirring heart within."
小维吉妮娅，在过去的很长一段时间里，我都以含而不露的理性自居。
Little Verginia, for a long time, I've prided myself on my subtle and restrained rationality.
但我一直想说，你念诗的样子很美。我想过，等到了新世界，一定要与你并肩相依……
But I've always wanted to tell you, you look beautiful when you recite poetry. I've dreamed that when we reach the new world, we'll stand side by side...
为什么…为什么总要等呢？这里有你、有我、有大家…这里分明就是新世界啊！
Why... why do we always have to wait? We're all here — you, me, everyone... This is clearly our new world!
…对不起，阿波罗尼，我有些失态了……
...I'm sorry, Apollonius, I got a bit carried away...
不，小维吉妮娅，你说得对，这里就是新世界。我的意思是…也许是时候，直面并希求你那澎湃的心灵了。
No, little Verginia, you're right, this is the new world. What I mean is... maybe it's time to face and embrace that passionate soul of yours.
恭喜你呀，小维吉妮娅，让这块石头开窍可真不容易！
Congratulations, little Verginia! It wasn't easy getting through that thick skull!
应该是恭喜你们两位…唉，真叫人欣慰啊，*天空粗口*！
I should congratulate you two... *sigh* How heartwarming, *Skyfolk swear word*!
谢谢大家，谢谢你们，谢谢……
Thank you everyone, thank you all, thank you...
你好，灰鱼儿。所谓欢宴，正是由灵魂的洋流交织而出的浪花与暗涌。
Hello, Gray Fry. A feast, you see, is like waves and undercurrents woven from the ocean currents of our souls.
你我如今所目睹的，便是一朵格外洁白而美丽的浪花…不是吗？
What we're witnessing right now is an exceptionally pure and beautiful whitecap... don't you think?
这是你自导自演的幻境……
This is just a fantasy of your own making...
曳石爵…是你复原的，对吗？
Dux Helkolithist... you restored him, didn't you?
我并未刻意去做些什么。在永恒酣歌的斯缇科西亚，法吉娜的神力会满足人们所有的愿望。
I didn't deliberately do anything. In Styxia, where eternal songs resound, Phagousa's divine power fulfills all wishes.
阿波罗尼心系世界命运，故总会产生疑虑，最终必然离开欢宴，消为一簇泡沫。
Apollonius, burdened by the world's destiny, is forever plagued by doubts, destined to leave the banquet and dissolve into a bubble of foam.
而维吉妮娅只愿将浪漫吐露与心上人，哪怕知晓彼此只是记忆催生的蜃景，必不动摇半分。
And Verginia would only share her romance with her beloved. Even knowing they were only an illusion born of memories, her resolve would not waver in the slightest.
She knew it was just an illusion...!?
看来，你还未曾发觉那浪花之下的暗涌，灰鱼儿。
Seems you haven't noticed the undercurrents beneath those waves, Gray Fry.
去看看吧。去看看那悬石滚落、微风倾止的幻宴边境，我那些伙伴们…最真实的样子。
Go and see. Go see the border of this illusory banquet, where stones hang suspended and gentle winds cease. See my companions... in their truest form.
也许那时你便会愈发明白，欢宴于我，于他们…以及于这个世界的意义。
Perhaps then you'll better understand what these banquets mean to me, to them... and to this world.
…这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久。再会，伙伴们…愿你们能永享这无休的欢宴。
...I can't believe I hesitated for so long about leaving. Farewell, my friends... May you forever enjoy this endless banquet.
…第一百四十二次。亲爱的阿波罗尼，这是你第一百四十二次面带愁容，离开斯缇科西亚，离开我们的盛宴。
...That's the one hundred and forty-second time. Dear Apollonius, this is the one hundred and forty-second time you've carried that worried look, leaving Styxia and our banquet behind.
而在明天，你又会回到我的身边。那时的你会面容慈爱，像一尊和蔼的石像。
And tomorrow, you'll be by my side again. Your face will be filled with kindness then, like a gentle stone statue.
除了目睹，我也曾哭泣、也曾阻拦，但你最终总会义无反顾地离开。
I not only witnessed it, I cried and tried to stop you, but you would always leave without hesitation in the end.
无论是怒而离开树庭，还是身先士卒讨伐海洋…你总是将自己视作一枚顽石，试图悬住世界的命运。
Whether storming out of the Grove in anger, or leading the charge against Ocean... you always see yourself as an immovable boulder, trying to hold the world's destiny in balance.
这就是你，亲爱的阿波罗尼，哪怕我们如今只是幻境中的一簇泡沫……
That's who you are, dear Apollonius, even though we're now just bubbles in an illusion...
You haven't changed, and neither will I.
我不在乎我们是泡沫还是洋流，是真实还是虚妄……
I don't care if we're bubbles or ocean currents, reality or illusion...
我只知道，我已经下定了决心，要为你再念那首情诗百次千次，吐露那段应得回响的浪漫……
All I know is that I've made up my mind to recite that love poem for you a hundred times, a thousand times, to express that romance that deserves its response...
我们会第一次，也会无数次并肩而眠…并再也不用从这场梦中醒来。
We'll sleep side by side for the first time, and countless times after... and never have to wake up from this dream again.
{NICKNAME}, could you help me with something...
残像…说明阿波罗尼确实来过这里。看看他之后往哪里走吧。
An afterimage... So Apollonius was definitely here. Let's see where he went next.
能够指引命运的雅努斯迷津，就在这池水之下……
The destiny-guiding Janus' Maze lies beneath these waters...
真是僻静的居所啊，此地…也不属于欢宴吗？
What a secluded dwelling... Is this place also not meant for festivities?
有些熟悉的道路，莫非那命运也在主动指引我前去一探究竟么……
This path feels familiar... Could destiny itself be guiding me to uncover its mysteries?
阿波罗尼，就这么变成了泡沫…该怎么和吟风爵她们说呢……
Apollonius just dissolved into bubbles... How am I going to tell Dux Carminum and the others...
找到阿波罗尼了？这怎么可能……
再见，{NICKNAME}…希望我们还有机会再见。
See you around, {NICKNAME}... until we meet again.
在踏出斯缇科西亚城门的刹那，阿波罗尼便化作泡沫飞散……
Just as Apollonius passed through Styxia's gates, his entire being dissolved into sea foam and vanished into thin air...
仿佛这欢宴的蜃景，容不下一颗清醒的石子。
...like this grand revelry was a dream that couldn't bear the weight of a single sobering thought.
迷津残卷在摇曳着，希望你操控「雅努斯迷津」，帮它追溯过去的推演。
The Maze scroll fragment is flickering. Use Janus' Maze to help retrace and extrapolate its past.
或许可以抽空帮帮忙？你打算——
Maybe you could help out when you get a chance? You're planning to—
委托名「珍藏的蜜酿去哪了」，推演结果是「在委托人肚子里」。
Request: "Where did the treasured Honey brew go?" - Extrapolation Result: "In the client's stomach."
委托名「我的绿叶书签不见了」，推演结果是「在委托人肚子里，少喝蜜酿」。
Request: "My green leaf bookmark is missing." - Extrapolation Result: "It's in the client's stomach. Maybe lay off the honey brew."
委托名「我那喝多的同伴哪去了」，推演结果是「昏睡于排幽处，望珍重」。
Request: "Where did my drunk buddy go?" - Extrapolation Result: "Passed out by the vents. Handle with care."
委托名「我的真爱会在哪」，推演结果是「很遗憾」。
Request: "Where will my true love be?" - Extrapolation Result: "Unfortunately..."
委托名「这歌声的源头在哪里」，推演结果是「在那深处」。
Request: "Where does this song come from?" - Extrapolation Result: "From the depths."
委托名「纷争的尽头在哪里」，推演结果是「无」。
Request: "Where does the strife end?" - Extrapolation Result: "Nowhere."
委托名「法吉娜大人在哪」，推演结果是「在水里，在水里」。
Request: "Where is Lady Phagousa?" - Extrapolation Result: "In the water, in the water."
委托名「你在哪」，推演结果是「不告诉你，不告诉你」。
Request: "Where are you?" - Extrapolation Result: "Not telling you, not telling you."
委托名「世界的真理在哪里」，推演结果是「反正不在这」。
Request: "Where is the truth of the world?" - Extrapolation Result: "Not here, that's for sure."
I have things to do. Come back another time.
欢迎，客人…原来是救世主阁下啊。您方才制作的「专属心酿」已经萃取完成了，请收下。
Well hello there... Oh! Our great Deliverer! Your "exclusive soul brew" from earlier is ready. Here you are.
Well, I should be going now...
如果是指在葡萄台上走了一遭…这么短时间就能出品吗？
From stepping on those grapes? How did it become a drink so quickly?
Honey brew, huh? Let me have a sip—
奇妙，这瓶紫色的液体没有任何味道，有种在喝水的错觉。
Weird. This purple liquid is completely flavorless. Might as well be drinking water.
全是不明白的事，抽空还是去问问情况吧。
Nothing makes sense here. I'll have to find out what's really going on.
啊，客人，请问您需要什么？
Greetings! What can I help you with?
What was all that about before?
啊…瞧我这失误，宴会上太久没有生人，我险些忘记您是来自天外了。
Oh... my apologies! We haven't had outsiders join our celebration in ages. I forgot you're from beyond the sky.
容我介绍，这里是蜜酿采榨区。曾经的斯缇科西亚人——乃至全翁法罗斯所饮的蜜酿，多数都是源自此处的果实，以及满溢之杯的神力。

Allow me to introduce: the harvest zone for our honey brew. Before everything changed, Styxians and all people of Amphoreus drank brews made from these fruits, blessed by the divine power of the Chalice of Plenty.
而方才您步上的，是法吉娜的祭台。通过亲自挤压葡萄，您的来时路便会立刻化作一瓶「专属心酿」，无论失却欢欣多久，都能以它平复心境，重拾笑靥……

What you walked across was Phagousa's altar. By personally stepping on the grapes, the journey you took to get here will be instantly turned into a bottle of "exclusive soul brew." One sip is supposed to calm troubled hearts and restore smiles, no matter how long they have been without joy...
...or that's how it used to be, at least.
嗯…不知道您有没有开瓶尝过它的味道，实不相瞒……
Well... have you tried it yet? To be honest...
正是，每瓶「专属心酿」的味道各不相同。只是……
Exactly. Every "exclusive soul brew" should taste different. But unfortunately...
在法吉娜陨命后，祭台的神力已经愈加微弱，现在产出的「专属心酿」可谓寡淡如水，仅能尝出一点点蜜酿香气。
With Phagousa gone, the altar's power has diminished significantly. Now our "exclusive soul brew" tastes like nothing but water with barely a whisper of honey brew fragrance.
In other words, it's glorified water.
唉，您说话很直白，我很难过。
Maybe Hysilens could help with this?
的确，不过——客人们意识到味道减退是近期的事，而我们有一阵子没见到海瑟音大人了……
Good idea, but... the guests only started complaining recently, and Lady Hysilens has been absent for quite a while...
So... I was hoping that maybe YOU could...
Let me guess, you want me to fix it with prayers?
您是说欧洛尼斯祷言吗？不不，您也知道那两尊泰坦曾经水火不容，要是动用欧洛尼斯的神力……恐怕会起到反效果。
Oronyx's Prayer? No, no. Those two Titans couldn't stand each other. Using Oronyx's power... would probably backfire.
I have no idea where to find Hysilens.
我明白，想拜托您的事情是另一件——
Right, of course. Actually, I had something different in mind...
当下，最妥当的方案，或许是去委任涅赖德斯阁下——她曾是海瑟音大人的贴身辅佐，也是如今唯一的「海洋」司祭。
Our best option now might be to seek Lady Nereides. She was Lady Hysilens's personal assistant and is currently the only "Ocean" Priest remaining.
或许，她能为我们求来海瑟音大人的权能。
Perhaps she can channel Lady Hysilens's power to help us.
Naturally. I'll make it worth your while.
Alright, I'll go speak with her.
感激不尽，阁下。我会准备好谢礼。
Many thanks! I'll have your payment ready when you return.
为了能让这份独特重现在欢宴之上——万事拜托了，救世主阁下。
For the sake of bringing this unique experience back to our revelry... we're counting on you, Great Deliverer.
呵呵…哈哈…呵哈哈哈…诶呦，好大一只海蛞蝓……
Heh... Hah haha.... Hahaha... Whoa, what a huge sea slug...
Ma'am? Ma'am! Time to shake off that buzz.
This sea slug needs you to start working again!
哎，还…还怪亲切的——找我有事吗，海里的小精灵？要不要来点蜜酿啊——
Well, aren't you... *hic* a cute one! Do you need something, little ocean sprite? Care for a sip of my honey brew?
想请您动用「海洋」的权能。
I need you to channel the power of the "Ocean."
海…洋……？啊…莫非您是海瑟音大人一直在等候的那位——
The... Ocean? Wait... Are you the one Lady Hysilens has been waiting for?
You quickly explained why you were there.
是吗，岁月已然延伸如此之远…这场永无休止的欢宴间，我几近忘却自己的本职，只是——
Oh my... Has it been that long already? With all this never-ending revelry, I've almost forgotten what I'm supposed to do... except—
海瑟音大人最后托付给老身的任务——「享受并延续这场欢宴」，唯独这点，我绝不会忘记。带我前去吧，救世主阁下。
One thing I'll never forget is Lady Hysilens's last task for me: "Enjoy and continue this revelry." Now, Great Deliverer, would you kindly escort me there?
许久不见您清醒的样子了，涅赖德斯大人。
It's been a while since we've seen you sober, Lady Nereides.
呵，情况我理解了，让我一试吧。
Well then, I've been briefed. I'll see what I can do.
「变幻波光的化身啊，我向您倾诉，一切驻足聆听您的歌唱，请赐人们的杯中蜜酿满溢——」
"O embodiment of the shimmering tides, hear my call. The world falls silent for your sacred song. Bless this gathering with cups that never run dry—"
这手感…老身也无法断言。救世主阁下，能麻烦您帮忙确认一下吗？
It feels... hmm, I'm not entirely certain. Great Deliverer, could you give it a taste for me?
晶紫色液体在空中划出流线，随即收入瓶中——一罐蜜酿悄然封装。
Glimmering streaks of purple liquid swirled through the air and flowed into the vessel in waiting, a flask of honey brew now sealed and ready.
Same as before. It's just water.
果然…法吉娜的权柄已经彻底消散了，事到如今，仅靠海洋的仪式，无法使它恢复分毫。
I suspected as much. Phagousa's authority entirely faded away. The Ocean's rituals alone cannot restore even the slightest bit of it now.
换个思路吧，接下来，老身会尝试将其「复现」，即重新创造一个祭台。只是，我需要进一步了解它的原理才行。
Let's try something else. I'll try to "recreate" the flavor by building a new altar. But before that, I need to figure out how it actually works.
…不，既然救世主阁下在场，不如取一条捷径——直接探求那位已陨泰坦本尊的记忆便是。
No need for that. With the Great Deliverer here, we have a better option. Let's directly tap into the fallen Titan's memories instead.
麻烦你了，救世主——呵，说来也让人惆怅，阁下应该是最后一位欧洛尼斯神迹的使用者了……
I'll need your help, Great Deliverer. Hmm... there's a certain sadness in knowing you're likely the last to ever wield Oronyx's Miracle.
或许是你曾回溯过它一次的关系，记忆之声如约而至。
Their memory speaks to you like greeting an old friend, probably because you've rewound them once already.
嗯…欢宴已抵热潮，可是…不喜蜜酿之人…仍比比皆是啊。
Well... Our revelry is at its height, but... Too many have passed on the honey brew.
怎么办呢？又不能给人强灌下去——也许能？啊，啊，有了，有了。
What should I do? Can't exactly force them to drink it— Or can I? No, wait, I've got a better idea!
摘取他们满溢的喜好来酿造，将回忆化作果浆，绝妙！
I'll harvest their deepest desires for my brew, spinning memories into liquid joy. Behold my genius!
来吧，宝贝儿们…踩吧，把你们的渴望踏入池中——
That's it, my lovelies... step in and crush your desires deep into the basin—
毕竟…没人会拒绝自己最爱的味道……
After all... no one ever turns down a sip of their own deepest longing...
Yep, that's the Titan of Honey Brew alright...
They've got quite the silver tongue.
「择取人们的喜好，创造不同口味的蜜酿」，正可谓法吉娜的印象所示。
"Honey brews for every palate, each bottle filled with different desires." That's the divine work Phagousa is most known for.
然而很遗憾，在海瑟音大人的权柄中，并不包含窥探内心一事。
Sadly, peering into hearts and minds isn't part of Lady Hysilens's authority.
So we're at a dead end.
Can't blame her. She's still new to being a demigod.
「纵使回声褪成遗忘，那些身影也从未模糊」——百十年前，一度苏醒的海瑟音大人曾对我这样说过。
"Echoes of memories may fade to oblivion, but the people in them never lose their shape." Lady Hysilens spoke these words to me during a rare lucid moment a century past.
…足矣。万分感激，救世主阁下。老身方才明白了，该如何「将味道复现」。
I see it clearly now. My deepest thanks, Great Deliverer. Now I know how to "recreate the flavor."
先回到酿造区吧，这一次，也要麻烦阁下了。
Let's head back to the harvest zone. I'll need your help one more time.
涅赖德斯大人，看您的表情，想必是已经有眉目了？
Lady Nereides, you look like you've figured something out?
算是吧，让开些，小心被卷入洋流中去。
You could say that. Step back. You don't want to get pulled into the ocean currents.
「变幻波光的化身啊——我向您倾诉，请择清忆为实，赐人们的杯中蜜酿满溢——」
"O embodiment of the shimmering tides, hear my call. Turn their memories into honey brew and bless this gathering with cups that never run dry—"
The brew glimmers faintly, sprinkled with twinkling specks.
晶紫色液体在空中划出流线，随即收入瓶中——一罐蜜酿悄然封装。
Glimmering streaks of purple liquid swirled through the air and flowed into the vessel in waiting, a flask of honey brew now sealed and ready.
柔和的口感，花香，水生调…这真的是蜜酿？不对，你确信这个味道似乎在哪里……
Silky consistency, floral fragrance, water elements... Is this actually honey brew? No, wait... this taste seems familiar, like you've had it somewhere...
呛人的风味并未如预期般向你袭来，取而代之的却是一种熟悉感，就像在哪里……
Instead of the strong kick you expected, you're struck by a familiar taste, like you've had it somewhere...
这是海瑟音给我尝过的…
啊啊，感谢您，海瑟音大人…我们成功了，救世主阁下。
Oh, blessed be Lady Hysilens! We've done it, Great Deliverer.
这是海瑟音大人的认知中，您来到翁法罗斯后，最为熟悉的饮品。
Lady Hysilens somehow knows that this is the drink you've become most familiar with since arriving in Amphoreus.
她没有到访的我们的欢宴，但却对这座城邦中的每个人都无比熟知……
Despite never gracing our revelry, she possesses an intimate knowledge of every person in this city-state...
如此一来，在这片幻境中，回味便与心酿无异。
So in this illusion, everyone tastes the drink exactly what their souls have brewed.
...the Dew of Divine Blood that Hysilens let me try?
没错，没错，就是这个——哎呀，暌违十五年的「专属心酿」，总算回来了。
Oh yes! This is definitely it! The "exclusive soul brew" I've been craving for fifteen years is finally back!
我这瓶倒是跟之前不太一样……但没关系，这瓶也…好喝！
The flavor isn't quite what I remember... but honestly? That doesn't matter. This new bottle is incredible!
好了各位，多亏司祭求来海瑟音大人的赐福，我们重新开业啦。
Ladies and gentlemen! Our doors are officially reopened, all thanks to our priest who prayed for Lady Hysilens's blessing!
好啊！千年未见的味道，这下又能喝着啦——
Fantastic! A taste lost for a thousand years, now ours to enjoy again—
救世主阁下，涅赖德斯大人，这次真是麻烦二位了。
Great Deliverer, Lady Nereides, your help has been absolutely invaluable to us.
哈哈，当然！稍后就拿给您，您可以期待一下！
Certainly! I'll fetch it right away. I promise you'll be pleased!
实在是感激不尽，后续您要是有朋友来到这里，欢迎来酿造区体验！这场欢宴欢迎每一个热爱蜜酿的人！
We cannot thank you enough. If you ever return with friends, do stop by our harvest zone! Our revelry has room for anyone who enjoys honey brew!
之后要忙起来了，请原谅我先行告退，二位还请慢慢参观。
I've got to run now, business calls. Please, make yourselves at home and feel free to look around.
救世主阁下，我有一件物品要交付于你。
Great Deliverer, I have a special item that belongs in your hands.
Whatever it is, it looks expensive.
翁法罗斯唯一的一樽，源自「海洋」的纯酿，樽铭为「把欢宴带去明天」。无他，无价。
The last bottle in all of Amphoreus, a pure brew of the "Ocean," bearing the inscription "Take the Feast to Tomorrow." It is, quite simply, priceless.
它是在那千年的歌谣被唱诵前，由海瑟音大人亲手创制封装的。
Lady Hysilens personally created and sealed it, long before anyone had ever heard that ancient ballad.
海瑟音大人唯一的嘱咐，便是将它交给她所等待的那一位——
She left just one request, that this bottle find its way to the person she's been waiting for—
…她呼唤我们到她身边，却从未消解那份孤独。好在，阁下现在身在此处。
She gathered us around her, yet never escaped her solitude. Now that you're here, perhaps that will change.
阁下……你认为，现在的「心酿」，仍与往日一致吗？
Tell me, Great Deliverer... is the "soul brew" we make today still faithful to what it once was?
大家都很开心，这就够了。
As long as everyone's happy, that's all that matters.
阁下是这么想的吗…不过，无论何种论点，都算不上错谬。
So that's what you think... Still, no opinion is truly wrong here.
毕竟，延续欢宴的并非蜜酿本身，而是蜜酿中流淌的故事。
After all, what carries the revelry forward isn't the honey brew itself, but the stories it holds.
下回，一起畅饮一杯吧，救世主阁下。
Next time, let's share a cup together, Great Deliverer.
烈到难以入口的纯酿，很难想象什么样的人才会喜欢这种口味，或是把这瓶送给别人。
A pure brew so harsh it burns going down. Hard to imagine who would enjoy something like that, or even gift it to someone else.
虽然像是鲜血，但其实是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>纯石榴汁。悬锋人，实在奇妙。
It may look like blood, but it's actually <unbreak>100%</unbreak> pure pomegranate juice. The Kremnoans are truly something else.
瓶身色彩斑斓，味道千变万化——啊，上等的果昔。
A riot of color on the bottle, and an ever-shifting taste inside— Ah, now that's a fine fruit smoothie.
不含浓度的葡萄汁。似乎是因为一些用于发酵的生命已远渡冥界了……
Unfermented grape juice. Seems the life meant to spark the fermentation has long since crossed into the nether realm...
只有极少数人能品出，这樽蜜酿有多么价值不菲。铭为「致大地兽」，光历<unbreak>4500</unbreak>年制。
Only a rare few can tell just how valuable this honey brew is. Labeled "To Dromas," crafted in Light Calendar <unbreak>4500</unbreak>.
天空一族没太有饮用蜜酿的习惯，毕竟葡萄在高海拔地区无法生长——所以，这是一瓶水汽蒸发「云酿」…就是蒸馏水。

The Sky people never developed a taste for honey brew, as grapes simply won't grow at these altitudes. So what we have here is "Cloudbrew," made from condensed vapor... basically just distilled water.
粗制蜜酿，就像是各个城邦市场售卖的，需要自己带个小碗去盛的那种便宜货一样——还怪好喝的。
Crude honey brew, the kind sold in every city-state marketplace. Cheap enough you have to bring your own bowl to scoop it. Honestly? Kinda tasty.
你得到了一瓶十分浑浊的蜜酿，味道粗糙苦涩，只应属于街头流民的行囊…凯撒居然喝过这种东西？
You obtain a bottle of murky honey brew, rough and bitter. The sort that belongs in the pack of a vagabond... Wait, the Imperator drank this before?
一瓶口感绝佳的蜜酿，堪比神血的精品…但似乎掺杂着硝烟、鲜血与泪水的味道。
A bottle of exquisite honey brew, superb as divine blood... yet its flavor carries the smoke of war, the sting of blood, and the salt of tears.
葡萄啪嗒啪嗒作响，一瓶瓶蜜酿被灌装——很可惜，属于你的那瓶还没准备好。
The grapes plip and plop as they're pressed, and bottle after bottle is filled. Shame the one meant for you isn't ready just yet.
熟悉的味道，虽并非真品，但却能从中感受到——那位「海洋」半神努力尝试复现时的真切心意。
The taste is familiar. Even though it's not the real thing, I can feel the sincerity of the demigod of Ocean in trying to recreate it.
盛放葡萄的池子…看起来很好踩啊，要不要走上去试试？
That pool full of grapes... looks way too tempting to stomp on. Wanna take a step and try it?
为了能让这份独特重现在欢宴之上——万事拜托了，救世主阁下。
For the sake of bringing this unique experience back to our revelry... we're counting on you, Great Deliverer.
救世主阁下，能麻烦您帮忙确认一下吗？只要走上祭台，再制造一瓶心酿便好。
Great Deliverer, might I trouble you to verify? Simply step onto the altar and craft another bottle of soul brew.
喔，不知修好了没有？救世主阁下，您再做一瓶看看？
Oh? I wonder if it's working now. Great Deliverer, could you try making one more bottle?
拜托了，阁下。走上祭台，再制造一瓶心酿吧。
Please, Great Deliverer. Step onto the altar and craft another bottle of soul brew.
我感受到了，祭台似乎重新焕发出了活力……
I can feel it. The altar seems to have come back to life...
「心酿」回归了。把握好「仅一次」的机会，让一位翁法罗斯遇到的朋友来尝试，或许……
The soul brew has returned. Make the most of this "one and only chance." Let a friend from Amphoreus try it, and maybe...
如果在列车的这个位置布设空间望远镜，应该能观测到更短的波长……
If a space telescope were deployed at this location on the Express, it would almost certainly be possible to observe shorter wavelengths...
Mm, feels like a good angle.
Have you got a new thesis topic?
是呀。之前苦思冥想不得其法，一登上列车，想法就接二连三地冒出来，灵感真是折磨人的小妖怪。
Sure do! Y'know, I was racking my brains before I boarded the Express, but now I've got more ideas than I know what to do with. Inspiration is a fickle mistress.
这篇论文或许和列车有关…到时候还要请你们接受我的采访，多多提供一手资料。
My thesis might just be related to the Express... I hope you'll agree to be interviewed later — I need first-hand information.
当然不是啦。我又不是以工作名义来参观的，而是受到了{NICKNAME}的邀请，对吧？
Of course not — I'm here on your invitation. Isn't that right?
所以在登上列车的那一刻，我就迫不及待调整至休假模式，全力睁大眼睛，寻找下一个论文选题。
That's why I went into vacation mode the second I boarded the Express — thesis topics don't unearth themselves y'know.
...Of course, there are other things in life too.
今天就好好享受列车时光吧。
Why not just soak in the Express for today.
虽然之前也来过列车，不过有{NICKNAME}在的列车，我还是第一次来呢。
I've been on the Express before, but this is my first visit with {NICKNAME} on board.
I should be able to observe...
如果能观测到更短的波长，那可以当作论文的新选题…不过不是今天的重点啦。
If shorter wavelengths could be observed, it'd make for a good thesis... But that's not the focus of today.
今天就好好享受列车时光吧。
Why not just soak in the Express for now.
虽然之前也来过列车，不过有{NICKNAME}在的列车，我还是第一次来呢。
I've been on the Express before, but this is my first visit with {NICKNAME} on board.
列车上有不少我只在目录上见过的奇物，虽然仅靠肉眼我也不能完全确信……
There are quite a few curios on the Express that I've only seen in the catalogs, though I'll need to see them up close before I believe them...
我猜它应该是合成机的原型机之一，底座上或许还留有空间站的奇物编码。
I'm guessing that's one of the prototype synthesizers. There may be a curio code on its base.
但公司并未从一开始就推出「万能」系列，你猜为什么？
"Omni" makes it sound pretty capable, but the Corporation released other models onto the market first. Know why?
答案是他们还想赚普通合成机的钱~
Well, why make "omni" money when you can make ordinary money first~?
唔，我倒不认为它是个奇物。
Oh, I don't think that's a curio.
它的曲库齐全得惊人，除了大量资金投入，我想象不到你们有其他办法来解决版权问题。
It's amazing how many songs are stored in its library. Someone must have paid big money to get all the copyright issues sorted.
不过，最可疑的当属那边的沙发……
Hmm... there's something weird about that sofa over there...
为什么{NICKNAME}你可以选择坐下，但我做不到。
{NICKNAME}, how come it lets you sit on it, but not me?
或许它有自己的一套选择机制，只有被这个奇物认可的人才被允许坐在上面。
Perhaps it has its own set of authorization mechanisms, and only those it recognizes are permitted to sit on it.
Interesting... I'll have to have a closer look some time.
There are a lot of Curios on the Express...
唔…那个沙发真的很可疑……
Huh... there's something strange about that sofa.

居然有这么古老的玩意儿…你们还在用这种老式留声机吗？
This must be ancient... Is the Express crew still using it?
那倒没有，只是比较少见。
Oh, nothing. It's just you don't see things like this every day.
留声机…要听歌得用黑胶碟片吧？在空间站里，只有极少数的音乐爱好者才有收集实体唱片的习惯。
Phonographs...They use vinyl records, right? There's only a handful of folks on the space station who collect those things.
要不然就是像古恩那种老头子才会用…不过我记得他听的是录音带。
I think they're more popular with the older crowd — I bet Gunn would know how to use them. Still, if I remember correctly, Gunn only listens to audio tapes...
How do you listen to music?
和你们一样啊，用终端随便听听。
Same as you guys — on terminals.
You seem to know a lot.
你是说音乐吗？我只是偶尔听听，称不上什么行家。
About music? I'd say I'm more of a casual listener than a hardcore enthusiast.
唔，我算是明白为什么总有人喜欢这种古老笨重又不方便的「大块头」了。
Huh... What with them being so big and heavy, I used to wonder why anyone would ever buy a Phonograph. Think I'm starting to get it now.
因为「公司」旗下的音乐平台实在太乱了，像我就是十几个平台的付费会员。

收费倒不贵，只是切换起来太麻烦了，还不如留声机呢——只要有碟片，想听什么就放什么，还能满足收藏欲。

It's not like they're expensive or anything. It's just a hassle to switch between them to find the song you like. With a Phonograph, it's essentially just plug-and-play. It also scratches the itch to collect things I guess.
居然有这么古老的玩意儿…没想到你们还在用它听歌。

我最近难得有空，还想上列车找姬子姐姐聊聊，没想到正好碰见你……
I finally managed to get some time off work and thought I'd hop on the Express for a chat with Himeko. I had no idea I'd bump into you...
Should I... leave you to it?
我不是这个意思！我以为你在外面冒险呢，所以有点惊讶。
That's not what I'm saying! I just thought you'd be on an adventure somewhere, that's all.
那可不行，空间站里还有很多事要忙呢。
Sadly, I can't. Too much work on the space station.
以前列车停靠在空间站月台的时候，我来拜访过不少次。

但我感觉，现在的列车好像和以前不大一样了……
I will say, the train feels a little different now...
我觉得，自从你加入列车组之后，星穹列车里好像更「生机勃勃」了。
It's almost as if you joining the crew has given everyone an extra boost of energy...
这个说法可能过于抽象，但这就是我刚刚见到你时的直观印象。休息时间能和好朋友偶遇，怎么说都是件开心的事。
...And this might sound a little strange, but that's how I felt when I first met you, hehe. Anyway, whichever way you slice it, it's always nice to bump into a friend.
I didn't expect to bump into you...
以前列车停靠在空间站月台的时候，我来拜访过不少次。

这个说法可能过于抽象，但这就是我刚刚见到你时的直观印象。休息时间能和好朋友偶遇，怎么说都是件开心的事。

要是有机会，真想把我的望远镜搬到列车上。
If I get the chance, I'd love to bring my telescope onto the Express.
不是那种笨重的巨型天文望远镜啦，是那种能随时随地组装起来的。
Not an observatory-sized one, haha. I've got a portable one — it can be disassembled and reassembled super easily.
底座虽然又小又轻便，但用着还蛮稳固，我小时候经常用它来看星星。
It's got a small base, but it's stable enough to get the job done. I used to love stargazing with it when I was a child.
虽说宇宙中遍布着各式各样的星体，但我们究竟能观测到什么，这谁也说不准。
There are all kinds of wonders in the universe — you never know what you might find with a telescope.
列车上的光源设置得很合理，车窗这边的视野也棒。
The lighting on the Express is perfect for observations. Great views at the windows too.
{NICKNAME}，你要是有空，可以坐在这儿，关上灯，仔细看看窗外的景色。
When you find a moment, sit here and turn off the lights. You'll be amazed by what you can see.
如果累了，直接躺在座位上看也行——不论从什么角度看，宇宙总是那么迷人。

车窗边简直是最佳观星点，唔，老实说我都有点羡慕了。
There's no better place for looking out into the stars than the Express. I envy you guys.
I really want to move the telescope here...
{NICKNAME}，你要是有空，可以坐在车窗这儿，关上灯，仔细看看窗外的景色。

Don't look so worried! I'm not throwing you another mission.
之前你在空间站的时候，帮了大家不少忙。多亏了你，我的工作也轻松了不少。

不久之前，我还在思考何时才能再次见到贝洛伯格的天空，如今却登上了驶向宇宙的列车……
Not so long ago, I was still wondering whether I'd ever see Belobog's sky again. Now, I'm on a train coasting through the universe...
…对不起，窗外的风景实在是太…我稍稍有些走神了。
...Sorry, it's so beautiful outside... I got a little lost in thought.
差点以为自己被卷入了什么童话故事里了……
I almost thought I'd slipped into a fairy tale...
不介意的话，我会经常过来坐坐。
I'll come and have a seat here more often, if you don't mind.
站在列车上时，我能感受到其实你们也和我们一样，正凭借自己的力量在宇宙中创造未来。
When I stand aboard the Express, I can feel that you and I are really the same — manifesting our own futures in this universe to the best of our abilities.
I think that's what's known as trailblazing.
嗯，大家都在为更广阔的风景而努力……
Mm, everyone's working hard for the bigger picture...
相信我在这儿会拥有许多愉快的回忆。
I believe I'll have lots of happy memories here.
感谢你邀请我登上星穹列车，{NICKNAME}。
Thank you for inviting me aboard the Astral Express, {NICKNAME}.

上次出诊时，有个孩子哭得厉害，他经常在我这儿看病，该听的故事也都听过了，那天怎么哄他，他都不肯听。

The last time I was out in the field, there was a crying child. I'd seen him before many times at the clinic — he'd heard all my usual stories... But that day, no matter what I said to him, he wouldn't listen.
我就和他说起了列车，说着说着他就不哭了，还问了我很多问题。
So I told him about the Express, and eventually he stopped crying and started asking so many questions.
在磐岩镇能看见列车么？为什么列车会在天上飞？列车长是谁呀？
Can you see the Express in Boulder Town? Why does it fly in the sky? Who is the conductor?
Lemme think how to answer those...
其实不用回答也没关系，孩子会给出自己的答案。
Actually, I didn't need any answers — he made them all up himself.
「星星碎了，列车要到处去接星星，所以在天上飞。」
"The stars exploded, and the Express has to go everywhere to pick up all the pieces, and that's why it flies up in the sky."
「列车有很多列车朋友，它要去找它们玩儿。」
"The Express has lots of Express friends, and it wants to find them and play together."
——想象是一切存在的源泉，孩子只需要想象便能理解列车，不需要任何解释。
...Imagination is the source of all existence. Children need only their imagination to understand the Express.
如果下次告诉他们，我登上星穹列车了，不知道他们会不会给我编出一百种登上列车的方式呢……
Then next time I'm back in Belobog I'll tell them I boarded the Express, and I'm sure they'll give me a hundred different explanations of how it happened...

广袤的宇宙，雅利洛-Ⅵ…这样壮丽的景色，无论看多少次都不会感到厌烦。
The vast universe and Jarilo-VI... How could you ever get tired of such an incredible view.
如果有办法把这风景记录下来，带回去给孩子们看就好了。
If only there was a way for me to preserve this moment and show it to the kids back home.
呵呵…你还是这么热心。只是……
Haha, kind-hearted as usual. It's just...
我去把三月七的相机拿来！
呵呵…罢了罢了——那孩子要是发现相机丢了，肯定会着急的吧？况且……
Haha, that won't be necessary — I can't imagine March reacting well if her camera went missing. Besides...
…无论是手机，还是那孩子的相机，虽然都能够记录当下的景色，但那到底与我们人眼所见是大有不同的。
Phones and cameras capture great beauty, but it never compares to what we see with our own eyes.

Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I was lost in the view — I didn't realize you were here.
说起来，你还记得我们先前在雪原中的经历吗？
Do you remember us walking through the Snow Plains?
你说，如果哥哥能活到今天，像我一样站在这里，欣赏与贝洛伯格全然不同的风景…他又会作何感想呢？

他一定也会被宇宙震撼到吧。

呵呵…很像是他会做的事。

呵呵…也是。毕竟在许多人看来，他只是个草菅人命的恶魔……
Mm, I don't blame you for that. A disregard for human life doesn't exactly endear you to other humans...
瓦赫他…生前总是执着于借医学突破血肉之躯的极限，最后不得已含恨而终……
Vache spent his life looking for ways to push past the limits of the human body... but he met a bitter end.
而他却不知道，也正是我们这种连低温都无法应对的脆弱生物，才有办法挣脱重力的束缚，在宇宙中穿梭自如……
He never realized that human fragility is also the greatest driver of our accomplishments. Our bodies never conquered the cold, but our minds ensured that we never had to. Now we travel the stars...
人类…还真是矛盾的生物啊。

列车之旅总算成行了…接下来要怎么参观？按照列车游览路线么？
It's finally time for the Express tour... What should we see next? Do we just follow the Express tour route?
能受邀来列车，我感到十分荣幸。
I'm honored to be invited aboard the Express.
Truly, I'm not just being polite with you...
朗道家是个大家族，家里经常有人来来往往。
The Landau family is big — there are always people around at home.
列车和我家的感觉不太一样，挺空旷的。
The Express doesn't give me that same feeling. It's pretty empty.
That's not a bad thing, right?
对。虽然空旷，但到处都有鲜活的生活痕迹。我能想到当大家都在的时候，它是如何活起来的。
Not at all. It may be empty, but there are traces of life everywhere. I can just imagine how bustling it would be with people here.
打个比方，就像深夜的贝洛伯格，空旷，宁静，却始终亲切。
It's like Belobog in the dead of the night: Empty, quiet, but always kind.
这种感觉对于一个从没离开过贝洛伯格的人来说，真的很神奇。
It's an amazing feeling for someone who's never left Belobog before.
列车虽然空旷，但到处都有鲜活的生活痕迹。我能想到当大家都在的时候，它是如何活起来的。
The Express is pretty empty, but there are traces of life everywhere. I can just imagine how bustling it would be with people here.
打个比方，就像深夜的贝洛伯格，空旷，宁静，却始终亲切。
It's like Belobog in the dead of the night: Empty, quiet, but always kind.
这种感觉对于一个从没离开过贝洛伯格的人来说，真的很神奇。
It's an amazing feeling for someone who's never left Belobog before.
参观列车过后，我就在想……
Ever since the Express tour, I've been wondering...
…如果铁卫能拥有一台这样的列车，会不会对战事有所帮助。
If the Guards had a train like this, would it make our campaigns easier?
You could use it to transfer supplies.
运输物资…吗？听起来确实很方便……
Transfer supplies... huh. That's not a bad idea.
You could use it to deploy troops.
调度士兵…吗？听起来确实很快捷……
Deploy troops... huh. That's not a bad idea.
You could drive it straight into the monsters and send them flying!!!
...I don't think I've ever seen you that excited.
而且…你竟然要把列车送进战场吗？我只能想到和后勤调度相关的用法……
So... you're thinking of turning the Express into a combat unit? Personally I'd only use it for logistics...
嗯…被你这么一说，我感觉也许值得和技术部的铁卫们聊聊列车的事。
Hmm... You've given me some food for thought — I should have a chat with the Technology Division about this.
这次回去就把这件事提上日程吧。
I'll add it to my to-do list.
如果铁卫有这样的列车……
If the Guards had a train like this...
我感觉…也许值得和技术部的铁卫们聊聊列车的事。
It might be worth talking to the Technology Division about incorporating a train into our units.
…这次回去就把这件事提上日程吧。
...I should add it to my to-do list.
刚才与姬子小姐及瓦尔特先生聊了会儿天，学到了许多有趣的事物。
I just had quite an interesting conversation with Himeko and Mr. Yang.
只是…姬子小姐手制的那个…黑色的饮料，味道实在……
But that brown drink that Himeko makes... it's very...
…看来是那饮料的风味确实不对。以后我还是别碰它了……
...I'm not alone then. I'll be keeping a safe distance.
但无论如何，和两位前辈聊天使我受益良多，对此我表示非常感激。
Anyway, I learned a lot from them. I'm very grateful for that.
What did you guys talk about?
嗯…最令我震惊的果然还是「星神」了。
Well, the part that shocked me the most was about the Aeons.
There's plenty more where that came from.
我…咳。说是讨厌好像有点不礼貌…但我也确实不喜欢那个味道。
Ahem... I'm okay, thanks. Not what I'm used to.
但无论如何，和两位前辈聊天使我受益良多，对此我表示非常感激。
Anyway, I learned a lot from them. I'm very grateful for that.
贝洛伯格的筑城者们总会聊起克里珀的丰功伟绩，在我们心中，祂就是全宇宙唯一至高无上的存在。
Belobog's Architects talk about the great deeds of Qlipoth all the time. In our minds, Qlipoth represents the single greatest power in the universe.
但姬子小姐与瓦尔特先生告诉我，原来宇宙中远不止克里珀一位「星神」——就连那在七百年前入侵贝洛伯格的异星敌寇，也是某位「星神」的令使。

But Himeko and Mr. Yang told me that Qlipoth is far from the only Aeon in the universe. For example, the enemies that invaded Belobog <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago were Emanators of a different Aeon.
现在，贝洛伯格的自然环境现正在逐步恢复正常，那些令使随时都有可能卷土重来……
Things are getting back on track for Belobog, but those Emanators could return one day...
…看来，是时候让银鬃铁卫做好准备了。
...I need to make sure the Silvermane Guards are always at the ready.
还有克里珀之外的星神……
And the other Aeons apart from Qlipoth...
姬子小姐与瓦尔特先生告诉我，原来宇宙中远不止克里珀一位「星神」——就连那在七百年前入侵贝洛伯格的异星敌寇，也是某位「星神」的令使。

现在，贝洛伯格的自然环境现正在逐步恢复正常，那些令使随时都有可能卷土重来……
Things are getting back on track for Belobog, but those Emanators could return one day...
…看来，是时候让银鬃铁卫做好准备了。
...I need to make sure the Silvermane Guards are always at the ready.
不久前，姬子小姐给我展示了她的收藏。其中有一个叫「卫星」的东西，我很感兴趣。
Not long ago, Himeko showed me her collection. There was something called a "satellite" — I was very intrigued.
我觉得，它和我们铁卫使用的自动机兵有些类似。如果我们能把自动机兵像「卫星」一样部署到太空中，就能在战斗中取得优势。
It works in a similar way to our automatons. If we could launch our automatons into space like satellites, it'd definitely give us an edge in combat.
You'd be able to detect potential threats.
你说得对。自动机兵可以成为我们在太空中的眼睛——不管威胁来自天外还是地面，它们都能第一时间发现。
That's right — the automatons would be our eyes and ears in space. No matter whether the threats arose on the surface or in outer space, we'd be able to spot them.
可以出其不意地发动攻击。
You'd be able to act preemptively.
你说得对。自动机兵可以成为我们在太空中的炮台——就像姬子小姐的藏品那样。
Exactly — the automatons would be our turrets in space. That's also how Himeko uses her satellite.
Sounds like it'll require a whole lot of engineering...
如果只凭我们贝洛伯格现有的技术，确实很难实现。不过……
It will be very difficult to bring this concept to reality using Belobog's current technology.
姬子小姐和我说，如果银鬃铁卫有意如此，可以随时向她请求帮助。
But Himeko told me that if the Silvermane Guards do go ahead with it, she'll be glad to help.
只是此事我一人说了不算。我还得将提案整理好，与布洛妮娅、佩拉和其他尉官商议才是……
Only thing though is, I can't make the call. I'll need to write a report and discuss it with Bronya, Pela, and others first.
如果把自动机兵部署在太空……
If we deploy automatons into space...
如果我们能把自动机兵像「卫星」一样部署到太空中，就能在战斗中取得优势。
If we could launch our automatons into space like satellites, it'd definitely give us an edge in combat.
只是此事我一人说了不算。我还得将提案整理好，与布洛妮娅、佩拉和其他尉官商议才是……
Only thing though is, I can't make the call. I'll need to write a report and discuss it with Bronya, Pela, and others first.
在这列车前后车厢转了好久，终于找到你了。
Oh, you are here. I've been looking for you up and down the train.
Anything I can do for you?
其实…是我带了些礼物想要给你。
Actually... I brought you a few things.
You didn't break into the archives, did you?
我带了些礼物给你们，就当赔礼吧。
I brought you all some gifts. Hope I didn't cause too much trouble.
I've been looking for you, too.
那还挺巧的…我带了些礼物给你们。
Is that so? Well, I've got something for you.
这是铁卫全军为报答列车拯救了贝洛伯格，特意为你们准备的礼物。
This is a gift from the Silvermane Guards, to show our gratitude towards those who saved Belobog.
有机会的话，常回贝洛伯格看看吧——银鬃铁卫随时欢迎你们归来。
When you find a moment, do come back to Belobog to have a chat. The Silvermane Guards will always welcome you.
The Silvermane Guards wish to express their gratitude...
这是铁卫全军为报答列车拯救了贝洛伯格，特意为你们准备的礼物。
This is a gift from the Silvermane Guards, to show our gratitude towards those who saved Belobog.
有机会的话，常回贝洛伯格看看吧——银鬃铁卫随时欢迎你们归来。
When you find a moment, do come back to Belobog to have a chat. The Silvermane Guards will always welcome you.
这里可以增加一些虹膜识别设备，防止外来人员潜入列车……
This place could do with some iris scanners... wouldn't want unregistered visitors sneaking aboard.
我记得艾丝妲小姐之前有定制过一些设备，或许可以问问她……
I remember Lady Asta commissioned some security equipment a while back. Maybe she still has some spares...
抱歉，刚才是我在自言自语，让你产生了误会。目前列车上十分安全，没有…不对，只有我一个外来人员。
Oh, sorry, I was thinking out loud. Don't worry, the Express is perfectly safe — there are no... Come to think of it, I'm an unregistered visitor.
尽管我相信星穹列车以及列车上其他乘客的力量，但是基础安防还是不能疏忽的。
I'm sure you guys and the Express itself are more than capable of maintaining security... but it's important not to overlook basic prevention methods.
因为之前「军团」的入侵，小姐她最近热衷于定制防卫产品，似乎还成为了一些品牌的高级会员。

Ah, that's right. Since the Legion's invasion, Lady Asta's been procuring defense products customized to the station's needs. I think she's already got platinum membership cards with some of the suppliers...
虽然面对突发状况，个人能力是最关键的因素。但如果有合适的防卫设备在旁，总归会更安全些。
When the unthinkable happens, it usually comes down to the combat effectiveness of the defenders to gain the upper hand. But it's always helpful to have the right equipment by your side.
除开人员识别系统，我还针对第三方电波监测以及紧急防卫反应装置做了一些记录。
In addition to visitor recognition systems, I've made a few notes on third-party signal monitoring and emergency response devices.
希望这些记录可以给列车长提供一些新的思路，以备不时之需。
Of course, it'd be great if you never had to use any of it, but I hope my analysis is of help to the conductor!
那…那只是那帮家伙的玩笑话！你不要当真，也不要跟着他们学！
I... Th—Those guys aren't serious when they refer to me like that, y'know. Anyway, please don't start using it yourself too...
We have a rule on the Express — no work talk...
抱歉…我只是希望能帮到你。
Sorry... I was just trying to help.
很感谢{NICKNAME}邀请我来列车上参观。虽然之前也在月台看见过列车几次，但是进入到车厢内…还是第一次。
Anyway, thanks for inviting me to see the train, {NICKNAME}. I've seen the Express when it was docked at the platform, but this is my first time on board.
我不像小姐那么博学多识……我能做的，就只有在防卫这件事上发挥一些作用了吧？
I'm not as knowledgeable as Lady Asta... The only way I can contribute is to help the station improve its defenses, don't you think?
Thanks, but you're supposed to be off work!
原…原来是这样吗？看来的确是我精神太紧张了。
H—Huh? *sigh* You're right, I need to learn to unwind.
之前我一直都埋头于空间站的防卫工作，差点忘记劳逸结合才是最有效率的方法了。
I've been so focused on the station's defenses recently — it's easy to forget that work-life balance is the best way to stay on top.
偶尔放松放松，感觉也很不错…谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
Thanks for your advice, {NICKNAME}. It's nice to have a break every now and then.
Some devices can be deployed here...
参观的话，应该从哪里开始呢…好不容易放松紧绷的神经，竟然还有点不习惯了。

你说得没错。老是考虑用标准衡量问题，是没有办法以休闲的态度参观列车的。
You're right. I won't enjoy myself if I turn it into another safety inspection.
偶尔放松放松，感觉也很不错…谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
Thanks for your advice, {NICKNAME}. It's nice to have a break every now and then.
想不到那样小的身躯里，竟然潜藏着如此巨大的能量！
I didn't know so much power could fit into such a small body!
嘿嘿…夸得我都有点害羞了。
Ah, stop it, you're making me blush.
啊…抱歉{NICKNAME}，我是在说这辆列车的列车长——帕姆大人。但{NICKNAME}你也是很厉害的。
Uh... Sorry, {NICKNAME}, I was talking about Pom-Pom, the conductor. But hey, you're super good at what you do, too!
这辆列车行驶于宇宙之中，潜在的危机多不胜数。而帕姆大人不仅确保了列车的安全，甚至还将车厢内的保洁、绿植的养护工作都揽到自己的职责中去。

The Express must have encountered huge dangers on its journey through the universe. Not only does Pom-Pom make sure that no harm comes to the crew, they even manage to find time to clean the carriages and take care of the plants.
宏观和微观都能把控得如此细致入微…实在是太厉害了！
Strategically minded with an eye for detail... So impressive.

列车里弥漫着的浓郁咖啡香…闻起来真不错。
That's the smell of science happening.
是从姬子的房间传来的。
之前列车长告诉我说，这是姬子女士自研咖啡的特殊香味。可惜我喝了咖啡就会失眠，不然我真想向姬子女士求一下配方。
I remember the conductor telling me that Himeko's coffee had a special aroma. If caffeine didn't mess with my sleeping pattern so much, I'd ask her for the recipe.
空间站很多科员喜欢喝咖啡，他们说这样有利于集中精神做实验。
A lot of the researchers on the station live off the stuff. They said it helps them focus.
但是他们平时喝的咖啡都没有这种特殊香味。或许这就是姬子女士自研秘方的魅力所在吧？
Still, none of the coffee they drink has the same aroma as Himeko's brew. She must have a few secret ingredients up her sleeve.
不知道艾丝妲小姐会不会喜欢这样的气味呢？她偶尔也会喝咖啡，不过一定要加糖加奶，她不爱喝苦涩的东西……
I wonder if Lady Asta would like it? She drinks a cup or two occasionally, but she has it with milk and sugar. She can't stand bitter flavors...
抱歉，好像说到别的地方去了。{NICKNAME}，请别在意。
Oh, uh, what were we talking about again? Coffee! Sorry, {NICKNAME}.

…改变一下佩佩的饮食配方，也许就不会掉毛了…
...Maybe if I change Peppy's diet, he won't shed so much...
没有没有，毕竟我是受到邀请才有幸来到列车，贸然带一只狗狗过来，或许会给你们添麻烦。
No, no, I wouldn't bring Peppy without letting you guys know first. You have a lot on your plate — I wouldn't want you to worry about having to take care of him.
之前和列车长简单聊了几句之后，对于佩佩每日饮食的配方有了一些改进的想法。应该谈不上好吃，但一定会更有营养的。
Yeah, the conductor gave me some ideas on how to improve it. It'll probably taste worse, but it'll be more nutritious.
我看列车上也没有养宠物，但…也有一些掉毛…呃…我猜测可能是列车长有类似的情况，所以询问了它。
I knew there were no pets on the Express, but I saw signs of shedding. That's when I realized that, uh... maybe the conductor was having the same problem. That's why I wanted to get Pom-Pom's advice.
在得知佩佩的事情之后，列车长很热情地分享了一些独家烹饪配方，说是可以有效缓解这类问题。
After I told Pom-Pom about Peppy's shedding, they shared some cooking tips that should help solve the problem.
等回去之后我就给佩佩试试，希望它不要挑食。
I'll start him on the new diet when I get back... Hope he isn't too picky.
从食物下手或许有帮助……
It might help to start with food...
在得知佩佩的事情之后，列车长很热情地分享了一些独家烹饪配方，说是可以有效缓解这类问题。

如果是这样的坐垫，说不定可以减少身体的负担。
Now this type of cushion looks like it'd help with fatigue. Y'know, from sitting too long?
My advice — stop sitting and start lying down.
躺下的话更适合休息，如果不得不办公，还是只能考虑坐着。
That's fine if you're not on the clock, but you can't just lie down at work!
是很柔软的材质，让人感觉身心都得到了放松。
The material is super soft — whoever made this had relaxation in mind.
科员们经常需要坐在椅子上办公，有的时候也会抱怨肩颈酸痛。
Sadly a lot of our researchers get shoulder and neck pain — they're sat at their desks most of the day.
虽然小姐已经为大家购买了人体工学的座椅，但依然觉得差了点什么。如果能使用这个材质的坐垫，应该可以让小姐和科员们都感觉轻松一些。
Lady Asta bought ergonomic chairs for everybody, but I feel like there's still room for improvement. Cushions like this one might actually be the missing piece.
没想到在参观列车的时候还能帮上大家的忙……
