{NICKNAME}，谢谢你邀请我来这里参观列车，放松神经。
Thanks for inviting me to the Express, {NICKNAME} — it's been nice to have a break.
之前我一直都在思考：防卫科还能做些什么，才能防止「军团」入侵那样的恶性事件再次发生……
When I got the invitation I was completely caught up in Security Department affairs — how to prevent another Legion invasion, that kind of thing...
不知不觉，精神就处于高度紧张状态，思维也僵化了。但是来到这里之后，看到车窗外的宇宙浩瀚无垠，整个人也感觉舒缓了很多……

It took me a while to realize I was letting the whole thing stress me out — I couldn't think straight. When I set foot on the Express and saw how vast the universe is, I started to feel calm and relaxed.
虽然不贵重，但这是我能想到最能帮上你的东西，请你务必收下。
Here, take this. It's nothing expensive, but I'm sure it'll be of help.
Thank you for inviting me here.
思维的放松果然也很重要…换一换环境竟然可以有如此大的效果。
It's important to slow down and unwind... A change of scenery is sometimes the best medicine.
之前都太过沉浸于防卫科的工作，忘记休息的重要性了。
I was too caught up in Security Department affairs — I forgot how important it is to get some good rest.
谢谢你让我想起这一点，{NICKNAME}。
我得感谢丹恒的邀请，这趟列车之旅当真不虚此行。商人的星际跃迁大多枯燥乏味，很少有这种旅行的感觉。

I must thank Dan Heng for his invitation — this journey upon the Astral Express has been well worth my while. Interstellar warp jumps with merchants are often dull, and rarely ever feel like an actual journey.
列车…{RUBY_B#阿基维利}游云天君{RUBY_E#}真是位有情调的星神。
The Astral Express... The {RUBY_B#Akivili}Cloudstrider{RUBY_E#} really was an Aeon of taste.
啊…抱歉，还未自我介绍。我是星际行商，在仙舟的注册名是「罗刹」。
Oh... Forgive me, I forgot to introduce myself. I'm an interstellar merchant — my Xianzhou registered name is "Luocha."
前些日子在罗浮认识了你们列车上的丹恒兄弟，他邀请我得空时来列车上玩。
I met an acquaintance of yours several days ago named Dan Heng. He invited me to board the Express should I have the time, and so here I am.
真不错啊，这复古的列车设计，这舒适的车厢，唔，如果我们的飞船能这么改造就好了……
Astounding! The retro design of this locomotive, the comfort of its cabins! If only our own spacecraft could be modified in such a way...
哈哈，可不行啊。行商的星际飞船更注重载重、安保、消毒等等事宜……
Hah, now that would be something... but on a merchant ship, load, security, and sterilization take precedence over creature comforts...
舒适性反倒在其次，主要还是做生意么。我们一般都用公司的量产运输舰。
What I mean to say is, comfort comes second to business. We generally use the Company's mass-produced transport ships.
说实话没你想得那么好…
To be honest, it's not as good as you think.
是吗？我听丹恒的描述，还以为你们都很喜欢呢……
Really? After listening to Dan Heng, I assumed you all liked it...
想象一下，在一列长夜孤灯似的列车里眺望窗外的文明。纷争、痛苦、绝望、悲鸣，仿佛都被隔绝在了另一个世界……

Such a train can be likened to a solitary candle in the darkness of night... One may peer upon civilizations where strife, hardship, desperation, and sorrow exist seemingly in a separate plane of existence...
想象一下，在一列长夜孤灯似的列车里眺望窗外的文明。纷争、痛苦、绝望、悲鸣，仿佛都被隔绝在了另一个世界……

Such a train can be likened to a solitary candle in the darkness of night... One may peer upon civilizations where strife, hardship, desperation, and sorrow exist seemingly in a separate plane of existence...
It truly is a stunning view...
列车里的人看见我都很惊讶呢。
People on the Express are shocked at the sight of me.
听说在丹恒兄弟上车前，列车里有个跟我长得很像的乘客。
I heard Dan Heng mention that before he boarded the Express, there was a passenger who looked remarkably like me.
人好像不怎么样，给他们留下了心理阴影。
He was seemingly up to no good and left a lasting psychological scar.
那位戴眼镜的瓦尔特先生，看见我后转身走了，过了一会儿拿设备传了本书给我，叫《论环境的意义——没有人生而为恶》。

The gentleman in spectacles — Mr. Welt Yang — he walked away as soon as he laid eyes on me. A while later he used a device to transfer a book to me called "On The Matter of Environment - No One Is Born Evil."
…那个和我长得很像的人一定很有趣吧。
...I'll wager that fellow was an intriguing character.
…那个和我长得很像的人一定很有趣吧。
...I'll wager that fellow was an intriguing character.
Why are you looking at me?
If you have something to say, say it!
啊，没有冒犯的意思。在下略懂医术，观你的行气节奏，感觉脉象有异。
Goodness! I don't mean to offend... I happen to have some medical knowledge, and while observing the flow of your qi, I noticed something unusual about your pulse.
You're not in the best health.
How long have I got left?
长期在宇宙中旅行的人，人体生物周期多少有些紊乱，属于太空病的一种。
Those who travel the vastness of the universe for extended periods will often find their bodily cycles to be in some sort of disarray. It's a form of space sickness.
我开个安神方子，睡前服用，最好能按一定的规律安排稳定的作息。
Let me prescribe you something to soothe your body and mind — take it before bed. It's best that you establish a regular work and sleep schedule.
Ahem, you are truly too kind...
Well, again, I would say so...
Well, in that case there is little I can do.
有个问题不知当问不当……
I have a question for you that I am hesitant to ask...
在你附近时，我能感受到一种力量…唔，难道你手上有颗「星核」吗？
Whenever I am in your vicinity, I sense a sort of... power. Could it be you have a Stellaron in your possession?
在下去过被万界之癌污染的世界，靠近它的那种感觉，和靠近你时很像。
It is a feeling I have encountered when approaching worlds that have been polluted by the Cancer of All Worlds...
Dan Heng told you this too?
不不，你误会丹恒兄弟了，这是我自己的猜测。
You are mistaken. Dan Heng told me nothing of the sort — this was my own conjecture.
啊，那大概是在下弄错了吧。
Ah? Then I am most likely mistaken.
不过，感觉虽然很像，却意外地沉静，没有万界之癌那种狂暴和贪婪……
The sense I speak of is familiar to me, yet unexpectedly characterized by a calmness. It lacks the fervor and greed that the Cancer of All Worlds possesses.
The sense is familiar to me, and yet...
是黑塔的奇物收藏地啊……
这里就是空间站「黑塔」吗，不知访客能否入内？
So, this is the Herta Space Station? I wonder, are visitors permitted onboard?
It's under reconstruction, no entry for unauthorized personnel.
Is that so? What a shame.
黑塔女士最近很有名呢，公司的节目和广播里轰炸般地反复提及她的名字。
Madam Herta's reputation precedes her of late — her name is constantly mentioned in the company's broadcasts and programs.
据说她是以利亚萨拉斯之后，第一个愿意和世人分享才华的俱乐部天才。
Prior to her, they say that the last member of the Genius Society who was willing to showcase their talents was Elias Salas.
以利亚萨拉斯让全银河的科技水平获得了一次飞跃，这次黑塔女士的出现，或许也会是一次科技革命……
Elias Salas's contributions ushered forth a great galaxy-wide technological leap. Now that Madam Herta is on the scene, perhaps another technological revolution looms...
很久以前的一位天才，听说超距遥感和心灵通感信标都是他的发明，只是署名让给了博识学会。
A genius from long ago. It is said that he invented ultraremote sensing and the telepathy beacon, only he signed them over to the Intelligentsia Guild.
在众多俱乐部天才里，以利亚萨拉斯算是个异类。他不愿意人为增寿，活了一百零三岁就去世了。据说他至少有一百种延长生命的办法，但他就是不用。

Out of the many members of the Genius Society, you could say Elias Salas was... different. He didn't want to extend his lifespan, and so passed away at the age of <unbreak>103</unbreak>. It's estimated he had at least a hundred different methods for prolonging life, yet he chose not to use them.
她是天才俱乐部的人。那个俱乐部只有被博识尊认可的存在才能加入，是精英中的精英，亿亿无一的天才。
She's a member of the Genius Society. Only those approved by Nous may join — the smartest of the smart... her genius is one in a trillion.
这群人至少有半数把名字留在了宇宙史上：利尔他、「帝皇」鲁珀特、以利亚萨拉斯、原始博士、螺丝咕姆……
At least half the members of the Society have etched their names on the universe's wall of history — there's Aiden, Emperor Rubert, Elias Salas, Dr. Primitive, Screwllum...
You seem to know quite a lot, don't you?
哈哈，商人嘛，信息也是商品的一种。
Haha, what can I say, I'm a merchant, and information is also a commodity.
真希望有机会能去空间站看看啊。
I really hope I get the chance to look around the space station.
真希望有机会能去空间站看看啊。
I really hope I get the chance to look around the space station.
常来列车叨扰各位，这里有些薄礼，聊表谢意。
I hope my presence here has not proved a nuisance to you all. Here, a few meager gifts as tokens of my appreciation.
Well, then, I'll gladly take whatever you've got.
Better to give thanks to Akivili.
收下吧。它们虽不算昂贵，但也有点用处。
Please, take them. They're not exactly valuable, but they have their uses.
Thank you, I'll take them then.
Then, next time, bring me more valuable stuff!
乘坐星穹列车徜徉宇宙…真令人羡慕啊。
Wandering the universe on the Astral Express... *sigh* One can only be envious!
乘坐星穹列车徜徉宇宙…真令人羡慕啊。
Wandering the universe on the Astral Express... *sigh* One can only be envious!
A few meager gifts as tokens of my appreciation...
你眨了眨眼，再次确认自己看见了什么——的确是她，银狼，一个按理不该出现在这儿的人。
You blinked your eyes and made sure that the person you just saw was Silver Wolf — she wasn't supposed to be here.
What are you doing on the Express!?
怎么了？别人都能上这车，我也能来。
What do you mean what am I doing? Everyone else is here, can't I be too?
怎么了？一副看见电子蜗牛的表情。
What's wrong with you? You look like you just got shocked by an electric snail.
March 7th, quick, make a run for it!
还挺有同伴意识，我喜欢。
A strong sense of awareness for your companions — I like that.
Dan Heng, watch out! Make a run for it!
还挺有同伴意识，我喜欢。
A strong sense of awareness for your companions — I like that.
安心吧，只是来串个门。我正在进攻星际互联网络的黑域，碰巧在网络迷宫看见了星穹列车的信号，就来瞧一眼。

Relax, I'm just dropping by for a visit. I was hacking through the dark regions of the Interastral Network a while ago and happened to see a signal from the Astral Express, so I thought I'd stop by to check it out.
站在这儿的只是个全息投影，啥也干不了，跟车厢顶上的虚空鲸没什么区别。你看——
What you see in front of you is a hologram, just as harmless as the whale holograms you see floating around the Express. Here, see for yourself...
她伸手戳了戳你的腹部，手指径直消失在了衣服表面。
She poked your stomach. The part of her finger that touched your clothes disappeared.
这下相信了吧？要是还不放心，你可以断开网络连接，那样就看不到我了——除非你把它再连上。
Seeing is believing, right? If you're still not convinced, you can cut off the network connection on the Express and I'll disappear into thin air — until you turn it back on, of course.
站在这儿的只是个全息投影，啥也干不了，你不会还要我再证明一次？
What you see in front of you is just a hologram, harmless as a puff of air. You don't need another demonstration, do you?
要不要玩点什么？桌面游戏我也很擅长。
Want to play a game? I'm pretty good at board games, you know.
Aren't you using a hologram, though?
哦对，我摸不到棋子…什么年代了，还在用实体棋盘，无名客也太怀旧了。
Oh yeah, holograms can't move board game pieces... The Nameless must really be a nostalgic group to be using physical board games in this modern age.
Don't you have anything else to do?
有啊，一边和你聊天，一边分三个屏幕玩不同的游戏，顺带打探下游牧矿工的消息，赚点零花钱。

Oh, I have plenty to do. As I chat here with you on the Express, I'm also playing multiple games at once on three different screens, probing around for info about nomadic miners, and running some side-hustles for extra cash.
你们这么大个车厢，连台街机都没有，真好奇你们平时都是怎么打发时间的，读书？拍照？喝咖啡？东奔西走助人为乐？

You all have so much space here on the Express, and not so much as a single arcade machine to show for it. How do you pass the time? Reading? Photography? Sipping coffee? Running around everywhere helping people as a hobby?
要不你叫几个朋友，我教你们玩「星际十三步」——聚会游戏我也很擅长。
Why don't you call over some friends, and I'll teach you how to play Thirteen Star-Steps - I'm good at party games too, you know.
你们这么大个车厢，连台街机都没有，真好奇你们平时都是怎么打发时间的，读书？拍照？喝咖啡？东奔西走助人为乐？

要不你叫几个朋友，我教你们玩「星际十三步」——聚会游戏我也很擅长。
Why don't you call over some friends, and I'll teach you how to play Thirteen Star-Steps - I'm good at party games too, you know.
有点意思，这车里的设施还挺齐全：前厅、休息室、还有每个人的包间，难怪无名客能四海为家。

Interesting. The facilities on the Express are quite extensive: With a reception room, a lounge, and a private coach for each passenger, it's no wonder the Nameless are able to call the four corners of the galaxy their home.
人生就是场没有终点的旅行。
Life is but a journey without a destination.
入戏倒挺快——你上车没多久吧。
You're a new passenger yourself, aren't you?
Sounds like you wanna join the Express!
不行，星核猎手那边的「游戏」还没通关呢，总得有个先来后到。
I'm afraid that won't be feasible — I'm still busy playing the Stellaron Hunters' game at the moment. First come first serve, after all.
So a Stellaron Hunter's life is not like this?
这我不能告诉你，会被卡芙卡念叨的。
I cannot comment on such matters, or I will be reprimanded by Kafka.
离开朋克洛德前，我也曾梦想过当个无名客——乘着列车离开星球，等待着我的将是新手村外广阔无垠的冒险。
Before I left Punklorde, I also dreamed of joining the Nameless and hopping on the Express to travel between worlds — beyond the village of newbies back home, a vast and endless adventure awaited me.
当然，我也可以选择加入公司，或者巡海游侠，甚至利用一下泯灭帮，只要能让我奔向银河，走哪条路都可以。
Of course, I could have also joined the IPC, the Galaxy Rangers, or even the Annihilation Gang. Whatever road takes me across the galaxy is the one I'm willing to travel on.
但最后是星核猎手先找到了我——或者说，是我找到了他们。用艾利欧的话讲，这就是「命运」。
But in the end, it was the Stellaron Hunters who found me first — or rather, it was I who found them. In Elio's words, this is called destiny.
离开朋克洛德前，我也曾梦想过当个无名客——乘着列车离开星球，等待着我的将是新手村外广阔无垠的冒险。
Before I left Punklorde, I also dreamed of joining the Nameless and hopping on the Express to travel between worlds — beyond the village of newbies back home, a vast and endless adventure awaited me.
当然，我也可以选择加入公司，或者巡海游侠，甚至利用一下泯灭帮，只要能让我奔向银河，走哪条路都可以。
Of course, I could have also joined the IPC, the Galaxy Rangers, or even the Annihilation Gang. Whatever road takes me across the galaxy is the one I'm willing to travel on.
但最后是星核猎手先找到了我——或者说，是我找到了他们。用艾利欧的话讲，这就是「命运」。
But in the end, it was the Stellaron Hunters who found me first — or rather, it was I who found them. In Elio's words, this is called destiny.
哦，{NICKNAME}，表情很严肃啊。你这是看见了什么？
{NICKNAME}, that's a serious expression you've got there. Did something catch your attention?
Who are you calling an intruder? Oh, me...
我只是来串门的，没有恶意。
I mean no harm — I'm just visiting.
之前那位戴眼镜的大叔也在用很微妙的眼神看我，我们之间是不是哪里有误会？
The older gentleman with glasses was also giving me some very subtle looks. Has there been a misunderstanding of some kind?
还是说，你们在去别人家做客前，难道会和对方先讲一声？
Do you always tell people ahead of time before you pay them a visit?
The Nameless have always been hospitable hosts.
我明白了，这是习惯差异。朋克洛德没这传统，星核猎手一般也不这么做事。
I see, it's just a cultural difference. Punklorde doesn't have this custom, and the Stellaron Hunters don't generally observe this kind of tradition either.
电影里不是经常有那种主人回家开灯，却发现早有人坐在沙发椅上等他的桥段吗？卡芙卡和刃都喜欢这么干，萨姆甚至不会让他开灯。

Isn't it often the case in movies that a guy comes home and turns on the lights, only to find someone sitting on the sofa waiting for him? Kafka and Blade both like to do that, and Sam won't even give the guy a chance to turn on the lights.
但我就不一样了，我会在对方进门前就主动打招呼。你看，我对你还是不错的。
But that's not my style. I will take the initiative to say hello before the other person enters the room. You see, I'm treating you quite well.
放心，来拜访的时候，我都会主动和你打招呼的。
No need to worry — I will always take the initiative to greet you when I come to visit.
呜，糟了，好难受…早知道应该关闭重力模拟的……
Ooh, drats, what a drag... should have known to turn off the gravity simulator...
习惯了网络漫游，反而不适应正常的交通工具了……
I've grown so accustomed to network roaming that normal transportation feels weird now.
Ah, it's you... you saw that?
Are you... suffering from motion sickness?
So you do have weaknesses, huh?
Try not to vomit on the Express. Please!
我闲着无聊，逗你玩的。晕车？我？怎么可能。
No, no, I'm just messing with you because I'm bored. Motion sickness? Me? Don't be absurd. Don't forget—
别忘了，站在你面前的只是一个全息投影，真正的我现在正躺在舒服的冰水浴缸里，压根就不在星穹列车上——
—standing in front of you is just a hologram. The real me is now lying in a cozy ice bath, far, far away from the Astral Express.
列车即将开启跃迁，请各位乘客做好准备——
The Express is about to warp jump, all passengers please get ready!
She made a run for it?
你沉思片刻，确信自己发现了银狼的弱点，以及——
You thought for a while. You were sure that you've found Silver Wolf's weakness and —
她刚刚其实就在列车上。
—She was on the Express for real, not just a hologram.
那个熟悉的全息投影又回来了。
你揉了揉眼睛，刚刚的一切仿佛都是一场幻觉。
You rub your eyes, and everything that transpired just now seems like an illusion.
很反常地，银狼没有向你打招呼，而是竖起食指，聚精会神地在空中点击着什么。
Silver Wolf didn't greet you as usual. Instead, she raised her finger and clicked on something in the air.
Shh — wait a minute, I'm busy.
片刻过后，你看见她的脸上洋溢出喜悦的笑容。
After a while, you see a smile on her happy face.
哦对，你看不见屏幕，和你解释一下，我刚才在转扭蛋，就是游戏里都会有的那种。
Oh yeah, you can't see the screen. Let me explain: I was just pulling for a gacha capsule — you know, the kind you can get in games.
至于结果，当然是一次就得了五星——也就是头等奖。
As for the result, I got a five-star prize in one go — the top prize.
So that's why you came all the way here? All for a lucky gacha pull spot?
这你就不懂了，玩游戏，技术是一回事，运气是另一回事——想要一直赢，就得二者兼顾。
You simply don't understand. In games, skill is one thing, luck is another — if you want to win all the time, you need to have both.
前者可以靠练习，后者就得看天赋。直觉告诉我，今天观景车厢的运势流向很不错，确认取消三次后转动扭蛋，就是命中目标的最佳时机。

The former can be acquired through practice, but the latter depends on talent. The flow of luck in the Parlor Car is very favorable today. The best strategy is to pull for the desired target after confirming and canceling three times in a row.
Really!? I'mma give it a try right now!
事先说清楚，这只是我的直觉，对你不一定管用，如果没有效果，我不负责。
Let's be clear about one thing first — this is just my intuition. It may not work for you, and I am not responsible for any sub-optimal results.
总之，今天开心！送你一份小礼物，希望你也能和我一样顺利。
Anyway, have a happy day! Here's a little gift for you. I hope everything works out as well for you as it has for me.
站在棋盘边，离两侧座椅同样远的点位上，面朝过道对面的观景窗，将视线对准车厢顶部的虚空鲸投影，然后打开界面，确认取消三次后转动扭蛋，就是命中目标的最佳时机。

Stand at the edge of the board, at a point equidistant from the seats on either side, facing the viewing window opposite the aisle. Align your eyes with the void song whales hologram near the ceiling and open the interface. Then pull for the prize after confirming and canceling three times in a row. This is the best strategy for obtaining the desired prize.
事先说清楚，这只是我的直觉，对你不一定管用，如果没有效果，我不负责。
Let's be clear about one thing first — this is just my intuition. It may not work for you, and I am not responsible for any sub-optimal results.
坐上「司舵」那张椅子之后，我已经很久没有机会像这样观看天空了……
Since assuming the role of Helm Master, it's rare that I have the chance to gaze upon the stars like this...
本该是我看厌了的风景，可如今又让我不由得感叹…天空真是高远啊。
It should be a view I tire of seeing, but it always leaves me in awe... The heavens really are boundless.
What do you think of this place?
可惜，天空已经不再属于我了。也许有一天，我会回到它的怀抱中，但那一定会是我最后一次翱翔。
It's a shame. The stars no longer belong to me. Perhaps one day I shall feel their embrace once again, but it will undoubtedly be the day of my last flight.
Come and have a look whenever you can.
I will. Thank you for your invitation.
不得不说，来到列车上后，我确实有点羡慕你的生活。你能享受宇宙的浩瀚无垠，又有那么多可靠的伙伴。
I can't help but say that after arriving on the Express, I'm a little envious of your way of life. You are able to enjoy the vastness of the universe, and with reliable companions by your side.
希望你们都能好好珍惜彼此。
I hope you all cherish one another.
不得不说，来到列车上后，我确实有点羡慕你的生活。你能享受宇宙的浩瀚无垠，又有那么多可靠的伙伴。
I can't help but say that after arriving on the Express, I'm a little envious of your way of life. You are able to enjoy the vastness of the universe, and with reliable companions by your side.
希望你们都能好好珍惜彼此。
I hope you all cherish one another.
刚刚三月七给我看了一些玩偶，都是按照列车组成员的长相做的吧？非常可爱。
March 7th just showed me some dolls that were made to look like the members of the Express crew. They're adorable.
I agree. I love them too.
这让我想起了许多往事…
This brings back a lot of memories...
我是军人出身，也没什么照顾小孩子的经验。晴霓小的时候，我没有足够的时间陪她，又担心她一个人非常寂寞，就给她买了一大堆毛绒玩偶。

I come from a military background, so I don't have much experience when it comes to caring for children. When Qingni was a child, I rarely had time for her. I often worried about her feeling very lonely, so I bought her a lot of dolls.
后来有一段时间，有人问她一个人在家害不害怕，她还骄傲地说：「我不怕，我有很多毛绒玩偶妈妈！」搞得天舶司的下属们都在偷笑。

I remember someone asked her once if she ever felt afraid being home by herself, and she proudly responded: "I'm not afraid! I've got lots of doll mommies!" Needless to say, the Sky-Faring Commission was very entertained.
现在想想，也挺对不起她的…虽然她自己倒不在意，还经常提起这事儿。
...Thinking back, even if she wasn't too affected by my absence, I do feel guilty.
看到你们这几个无名客之间的关系，以及星穹列车如此温馨的氛围，勾起了我许多关于「家」的回忆…很令人羡慕啊。
The Nameless have a great relationship — it lends a warm atmosphere to the Astral Express... and it brings back memories of my own family. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little envious.
看到你们这几个无名客之间的关系，以及星穹列车如此温馨的氛围，勾起了我许多关于「家」的回忆…很令人羡慕啊。
The Nameless have a great relationship — it lends a warm atmosphere to the Astral Express... and it brings back memories of my own family. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little envious.
刚才遇到姬子小姐，和她聊了一会儿。没想到她这么内行。
I just bumped into Himeko. We got chatting, and, well... I never knew she was such an expert.
不算什么特别有趣的话题，都是航天技术相关的…只是我本来担心星槎的原理不好理解，没想到姬子一听就懂。
Oh, nothing too interesting — space flight technologies... I was worried that the principles of the starskiff would be hard for Himeko to comprehend — I never imagined she'd grasp it so easily.
不过说到底，我也没怎么深入接触过技术工作，真要论起来，搞不好她的理论知识储备比我还丰富。
I'm afraid I haven't had much exposure to technical fields — perhaps she has a better theoretical understanding than myself.
她肯定欢迎你常来找她聊天。
I'm sure she'd be keen to continue the conversation.
Well, then I'll definitely come by more often...
毕竟只有在这里，我才能彻底脱去「司舵」的外衣，作为「驭空」享受难得的清闲。
...after all, this is the only place I'm able to lose the Helm Master uniform and relax a little.
I never knew Himeko was such an expert.
I'll definitely come by more often...
毕竟只有在这里，我才能彻底脱去「司舵」的外衣，作为「驭空」享受难得的清闲。
...after all, this is the only place I'm able to lose the Helm Master uniform and relax a little.
我刚才似乎看到了一群虚空鲸从窗外飞过。
I think I just saw a group of void song whales fly past the window.
可惜你不在，让我一人独享了这难得的美景。
It's a shame you weren't here to see them — I prefer to witness such rare sights with others.
I've seen them a few times before.
说起来，罗浮上也曾有类似的生灵。但它们并非在空中遨游，而是生活在水中，叫做「渊兽」。
That reminds me, there were similar creatures that lived on the Luofu... They didn't travel freely through the heavens though — they lived in water. We called them depth crawlers.
后来，在三劫时代，罗浮的生态环境骤变，这些巨大而温和的生灵首当其冲，消失在了历史的长河中。
Later, during the Three Sufferings Era, the Luofu's ecosystem underwent a sudden change. These gentle giants bore the brunt of the change, and forever disappeared down the river of time.
小时候，我在画册上见到渊兽，便和家里人吵着要去看，他们却说，渊兽几千年前就已经灭绝了。
I remember seeing a picture of a depth crawler in my childhood — I insisted to my parents that we had to go and see them... My parents told me how they had been extinct for thousands of years.
我为此难过了很久，直到家人为了安抚我，带我搭星槎去看虚空鲸…那是我第一次看到虚空鲸群，真的很美。
I was so sad that my parents decided to take me on a starskiff to see the void song whales. That was the first time I'd ever laid eyes upon them... Such miraculous creatures.
现在想来，那次赏鲸之旅，也是我成为斗舰飞行士的契机之一吧。人生还真是奇妙啊……
Thinking back, that trip to see the void song whales was one of the turning points which set me on the path to becoming a fighter pilot. Life truly is full of wonders...
I think I just saw a void song whale...
现在想来，那次赏鲸之旅，也是我成为斗舰飞行士的契机之一吧。人生还真是奇妙啊……
Thinking back, that trip to see the void song whales was one of the turning points which set me on the path to becoming a fighter pilot. Life truly is full of wonders...
能陪我在舷窗前站一会儿吗？什么都不要说…只是陪我站一会儿。
Will you stand with me by the window a little while? No need to talk...
谢谢你…即使身在列车之中，置身事外地凝望着星海，也会突然感到有些不安……
Thank you... I know I'm standing safely here on the Express, but sometimes gazing out at such a vast sea of stars makes me feel a little uneasy...
能有个人陪在我身边，就像以前在天上那样，我就能平静很多…谢谢你……
Having someone by my side calms me — it's always been the case... Thank you.
别担心，我没事。可能…我只是不习惯这样平静的天空吧。如果有一天，罗浮也可以像这样一直和平安宁，我总归是能习惯的。
Don't worry, it's nothing. Perhaps I'm just not used to such a peaceful vista. If the Luofu's skies can become as calm as this, maybe I'll eventually get used to it.
Will you stand here with me for a little while?
我只是不习惯这样平静的天空吧。如果有一天，罗浮也可以像这样一直和平安宁，我总归是能习惯的。
Perhaps I'm just not used to such a peaceful vista. If the Luofu's skies can become as calm as this, maybe I'll eventually get used to it.
这些日子，你帮了罗浮，也帮了我很多忙。于公于私，我都应该感谢你……
My time with you has been a great help to the Luofu, and a great help to me. I want to say thank you, both publicly and privately.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，收下这些吧。这是我代表天舶司赠与你的谢礼，希望你能够善加利用。
So... thank you, {NICKNAME}. Take these. On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I'd like to offer you this gift of thanks. I hope you can put them to good use.
谢谢，倒也不必如此正式。
That's very kind of you, but you needn't be so formal.
抱歉，我并不是和你打官腔。一旦到了我这个年纪，就不怎么会结交新朋友了……
Sorry, I don't mean to sound so formal. Once you reach my age, it's difficult to make new friends...
所以我…很珍视你这个朋友。
...which is why I treasure our friendship.
接下来，无论你要去往何方，要经历怎样的艰险…只要我还活着，罗浮就永远是你的港湾。
From now on, no matter where you may go, no matter what hardships you may encounter... as long as I am alive, the Luofu will always be an open harbor to you...
I have a gift for you...
一旦到了我这个年纪，就不怎么会结交新朋友了…
Once you reach my age, it becomes difficult to make new friends...
所以我…很珍视你这个朋友。
...which is why I treasure our friendship.
接下来，无论你要去往何方，要经历怎样的艰险…只要我还活着，罗浮就永远是你的港湾。
From now on, no matter where you may go, no matter what hardships you may encounter... as long as I am alive, the Luofu will always be an open harbor to you...
嘿嘿，只要逃到这儿，别说丹鼎司，神策府的人都别想抓住我～
Hehe, now that I've made it this far, the Alchemy Commission and the Seat of Divine Foresight have no chance of catching me...
It's you, {NICKNAME}! Are you trying to scare me to death?
Huh? Hmph, I know your voice, {NICKNAME}.
明明是你邀请我的，还要这样平白无故吓人，真是的……
It was you who invited me. Why you gotta scare me like that? Honestly...
不如你快快告诉本小姐，列车什么时候出发？
Hey, how about you tell me when the Express is departing?
For that, you gotta ask the conductor.
列车长？就是那个戴上帽子比我高但其实比我矮的可爱小家伙吗？
The conductor? You mean that cuddly-looking creature, right? The one that's shorter than me if you don't count the hat?
看它优哉游哉的样子，就知道这列车一时半会儿还走不了。
Judging by how bored they look, my guess is we won't be leaving any time soon.
The Express has been detained by the general.
什么？！将军不会已经算到我会乘坐星穹列车逃跑了吧？
What!? Does that mean the general knows I'm trying to escape on the Astral Express?
那可不行，你们再这样优哉游哉下去，肯定走不了了。
This won't do — you guys need to stop waltzing around and get us out of here!
Looky here, someone is in a rush to leave.
你可千万别误会，我不是真的想要离开罗浮一去不回…至少现在不想。
Don't misunderstand — I don't wanna leave the Luofu forever... at least not right now.
既然是散心嘛，早点走，早点回来～
I just wanted to head out early and get back early...
不过凭丹鼎司那些老家伙，他们就算想破脑袋也不会猜到我在哪儿。
...I don't wanna give the Alchemy Commission time to discover my itinerary, that's all.
这么一想，列车真是个不错的秘密基地。
Now that I think of it, the Express really would make a good secret base.
谢谢你的邀请，我很喜欢这里～
Anyway, thanks for the invitation, I really like it here~
Your secrets are safe with me.
嘿嘿，不然的话，下次你就见不到这么可爱的神医大人啦。
Hehe, they better be... or I won't be coming back!
Nobody will think to come looking here...
反正凭丹鼎司那些老家伙，他们就算想破脑袋也不会猜到我在哪儿。
Doesn't matter how much the Alchemy Commission racks its brain, they'll never guess where I've gone.
这么一想，列车真是个不错的秘密基地。
Now that I think of it, the Express really would make a good secret base.
谢谢你的邀请，我很喜欢这里～
Anyway, thanks for the invitation, I really like it here~
Your secrets are safe with me.
嘿嘿，不然的话，你就见不到这么可爱的神医大人啦。
Hehe, they better be... or I won't be coming back!
听病人说，有很多星际旅客不习惯长途旅行，在旅行过程中突发症状。
I've heard patients say that interstellar travelers are prone to sudden illness if they're on the road for too long.
所以，我就给你们带了一些应急药，已经交给列车长啦～
That's why I brought you all some emergency medication — I've given it to the conductor.
嘿嘿，药嘛，有备无患，肯定能用得上。
Hehe, can't do without medicine. It's always better to be prepared.
我听列车长说过啦，不过，多一些药有备无患嘛。
Yeah, yeah, the conductor mentioned, but it never hurts to have more than you need, right?
备好了应急药物，还得掌握药品的用途及使用方法，我也教给列车长啦～
Having stocks is one thing, but knowing a medicine's usage and application is another. I briefed the conductor on the instructions!
You really seem to like Pom-Pom.
没错！帕姆真是太可爱了。
How can you not! Pom-Pom's so cute!
帕姆听得特别仔细，是一个合格的列车长。
Pom-Pom listened to the instructions very carefully — they must be a very capable conductor.
其实，我还想跟列车长再多聊聊。要不，下次我再带点儿应急药过来？
In fact, I miss chatting to Pom-Pom already. How about I bring some more of that emergency medicine again next time?
I don't think it will all fit on the Express.
也对哦…那我想想还有什么帕姆喜欢的。
Hmm, you might be right... What else does Pom-Pom like?
列车长看上去还很喜欢照顾花草，下次我们可以好好聊聊～
I guess... Oh, the conductor likes plants, right? That's a great topic for next time~
I've prepared some medicine for the Express...
我在禁邸后面的小院子里养了好多药草，颇有心得。
I've been cultivating medicinal herbs in the Forbidden Residence's rear courtyard. I'm becoming quite the expert.
感觉列车长很喜欢照顾花草，下次我们可以好好聊聊～
The conductor really likes plants, right? That's a great topic for next time~
{NICKNAME}，我来当「列车医生」，咱们今晚就逃离罗浮吧！
{NICKNAME}, why don't you guys let me be the resident doctor on the Express! Let's escape the Luofu this evening!
先让我想想该准备些什么……
Just let me think about what to pack...
Do you have tuskpir wraps here?
星槎海倒是有得卖，但现在去也来不及了。
They sell them in Starskiff Haven, but there's no time to go there now.
算了算了，有别的也行，这里有黄石乳酪洋芋条吗？
Never mind, I'm sure there'll be other things I like. Do you have Yellow Boulder Cheese Fries here?
姬子的咖啡啊…之前本小姐来列车时喝过…跟药水一个味道，我不喜欢。
Himeko's coffee? I tried it when I came aboard the Express — yuck! Tastes like medicine.
…那饮料呢，浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶有吗？
...What about drinks? Puffergoat milk? Immortal's Delight?
都说了本小姐不喜欢啊！
I told you, I don't like it!
列车上怎么一点儿仙舟美食都没有呢？算了，我们今晚不出发了，请允许我辞去「列车医生」的职务。
So there aren't ANY Xianzhou delicacies on the Express? Ugh, forget about escaping the Luofu — I formally resign from my post as resident doctor on the Express...
下次我再准备一些仙舟美食吧。
Next time I'll stock up on Xianzhou delicacies.
好呀，让我来一起准备，你们肯定也会喜欢的。
Great! I'll help — you'll love what I've got in mind.
真是舍不得仙舟美食啊。
I really can't survive without Xianzhou delicacies.
除了貘馍卷、黄石乳酪洋芋条、浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶，我还想要蒜苗五花肉、脆瓜胡辣鸡丁、陈婆豆腐、紫芋扣肉、鲜奶热炒、白灼鳞虾……

Tuskpir wraps, Yellow Boulder Cheese Fries, puffergoat milk, and Immortal's Delight aside, I also miss Garlic-infused Pork, Crisped Melon and Diced Chicken, Granny Chen's Tofu, Purple Taro with Pork, Fresh Milk Stir Fry, and Braised Prawns...
…刚才你们的列车长是不是咽了一下口水？
...Did the conductor just lick their lips?
Even speaking about all this is making me hungry...
你来看看我是不是长高了？我觉得应该是高了一丢丢。
Do you think I'm taller? I swear I've grown a smidge.
那就好，本小姐肯定是长高了。
That's good. I knew I'd gotten taller.
不会吧？你是故意骗我的。
我才不信你，我肯定长高了～
I don't believe you! I've definitely grown taller.
穿过玉界门来到星穹列车，就会经历一段失重，而失重是能让人长高的！
I passed through the Jade Gate on my way to the Astral Express. The Jade Gate makes you weightless, and weightlessness can make people grow taller!
重力是往下的，长高是往上的，只要常来星穹列车，我肯定能长高～
Gravity means down, growing means up! As long as I keep visiting the Astral Express, I'm bound to grow taller.
听上去是有科学原理的。
Are you sure that's not just all in your head?
…等等，突然想到了一个问题，你们的列车长会长高吗？
Wait a minute... I just thought of something. Does your conductor ever grow taller?
不行不行，但我还是应该对自己有信心。
Ah! No, no — I need to believe in myself!
那就好，帕姆能，我也能呀～
Great! If Pom-Pom can, then so can I!
你看看我是不是长高了……
What do you think? Have I grown taller?
突然想到了一个问题，你们的列车长还会长高吗？
I just thought of something. Does your conductor ever grow taller?
我还是应该对自己有信心。
No, no — I need to believe in myself!
那就好，帕姆能，我也能呀～
Great! If Pom-Pom can, then so can I!
不知道为什么，从列车上回去之后，我开始做梦了。
I don't know why, but since I left the Express, I started having dreams.
我原本不做梦的。现在开始做起到处旅行的梦，一定是被关的太久了。
I dreamed about travel. I must've been locked away too long...
I remember I was really high up...
Dreams are a window to your inner thoughts.
哎呀，我刚才说的「变高」不是那个意思。
Ugh, it's not what you think! I wasn't dreaming about getting taller...
我是说，在梦里我会飞，飞得很高很高。
你说的倒也没错，毕竟，我甚至梦见自己会飞。
*sigh* You're right, I dreamed I was flying after all.
没有。我梦见自己飞得很高很高，哪还看得见你。
Nope. I was super high up — how could I see you from up there?
梦里的我想去哪儿就去哪儿，可自由了，真羡慕她呀。
I can go wherever I want in my dreams — I'm completely free... almost makes me envious of myself.
…可惜我还没有睡够，就被人给叫醒了。
...Needless to say, someone woke me up, as always.
I wish you pleasant dreams this evening.
Thanks! I feel like I've got some lined up.
虽然梦里想去哪儿就去哪儿，但是梦醒了之后总感觉空落落的。
Even though I can go wherever I want in my dreams, I always feel a bit empty when I wake up.
…明明是那么幸福的梦，为什么醒来只会流出悲伤的眼泪呢？
...My dreams are happy, so why do I always end up crying when they're over?
I don't get it... never mind...
本小姐刚才还找你呢，正好你来了。
I was just looking for you, and here you are.
仙舟上有些「石头」药材呢，能研磨成粉，顺着水喝下去能够镇心安神、温肺定喘。
The Xianzhou has a type of medicinal stone that can be ground into a fine powder and mixed with water. Drinking it calms the nerves and warms the lungs.
另有些漂亮的「石头」，光是放在身边，就能让人舒畅心胸、愉悦精神。
There are also beautiful stones that can bring soothing happiness just by being around them.
谢谢你，我已经开始愉悦了。
Thank you, I feel happier already.
请你拿走，这我不能收下！
That's too generous of you. I don't deserve them.
但是你却把自己的口袋打开了……
Ah! Don't be so polite, take them!
既然都说到这个份上了……
对呀对呀，就别再拒绝了嘛！
That's more like it, now don't say no again!
嘿嘿，前些日子也算是受到{NICKNAME}的照顾，这是我的心意～
Hehe. You've been a good host the last few days, {NICKNAME}. Just a token of my gratitude.
你要是有了什么疑难杂症，记得来找我，有我「衔药龙女」在，保证药到病除。
If you ever have any unusual ailments, come find me. This Healer Lady is guaranteed to get to the bottom of them.
我给你带了点儿好东西！
I've got something good for you!
嘿嘿，前些日子也算是受到{NICKNAME}的照顾，这是我的心意～
Hehe. You've been a good host the last few days, {NICKNAME}. Just a token of my gratitude.
你要是有了什么疑难杂症，记得来找我，有我「衔药龙女」在，保证药到病除。
If you ever have any unusual ailments, come find me. This Healer Lady is guaranteed to get to the bottom of them.
又见面了，怎么样，最近有和呜呜伯聊天吗？
We meet again. How have you been? Chatted with any Wubbaboo lately?
I have some questions for you...
尽管问吧！只要是和珍稀物种有关的，我知无不言！
Ask away! As long as it's about rare species, I'll tell you everything I know!
为什么有个呜呜伯长得特别大？
Why is there one really big Wubbaboo?
呜呜伯在生长过程中有概率突变，块头会急速增大，不过这种概率很低。
Wubbaboo has a chance to mutate as they grow and can rapidly increase in size, but that possibility is very low.
至于你说的那家伙啊…如果说呜呜伯们是一个大家庭的话，它就是当之无愧的家长。
As for the one you mentioned... If Wubbaboos are one big family, then such an individual would definitely be the parent.
除了站长和黑塔女士的办公室，它们哪儿都去……
They go everywhere apart from Madam Herta's and the lead researcher's offices.
偷偷告诉你，它们喜欢去人少的地方待着。
I'll let you in on a secret — They like to be away from people.
你喜欢和呜呜伯聊天吗？
Do you enjoy chatting with Wubbaboo?
那当然啦，在你来之前，空间站里只有我能听懂它们在说什么。
Of course. I was the only one who could understand them on the space station before you got here.
那种孤独的感觉…哎，实在太可怜啦，所以我没事就会陪它们聊会儿。
That lonely feeling... *sigh* I feel so bad for them. That's why I chat with them whenever I can.
而且跟它们聊天还挺有趣的！你有机会的话也去找它们聊聊吧。
And they're pretty fun to talk to! You should try it when you've got the chance.
好哦，以后还有什么和珍稀物种有关的问题，可以随时来找我。
Cool. Come find me again if you have questions about rare species.
是你啊，年轻人。有什么事儿吗？
It's you, young one. How can I help you?
这要看你如何定义「好」与「不好」了。
It depends on how you define "well."
她现在并不记得之前发生的事，也没什么烦恼，算是「过得很好」吧。
She doesn't remember what happened before and doesn't have anything to worry about, so I'd say she is "doing well."
I think I saw Sheila again.
嗯，她是法政科的向导，法政科的工作可少不了她。
Yes. She's a guide in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and the Department can't function without her.
不过，你应该也知道了，现在的她已经不是原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>号了。
But you probably also know she is no longer Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>.
人老了，我也没什么追求了，平平淡淡也挺好。
I'm getting old, and I don't have much that I want anymore. A peaceful life is good enough.
有空的话，或许会培养一下后辈吧，我听说…有些年轻科员对研发仿生人的事很感兴趣。
I might train some students if I have the time. I heard... that some young researchers are apparently very interested in working on androids.
有机会的话，我想向他们传授点心得…哎，毕竟每个人都有自己的遗憾。
Given an opportunity, I would like to teach them a thing or two... Ahh, after all, everyone has regrets.
I don't have any other questions.
谢谢你的解答，我没有问题了。
Thank you. I don't have any other questions.
好的孩子，以后有空可以多多来聊聊。
Good. Do come back more often to chat with me, child.
又见到你了…除了星神…我了解的知识并不多……
We meet again... I don't know much about anything apart from the Aeons...
I have a few questions for you...
是…哪个领域方面的知识？我不是通识类学者……
In what field of study? I am not a general scholar...
如果我回答不上来，还是请你去询问别的科员吧。
If I can't answer your questions, please ask the other researchers.
Huh? How did you know that?
猫猫啊…谁会不喜欢猫猫呢，可爱又迷人…它们的呼噜声还有安眠的效果。
Cats... How can anyone resist cats? They are so cute and charming, and their purring even helps with sleep.
可惜我没时间养猫…不过我收藏了很多猫猫的视频、贴纸、照片什么的，平时拿出来看看就觉得特别开心。
Pity I have no time to look after a real cat... But I collected lots of cat videos, stickers, and photos. Just looking at them makes me happy.
你一直在做星神相关的研究？
嗯，都是些纸面功夫…文献研究什么的。
Mmm, but it's all a bit superficial, like reading and writing research papers.
关于星神的一切我都很感兴趣，就是要看的资料实在太多了…不知道什么时候才能看完。
I am very interested in everything related to the Aeons, but there are too many materials to read... I don't know when I can finish them all.
Do you have any books to recommend?
书？我看的书…还算多，不过都是和星神有关的文献。
Books? I do read... a lot, but those books are all related to Aeons.
《星神的失落——银河民俗考》丛书挺不错的，通俗易懂…就是篇幅长了点……
The series The Fall of The Aeons – A Discussion on Cosmic Traditions is pretty good and easy to understand. It's just a bit long...
《银河神话举隅：神话中的星神内涵叙略》也不错，你有空的话可以看看。
Examples of Cosmic Legends: A Collection of Aeon References in Myths is also quite good. You can try that book when you have time.
我应该没什么想问的了。
I don't think I have anything to ask.
I will leave you to your work for now.
嗯，如果你还有什么和星神有关的问题，可以随时来找我。
Okay. You can come find me again if you have any other questions about the Aeons.
无论是来自裂缝深渊中的敌人，还是来自不轨人心的算计。
Whether they are enemies from the abyss or people with ill intentions...
只要我还在空间站一日，就不会允许那些孽障在黑塔大人的地盘肆意撒野！
So long as I'm in the space station, I will never let them ravage the territory of Madam Herta!
倘若非要凌踏这片科学的净土，那么就先从我，卡波特身上跨过去吧！
If they are to trample on this pure land of science, they'll have to go through me first!
哦！又是一位迷失之人。不要担心，不要着急，我会为你指引道路。
Oh! Here's another lost soul. Don't worry. I'll show you the way.
我叫卡波特，是界种科的科员。但还有另一重身份，更为重要——
My name is Capote. I'm a member of the Department of Ecology, but my other identity is even more important...
那就是黑塔大人最忠实的追随者！
I am a die-hard fan of Madam Herta!
我在这里，就是想要为这座空间站，也是为了黑塔大人，做出一点微薄的努力。
I'm here to make my humble contributions to this space station, as well as to Madam Herta.
虽然我没有办法与孽障搏斗，助力复兴之路的铺设……
Though I cannot fight against these horrors and lay out a road to revival...
但我会通过我的语言，去指引每一个，就像是你这样，迷失在慌乱之中的人。
But with my words, I will guide all those who are lost and in a panic like yourself.
你能为我提供什么帮助吗？
帮助？对没错，你看上去的确需要一些小小的帮助。
Help? Right, you do look like you need some help.
从你的眼神里，我能看出焦躁不安。这是一种来源于恐惧的情绪，我能理解。
I can see anxiety in your eyes. This emotion originates from fear. I can understand it.
而我，将会为你拨开这层心灵上的迷雾。这也是我能为黑塔大人，做出的微小贡献。
And I will clear the uncertainty in your heart. This is the least I can do for Madam Herta.
来吧！尽情地倾诉吧！把你的困扰、苦痛，统统都告知我，让我来化解它们吧！
Come! Confess it all to me! Tell me all your frustrations and pain, and let me soothe them for you!
咳咳…当然，这些只是心灵上的援助。如果真的感到不适，还是需要找正规医疗途径。
*cough* Of course, this is just psychological help. If you feel any real discomfort, please seek out a medical doctor.
我还有些事情需要问你…
I've got something to ask you.
有多少人被你化解过苦难？
How many people have had their pain "soothed" by you?
我不是一个喜欢为自己贴金揽功的人，希望你能明白这一点。
I'm not someone who likes to reap benefits for myself, and I hope you understand that.
但既然你主动发问，我还是为你解答——毕竟我生而为人的职责，就是解答他人的困惑！
But since you asked, I will answer — After all, my life's duty is to dispel others' confusion!
你看到我们身旁那些粉丝的目光没？那炽热灼灼的眼神，就是被化解苦难之后的最好证明！
Do you see the burning gazes of the fans around us? Those passionate looks of rapture are the best evidence of having had their pains soothed!
她们已经看见了星辰，不再被阴翳笼罩双目。所以才能如此炽热地注视我…哦不，注视真理和现实啊！
They no longer have their eyes clouded and now see the stars, and that is how they are able to passionately look at me... I mean, at truth and reality!
你的动作好像被精心设计过…
The way you move seems to be deliberately designed...
我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.
大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.
即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.
或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.
对于这场入侵你怎么看？
What do you think about this invasion?
灾难！这就是一场纯纯粹粹、彻彻底底的灾难！
A disaster! An absolute, complete disaster!
虽然我知道，空间站近日人心惶惶，每个人对于这场入侵，都有不一样的看法。
I know that everyone on the space station is concerned these days and all hold different views regarding the invasion.
但我的眼中，只看到了粉丝们恐惧的脸庞——被泪水打湿的玫瑰固然有别样的韵味，但倘若馥郁的香气变为了苦涩的愁郁，那岂不是末日的光景？
However, I only see the horrified faces of my fans. Though roses moist with tears hold a special scent, it would be apocalyptic for such thick and sweet aromas to turn sour with sorrow.
所以，我更要坚定自我的职责——成为她们的引路明灯！
Therefore, I need to remain steadfast in my duty, and become their guiding light!
I don't have any other questions.
I don't have anything else to ask.
如果你心中还有困惑，可以随时来找我。当然也可以写信，我喜欢那样传统的交流方式。
If you still hold confusion in your heart, please, come find me anytime. Of course, you may also write to me. I like that kind of classical communication method.
信件可以交给拉明娜，她会处理好的。期待下次与你的相见——或者与你的文字相见。
You can give your letter to Lamina and she will look after it. I look forward to seeing you again — or seeing your letters.
我还有些事情需要问你…

信件可以交给拉明娜，她会处理好的。期待下次与你的相见——或者与你的文字相见。
You can give your letter to Lamina and she will look after it. I look forward to seeing you again — or seeing your letters.
…嘿！别偷偷摸摸站在别人身边！你这样是很容易吓到人的！
...Hey, don't come up to people all quietly like that! You are going to scare people!
哦…是{NICKNAME}啊。抱歉，我还以为是那些人过来了……
Oh... It's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I thought those people are here...
哎，别提了。还记得之前拉明娜干的好事吧？现在整个空间站的人，都把我视作过街老鼠，人人喊打！甚至以前那些自称永远不会离开后援会的科员，现在还带头找我麻烦！

Oh, it's terrible. Do you remember what Lamina did? Now everyone on the space station spites me and ostracizes me! Even those who said they would never leave my fan club are taking the lead in opposing me!
你瞧我现在这个倒霉样，不就是被他们给折腾的嘛！
I'm in such a pitiable state because of them!
Who are those people you're talking about?
曾经的波少粉丝后援会核心会员，现如今的卡波特头号抵制人员…哎，你也或多或少有听说的吧？在拉明娜那件事儿之后，大家对我的看法什么的。
The previous core members of the Master Capote Fan Club are now my biggest haters... You've heard about this, right? About how everyone views me after what happened with Lamina?
看你还是个明眼人，应该不会和他们一样不分青红皂白吧？
You look to be a smart cookie. You won't be as much of a brute as them, right?
I still need to talk to you about something.
也好也好，只要不是无意义地谩骂和批判，我都会好好听着的。
Fine fine. I'll take it to heart as long as it's not pointless criticism and slander.
哎，{NICKNAME}。从那件事之后，我又何尝没有反省过自己的呢？可是那些人哪儿会听我讲话？在他们眼中，我已经是个不知悔改的罪人了。
Ahh, {NICKNAME}, have I not reflected upon my actions since then? But who amongst those people would listen to me? For them, I am already an unrepentant sinner.
我辜负了粉丝的期待，这件事我应该付出代价。可是一旦我在这件事上表达歉意，大家反而更加愤怒，觉得我只是继续在编造谎言而已……
I betrayed the fans' expectations and I agree I need to pay for that. However, once I showed any remorse on this matter, they got more angry and felt I was just making up lies again...
You need to apologize to Lamina...
这件事虽然是我的私事，但{NICKNAME}你也不是外人，我还是偷偷告诉你吧。
It's my personal business, but since you are hardly a stranger, I'll tell you something in secret.
最开始我当然很生气，毕竟这件事，她明明可以跟我商量嘛！闹得这么大，多不好下台啊……
Of course I was angry at first. She could have discussed this with me! It became such a huge mess, and it was so hard to sort out my public image...
但是经过我的深刻反思之后，我才意识到这个想法多么荒谬。如果遭遇无端压迫的人是我，想必应该也没有那份勇气去主动要求和对方谈一谈吧。

However, I realized how ludicrous my ideas were after I thought long and hard on them. If I were the one getting endlessly oppressed, then I probably also won't have the courage to actively approach the other party for a conversation.
当我意识到拉明娜的难处与勇气之后，我更加坚信了一件事——曾经的我，真是个不折不扣的混账。
When I realized Lamina's difficulties and her courage, I became more firmly convinced of one thing — I was a total jerk.
因此，我将自己的反省与思考都告诉了她。虽然拉明娜当时…并没有接受我的道歉，但我相信我的诚意一定可以传递给她的吧？
Therefore, I told her all about my introspection. Lamina didn't accept my apology there and then, but I believe she must have felt my sincerity.
重新做人是有点困难的。
It's a bit hard to start over again.
我的天，你是第一个站在我的立场为我考虑的人。{NICKNAME}，你真是我的人生挚友！要知道，大家伙儿都觉得我死不足惜，更别提允许我重新做人了！

My goodness, you are the first to see things from my perspective. {NICKNAME}, you are indeed my bosom friend! See, everyone else thinks I can't redeem myself even with death, let alone allow me to start over!
不过幸好，我的人生还不算彻底黯淡无光。毕竟我还拥有你，以及真正理解我的人。
Thankfully, my life is not completely devoid of light. After all, I still have you and those who really understand me.
虽然波少粉丝后援会解散了，但还是有少部分粉丝留了下来，成立了新的后援会。有了他们的支持，我肯定可以更快在空间站改头换面，让大家感受到我的决心的！

Though the Master Capote Fan Club had disbanded, a small number of fans stayed behind and formed a new club. With their support, I can definitely start all over again on the space station and let everyone feel my conviction!
我没有别的事情想和你说了。
I don't have anything else to say to you.
I don't have anything else to say.
和你聊了聊，感觉心里舒服痛快多了。之前我说话老是忍不住去端着架子，说些空话。现在能和你这样推心置腹地说说话，感觉倒是十分难得。
I feel a lot better after speaking to you. I used to always put up airs and talk big, but now that I can speak candidly with you, it's actually a rather rare experience.
谢谢你愿意听我讲话。如果之后你有需要，我也愿意随时倾听你的发言。
Thank you for listening to me. I am also always ready to listen whenever you need me.
嘿，是你来啦？有什么我能帮上忙的就说，为朋友我卡波特都是两肋插刀的！
Oh, it's you! Tell me how I can help you. I, Capote, will do anything for my friend!

Thank you for listening to me. I am also always ready to listen whenever you need me.
啊…是{NICKNAME}呀。好久不见，有什么我可以帮你…啊，不好意思，一不小心又回到了之前的「秘书」状态。
Ah... it's you, {NICKNAME}. Long time no see. What can I help you — Ah, sorry, I sometimes still revert to my old secretary mode.
现在的我，已经不需要扮演那个家伙的私人秘书了。虽然目前还在适应阶段，但我相信之后一定会做得更好的。
I don't need to play the role of that man's personal secretary anymore. It takes a bit of time to adjust, but I know I'll get better at it.
感觉你比以前有精神了。
It feels like you're a lot more energized than before.
刚开始还有些不适应的。毕竟从那样繁琐的工作中一下子脱身，多少有点难以找到自我的定位。
I did have some difficulties at first. After all, it was kind of hard to re-position myself when such a busy work schedule just suddenly stopped.
但很快我发现，曾经的波少粉丝，也和我有相同的情况。大家都是一下子被强行挖去了生命中的一个环节，难免会觉得空落落的。
But I soon realized many previous Capote fans were in the same boat as me. We all felt a part of our lives was forcibly taken from us, and we can't help but feel empty.
于是我们就联合了起来，定期开展座谈会，分享自己的生活和工作。现在大家都感觉状态好了很多呢。
So, we banded together and met up frequently to talk about our lives and work. Now everyone feels much better.
最开始来到空间站的时候，我还多少抱有一些自我发展的规划。但是在做秘书的这段时间里，那些计划早就被磨灭得一干二净了。
I did have some plans for self-development when I first arrived at the space station, but those plans were all worn away during my time working as Capote's secretary.
现在重新将自己解放了出来，就好像第一次来到空间站的时候那样，看什么都是新崭崭的，觉得自己的未来有好多种可能。
Now that I'm free, I feel like I'm a newcomer at the space station once again. Everything seems so new and the future is so full of possibilities.
I want to chat with you more.
其实他来找过我，而且态度…有些让我不适应。不是说他做了什么奇怪的事情啦！只是平日里都高高在上的人，一下子对自己低声下气，多少感觉有点…怪怪的。

He's actually been to see me, and his attitude was... a bit weird. I'm not saying he did anything funny, just... for someone who's usually so high and mighty to suddenly act so low feels really weird.
所以当他讲完自己的深刻反省以及对我的歉意之后，我一下子没能说出来一句话。
I couldn't even say anything when he stated how deeply he had reflected on himself and how sorry he was.
也不知道是自己已经从那段过去中彻底走了出来，所以不在意他的回应；还是说从没想过他会道歉，所以真正听到的时候有些诧异。
I don't know if I've totally put that time behind me and didn't care about what he could have said, or I never thought he'd apologize and was surprised he actually did it.
总之，我没有能说出一句话，也没有给出任何回应。
Anyways, I couldn't say anything to him and gave him zero responses.
不过事后想来，那时候的他确实露出了从没展示过的眼神。应该可以说是…「真诚」的眼神吧？希望他之后也可以保持这份真诚。
But now that I think about it, he did show a look that I had never seen on his face before. Maybe that's... a "sincere" look? I hope he can keep being so sincere in the future.
What are your plans for the future?
虽…虽然之前一直在做一些琐碎的工作，但是好像不知不觉认识了很多其他科室的人。
Well... I've been doing mundane work all this time, but I somehow got to know lots of people in different departments.
可以说是因祸得福吧？曾经的那些卡波特粉丝后援会成员，有许多都是手里有独立研究项目的资深科员。
Maybe a bit of good luck actually came from this. Lots of the previous Capote Fan Club members are senior researchers with independent projects under their care.
因为平时和他们来往颇多，彼此也算是互相了解。经过引荐内推之后，也通过了几个研究项目的面试。大概之后，就会以「科员」的身份和你打招呼啦。

We knew each other because of our frequent interactions before. They got me to apply for some internal positions, and I managed to pass the interviews for a few projects. I'll probably be a "researcher" by the next time we meet.
你是个很有勇气的女孩。
You are a very brave person.
关于「勇气」这件事，我其实之前也很怀疑自己……
I don't know about being brave...
如果我真的是一个有勇气的人，是不是更应该在遭受压迫的时候，第一时间给他说出不呢？又或者是说早一点和他谈一谈，而不是以这样的方式画上句号呢？
If I really am brave, shouldn't I have said no to him the first time he oppressed me? Or should I have talked with him earlier, so that things wouldn't have to go down this way?
不过与其苛责自己做得还不够好，不如先坦率认可自己已经做出了改变吧？我最终选择了这样的方式与自己妥协，也算是与过去彻底告别了。
But instead of blaming myself for not having done enough, it's better to just admit that I've changed. I chose to face myself in this way and closed that chapter of my past.
总之，谢谢你，愿意对我说这样的话。
Anyways, thank you for saying these things to me.
I don't have anything else to say.
之后我就要着手准备项目研究的前期工作了，希望有机会可以再和你聊聊天。
I'm going to start preparing for the preliminary work of the research project now. Hope we get the chance to chat again in the future.

在宇宙中的感觉非常奇妙…罗浮对彦卿而言那么辽阔，但是在宇宙中，也不过是小小一隅而已。
Being surrounded by the universe feels... amazing. The Luofu feels like a small corner of something much, much bigger.
你喜欢列车上的景色吗？
喜欢啊。以前偶尔会在生活中遇到不顺利之事，如今只要望向宇宙，就会意识到这些烦心事有多渺小……
Yeah! All the challenges of everyday life seem to disappear when you gaze out into the universe.
You should totally visit the Express more often. It's a great place to have even greater fun.
好呀，那就时常来叨扰老师了。
Alright! Then I'll be here to bother you more often in the future.
宇宙之中，是不是还有很多等着我去挑战的对手呢……
I bet there are so many opponents out there in the universe just waiting for me to find them...

宇宙之中，是不是还有很多等着我去挑战的对手呢……

刚才和瓦尔特老师聊了一会儿，他讲了很多有趣的故事。
I was just talking to Mr. Yang — he told me some fascinating stories.
他说，有一柄「歼星大剑」，足有一百二十尺，唯有巨大的机器人才能挥舞得动。
He mentioned a <unbreak>120</unbreak>-foot sword called Star Bane that only a giant robot could wield.
我当然知道自己再怎么厉害也用不了那把剑啦，但还是想见识见识啊……
Of course, I know I'd never be able to wield such a sword, but I'd still love to see it...
He's probably talking about a cartoon or something...
动画片？原来不是真实存在的剑啊…但你不觉得这个思路其实是可行的吗？
Cartoon? So it's not a real sword!? But it could be real, right?
「歼星大剑」…嗯，回去讲给将军听听，也许他会愿意请工造司试试看吧。
Star Bane... Hmm, once I get back I'll talk to the general about it. Perhaps he'd be willing to get the Artisanship Commission involved?
一百二十尺的巨剑，光是想想都觉得激动！
A <unbreak>120</unbreak>-foot sword! Just thinking about it makes me excited.
说到这个…老师，彦卿最近还注意到了一件事！
Speaking of which, I noticed something recently!
Pray tell, what caught your eye?
你看外面，整艘罗浮是不是特别像一柄巨大的飞剑？这岂不是意味着，彦卿每天都在御剑飞行？
Look outside — don't you think the Luofu looks like a giant flying sword? So that would mean I'm flying around on a huge sword every day!

你看外面，整艘罗浮是不是特别像一柄巨大的飞剑？这岂不是意味着，彦卿每天都在御剑飞行？

I was just talking with Dan Heng, but... he never seems very interested in chatting.
老师，你知道丹恒老师对什么话题比较感兴趣吗？
Do you know any topics he'd be interested in?
刚刚也和丹恒老师聊起这个…
Funnily enough, that was a part of our conversation...
我问丹恒老师要去哪儿，他说要去智库查阅资料，然后就走进资料室了。
I asked Dan Heng where he was off to, and he said he was going to the data bank to look up some material. Then he walked straight into the Archives.
原本我还想着能多问几句的……
I did want to ask him a few more questions, but...
是呀，我刚刚也是问了丹恒老师才知道你在观景车厢。
Well, I did ask him where you were just now — that's how I knew you were in the Parlor Car.
原本我还想着能多问几句的……
I did want to ask him a few more questions, but...
没错，我刚刚问他的就是这个！
That's exactly what I asked him about!
比如列车的构造之类的，但他都回答得好简洁……
I asked all about what the Express was made of, but his answers were super short.
那看起来并不是我选择的话题他不感兴趣，到底是为什么呢……
So if the topics I chose interest him... why is he still like that?
He's good at keeping things brief.
原来是这样啊…老师这么说我就放心了。我原本还担心，是自己哪句话太冒失，惹他不开心了呢。
Oh, okay — I feel a bit better then. I was worried I spoke out of turn or upset him.
以后还是要多找丹恒老师聊聊天，也许聊得多了，他就能打开话匣子了吧。
I'll keep talking to him — maybe I can eventually unlock his chattier side!

老师，你们的列车长帕姆老师，到底是什么来头啊？
Where did the Express' conductor come from?
Too bad I don't know either...
彦卿原本以为，帕姆老师和将军以前养的朔雪一样，既是可爱的吉祥物也是家人…但刚刚我才察觉到，帕姆老师身上，有一种强者才有的气息……

At first, I thought Pom-Pom was like the pet the general used to keep — Snowmoon. Y'know, a cute mascot who's also a member of the family...? Anyway, I soon realized that wasn't the case — Pom-Pom has a strong presence on the Express.
真的啊！老师不常用剑，可能还不熟悉剑客的气息吧？但我一眼就能看出来，这位帕姆老师绝非等闲之辈，造诣很可能在我之上。

Really! You don't use a sword, so I guess you wouldn't feel the presence of a swordsman in front of you... but after one look at Pom-Pom, I knew they weren't someone to be trifled with. I think they may be more masterful than myself.
等一下直接去问问帕姆老师好了…也许帕姆老师愿意和我过上几招呢。
I should go and ask Pom-Pom about it — maybe I could pick up a few tricks!

彦卿当然知道，这银河中有无数强者等待我去挑战…但在智库中实际看到这些资料，还是觉得颇为震撼。
Well, I knew the universe had countless opponents waiting for me to challenge them... but I saw some information in the data bank that astounded me.
那个叫做「贝洛伯格」的城市，明明只是一座末日孤城，却高手如云…等以后有时间，还希望能去那里看看。
That city — Belobog — it seems like such a lonely place and yet it's full of masterful fighters. When I get time, I want to take a look there.
Well, I can take you there right now, if you're up for it.
现在还不行，我要学的东西还有很多。在罗浮上和人比试，输了也就输了。要是在域外输了，那可是丢将军的脸。
Now's not the time — there's still more to learn. If I lose to someone on the Luofu, it doesn't matter, but if I lose to an outsider, it would disgrace the general.
等过段时日，彦卿剑术大成，还请老师载我一程，去「贝洛伯格」见识见识那些雪国的高手们。
I want to spend some time honing my skills... Then, when the time's right, you can take me down, and we'll see what the masters of this snowy planet can do.
哎呀，光是想想，就觉得心潮澎湃。
Haha, just the thought of it gets my blood pumping!

The general is always telling me that a drop of water should be repaid with a spring, and that even among friends, etiquette prevails.
我觉得，老师是我的朋友，可我却又拿不出算得上「涌泉相报」的答谢，很是苦恼。
You're a good friend, but I can't think of any "spring" to repay you with...
不过最近，我在打扫后院时，在朔雪以前住的兽栏中翻出了这些漂亮的石头…想来是朔雪当年藏在那里的吧？
Still, when I was clearing out the rear courtyard recently, I found these beautiful stones buried in the pen where Snowmoon used to live... I guess Snowmoon must've buried them there.
虽然不知道这些东西价值几何，但很是好看，拿来送给老师，也许是再合适不过的礼物了。
I don't know if they're worth anything, but they look pretty. Here, I think they'd make a nice gift for you.
往后，我还想常来列车上叨扰。希望那个时候，也能和老师们一起聊聊天、看看宇宙、吃些好吃的……

我们贝洛伯格人已经足足七百年没有踏入高墙之外，更别说天上了……！

真的？！那真正的「天外之境」在哪里？我有机会跟着列车去看看吗？
Really!? Then where is the real Satelleden? Will I have the chance to go see it with the Express?
没想到你还看这种小说…
I didn't think you'd read novels like those...
…看这种小说怎么了！没看过《奇谭》的灵魂是不完整的！
...What's wrong with those novels? You're not complete unless you've read the Tale series!
…咳咳。不好意思，失态了。我刚才什么都没说。
...Ahem, sorry. Excuse me. Just pretend I didn't say anything.
谢谢你邀请我登上列车。我就自己随意转转吧，不用劳您大驾专门陪我了。
Thank you for inviting me to board the Express. I'll take a look around on my own. You don't have to accompany me.
You don't want me to show you around?
真不用，让我一个人静静吧。再见！
You really don't have to. I'd like to hang out on my own. Bye!
嗯嗯，你说得对，我怎么没想到呢？真是太棒了。
Mm, you're right. How come I didn't think of this? This is awesome.
诶诶，真的吗真的吗？我都没有听说过那种数据统计技巧，你给我详细说说好不好？
Huh, really? I've never heard of that data analysis technique. Can you elaborate on that?
诶？真的吗？没有啦，其实还好吧？
Oh? Do I? No, I'm really not.
诶？真的吗？没有啦，其实还好吧？

怎么样？是不是已经不会感觉到咄咄逼人的气势，也不会觉得话题被聊死无法进行了？
How is it? You don't feel I'm so aggressive and difficult to talk to anymore, right?
这都多亏了你的帮助，现在我有空的时候都会翻出以前的短信温故学习呢！
That's all thanks to you. Now I even dig up my old messages from time to time to review and learn from them!
诶，还好还好啦。托你的福，进度还行啦。
It goes, it goes. It's going alright. Thanks for asking.
不过我看你最近气色不是很好哦，是不是太忙碌了呢？要记得好好休息才行，日常营养摄入也不能掉以轻心。
But you're the one who seems a bit out of it. Are you doing too much work? Do remember to rest, and keep up a nutritious diet.
你怎么还是来问我有关她的事情？！啊…不好意思，情绪有点激动啦。我的意思是想说，关于姐姐的事情，你可以问问其他人哦。
Why are you still talking to me about her!? Ah... I'm sorry. I got a bit too excited. I mean, you can ask other people about my sister.
其实非要说到姐姐的话，也都还好啦。她确实很厉害呢，是的是的。
If you really want to talk about her... I guess that's fine. Yes, yes, she really is impressive.
嗯，没有啦没有啦，都还好的。嗯嗯！
No no. I'm all good. I really am!
I have a few questions for you...
怎么样？是不是已经不会感觉到咄咄逼人的气势，也不会觉得话题被聊死无法进行了？
How is it? You don't feel I'm so aggressive and difficult to talk to anymore, right?
这都多亏了你的帮助，现在我有空的时候都会翻出以前的短信温故学习呢！
That's all thanks to you. Now I even dig up my old messages from time to time to review and learn from them!
诶，还好还好啦。托你的福，进度还行啦。
It goes, it goes. It's going alright. Thanks for asking.
不过我看你最近气色不是很好哦，是不是太忙碌了呢？要记得好好休息才行，日常营养摄入也不能掉以轻心。
But you're the one who seems a bit out of it. Are you doing too much work? Do remember to rest, and keep up a nutritious diet.
好的好的！那个…我不是按你教我的来聊天嘛，我以为你喜欢这么讲话呢。
Okay okay! Well, I'm just talking in the way you taught me to. I thought you liked this.
总之这事儿…多亏有你教我，我现在语气没之前那么冲了，感觉整个人都不同了呢！
Anyways... I still have to thank you. I don't talk as aggressively these days and it feels like I'm a completely new person.
嗯，没有啦没有啦，都还好的。嗯嗯！
No no. I'm all good. I really am!
虚伪之人，罪不可恕，千刀万剐，死不足惜！
Liars are unforgivable! Even death cannot redeem them!
哼，很快我就可以写完这份报告书了…卡波特，你等着吧！
Hmph, I'm going to finish writing this report very soon... Just you wait, Capote!
你不是波少头号粉丝吗？
Aren't you Master Capote's biggest fan?
呸呸呸！世玲与你无冤无仇，你怎么能用这么晦气的名号来称呼世玲呢？
Bah! I've never wronged you, so don't give me a title that brings bad luck!
脱粉即无关，希望你可以尊重世玲！
It's all over once I stopped being his fan. Please show me some respect!
你什么记性呀？当时你不也在场嘛！哎呀，世玲可不愿意再回忆一次痛苦的经历。
Don't you remember? You were there too! Ugh, I don't want to relive that terrible experience ever again.
总之，你只要记住卡波特是个大坏蛋就对了！
Anyways, just remember that Capote is despicable!
There's something else I want to ask.
当然是统计卡波特罪行的报告书呀！作为他之前的头号粉丝，世玲可是知道许多秘密的…那些事儿，旁人想都不敢想！
A report that summarizes Capote's sins! I know a lot of secrets as his former top fan... Other people can't even imagine it!
可惜写作进度太慢了，都怪阿德勒每天来烦我，不然世玲早就写完发到空间站的匿名论坛里去了。
Pity that I'm writing so slowly. I blame Adler — he comes to bother me every day, otherwise I'd have finished this ages ago and published it on the space station's anonymous forum.
波少粉丝后援会解散了吗？
Did the Master Capote Fan Club disband?
当然解散啦！大家逃都来不及呢。只不过听说还有少部分人还打算继续支持他，说什么「要陪伴波少洗心革面」。
Of course it did! We couldn't get away fast enough. But I hear some people plan to keep supporting him and want to "be there for him as he changes."
真是不理解那帮人！像卡波特这样的坏东西还有什么值得关心的？搞不懂，真搞不懂！
I don't get those people at all! People like Capote don't deserve any care! I don't get it. I really don't!
那些你给卡波特的奇物…
嘘！！亏世玲还把你当朋友，什么话都愿意给你讲，你怎么稍不留心就把世玲的秘密大声讲出来了？！这要是让旁人听去了怎么办！？
Shhh! I told you that because we are friends, but that doesn't mean you can say it out loud! What if other people hear?
那些东西世玲早就安排对应负责人进行回收了，你别瞎操心。这件事就当翻页了！以后不准再提了！
I already got the relevant parties to take back those Curios. Don't you worry about it. Just treat it as water under the bridge! Don't mention it ever again!
等着瞧吧卡波特！等我忙完手里的工作，整理完奇物报告，再去忙完收容回收检查，最后再和阿德勒去一趟…哎哟！世玲怎么还有那么多事要忙呀！
Just you wait, Capote! When I finished my work, tidied up the Curio report, supervised Curio reclamation, and went with Adler to... Ugh! How come I still have so much work to do!?
首先去验收收容回来的奇物，然后再去做例行仓库抽检，最后答应了要陪阿德勒去找那个会说话的怪东西…哎哟，今天也没空写报告了！

Firstly I need to do the inventory for reclaimed Curios, then do regular quality control at the warehouse, then I promised Adler to go find the weird thing that talks... Great, no time to write my report today either!
There's something else I want to ask.
当然是统计卡波特罪行的报告书呀！作为他之前的头号粉丝，世玲可是知道许多秘密的…那些事儿，旁人想都不敢想！
A report that summarizes Capote's sins! I know a lot of secrets as his former top fan... Other people can't even imagine it!
可惜写作进度太慢了，都怪阿德勒每天来烦我，不然世玲早就写完发到空间站的匿名论坛里去了。
Pity that I'm writing so slowly. I blame Adler — he comes to bother me every day, otherwise I'd have finished this ages ago and published it on the space station's anonymous forum.
波少粉丝后援会解散了吗？
Did the Master Capote Fan Club disband?
当然解散啦！大家逃都来不及呢。只不过听说还有少部分人还打算继续支持他，说什么「要陪伴波少洗心革面」。
Of course it did! We couldn't get away fast enough. But I hear some people plan to keep supporting him and want to "be there for him as he changes."
真是不理解那帮人！像卡波特这样的混账东西还有什么值得关心的？搞不懂，真搞不懂！
I don't get those people at all! Scoundrels like Capote don't deserve any care! I don't get it. I really don't!
那些你给卡波特的奇物…
嘘！！亏世玲还把你当朋友，什么话都愿意给你讲，你怎么稍不留心就把世玲的秘密大声讲出来了？！这要是让旁人听去了怎么办！？
Shhh! I told you that because we are friends, but that doesn't mean you can say it out loud! What if other people hear?
那些东西世玲早就安排对应负责人进行回收了，你别瞎操心。这件事就当翻页了！以后不准再提了！
I already got the relevant parties to take back those Curios. Don't you worry about it. Just treat it as water under the bridge! Don't mention it ever again!
等着瞧吧卡波特！等我忙完手里的工作，整理完奇物报告，再去忙完收容回收检查，最后再和阿德勒去一趟…哎哟！世玲怎么还有那么多事要忙呀！
Just you wait, Capote! When I finished my work, tidied up the Curio report, supervised Curio reclamation, and went with Adler to... Ugh! How come I still have so much work to do!?
哈欠——困死了。啊…又是你，这次又是什么事？
*Yawn* I'm so sleepy. You again? What's up?
我有一些问题想要问你…
I've got something to ask you.
…什么叫偷懒？我是医疗科的成员乔安，每天要处理的事情很多，不抽空休息会儿还得了…我这副小身板又不是铁打的。
...What do you mean, slacking off? I'm Joanne from the Medical Department, and I've got a lot to do every day. I need time to relax... otherwise my body won't be able to handle it.
听说你之前一直没休息过？
I heard you didn't rest for a long time?
哎，别提了，昼夜连轴转，最后直接累趴下了。
Ooh, don't get me started. I'd been working <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7 before I burnt out.
既然你知道这事，就别跟我搭话了，我得休息会儿……
If you knew this, then just leave me alone. I need to rest...
打扰一个想打瞌睡的人，比打扰一个正在熟睡的人更加恶劣。
It's worse to disturb someone trying to sleep than wake up someone already asleep.
听说你感染了模因病毒？
…连你都听说了啊？肯定是咱们医疗科那几个大嘴巴到处说。
...Even you are in the know? It must be those blabbermouths at the medical department.
哎，算我倒霉，我也不知道怎么就感染这玩意。
Ugh, this is so unfair. I have no idea how I even got this darn thing.
好在因祸得福，让我休息了几天，总算是睡了个好觉……
Mercifully, it turned out to be a blessing in disguise. I got to take a few days off, and finally got a good night's sleep...
I better leave you alone then.
Well, then, I'd better leave you alone.
嗯嗯，你自便吧，我得休息了，一会儿还要继续看诊呢。
Sure, you go ahead. I need to get some rest before my next shift.
小年轻，又见面了。坐坐坐，别见外。
Kiddo, we meet again. Take a seat.
I want to hear more of your gossip...
有没有什么陈年旧梦的八卦？
Are there any gossips from the old days?
Oh, I am best qualified to talk about this.
伯纳德你认识吧？就是地概科那个倔老头，一看就不好惹， 眉毛比眼睛都有精神的那个。
You know Bernard, don't you? The stubborn old guy from the Department of Cosmic Geography who doesn't look very approachable. His eyebrows are fiercer than his eyes.
你别看他现在这么阻挠他徒弟的爱情，当年的他，好家伙，那叫一个多情郎啊。
Don't be fooled by his seeming determination to prevent his apprentice from dating. You never could've guessed that he used to be quite the womanizer back in his younger days.
年轻的时候吧，这伯纳德情窦初开，想要追密卷科一个姑娘。我们这些做兄弟的能不帮忙吗？那前前后后，忙了好一哆嗦。
Back when he was young, Bernard fell in love for the first time with a girl from the Department of Insight. As his brothers, we all helped him to pursue her for a while.
这年轻时候的爱情就是炽热，我怀疑伯纳德那老东西，就是在洛奇身上，看到了自个儿年轻时候的影子吧，嘿。
Young love is always full of passion. I guess Bernard just saw his younger self in Rocky, haha.
啊？你问我之后怎么着了？年轻人，这听八卦可不兴一口气听完。想要知道，就请听下回分解吧！
What's that? You want to know what happened then? Kiddo, I can't spill all the beans in one go. Stay tuned!
有没有什么难以忘怀的故事？
到了我这把岁数看过去，那啥事都多少有点难以忘怀，你懂这意思吧？
At my age, everything is unforgettable. You know what I mean?
真不是我说，你们年轻人其实不爱听这句，但我还是得说——没有啥忘不掉的事儿，没有啥过不去的坎儿！真要是有，那就是当时没琢磨明白，当局者迷了！
I know young people these days hate to hear this, but nothing is truly unforgettable, and there's nothing you can't get over! If there is, it's only because you've been too lost to figure it out!
被你这么一问，我脑子里还真糊涂起来了。一下子好多事儿都冲出来了。真是不能提，不能想啊。
Now that you brought it up, I am actually confused. I just remembered so many things all at once. The past really doesn't bear being remembered.
什么古恩那家伙年轻的时候风风火火的样子，还有伯纳德刚来的时候那身板才叫一个结实……
How energetic Gunn used to be... And how strong Bernard was when he first joined us...
What have you been working on lately?
退休之后就不能说自己在忙什么了，一般都说是：最近在玩儿着什么呢。
I'm retired, so that might not be an accurate question. We normally just say what we've been playing with.
我没啥文化，不像是古恩看得明白愚人戏。我大半辈子都搞机修，和载具称兄道弟，老了也只会折腾点这个。

I never got a proper education. I wouldn't understand Fool's Play like Gunn does. My life's work has been all about repairing and handling machines and vehicles, and now that I'm old, that's still the only thing I do.
喏，瞧见没，这个小玩具。可别觉得是给小孩儿玩的！这辆装甲车跑过的路，比我喝的酒都多！这个小模型，里头完美复刻了原型的机动轨道呢。

Here, check this out. Don't think this is some child's plaything! The armored car this miniature model is based on has traveled on more roads than I could count! This model even has a perfect replica of the real thing's mechanized track.
我当年可是修了它足足三次，三次都是从濒死边缘把它救回来……
I fixed this thing three times. Three times I managed to bring it back from the brink of death ...
哎哟，不说了不说了，都是过去的事儿咯！
Well, I think I'm done talking. These stories are all water under the bridge.
I don't have any other questions.
和你扯闲篇，够劲儿，开心！年轻人，下次有空再来，别的没有，故事管够！
It was fun chatting with you. I liked it! Come here again when you have time, kiddo. I might not have much in my possession, but I sure have more than enough stories to share.
哎，是你啊，来找老头子是有什么事吗？
Ah, it's you again. How can an old man like me help you?
哼，这个没良心的小子，早把老头子我忘咯！别说下落了，连个消息都没给我发，亏我还天天刷新终端看有没有未读消息……

Hmph, that ungrateful brat has long forgotten about me. He never sent me any messages, let alone his whereabouts. And here I am, logging onto the terminal every day to see whether there are any unread messages...
不过…虽然没收到他的消息，但他的生命体征信号一直是亮着的，显示正常，多半没啥事。
But... his vital signs always appear normal based on the reading. He's probably okay.
可能是那边信号不太好吧。
Maybe he's got a bad signal where he is.
Is everything all right without Rocky around?
哼，别提了！刚刚知道洛奇走了的时候，可差点没把我气死！
Ugh, don't even get me started. I was absolutely livid when I first realized Rocky had left.
好在我去医疗科做了个检查，老头子我身子骨硬朗得很，别的不敢说，等这傻小子回来是足够了！
Thankfully, my results from the Medical Department are pretty good, and I feel I'm in good enough health to wait for this silly boy's return.
其他人知道洛奇的事吗?
Does anyone else know about this?
反正我那傻徒弟不在空间站里，别人知不知道都无所谓了。
It doesn't matter, my silly apprentice is not in the space station anyway.
而且…就算知道了又有什么用呢？又不见谁去把他拽回来……
Besides, what use would that be even if they knew? It's not like they're gonna drag Rocky back...
I don't have any other questions.
哎，洛奇啊，我的傻徒弟…师父早就不怪你了，可你什么时候才会回来哇……
Ahhh, Rocky, my silly apprentice... I've never blamed you for leaving, but when are you coming back...?
…咳咳。不好意思，失态了。我刚才什么都没说。
...Ahem, sorry. Excuse me. Just pretend I didn't say anything.
谢谢你邀请我登上列车。我就自己随意转转吧，不用劳您大驾专门陪我了。
Thank you for inviting me to board the Express. I'll take a look around on my own. You don't have to accompany me.
You don't want me to show you around?
真不用，让我一个人静静吧。再见！
You really don't have to. I'd like to hang out on my own. Bye!
查阅了你们列车的智库之后，我才意识到，我们贝洛伯格拥有的知识与你们相比，实在是不值一提……
After going through the Express' data bank, I've truly realized just how little knowledge Belobog possesses compared to you...
如今贝洛伯格正逐渐恢复正常，也在逐步取得与外界的联系。为了避免潜在的敌人对我们造成威胁，我必须尽可能把你们的知识全都带回去才行。

Now that Belobog is gradually returning to normal, we are also slowly reconnecting with the outside world. I have to take as much of your knowledge back with me as possible to prevent any potential enemies from endangering us.
…当然，我会尽量不影响丹恒的，放心吧。
...Don't worry, I'll try my best not to bother Dan Heng.
The Express' data bank welcomes you at all times.
哼哼，那我可要整天泡在这里了。
Really? Then I'm gonna spend all day here.
…开个玩笑。毕竟丹恒还得睡觉呢。
...I'm kidding. Dan Heng needs the room to sleep in, after all.
看到了什么有趣的东西？
嗯…挺多的。让我比较在意的是那个叫作「星际和平公司」的商业组织……
Quite a lot. I'm most interested in that commercial organization — the Interastral Peace Corporation.
明明都是克里珀的追随者，他们的做法与我们筑城者却大相径庭——说到底，做买卖真能支援「存护」吗？我在怀疑他们的真实意图为何……
They are also followers of Qlipoth, but what they do is drastically different from us Architects. Can businessmen honestly support the Preservation? I'm seriously doubting their true motives...
你不会要全部背下来吧…
You're not gonna memorize it all, right...?
不然呢，用纸笔抄写吗？这么多内容，我一个人可搬不动。
How else can I take it back? By copying it on paper? I can't carry that much paper on my own.
而且，手机的存储容量也完全不够…所以还是用人脑记忆来得方便些。
And my phone definitely doesn't have enough storage... so, memorizing it is the most convenient way to go.
话说回来，我还意识到一件事——你们智库的加密手段实在是有些薄弱……
Actually, I realized something else — the encryption for your data bank is pretty weak...
…这可不是小问题，稍后我会和姬子小姐聊聊的。
...That could be a big issue. I'll have a chat with Himeko about it.
I checked the Express Data Bank...
查阅智库的时候，我还意识到一件事——你们智库的加密手段实在是有些薄弱……
I realized something else when going through the data bank — the encryption for your data bank is pretty weak...
…这可不是小问题，稍后我会和姬子小姐聊聊的。
...That could be a big issue. I'll have a chat with Himeko about it.
此前与姬子小姐聊天，我这才了解到雅利洛-Ⅵ并非唯一因为星核蒙受灾难的星球，宇宙中遭遇了同样命运的世界远超我们想象……

It was only after talking to Himeko that I learned that Jarilo-VI isn't the only planet suffering from the Stellaron's calamity. The number of worlds that endured such a fate far surpasses what we imagined...
尽管如此，姬子小姐还是向我表示，星核的成因至今为止仍是个谜，因此目前没有切实可行的办法消除星核带来的污染。
Even so, Himeko indicated that the source of Stellarons remains mysterious, and there are no realistic ways to remove a Stellaron's contamination.
不过，她也向我分享了其他星球采取的对策——其中有些案例与我们的状况很是相似，我正在考虑和杰帕德戍卫官讨论采取类似对策的可行性……

However, she shared some strategies that other planets have taken — some of them are very similar to our circumstances. I'm considering discussing with Captain Gepard the possibilities of adopting those strategies...
是啊，我也觉得有值得一试的价值。
I agree. They're at least worth a try.
Maybe they won't be of much use.
我也没有太大把握——但无论如何，我想有值得一试的价值。
I'm not confident either — but they're at least worth a try.
…咳咳，不好意思。可能是我的职业病犯了。
...Ahem, sorry, I was in work mode.
总之，我想说的是——我们正在想办法消除星核和裂界带来的影响。
Anyways, what I'm trying to say is that we're seeking ways to remove the influence of the Stellaron and the Fragmentum.
我们铁卫已经与裂界对抗了太久，付出了太大的代价…哪怕是星核问题已经被你们解决了的当下，伤亡报告上的数字还是令人触目惊心。

Us Silvermane Guards have fought against the Fragmentum for far too long and have lost too much... Even though you've solved the Stellaron problem for now, the number of casualties is still staggering.
如果，我是说如果——如果我们真的能够找到根除裂界污染的方法——那么，我，还有杰帕德，就再也不必眼睁睁地看着战友们白白送命……
If — and I mean if — we can truly find a way to uproot the Fragmentum's corruption, then maybe we can stem the Silvermane Guards' losses...
…啊，对不起，这话题好像有点太沉重了。请让我一个人静一静吧，谢谢你。
...Ah, sorry... this topic always makes me a little emotional. I think I need some alone time — thank you.
该和杰帕德讨论一下了……
Time for a chat with Gepard...
如果我们真的能够找到根除裂界污染的方法……
If we can truly find a way to uproot the Fragmentum's corruption...
没想到那个黑色的饮料味道竟然还不错，而且还很提神！要是熬夜工作的时候能来上这么一杯该有多好……
I didn't think that black drink would taste so good... and really energizing too! If only I could get a cup when I'm pulling those all-nighters...
其实，单看卖相我还以为根本不能喝呢。大千世界真是无奇不有啊。
Judging from its appearance, I thought it'd be unpalatable. The wonders of the universe are endless.
我说的是咖啡——应该是叫这个名字吧？
I'm talking about coffee — is that what it's called?
不是啦，那个在贝洛伯格也能喝到啊。
No, You can drink that in Belobog as well.
我说的是咖啡——应该是叫这个名字吧？
I'm talking about coffee — is that what it's called?
我觉得还挺好喝的。不过，听姬子小姐说，列车上的其他人似乎都不大喜欢这种饮料……
I think it's pretty tasty. But according to Himeko, everyone on the Express doesn't really appreciate that drink...
而且，姬子小姐见我这么喜欢，还分了一大把咖啡豆给我——甚至还有一台咖啡机！真是弄得我怪不好意思的……
Himeko gave me a big handful of coffee beans when she saw how much I liked it — and then she gave me a coffee machine! It's a bit embarrassing, hehe.
下次再来列车做客的话，一定要给她带些贝洛伯格特产作回礼才行。
Next time I visit the Express, I'll definitely bring her some Belobog specialties in return.
试喝了姬子小姐的饮料……
姬子小姐分了一大把咖啡豆给我——甚至还有一台咖啡机！真是弄得我怪不好意思的……

下次再来列车做客的话，一定要给她带些贝洛伯格特产作回礼才行。
Next time I visit the Express, I'll definitely bring her some Belobog specialties in return.
自从上次露营之后，我就在想：要是能去比雪原更远的地方看看就好了。
I've been thinking since the last camping trip that it would be great if I can go somewhere even further than the Snow Plains.
登上列车之后，看着在城里和雪原中根本无法见到的景色…这种念头也变得越来越强烈了。
That thought has been growing stronger ever since I boarded the Express... and saw views that would never have been visible from the city or the Snow Plains.
谢谢你的邀请，但我毕竟身为银鬃铁卫的情报官，没办法抛下工作去随意旅行……
Thanks for your invitation, but I am the Silvermane Guards' Intelligence Officer — I can't just drop my work and go travelling...
像玲可一样成为极地探险家吧。
Then become an outdoor explorer like Lynx.
谢谢你的建议，但我想自己还是更擅长情报官的工作——也正由于这个原因，我实在没办法抛下工作去随意旅行……
Thanks for your suggestion, but I think I'm more suited to be an Intelligence Officer... Besides, I can't just drop my work and go travelling...
But you have lots of work, right?
是啊。我毕竟身为银鬃铁卫的情报官，没办法抛下工作随意去旅行……
Yes. As the Silvermane Guards' Intelligence Officer, I can't just drop my work and go travelling...
不过，能像这样偶尔来到你们的列车上做客，我就已经很满足了。
But I'm already very happy that I get to visit your Express like this once in a while.
另外，我也发自内心地喜欢情报官这份工作——对我而言，比起旅行，还是脑力活动更让人愉悦啊。
Besides, I genuinely like the job of an Intelligence Officer — for me, using my brain is a lot more fun than traveling.
If only I could travel on the Express...
能像这样偶尔来到你们的列车上做客，我就已经很满足了。
I'm already very happy that I get to visit your Express like this once in a while.
…谢谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}——也请替我向列车组的其他成员转达谢意。
...Thank you for the invitation, {NICKNAME}, and please pass my gratitude to the rest of the Express Crew.
没事，我不是来找你的，我来找三月七，交流一些…读后感。顺便给你带了点小礼物，拿着吧。别误会，我真不是特意来找你的。
Don't worry. I'm not here for you. I'm here to find March and discuss some... opinions about books, and I brought you a small gift. Here. Don't misunderstand. I'm definitely not here for you.
好了，没别的事你就先走吧。我还要等三月七呢……
Alright, if there's nothing else, then move along. I'm waiting for March...
好了，没别的事你就先走吧。我还要等三月七呢……
Alright, if there's nothing else, then move along. I'm waiting for March...
在这里，好像完全看不到贝洛伯格……
I can't see Belobog at all from here...
如果是查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉伊斯坎德拉山的话…恐怕也看不到吧。
I can hardly even see Mt. Zarathustrazapala Iskandra.
可那毕竟是星球表面最高的山峰……
But that's the tallest peak on the whole planet...
查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉伊斯坎德拉山——应该是贝洛伯格人目前已知的、星球表面最高的山峰……
Mt. Zarathustrazapala Iskandra — it's the tallest mountain we know of on the planet...
…在登上列车之前，我以为贝洛伯格和雪原就是整个世界的全部了——但没想到实际情况远超我的想象。
...Before I boarded the Express, I thought Belobog and the Snow Plains were the entire world. I didn't think reality would surpass my imagination this much.
等到我把这颗星球的秘密全部勘明之后…就和你们一起，向宇宙的更深处进发吧。
Once I've discovered all the secrets on this planet... I'll go with you to head deeper into the universe.
到时候可一定不要拒绝我哦，说好了。
Don't turn me down when the time comes, okay?
宇宙…感觉我已经跃跃欲试起来了。
The universe... I'm already feeling hyped up.
等到我把这颗星球的秘密全部勘明之后…就和你们一起，向宇宙的更深处进发吧。
Once I've discovered all the secrets on this planet... I'll go with you to head deeper into the universe.
到时候可一定不要拒绝我哦，说好了。
Don't turn me down when the time comes, okay?
那位列车长的模样，好眼熟……
究竟是在哪里看到过呢……
I swear I've seen them before.
是雪原里的某种生物吗？但不应该啊，完全没有相关的印象……
Maybe they look like a Snow Plains creature? Hmm. I don't remember seeing one that looks like that...
可能只是某种形似的生物。
Maybe it was just something that looks similar.
嗯，目前看来这是可能性最大的结论——不过我的笔记里好像没有类似的记录……
Yeah, probably. But I don't have anything like that in my records.
…不行，完全没有头绪。我的笔记里好像也没有类似的记录……
...Nope. I'm completely lost. And my records aren't helping...
难道雅利洛-Ⅵ上有帕姆的同胞？
Are you saying Pom-Pom's kin are on Jarilo-VI?
啊…可是姬子小姐对我说帕姆是独一无二的。我的笔记里好像也没有类似的记录……
I doubt it. Himeko told me Pom-Pom is unique. I don't have anything like that in my records...
啊，我想起来了——是星球仪——那上面有个和帕姆非常相似的图案！
Ah! I remember now! It's the armillary sphere. There's a shape on it that really looks like Pom-Pom!
但为什么是星球仪？这也太奇怪了吧……
But why the armillary sphere? That's so odd...
没错，就是星球仪——那上面有个和帕姆非常相似的图案！
It's the armillary sphere for sure. There's a shape on it that really looks like Pom-Pom!
但为什么是星球仪？这也太奇怪了吧……
But why the armillary sphere? That's so odd...
感觉…列车上的氛围，好奇妙。
The feeling on the Express is really unique.
大家的阅历都好丰富，聊起天来也完全感觉不到社交压力……
Everyone's so knowledgeable, and super easy to talk to...
哼哼，那我可就不客气了。
Hehe, don't mind if I do.
Isn't it the same in your family?
其实不是这样的。和哥哥姐姐聊天，要顾虑的反而才比较多。
Not really. It's not always easy to talk to my brother and sister.
Really? Well, that's good to hear.
这下登上列车的理由又多了一个……
Now I have one more reason to board the Express...
…好期待以后的列车生活。感觉一定会很有趣。
...I'm really looking forward to my future here. It's gonna be so much fun.
干脆现在就回家去收拾行李吧……
Maybe I should go pack my bag right now...
