好期待以后的列车生活。感觉一定会很有趣。
I'm really looking forward to my future here. It's gonna be so much fun.
干脆现在就回家去收拾行李吧……
Maybe I should go pack my bag right now...
先前向丹恒请教了许多知识……
I learned a lot from Dan Heng...
…没想到他那么健谈。从外表完全看不出来。
...You wouldn't think he was so chatty!
What did you learn from him?
一开始只是向他请教了列车智库的使用方法…但后面不知怎地，我们就聊到贝洛伯格的地文地貌了。
I asked him how to use the Express' data bank... but somehow we ended up talking about Belobog geography.
然后，我们又聊了很多其他星球的自然地理——虽然只是我一直在单方面地听他讲…但那些知识都非常有趣。
Then we talked about the geography of lots of other planets. Well, he talked and I listened... but it was very interesting.
没想到，贝洛伯格以外的天地居然这么广阔……
I never thought the world beyond Belobog could be so huge...
...I can't wait to explore beyond the sky.
向丹恒请教了许多知识……
I learned a lot from Dan Heng...
没想到，贝洛伯格以外的天地居然这么广阔……
I never thought the world beyond Belobog could be so huge...
...I can't wait to explore beyond the sky.
列车上好像有点…太暖和了……
The Express is a bit too... warm.
Makes my brain a little... slow.
感觉快要…快要睡着了…呼……
Feels like I'm about to — *yawn* — fall asleep...
Go rest for a while on the sofa.
Ah...? But... the data bank... It hasn't been...
去三月七的房间里休息会儿吧。
Go rest for a while in March's room.
Uhh... I don't wanna cause her trouble...
And... the data bank... It hasn't been...
Lynx seems to have fallen asleep.
The Express is a bit too... warm.
Lynx seems to have fallen asleep.
前两天我在雪原里找到了这个……
I found this in the Snow Plains the other day...
You're welcome. I hope you like it.
没什么不好意思的，你就收下吧。
雪原里总能发现让人意外的东西…这就是极地探险的魅力所在。
You can always find something surprising in the Snow Plains... That's the charm of outdoor exploration.
如果你也有兴趣的话，我们下次叫上佩拉一起去吧。就像上次的露营一样……
If you're interested in going sometime, we could ask Pela to come too. It'll be just like the camping trip...
…不过，条件大概会比那时候艰苦得多——你要做好心理准备哦。
...But the conditions will probably be a lot worse this time around — you'll need to be ready.
I found this in the Snow Plains...
雪原里总能发现让人意外的东西…这就是极地探险的魅力所在。
You can always find something surprising in the Snow Plains... That's the charm of outdoor exploration.
如果你也有兴趣的话，我们下次叫上佩拉一起去吧。就像上次的露营一样……
If you're interested in going sometime, we could ask Pela to come too. It'll be just like the camping trip...
…不过，条件大概会比那时候艰苦得多——你要做好心理准备哦。
...But the conditions will probably be a lot worse this time around — you'll need to be ready.
我在下层区待了这么久，从来没幻想过太多——难以置信，我居然还能从这个角度远望家乡……
I've always lived in the Underworld and never ever imagined... I just can't believe I can look at my home from this angle...
这么看，我们住的这颗星球也不算很大嘛？
Say, our planet really isn't that big, is it?
…哦，就是近大远小的意思呗？这我懂！
...Oh, like how things look big when they get closer? I get that!
你们旅行了这么久，肯定去过比它大得多的地方吧？
You've been traveling for so long. Surely you've been to places way bigger than this?
This one is definitely not on the large side.
这么说，你们去过比它大得多的地方？
So you've been to places way bigger than this?
说出来你别不信，我小时候经常躲在老爹工坊的储物间里翻老画册。那些画册上净是些我从来没见过的地方——什么海啊，森林啊之类的。
Don't laugh, but I used to hide in the storage room in my dad's workshop and go through old picture books. They were full of places I'd never seen before — oceans, forests...
听说雅洛…啊不，应该是雅利洛-VI，对吧？听说雅利洛-VI以前不是白茫茫的一片，还有各种各样的地形跟自然环境。那些画面实在是神奇，靠我自己根本想象不出来。

I heard Jalo... Uhh I mean Jarilo — right? I heard Jarilo-VI didn't use to be all snowy like this, and it had all sorts of landscapes and natural environments. They are totally magical to me. I'd never have imagined it myself.
指望它变回以前的样子是不是不太现实？不过人总得有点梦想嘛，哈哈哈~
Maybe it's too unrealistic to wish it'd go back to the way it was, but it's good to have a dream, right? Hahaha~
噢，这话我爱听！虽然我也想去更有生机的地方看两眼，但那些地方毕竟不是自己的家乡，你说是吧？
Yeah, that's the spirit! I wanna see some places with a little more get up and go, y'know? Still, those places wouldn't be home.
…比如现在，我才刚来没一会儿，就已经有点怀念下层区空气的味道了。哈哈哈~
...Case in point, I've only been here for a while, but I'm already kinda missing the taste of the Underworld air. Hahaha!
要是能通过自己的双手，让雅利洛-VI回到鼎盛时的样子…想想就让人热血沸腾！
If I could find a way to turn the clock back on Jarilo-VI... Just thinking about it makes me excited!
宇宙旅行当然很有吸引力，不过我最想做的事…果然还是帮助自己身边的人，守护家园。
Space travel is pretty tempting, but what I wanna do most... is help the people around me and protect my home.
{NICKNAME}，来得正好！我正想给列车组提提意见呢。
{NICKNAME}, you're here right on time! I was about to give some feedback to the Express Crew.
这列车上的餐食，分量实在太小了！下层区条件最差的时候，也不见小吃摊老板这么抠抠搜搜的啊。
Uh... The portion sizes on the Express are too small! Things were pretty scarce in the Underworld, but the food stall owners were never this stingy.
也有可能是你食量太大…
Maybe you have a big appetite...
可能也有道理，毕竟搏击手每天的摄入可比普通人要大多了，哈哈哈。
Maybe that's true. A boxer does need to take in a lot more energy than the average person. Hahaha.
少量多餐是健康的吃法。
It's healthier to eat more meals in smaller amounts.
我反正不太习惯。吃饭嘛，就是要敞开肚皮才够劲！
I'm not really used to that. Eating is all about eating your fill!
还有…呃，我发现，列车长给的盒饭里总会掺些奇奇怪怪的蔬菜…不知道，反正我是吃不惯。
And, uhh... it seems like the conductor likes to include these weird vegetables in the lunches... I don't know what they are, but I don't like them.
哎，要不是为了保证营养摄入，我宁愿顿顿都点大宇宙炒饭……
*sigh* If I didn't have to worry about nutrition, I'd be ordering Cosmic Fried Rice every meal...
列车上的饭，分量也太少了！
The portion sizes on the Express are too small!
有机会的话，得把我的意见转告给列车长……
When I get the chance, I gotta give the conductor my feedback...
{NICKNAME}，我正在思考一件事，你听听有没有道理——
Hey {NICKNAME}, I was thinking about something. Hear it out and see if it makes sense —
你看，我这只机械手是下层区的工匠帮忙打造的，用上的技术在贝洛伯格也算尖端了。
See, my mechanical hand is made by the craftsmen in the Underworld. The techniques they used are the best in Belobog.
可我上了列车以后才发现，你们这儿日常用的普通设备，都比我以前见过的各种科技发明要先进多了！
But after I boarded the Express, I found out that even your most ordinary everyday equipment is way more advanced than any tech I've ever seen!
要是有可能的话…我是不是该找谁帮我改造下这只义手，让它更有威力？
I wonder... should I ask somebody here to modify my hand a bit and make it more powerful?
Like giving it a laser cannon?
有了大威力的武器，让我一次对付一百个裂界怪物都是小事一桩！
With such a powerful weapon, I'd be able to take on a hundred Fragmentum monsters at once!
搏击手不是只靠拳头吗…
Aren't boxers supposed to rely on their fists...?
哈哈哈，当然不是用在拳台上了。
Hahaha, of course I'm not gonna use it in the ring.
你想啊，如果能给这只手加上大威力的武器…那我一次应付一百个裂界怪物肯定都不成问题！
Just think about it. If I had a weapon that powerful in the palm of my hand, I could take on a hundred Fragmentum monsters at once!
很好，就这么决定了！我晚点就去找姬子小姐聊聊。
That's it then! Cool! I'll go chat with Himeko about this later.
…嗯？因为姬子小姐看上去就很懂武器，枪啊炮啊什么的。
...Why not? Seems like Himeko knows a lot about weapons — guns, cannons, you name it!
Uhh, that is unless you're thinking of a different Himeko?
如果有这么高级的技术……
If only such advanced tech were available...
晚点我就去找姬子小姐聊聊，看看她有没有什么改装机械手的建议。
I'll go chat with Himeko later and see if she has any advice about modifying my mechanical hand.
我一眼就能看出来，她对武器改装肯定特别在行！
I knew from the moment I saw her that she must be really good at modifying weapons!
{NICKNAME}！我想问问，列车上有训练室吗？
{NICKNAME}! Do you know if there's a training room on the Express?
…就是没有的意思？这可不行啊……
...So you don't have one? That won't do...
我看你们也经常要和险恶的敌人作战，不进行常规化的体能训练怎么行！
I figured you folks fight nasty enemies all the time. How can you not have regular physical training?
决定了，我要去和列车长提意见，给你们改造一间训练房出来！
I've decided. I'm gonna raise the issue with the conductor and get them to put together a training room for you!
你们应该经常要和险恶的敌人交战吧？为了能用最佳状态迎敌，常规化的体能训练可是必备项啊。
You folks fight nasty enemies all the time, right? You need to have regular physical training to stay in top form.
决定了，我要去和列车长提意见，给你们改造一间训练房出来！
I've decided. I'm gonna raise the issue with the conductor and get them to put together a training room for you!
我刚刚碰到三月七和丹恒了——之前只听说过他们跟你并肩作战的事，现在终于有机会见见本人了。
I just met March and Dan Heng — I'd heard about your adventures together but this is the first chance I got to meet them in the flesh.
真是两个有趣的家伙，哈哈哈！有他们陪着，旅途肯定不会无聊吧？
Interesting duo, haha! Guess they must keep you pretty entertained, huh?
我觉得你和三月七能合得来。
I thought you'd get along well with March 7th.

March has a lot of energy!

我觉得你和丹恒能做朋友。
I feel like you and Dan Heng could be good friends.
真的吗？我觉得他好像不太爱说话……

师傅和希儿都嫌我话痨，不知道丹恒小哥是不是也这么想？
My master and Seele both think that I talk too much. I wonder if Dan Heng thinks the same.
能跟这么有趣的人一起旅行，真是让人羡慕！
I'm jealous that you get to travel with such interesting people!
你可得好好珍惜自己的朋友啊，{NICKNAME}——糟了，我刚才的语气是不是跟奥列格师傅一模一样？
You should treasure your friends, {NICKNAME}... Uh-oh, am I starting to sound like master Oleg?
能跟三月和丹恒这么有趣的伙伴一起旅行，可真是让人羡慕。
I'm jealous that you get to travel with people as interesting as March and Dan Heng!
记得好好珍惜自己身边的朋友，{NICKNAME}！
我之前整理东西、翻箱倒柜的时候找到了些多余的物资，说不定对你们有用。
I found some extra supplies while I was tidying up — might be a help to you.
下层区最近太平得很，用不上这些东西。所以我寻思还不如分给列车组，指不定能派上些用场。
It's been pretty peaceful in the Underworld recently, so we don't have a lot of use for this stuff anymore. I figured I might as well share it all with the Express Crew.
既然列车组帮下层区渡过了劫难，那我也得尽力回馈你们才行。
Since the Express Crew helped the Underworld through such a tough time, I need to do my best to help you in return.
所谓朋友不就该这样吗？哈哈哈！
Isn't that what being friends is all about? Hahaha!
你们这列车上的风景竟还不错。本座久居这太卜司中，囿于洞天中虚假的星空，竟有些忘记了真实世界的壮丽。

The sights from this Express of yours are surprisingly pleasant. I've lived within the Divination Commission under the delve's artificial sky for so long that I'd somewhat forgotten the magnificence of the real world.
You're welcome to visit more often.
本座也时常想去那些遐方绝域，见识一下那些盛景。毕竟，世之奇伟瑰怪非常之观，常在于险远。
I hope to visit more of such marvelous places and to gaze upon such views with my own eyes... The most grandiose, astounding, and extraordinary vistas are often found in perilous and distant lands.
可惜罗浮一天也离不开我…就算想去哪里看看，他们也不愿放行吧。
It's a pity that the Luofu cannot part from me for even a day... Even if I wished to visit other lands, they probably wouldn't allow it.
这样说来，还要感谢你们…有时公务繁忙，还可以来这里躲个清闲…你们是仙舟的贵客，自也没人敢来这里找我。
I must thank you for this... I can come here to have some peace and quiet when my work gets too busy... You are esteemed guests on the Xianzhou — I doubt any would dare to pull me away.
这等方寸洞天，竟还有如此风景…真是不错，甚得我心。
Such a minute place, and yet such splendid scenery... just splendid.
这等方寸洞天，竟还有如此风景…真是不错，甚得我心。
Such a minute place, and yet such splendid scenery... just splendid.
不知不觉，本座竟与姬子闲谈了半日…
I didn't realize I'd spent half a day conversing with Himeko...
能与博学之人闲谈足足半日，真是人生的一大乐事。
It is indeed a pleasure to converse with such a knowledgeable peer for so long.
倒也没什么…和姬子谈了谈列车上引航系统的算法迭代。
Nothing too complex... we discussed upgrading the algorithms in the Express' navigation system.
我们都认为，当前的算法并非最优解，也都认为各自对阿僧祇连续统能做出更好的效果。
We agree that the current algorithms are sub-optimal, and that the Asamkhyeya Continuum can produce better results.
不过，在具体实施方案上，我们产生了一些分歧。
However, we had a difference of opinion regarding the execution.
姬子认为，采取宇宙际玛姬诺夫理论，可以迭代出最佳的优化模型。
Himeko thinks the Interstellar Maginov Theory can iterate the most perfect optimization model.
我倒是觉得，詹姆斯-真贺田体系本身就存在问题，以此为根基的形式体系也必然在可靠性上存在缺陷。
However, I feel the James-Magata System contains fundamental issues, causing any formal systems derived from it to inevitably contain irregularities.
最后我们决定在模拟机上测试一下…结果是，姬子设想的算法更为高效，可以大幅优化列车引航系统的计算精度。
We finally decided to test them on an emulator... It turns out Himeko's proposed calculations are more efficient, and will significantly improve the accuracy of the Express' navigational system.
从结论而言，是本座败了…不过真理嘛，并不在于口舌胜败。本座依然很满足。
As such, Himeko prevailed... But the truth isn't about winning or losing. I am content.
I didn't get any of that...
无妨，纯粹理性的乐趣所在，注定不为所有人理解。
No matter. It is the joy of pure logic, destined not to be comprehended by all.
I chatted with Himeko for hours...
纯粹理性的乐趣所在，注定不为所有人理解。
It is the joy of pure logic, destined not to be comprehended by all.
你们列车上那种域外的象棋，你玩过吗？
Have you tried the strange chess game you have here on the Express?
是吗？那我们可要找机会对弈一番了。
Really? Then we should have a match someday.
那并非仙舟象棋，规则却相差不大。列车长见本座对此有兴趣，便将规则传授于我。
It isn't Xianzhou chess, but the rules are similar. The conductor saw me expressing an interest and graciously decided to teach me.
说起仙舟象棋，本座可说是罗浮上的一等好手，能胜过我的不过寥寥数人。
Speaking of Xianzhou chess, I'm a bit of an expert — few on the Luofu could ever dream of defeating me.
但你们那位列车长，似乎也不是等闲之辈，与本座对弈数十局，竟是互有胜负。
But that conductor of yours is no ordinary player either. We played a dozen rounds and ended up in a stalemate.
我往后，大概会常来列车上下棋的……
Perhaps I should start making regular chess visits to the Express...
我往后，大概会常来列车上下棋的……
Perhaps I should start making regular chess visits to the Express...
方才同瓦尔特谈起游云天君，相互分享了很多颇为有趣的传说。
I was speaking with Mr. Yang about the Cloudstrider, and we shared many fascinating tales.
在仙舟联盟的民间故事中，有很多和游云天君有关的传说。游云天君造虹车、开星轨，遍行天宇、链接瀛寰。

There are many legends about the Cloudstrider in the Xianzhou Alliance's folktales. The Cloudstrider made a chromatic echelon, created the star rail, and traveled across the universe — connecting many worlds.
祂在银河各处都留下过关于自己的传说，但那些传说也大都真伪不明。
THEY left many legends throughout the galaxy... though such legends are bound to be contaminated by falsehoods.
游云天君曾将永燃的山火驱逐出地面，使地上的生灵免遭烈焰之苦。
The Cloudstrider once drove eternal wildfires from the ground, saving life on land from scorching heat.
当本座提起这个故事时，瓦尔特先生却说，在一个叫做「桑尔吉斯克」的地方也有类似的传说…阿基维利将永远在喷发的火山迁移到天上，拯救了万民。
When I spoke of this, Mr. Yang told me that a similar tale exists at a place called Sangiske... They believe Akivili moved a continuously erupting volcano into the heavens to save the people below.
这样一想，这段传说或许只是古人将自己星系中恒星的起源，附会到游云天君身上了吧。
Perhaps this legend was simply how ancient peoples accounted for the star in their planetary system — by attributing it to the Cloudstrider.
You learn something new every day.
这种事情，如果只听仙舟人的传说，或者只听桑尔吉斯克人的传说，恐怕永远也不能得出真相吧？
If one had heard only of the Xianzhou natives' legend, or the tale of the Sangiske people, it would be impossible to arrive at the truth.
真理往往在兼看兼听之中，若是只能看到自己眼前的东西，那便是播穅眯目，难见大江大河了。
Truth often lies in seeing and listening to other perspectives. When one sees only what is in front of them, they are blind to the bigger picture.
真理往往在兼看兼听之中，若是只能看到自己眼前的东西，那便是播穅眯目，难见大江大河了。
Truth often lies in seeing and listening to other perspectives. When one sees only what is in front of them, they are blind to the bigger picture.
说起来，无名客也是个劳神焦思、宵旰忧劳的营生啊…不如来试试本座平常喝的药茶吧？
Hmm, it would seem that being a Nameless is also a tiresome and difficult pursuit... Oh! You should try the herbal tea I like to drink.
毕竟是药茶，能好喝到哪儿去？虽说口味是比不上你们列车上的饮品，但效用可是一等一的。
Have you tried any herbal tea that tastes good? It may not be as palatable as the drinks on the Express, but its efficacy is peerless.
待本座把配方说与你听…这可是我从丹鼎司讨来的秘方，你最好拿笔记一下。
Let me impart the recipe to you... This is a recipe I specifically acquired from the Alchemy Commission. It's best if you put it down on paper.
上好的狩原毛峰一两、波月莲子三钱、伏冬桑两钱、鳄蝽蜕一钱、草木灰少许。
One tael of top-tier Hunter Maofeng tea, three maces of lunarescent lotus seeds, two maces of frost mulberries, one mace of shed crocbug skin, and a pinch of plant ash.
然后加水，加糖，糖要加到…加到茶水里再也溶不进一粒糖为止。
Then, add water and sugar until the water is so saturated that not a single grain of sugar can be dissolved further.
不多不多。一是糖分可以快速让大脑恢复活力，二是这个方子颇为苦涩，不放那么多糖，实在是难以入口……
No, no — glucose can rapidly revitalize the brain. Furthermore, this recipe is quite bitter. Frankly, the tea is hard to swallow unless it has that much sugar...
你按这个方子先调一杯。要是喝不惯…那便是糖的问题。本座下次给你带仙舟的糖粉来。
You should at least try making one cup. If you don't like the flavor... then it must be the sugar. I'll bring some Xianzhou powdered sugar next time.
Do you need the herbal tea recipe?
你按这个方子先调一杯。要是喝不惯…那便是糖的问题。本座下次给你带仙舟的糖粉来。
You should at least try making one cup. If you don't like the flavor... then it must be the sugar. I'll bring some Xianzhou powdered sugar next time.
罗浮横遭大难，本与星穹列车无关，但列车组还是仗义相助，帮罗浮安然渡过此劫。蒙受了星穹列车这么大的恩情，却一直没来得及答谢你们。

The sudden catastrophe that the Luofu suffered was unrelated to the Astral Express, yet your Crew gallantly provided assistance and helped us through this trial. The Astral Express has helped us so much, but I still haven't managed to thank you.
正巧，最近本座听闻有个商会进口了几块上好的宝石，便收入囊中。今次就将这几块宝石赠予你，权当是答谢了。
It just happens that I heard a merchant guild recently imported some premium precious stones, and I proceeded to acquire them. I would like to gift them to you today to show my gratitude.
诗曰：「无瑕胜玉美，至洁过冰清。」这宝石与你，最是相配不过了。
It is said that nothing is as impeccable as green jadeite, and nothing is as pure as white jade. These precious stones are a fitting gift for you.
I haven't had the chance to thank you...
诗曰：「无瑕胜玉美，至洁过冰清。」这宝石与你，最是相配不过了。
It is said that nothing is as impeccable as green jadeite, and nothing is as pure as white jade. These precious stones are a fitting gift for you.
唷！是{NICKNAME}呀~这是我第一次造访星穹列车，怎么不见你带我四处转转？这可不符合无名客的待客之道啊~
Hey! {NICKNAME}! It's my first time on the Astral Express. I've heard quite a bit about the hospitality of the Nameless. Shouldn't you be showing me around?
哎呀，我就开个玩笑，你别露出那副表情嘛。
Ahh, I'm just messing with you — lighten up!
You seem quite at home already.
还是被你看出来了~咱们都是熟人了，相互之间也不必太客气，是吧？
Haha, so you've noticed. Well, we're hardly strangers, better to skip the formalities, right?
要说登上过这趟星穹列车的公司员工，我肯定不是第一个。据说「开拓」阿基维利还在世的那会儿，公司和无名客之间还有不少往来合作。
I'm definitely not the first IPC staff member to board the Astral Express. I've heard that the IPC and the Nameless cooperated frequently when Akivili the Trailblazer was still around.
我还听说，董事会甚至考虑过花大价钱包下星穹列车，让它成为公司业务的一环…但所有的提议都被果断拒绝了。
I've also heard that the board once considered spending a fortune to buy out the Astral Express and to make it part of their business... However, all their offers were quickly declined.
偷偷告诉你哦，我觉得拒绝很明智。
Just between you and me, I think declining the offers was a smart choice.
对这个宇宙而言，资本必不可少——但假如世界上所有的事物都被资本收进囊中，那这个故事就一点都不浪漫了…你说是吧？
Capital definitely plays a critical role in the universe... but if everything in the world revolved around it, then life would be a lot less romantic... don't you think?
So this is what the inside of the Astral Express looks like...
话说回来，上车需要办什么手续吗？签合同？交押金？保证书总有吧？
Say, aren't there any forms to fill out for boarding the express? No contract to be signed? How about a deposit? Tsk, at least tell me there's a guarantee...
…都没有？嚯，有趣…纯粹建立在「私人信用」之上的合作关系，居然能开展得如此顺利…真不简单！
Nothing...? Hmm, interesting... So it's all based on interpersonal credit? Huh, I'm amazed everything runs on something so fragile!
欸，{NICKNAME}，我问你，星穹列车上是不是种了「镰叶紫菀草」？
Hey, {NICKNAME}, are there any Asters on the Astral Express?
对哦，一般的乘客也不会特别关注身边的绿植是什么品种的…算啦~
Hmm, I suppose most passengers don't pay much attention to the plant life around them... Never mind⁓
咳，算啦算啦，看表情就知道，你对这事完全没了解~
Ahem, never mind. I can tell from the look on your face that you have no idea what I'm talking about.
告诉你吧，「镰叶紫菀草」会散发出一种特别的气味，人类的鼻子几乎察觉不到。但账账对这种气味特别敏感——瞧！
Asters are a type of plant that release a unique scent — barely noticeable to humans. However, Numby is extremely sensitive to it — look!
我听专家说，对于特定的生物而言，这种植物散发的味道就像一大锅被熬化的蜜糖，一般的小动物根本把持不住。
The experts say that to certain creatures, the scent these plants release is like a big pot of caramelized honey. Most small creatures lose their minds over it.
但是「镰叶紫菀草」的叶片其实含有剧烈的神经毒素，假如有动物循着味道来到它的面前，然后咬上一口它的叶片……
The bad side is that Aster leaves actually contain an extremely strong neurotoxin. If an animal were to find one by following its scent and take a bite of it...
哎呀，真是恶毒的植物啊~账账，你可不许乱吃东西哦？
Ah! What a terrible plant! Numby, don't eat anything you're not supposed to, okay!?
Numby, behave! Don't keep running around~
真的有人会在车厢里种「镰叶紫菀草」吗？胆子可真大啊~
Is someone really growing Asters on the Express? That's quite a bold thing to do!
我盯着你呢，账账！可不许乱吃东西哦。
I have my eyes on you, Numby! Make sure you don't eat anything you're not supposed to.
这里实在太无聊了，我正在练习心算打发时间~正好，要不你来出题考我吧？越难越好。
I'm getting so bored here that I've started practicing mental math to pass the time... Since you're here, why don't you test me? Make it a hard one.
是要拿他们俩的可爱指数来计算吗？那这道题也太难了，我可算不出啊~

Huh? Hmm, we'd have to assign them both a numerical value based on a shared characteristic, like... cuteness? But in that case, we'd be talking astronomical values... Ugh, this one's too hard — I can't do it!
还是问我道正经的数学题吧。
Can we go with a normal math question?
这题够简单的，你还挺懂手下留情的嘛？
These are so easy. You really are gentle with people, aren't you?
来，再考我一道题吧，这次多上点强度~
Come on! One more — and make it challenging!
What is the fifth root of <unbreak>28,629,151</unbreak>?
What is C5H9NO4 the molecular formula of?
等会儿等会儿，你这分明是化学题吧？
Hold on a second... That's obviously a chemistry problem.
答案我倒是知道啦——「谷氨酸」，对吧？
...but that doesn't stop me from knowing the answer! It's glutamic acid, isn't it?
有点意思！能一下想出这么有趣的题目，看来你也不是等闲之辈嘛？
This is fun! I'm impressed by your ability to come up with such interesting questions on the spot!
很久没遇上像你这么有趣的人了。下次有机会，我们再好好交流交流~
I haven't met anyone as interesting as you for a while. We should talk more when we get another chance!
有句话是怎么说的来着…哦对了，「学好数理化，入职公司都不怕！」
What was that saying again...? Oh, right, "Math, physics, and chemistry are your key to the future!"
哪怕已经进入职场了，也不要忘记持续学习哦~
Don't forget to continue learning new stuff even after you've found a job!
{NICKNAME}，列车上有吃的吗？账账好像有点饿了。
{NICKNAME}, is there any food on the Express? I think Numby's hungry.
哎呀，看来账账不太喜欢这个呢……
Hmm, afraid Numby's not a fan...
我还是带它去餐车吧…走了，账账~
I'm just gonna take them to the dining carriage... Let's go, Numby!
Feed Numby Hard Chip of Nihility.
喔，看来账账很喜欢这个哦！
Oh? Seems like Numby really likes that!
不过它好像还没吃饱…我还是带它去餐车吧。走了，账账~
Still looks kinda hungry, though... I'm just gonna take them to the dining carriage. Let's go, Numby!
我还是带它去餐车吧…走了，账账~
I'm just gonna take them to the dining carriage... Let's go, Numby!
话说回来，餐车在哪来着……
By the way... Where's the dining carriage?
(Seems like Topaz is on the phone...)
…啊？你说什么？开盘就跌了百分之十五？
Huh...? Are you serious? <unbreak>15%</unbreak> drop on opening?
吁…有鬼。别急，等我先派人去了解下情况。
Hmm... strange. Don't worry, I'll have someone check it out.
杰奇，能听见吗？帮我打电话给理事长……
Jackie, can you hear me? I need you to call the chairman for me...
哎呀，当然是图拉斯制药的卡洛斯理事长！别问这么业余的问题好不好？
Ugh! Chairman Carlos of Tulas Pharmaceuticals, obviously! Knock it off with the amateur questions!
…「翡翠」找我？请她稍等，我5分钟后联系她。
...Jade is looking for me? I'll contact her in five minutes.
…巴里也有事？让他转备用线路，我现在有急事处理，晚点再回。
Barry needs me too...? Put him on another line — I have something urgent to take care of. I'll contact him later.
Market hiccup — don't worry about it.
(Having a job at the IPC sure is a lot of work...)
{NICKNAME}, come here! Hurry! I have something for you!
为了感谢星穹列车一直以来对我们业务的鼎力支持，「战略投资部」决定赠送给各位一样礼物。
As a gesture of appreciation for the Astral Express' continuous support for our business, the Strategic Investment Department has prepared a gift for the Crew.
拿着吧，别客气~处理客户关系最重要的一点，就是要学会礼尚往来——希望诸位未来也能继续支持我们的工作！
There's no need to be modest! The most important thing about consumer relations is the bond between us. I hope everyone will continue to support our work in the future!
What's important is reciprocation in kind...
你们的下一个目的地是哪？要是我正好有同事在那儿，我可以提前帮各位打声招呼，好好招待下你们。
Where are you guys headed next? If a colleague of mine happens to be there, I can give them a heads-up and have them show you guys around.
别有负担，这都是最寻常的礼节，算不上卖人情。公司也不是人人都那么功利啦~
That's what friends are for — don't be a stranger. Not everyone in the IPC is driven by pure ambition, y'know⁓
谢谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}。我在这里可以暂时忘掉繁杂的政务，还能欣赏到如此美妙的星空…我很满足。
Thank you for inviting me, {NICKNAME} — I'll be able to get away from the complexities of politics here. Being surrounded by these beautiful stars... it's such a joy.
虽然一起经历了这么多，但其实我对星穹列车的背景还知之甚少。有机会的话，我很想多来做几次客。
Although we've been through so much together, I actually know very little about the Astral Express. I'd like to start visiting more frequently if the opportunity arises.
我其实也不太了解列车…
I actually don't know much about the Express either...
这样吗？嗯，说的也是…就像三月，她似乎并不记得自己的过去——列车组的各位，感觉背景都相当神秘呢。
Really? Hmm, I suppose you wouldn't... That reminds me of March — she can't remember her past. Feels like everyone in the Express Crew has a mysterious background.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。希望我能有时间多多了解列车上的各位。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Hopefully, I'll have more time to get to know the Crew.
我很喜欢盯着这窗外的宇宙看。这景象既迷幻又深邃，还夹杂着些许浪漫。
I really enjoy staring out into the universe. What a vast, mesmerizing, romantic view.
可能的话，我希望有朝一日，贝洛伯格的孩子们也能像我一样，近距离地感受星空。
I hope that one day the children of Belobog will have the same opportunity to witness the stars up close.
{NICKNAME}，有事的话就尽管去忙吧？不用在意我，我只想再多看一会儿这外面的景色。
{NICKNAME}, please, don't mind me. Feel free to go about your business. I think I'll stay here and enjoy the view a while longer.
战士，冒险家，大守护者…同一片星空之下，我们人类扮演着各自的角色，过着各自的人生。
Warriors, adventurers, supreme guardians — we all gaze upon the same stars, the same sky... each with our own roles to play, our own independent lives to live.
我们为了生存所付出的努力，或许微小…但绝不卑微。
The work we put in to survive may seem small in the grand scheme of things... but that doesn't mean it's not important.
{NICKNAME}，刚才，姬子小姐给了我一杯饮品……
{NICKNAME}, Himeko gave me something to drink just now...
她说这是星穹列车特供的「咖啡」。我尝了一小口，感觉稍微有些……
She said it's coffee — an Astral Express specialty. I tried a sip, but it's a little...
唔…是有些苦，还有些…奇妙的酸味。
Um... It's a little bitter... and a little sour...
唔，看来我还是缺乏经验……
Mm... looks like I still have a lot to learn...
实话说，我从小到大从来没有喝过「咖啡」。
I'll be honest — I'd never had coffee before.
据说贝洛伯格曾经很流行这种饮品。但自从寒潮来临之后，能够种植咖啡豆的土壤就变得越来越稀有了。
I heard this drink was once very popular in Belobog. However, the advent of the Eternal Freeze brought harsh conditions, and the soil necessary to grow the coffee beans became extremely rare.
再到后来，咖啡几乎完全从市面上消失了——只有极少数地下渠道才能拿到货源。听说一些贪心的黑商会把劣质的咖啡豆炒至天价……

As a result, coffee beans became a rare sight — now you can only procure them if you have the right connections. I've even heard the tales of greedy merchant guilds driving up the cost of substandard coffee beans...
不得不说，如果这就是「咖啡」的味道…那我还挺同情那些花大价钱买新鲜的人的。
I have to admit, if this is the taste of coffee... I can't help but feel sorry for those who shell out a fortune for it.
这不是咖啡该有的样子…
This isn't how coffee should be...
咳，我明白了，看来这是你们列车组的共识…放心吧，我不会声张的。
Ahem... I understand. Looks like the Crew have similar feelings... Don't worry, I won't tell anyone.
咖啡本就苦涩，就像人生…
Coffee is supposed to be bitter, like life...
那个，{NICKNAME}…这杯咖啡我有点喝不下去了。但我不想惹姬子小姐不快，你能不能……
{NICKNAME}... I don't think I can get through this whole cup of coffee, but I don't want to hurt Himeko's feelings. Would you mind—
I didn't even finish what I was saying...
Hold your nose and chug it!
*sigh* Alright then, give me a moment to mentally prepare myself.
你能做到的，布洛妮娅…你一定可以……
You can do this, Bronya... You can do this...
不过是杯咖啡而已…布洛妮娅，你一定能做到的……
It's just a cup of coffee... I got this...
这点困难都克服不了的话，还当什么大守护者——呃啊，好苦……
How can you call yourself a supreme guardian if you can't overcome a cup of coffee? Ugh, it's so bitter...
{NICKNAME}，我想请教你一件事——为什么星穹列车的车厢内部这么温暖？
I want to ask you about something, {NICKNAME}. Why are the Astral Express' cars so warm?
得感谢强大的供暖系统。
It's all thanks to the powerful heating system.
真好啊。能在这么温暖的环境下生活，一定是件很幸福的事。
Amazing. It must be wonderful to live in such warmth.
可能是「开拓」之力在起作用。
It might be the power of the Trailblaze at work.
是借助了星神的力量吗？原来如此……
So it's the power of the Aeon? I see...
贝洛伯格也有一套自己的供暖系统，但上至克里珀堡、下至磐岩镇的诊所，室内的温度总是难以维持恒定。
Belobog has a heating system of its own. However, maintaining a steady indoor temperature has always been a challenge, no matter if it's Qlipoth Fort or the Boulder Town clinic.
如何在不透支地髓资源的前提下解决供暖问题，这是我首先想要攻破的课题之一。我和希露瓦聊过了，未来由她来主要负责……

One of the problems I want to solve is tackling the heating issue without exhausting Geomarrow reserves. I've discussed this with Serval — she'll be the one responsible for handling this matter in future...
…抱歉，话题一下又拐到工作上去了。我该听取你们的意见，让自己放松一下。
Sorry, I'm talking about work again... I should take your advice and try to relax a little.
我这就小睡一会儿…就一会儿。
I'm going to take a nap... just a quick one.
{NICKNAME}，我借机翻看了一下列车智库里的数据，希望你们不会介意。
{NICKNAME}, I took the opportunity to look through the Express' data bank. I hope you guys don't mind.
里面记录的内容给了我很大的冲击…贝洛伯格的很多筑城者都认为，世界上只有克里珀一位神明——很显然，他们的结论是片面的。
What I saw surprised me... A good number of the Architects in Belobog believe that Qlipoth is the one and only Aeon... It's clear that their conclusion was limited and lacking in perspective.
原来这个宇宙间真的有那么多伟大且神秘的存在…和祂们相比，我们真的如雪花般脆弱、渺小。
I didn't know there were so many great and mysterious beings in the universe... It goes to show just how tiny and fragile we really are.
那些记录不禁让我想起了母亲说过的话：由人类建立起来的文明真的能对抗神明的意志吗？我觉得……
These records remind me of something my mother once said to me — "Can civilizations built by humans really stand against the will of gods?"
We must take a stand, even if it's futile.
Such feats are impossible for humans.
你是这么想的吗？原来如此……
Is that how you feel? I see...
不管怎样，我们都必须继续脚踏实地地生活下去…相比藏在宇宙深处的古老存在，大部分人还是更在乎下一顿饭的着落。
Whatever the case, we must continue living, one step at a time... Most people are doing their best to survive — they have no time to ponder ancient beings hidden in the universe.
我只是希望——假如像星核那样的灾难还要再重来一次——到了那个关头，我们能做好应对的准备。
I just hope that if a disaster such as the Stellaron crisis were to happen again, we'd all be prepared for it.
星神，命途，派系…这些概念如此遥远，却又切实存在。
Aeons, Paths, and factions... These concepts all feel so distant to me, yet their existence cannot be denied.
不知道在过去的这<unbreak>700</unbreak>年里，「存护」克里珀有没有看过我们一眼呢……
I wonder if Qlipoth, the Preservation, has ever glanced at us in the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years — even for a second.
{NICKNAME}，关于列车长，我有一件事想问你……
{NICKNAME}, I have something I'd like to ask about the conductor...
Why don't you ask Pom-Pom directly?
呃…我只是不想冒犯到它。
Uh... I wouldn't want to offend them, but um...
我想问的是，帕姆它…究竟是学会了人类语言的兔子，还是被变成了兔子的人？
What I'd like to know... is Pom-Pom a rabbit that learned to speak...? Or a person that was turned into a rabbit?
真是这样？我还以为我猜错了。
Really? So my guess was correct.
Really? Seems like I got it wrong, then...
They're not a human or a rabbit.
也就是说，帕姆就是…帕姆？真神奇。
So that means Pom-Pom is just... Pom-Pom? Fascinating.
其实我也没见过真正的兔子，只是在书本里看到过资料和插图。第一眼见到帕姆的时候，我就在想……
Actually, I've never seen a rabbit in real life, I've only seen pictures and read about them in books. So when I first saw Pom-Pom, I thought...
…咳，没什么。{NICKNAME}，麻烦你，请别把我们之间这段对话告诉帕姆…好吗？
Ahem... never mind. {NICKNAME}, please don't tell Pom-Pom about this conversation... Okay?
学会了人类语言的兔子…被变成了兔子的人？
A rabbit that learned to speak...? Or a person that was turned into a rabbit?
…啊，别在意。我只是在自言自语。
Ah... don't mind me. I'm just talking to myself.
{NICKNAME}，又见面了。我给列车组准备了一件礼物，想想还是直接交到你手上比较合适。
{NICKNAME}, I've prepared a gift for the Crew. I feel that it'd be most appropriate if you held onto it.
你们帮助贝洛伯格挺过了一次又一次危机，我们实在无以为报。这只是一点小小的谢礼，希望你们能感受到蕴含其中的心意。
You all have saved Belobog from danger time and time again. We don't have much, but we'd like to say thank you with this small gesture.
以贝洛伯格目前拥有的力量，想要帮上无名客的忙，恐怕还遥不可及…但我仍旧希望有一天，能成为各位的后盾。
With what power Belobog currently holds, we are far from being able to assist the Nameless... However, I do hope that one day we can provide you with reliable support.
嗨，{NICKNAME}！多谢你的邀请。这车窗外的景象可不是人人都能欣赏得到的，真令人激动！
Hey, {NICKNAME}! Thanks for the invite, I'm so excited! This view isn't something you see every day!
你们每天就是像这样踩着银河，在太空里旅行吗？真厉害…怪不得列车组的人个个都见多识广。
So, you guys travel across the galaxy and journey through space like this every day? That's so cool... No wonder everyone on the Express is so knowledgeable.
哈？这么谦虚干嘛，这可不像你。
Huh? Not like you to be modest.
…夸你两句怎么还喘上了？哈哈哈，开个玩笑，这种回答才像你嘛。
*sigh* You really like a compliment, don't you... Haha, just kidding — that's exactly what I thought you'd say.
虽然我还没亲身经历过，但我觉得，任谁都没法拒绝一场完整的太空旅行吧？
I've yet to experience it myself, but no one in their right mind would turn down a chance to journey through space.
登上列车算是个小小的开始，不知道我以后还有没有机会前往宇宙深处——毕竟我答应了布洛妮娅跟娜塔她们，要继续守护下层区，振兴贝洛伯格……

Boarding the Express is just one small step — I don't know if I'll ever get the chance to travel the depths of the universe... After all, I did promise Bronya and Nat that I'd continue to protect the Underworld and help rebuild Belobog...
但对于虎克和克拉拉这样的小孩子来说，是不是还有希望？他们说不定能代表贝洛伯格，重新投入太空的怀抱！
Still, I bet there's still a chance for kids like Hook and Clara, right? Who knows, maybe they'll be able to represent Belobog as it returns to the arms of the universe!
我很羡慕你们，{NICKNAME}。要不是还有职责在身，我可能还想再多待一会儿。
I'm envious of you guys, {NICKNAME}. If it weren't for my duties, I'd really like to stay here a little longer.
下次见了——你还会再邀请我上车的，对吧？
I'll see you next time — you'll invite me back, right?
…我还没说是什么呢，别着急啊。
...Hold your horses. I haven't said anything yet.
等再过几年——或是几十年——贝洛伯格的天气稳定下来，我一定要给布洛妮娅提个建议：在贝洛伯格修一条铁道。
Perhaps in a few years... or maybe a few decades... When Belobog's weather stabilizes, I'll suggest that Bronya construct a railway in the city.
然后我们还要造一辆…不对，是好几辆列车，模子就照着星穹列车来做。
Then we'll build a... No, we'll build a whole lot of them — trains that look just like the Astral Express.
等寒潮消退，能供人们活动的区域会越来越大，这条铁道也会越修越长。总有一天，它会串联起很多个城市，贝洛伯格只是其中的一座。
When the Eternal Freeze finally lifts, people will be able to get around more easily, and the railway will expand. One day, it'll connect different cities — not just Belobog.
光是想想就让人激动！我猜大伙儿肯定会喜欢这个计划的。
It's exciting just thinking about it! I'm sure everyone will love the idea.
话说回来，我只是突然有了这个点子，至于具体该怎么实现还完全没有头绪。
It was just a random idea that popped into my head — I've no idea how to actually implement it.
是不是该去问下希露瓦？史瓦罗说不定也可以……
Maybe I should go talk to Serval? Svarog might be able to help, too...
{NICKNAME}, c'mere! I've got something to ask you!
你们的列车长，帕姆，它喜欢什么样的食物？雪萝卜？野菜？还是说……
Pom-Pom, the conductor — what kind of food do they like? Do they like snow radish? Herbs? Or maybe...
I don't like either of those.
Ha? What's it got to do with you?
我对着百科研究了很久，还是没搞明白帕姆到底是哪种生物。不过…会说话的动物应该也不多见吧……
I've been researching Pom-Pom in the encyclopedia for ages, but I still can't figure out what species they are. Then again, there aren't many species of talking animal...
…呃，你那是什么眼神？别小看我，我也是会翻资料的！
...Hey, what's with that look? I know how to do research too, okay!?
哼，我一定要在你们之前查清帕姆的身份，摸清它的喜好——瞧好吧！
Hmph, I'll figure out what Pom-Pom is and what they like before you do! Just you wait!
为啥帕姆一直不理我呢？
可恶，我不想被当成空气啊……
Grr, they're treating me like a ghost...
{NICKNAME}，刚才三月带我去她的房间逛了逛。
{NICKNAME}, March just showed me her room.
真是个温暖的小窝啊，你们列车组的生活真是幸福。我也参考参考，等以后过上好日子了，把房间重新装饰一下。
It's super cozy — you guys really have it good on the Express. When things get better, I'm gonna redesign my room and use the Express' style as inspiration.
唔，想试试看…不过三月的房间可能…过于粉嫩了点。
Mm, I'd like to give it a try... March's room, on the other hand... a little too pink and cute for my liking.
March's room could use more pink.
呃…那倒不必，毕竟我和三月的风格也不一样……
Uh-uh, I think you mean "less." There's no way my room's ever gonna be that color...
总之！不管房间怎么布设，有一件事我已经下定决心了——我也要搞一个等身的帕姆玩偶。
Regardless of the design, I've decided on one thing — a life-size Pom-Pom doll!
它好软，好——咳咳，没什么，你别介意……
Pom-Pom's so soft, and fluffy, and... Ahem! What were you saying?
帕姆的玩偶…能拜托娜塔帮我缝一个吗？
I wonder if Nat would be able to make a Pom-Pom doll for me...?
I'll ask her about it next time.
雅利洛-Ⅵ，从这里看过去就只有这么大……
贝洛伯格就更加渺小了，从车上甚至完全看不到……
Belobog is even smaller... I can barely even see it from the Express...
这宇宙，还真是大得吓人啊。
The universe is so vast — it's scary...
的确，美得惊人…但也有些让人脊背发凉。
You're right, it's breathtaking... but it also sends a bit of a chill down my spine.
的确，有些让人脊背发凉…但同时也美得惊人。
Brr, it sends a chill down my spine... but it's also magnificent.
这么多的星星，它们到底是在为了谁发光呢？
So many stars... Who are they shining for?
想不明白，估计这辈子都想不明白了。不过也无所谓——对我来说，过好每一天，活出自己想要的样子，这才是最重要的事。
I can't understand it, and maybe I never will. It doesn't matter though — making the best of every single day and living life the way I want to is what's important.
等到我们真的有时间停下来休息了，再坐下来一起思考和星星有关的事吧。
I guess once things settle down, I can spare a moment to contemplate the stars.
过好每一天，活出自己想要的样子——对我来说，这是眼下最重要的事。
Making the best of every single day and living life the way I want to — those are the most important things to me.
等到我们真的有时间停下来休息了，再坐下来一起思考和星星有关的事吧。
I guess once things settle down, I can spare a moment to contemplate the stars.
{NICKNAME}，有空吗？我…我从贝洛伯格给列车组带了些小礼物，你能代大家收下吗？
{NICKNAME}, are you free right now? I, umm... I brought some presents from Belobog to give to the Crew. Could you take them on their behalf?
咳…不好意思，我不太擅长这个。就当是为了报答你们准备的一点小心意吧…不是什么特别贵重的东西，你可别嫌弃。
Ahem... I'm sorry, I'm not very good at this. This is just a little something to say thank you. Nothing expensive — I hope you don't mind.
我在想，这宇宙里是不是还有很多其它世界，处境和我们类似，甚至更糟……
I wonder... how many other worlds are out there in the universe? Are they going through the same struggles as us? Perhaps they're facing even greater challenges...?
他们说不定也在等着列车到来呢。这么一想，你们肩上的包袱也很重啊，对吧？
Maybe they're also waiting for the Express to arrive. You guys really carry a lot of weight on your shoulders, don't you?
Some things must be seen to be believed...
果真是百闻不如一见。列车比神策府有趣多了。
Some things must be seen to be believed. The Express is so much more interesting than the Seat of Divine Foresight...
当时听闻传说中游云天君的虹车抵达罗浮，我心说无论怎样都得偷闲来瞧瞧。只是先前公务繁忙，抽不开身。眼下难得有空，便不请自来了，诸位莫要见怪。

When I heard that the Cloudstrider's legendary chromatic echelon had arrived at the Luofu, I knew I'd have to sneak over and take a look for myself... a pity that official matters prevented me for so long. I hope my unannounced visit won't cause you any trouble.
It's not as grand as the Seat of Divine Foresight.
哈哈，神策府的陈设初见之下确有几分雄阔肃杀的意思。但我看神策府，神策府看我，翻来覆去看上几百年，怕是都互生倦怠了。
Haha, the Seat of Divine Foresight may seem imposing at first, but having stared at it — and it back at me — for hundreds of years... we've grown rather tired of one another.
从这儿远眺，仿佛能洗去胸中尘埃，不觉为之一快。
It feels as if the heart and mind are wiped clean when looking into the distance from here. How refreshing.
对了，我此次是以私人身份前来拜会丹恒，还有列车上的诸位。若有什么我要遵守的规矩，{NICKNAME}记得告诉我。
I forgot to mention — this is a personal visit to see Dan Heng — and everyone else on the Express. If there are any rules that I should follow, do let me know, {NICKNAME}.
把这儿当家就好，将军请随意。
Just make yourself at home, general.
既是私人身份，还叫什么「将军」，叫我景元就好。
Haha, this is a personal visit — no need for formalities. Call me Jing Yuan.
以后得空，我想能常来坐坐，与各位闲谈。{NICKNAME}，你到时候该不会嫌我烦吧，哈哈！
I very much enjoy our idle conversations here... I hope to start visiting more frequently, when my schedule allows. Haha, you won't find me to be a bother, will you, {NICKNAME}?
Such a natural state of composure is rare — even on the Xianzhou... Inspiring...
这种浑然天成的松弛感，就连仙舟上也不多见，真是难得……
Such a natural state of composure is rare — even on the Xianzhou... Inspiring...
State of composure? What do you mean?
就是一种气定神闲的状态，看上去无忧无虑，但你知道对方胸有成竹，定有一番担当。
It is a state of being relaxed while maintaining a focused mind. The individual may look carefree, but they harbor a constant readiness.
那个人？哦…你是指，我方才说的有松弛感的那位？
Who? Oh... you mean the state of composure?
说来有些冒昧了，不过我观察了你们这位列车长许久，觉得它颇有些不凡之处。
I hope they won't take offense, but I have taken notice of your conductor — I find them to be extraordinary.
Pom-Pom? They're a little extraordinary, I guess.
确实。不过我想，「可爱」只是它的某个侧面。
...Yes, indeed. However, cuteness is but one of many admirable attributes.
列车要规划路线，检查设备情况，又要照顾诸位的起居，迎接像我这样的客人……
The Express must plan its routes, maintain its equipment, attend to the daily needs of its passengers, and receive guests, of course...
而看车厢这井井有条的模样，便知这些工作列车长信手拈来。它不急不慢的样子，不正是我说的「松弛感」吗？

From the orderly condition of the carriages alone, it is plain to see that the conductor is masterful in their responsibilities. Their calm demeanor is precisely the state of composure I am talking about.
突然对帕姆心生敬意了！
I've suddenly developed a new respect for Pom-Pom!
可爱的外表下兼具实力！
Cute and capable, all at once!
若时间允许，我想和列车长聊一聊，听它讲讲列车管理中的种种趣事。
If we have time, I would like to speak with the conductor and listen to their experiences of managing the Express.
若时间允许，我想和列车长聊一聊，听它讲讲列车管理中的种种趣事。
If we have time, I would like to speak with the conductor and listen to their experiences of managing the Express.
身为无名客，却与列车无缘……
It is a shame that, as a Nameless, her path never crossed with the Astral Express.
身为无名客，却与星穹列车无缘，实在可惜。要是她能登上这架列车，该多好啊……
It is a shame that, as a Nameless, her path never crossed with the Astral Express. It would be wonderful if she were aboard...
A Nameless whose path never crossed with the Astral Express?
不知镜流是否向你提起过，我们曾有位共同的故友和你们一样，也是无名客。
I'm unsure if Jingliu has ever mentioned this to you, but we had a mutual friend who was a Nameless, just like you.
一位故友，不知镜流是否向你提起过，那是许多年前的事了……
An old friend. I'm not sure if Jingliu has ever mentioned her to you — it was many years ago...
曜青仙舟的狐人中不乏到处探险考察的飞行世家。其中最有名的当属我这位朋友的家系。
The foxians of the Xianzhou Yaoqing are known for their adventuring flying families. The most renowned of these families was that of our mutual friend's.
其父母亲眷都是著作等身的学者与冒险家。她自诩承接了「无名客」的精神，以遍游星海胜景为志向，还著有一本知名游记。
Her parents were established scholars and adventurers, and she naturally inherited the spirit of the Nameless to travel and see the stars. She even has a famous travelogue in her name.
星穹列车的名头，我最初正是从她那儿听来的。只可惜，她游览千星，却无缘登上无名客心中的圣地，列车。
I first heard about the Astral Express from her. It is a shame that, in her travels to thousands of stars, she never had the opportunity to board the Express — the sacred place of the Nameless.
是我唐突了，尽说些陈年旧事，坏了气氛。
Ahem... All my talk of former days is rather spoiling the atmosphere. My apologies.
{NICKNAME}，我也很期待你将来能写下你们的旅程游记，到时候，记得让我看看。
{NICKNAME}, I hope you too will be able to make a travelogue of your own and include your experiences. I would love to read it.
我也很期待你将来能写下你们的旅程游记，到时候，记得让我看看。
I hope you too will be able to make a travelogue of your own and include your experiences. I would love to read it.
列车上的布设我很喜欢。
I am very fond of the furnishings on the Express.
列车上的布设我很喜欢。这些物件，想来是花了不少心思布置的，不知是谁的手笔？
I am very fond of the furnishings on the Express — it is apparent that whoever decorated the train truly put their heart into it. I wonder who it was?
想不到列车长的品味竟如此细腻……
I see. I am truly impressed by the attention to detail and taste of the conductor...
大家按各自喜好来布置的…
It was decorated by everyone according to their own preferences...
原来是诸位齐心协力的结果。
So this is a product of teamwork.
你看这沙发料子软和，若是在留声机里放一阙调子缓慢的小曲，再配上一壶鳞渊春，几块白云酥……

如此高卧不起，看辰宿流转，星汉明灭，放任一天流逝。真是再美妙不过的事情了。

I wonder what Dan Heng's getting up to lately...
未来在列车前行的路上若是遇到了难处，别忘了罗浮永远是诸位的避风港。

Welcome to the Astral Express, Huohuo.

结果回过神来，我在家里待了三天，和平常做着一样的事情，然后假期就要结束了…不知道素裳和桂乃芬假期里在做些什么呢……

But then, before I knew it, I'd spent three days at home doing the usual things, and now my vacation is about to end... I can't help wondering what Sushang and Guinaifen are doing on their days off...

While I was away, I stopped by The Looking Bronze and had got your "Fortune for Today." Ruoyue, the owner, said these sparkling stones were your lucky charms, so I brought them back for you. They'll bring you good fortune.

同样的事，既是凶也是吉，还真是挺奇妙的。

Isn't it wonderful? Through these windows you can lose yourself in the peaceful starry sky.

嗯…一种透明玻璃片，透明到几乎不可见。

Picture a sliver made up of beautiful dust, gases, and tiny specks, twirling around your finger like a captivating plum-colored mist.
就像戒指一样。我想，我会将它制作成与珠链般配的模样，应当散发一种温润的色泽。
It reminds me of a ring. I imagine crafting it, and then adding a bracelet of beads to complement its soft, lustrous glow.
好。希望每次，我都有新的发现。
Thank you. I hope there are new discoveries to be made each time I visit.
一个切片可以由美丽的尘埃、气体和粒子构成，它会如同绛紫色烟雾一样叆叇不绝…绕在指尖。
Picture a sliver made up of beautiful dust, gases, and tiny specks, twirling around your finger like a captivating plum-colored mist.
这样的「装饰」，{NICKNAME}你觉得如何？
This ornament — {NICKNAME}, how does it strike you?
你好，{NICKNAME}。我有个不情之请…请问，你有伤药吗？
Hello, {NICKNAME}. I hope it's not too bold of me to ask... do you happen to have any healing remedies?
说来有些不好意思，方才刺绣时，我伤到了手指。

有时我也会过于心急。这绣面要勾勒出花鸟绰约之姿，就要不紧不慢，时刻调整呼吸。
At times, my eagerness gets the better of me. To truly capture the grace of the birds and flowers in the embroidery, one must be patient and adjust one's breathing.
谢谢你…这样清凉的触感，令疼痛也被抚平了几分。

唔，没有什么可回赠于你的…我身上这些小物件，都是闲暇时自己绣的。{NICKNAME}，如果你喜欢，我也可以做一些赠予你。
Hmm, I don't have much with me to offer in return... These little fancies I wear are what I embroider in my free time. {NICKNAME}, I can craft some for you too if you like.
设色精妙的绣物佳品，较画意更胜一筹。
Such colorful embroidery — it feels even more expressive than a painting.
我身上这些小物件，都是闲暇时自己绣的。{NICKNAME}，香囊或是流苏挂坠…你喜欢吗？
These little fancies I wear are what I embroider in my free time. {NICKNAME}, would you fancy a spice sachet or a tassel pendant?
唔，现在各个星球上好像都在流行一种「海水熔岩」味的点心。据说是取了海中的水，以及苦血山脉里的熔岩。

Hmm... Everyone's talking about this "seawater magma" flavored snack — it's becoming all the rage on quite a few planets. I've heard they extract seawater and combine it with magma from the mountains.

The taste is pleasant, but I personally have a soft spot for pastries that showcase more... organic flavors.
哦，对了。听说现在也很流行为之拍照，发布在通讯工具上，以此来与各个星球埠口的门店换取更多点心试吃。
Speaking of which, I heard it's become quite common to photograph these delicacies and upload them to social media... and that doing so can even earn you sample treats from different purveyors.

可以将其放在阳光下拍摄。
Just place them in a sunny spot and snap a few pics.
是吗？听起来不错。下次我试试看。
Oh, is that all? Sounds great, I'll give it a go sometime.
Just strike a pose with a peace sign.
这个动作，对我来说有些困难…但谢谢你的建议，我会再尝试一下。
That pose would present... difficulties for me, but thank you for the suggestion.
不知道「海水熔岩」味的糕点，你们会不会感兴趣……
I wonder if you'd be interested in seawater magma flavored pastries...
如果喜欢的话，下次我得多准备些。
Should you take a liking to them, I'll make sure to prepare more next time.
不知道「海水熔岩」味的糕点，你们会不会感兴趣……
I wonder if you'd be interested in seawater magma flavored pastries...
如果喜欢的话，下次我得多准备些。
Should you take a liking to them, I'll make sure to prepare more next time.
列车上的鲜花，失去色泽后也会快速枯萎吧……
I imagine the flowers on the Express wither quite quickly once their vibrancy fades...
我正研究一种培育技术，将鲜花永久留存下来。不用制成干花，而是让水与生命永远在枝干中流动。
I'm researching a cultivation technique to preserve flowers forever... not by turning them into dried flowers, but by allowing water and life to perpetually flow within their stems...
但我很担心，从「短暂」变为「永久」后，是否会让鲜花不再因瞬时绽放而如此动人。就像…玫瑰被叫做其他名字后，闻起来便不再馥郁。
...however, I'm concerned that making the ephemeral "permanent" might strip flowers of their fleeting beauty... Would a rose by any other name smell as sweet?
Why not produce some dried flowers?
是很好的主意。我们总有很多方式，留住它作为生命…最为美丽而夺目的时刻。
I shan't discount it. There are countless ways to immortalize the most dazzling moments of a flower's life.
但最令人难忘的…还是眼看着它慢慢逝去，并为此而感到心痛的那种「感受」。
But, what remains most unforgettable... is the profound sensation of watching a flower fade away and the heartache that accompanies it.
…如果春天常在，一切就不会因终将逝去，而令人感到这般旖旎。
Without its inevitable departure, the charm of spring would diminish.
列车会经过…我的家乡吗？
Will the Express pass by... my home?
不知列车的尽头通向何方，也许会经过我的家乡也说不定呢？
I'm curious about the Express' trajectory. Will it pass by the place I call home?
一个锦绣之乡，那里的水很清澈。父亲是雕刻家，我与母亲一脉相承，热衷科研。母亲离世后，我应她的要求，保留了她的脑叶切片。

With its pristine waters, my homeland is like a tapestry of wonders. My father was a sculptor, but it was my mother's passion for research that I shared. Upon her passing, I held onto a piece of her brain tissue, as per her wishes.
但被博识尊选中后，我便离开了家乡开始研究…说起来，已很久未回去探望过父亲了。
However, after being chosen by Nous, I departed my home to delve into my research... Come to think of it, it's been quite some time since I last visited my father.
下次如果有空当，要回家乡看看父亲才是。
When I get a moment's respite, I ought to make a trip home to check on my father.

至于螺丝咕姆…是位不错的贵族。只是他所在意的领域，与我的研究目的并不相投。

斯蒂芬…这孩子十分善良，总是让人禁不住多关照他几分。

不知道下一次，天才俱乐部会员再次会面是什么时候。

不错，不错。精致的内饰，整洁的布置，环境安静，也很适合思考。

我会戴上我的头套，不被任何人打扰。

怎么，很难理解么？你是不是从来不看书？

The sensation of paper under one's fingertips, the sound of turning a page — they provide psychological stimulation when one's thoughts are stalled, leading you gradually out of any mental impasse.
于我，纸本书能令人时刻意识到知识的重量，是数据永远无法替代的感知。

如果只把纸本书视作一种载体，未免也太肤浅了。

仔细想想，你的自我是否也是如此。

哈哈！看来你这是已经做好当列车向导的准备了啊！那就不多等了，开始吧！

可惜胃里塞不下太多东西了，不然我还能再来几杯。

嗐！做人要有底线，这我赞同。但对于惩恶，一击毙命才是最好的收场。

这些束手束脚的「道德准则」，还是让内心纯净的人去遵守吧！

很对味儿！欢迎常来列车！

Whenever that happened, my brother would hum a lullaby for me. Halfway through the song, I would already be asleep...

一直在各个星系中辗转来回，很少有机会能好好看看这浩瀚的宇宙。
I've been traveling back and forth between various star systems, and I rarely get the opportunity to really see this vast universe.

哎呀，我哪有这么不识趣啦~

Fireworks? Where? I don't see any.
咦？奇怪…我明明按了按钮呀，是哪里出了问题……

Gray Hair, don't be so nervous.

等等等等，你上哪儿去？别走啊！

智库还挺有意思的嘛，尤其是关于「悲悼伶人」的描述，太形象了。
The data bank is very interesting. I love the entry for the Mourning Actors — it's so vivid and full of details.

如果眼泪值钱，我肯定能靠他们成为银河首富！

也有可能是因为这种日子，对我来说太重复了……
For me, living one's days out like that is too repetitive...
我只想找到宇宙中任何一个有乐子的角落，走哪儿看哪儿。如果乐子不够有趣，我会想办法，让它有趣得令人发指~

嘿嘿~温情的诉说时间结束！

这个故事怎么样？我还编了一个恐怖版的，想不想听听？

这个故事怎么样？我还编了一个恐怖版的，想不想听听？
How'd you like that story? I even came up with a scary version — wanna hear it?
列车的沙发实在太柔软了，睡着之后…连梦都是柔软的。

各种片段的组合：清爽的雨后森林、青草地和小狐狸…
All kinds of sights: A lush forest after a cooling rain, green pastures and little foxes...

Really? You're not kidding, are you?

But, if the cute forest, meadows, and little foxes hadn't started to twirl and fade away, I really might have slept for the whole day!

I've never had such a dream before. In most dreams, I just go from one mask to another...

Dreams like that would scare me awake.

嗯？不做梦？从来都没做过梦？

哦？又收到了一个「大乐子」消息，我研究研究！

对呀~我先前听到一些消息，说星穹列车有一个专门的合作对象储备库。

这样啊…好可惜。不考虑考虑建一个么？

哎，我可是很认真的，万一你们以后有处理不了的事，我随时可以成为你们的助手哦~

是啊，真的是助手！别这么不放心嘛，我看上去有这么不靠谱吗？

乐子人调查乐子事件，我敢打包票，绝对不会出现事故的！
A fun-seeker investigating fun things in the universe — I guarantee there's no way that could ever go wrong!
…好吧，看你这个表情是不会相信我的…没事，我可以明天再来问你一遍！
...All right, looks like you don't believe me... That's fine, I'll ask you again tomorrow!
…好吧，看你这个表情是不会相信我的…没事，我可以明天再来问你一遍！
...All right, looks like you don't believe me... That's fine, I'll ask you again tomorrow!

最近想根据性格给自己打造一个全新面具，换一副样子玩玩。有没有什么推荐？

那好办，我在面具上写个「勿扰」，避免和人交流就可以了，对吧？

龇牙咧嘴，然后来点红色染料，表情越幽怨越好的那种！有趣，太有趣了！
Fangs bared, then add a little red dye... The more ghastly the expression, the better! Interesting, very interesting!
那不如，面具就索性不用设计了，没有五官的面具，没有性格的性格……
How about forgoing the mask design then? A mask with no facial features, a personality with no personality...
{NICKNAME}，你提供的点子都超——极欢愉！我决定也为你打造一个专属面具！
{NICKNAME}, the ideas you've come up with are suuuuper Elating! I've decided to forge an exclusive mask for you!
样式我已经想好啦，但得先保密！这样下次见面的时候才有惊喜可言！你说对不对？

我决定也为你打造一个专属面具！

样式我已经想好啦，但得先保密！这样下次见面的时候才有惊喜可言！你说对不对？

快来快来！我给你带了一点亮晶晶的小东西，打开盒子看看吧！

盒子套盒子，才显得礼物有诚意嘛~

哇！好有耐心，居然一层一层打开了！

有啊~可以叫我帮你打开！

To make sure these ten boxes fit within one another, I had to meticulously measure them — it would've been a bust if I was off by even one millimeter!
礼物嘛，就是要有仪式感才行。
It's a present. Of course it's gotta look the part.
礼物嘛，就是要有仪式感才行。

我看到窗外有一些游离的记忆碎片，打算把它们「打捞」上来。
I saw some memory fragments drifting outside the window, and I intend to salvage them.
But... the Express windows are sealed tight.
我所说的「打捞」只需慢慢靠近那些记忆，再驱动忆者的力量提取保存即可。
By "salvage," I mean to slowly get close to those memories, and then exert my Memokeeper power to retrieve them.
Huh? I can't see them. Where are they?
这些记忆碎片微小如灰尘，构不成忆泡，很难用肉眼看见，甚至只有少数忆者才能感受到。
These memory fragments are as fine as dust, and can't form memory bubbles. They're hard to see with the naked eye — even most Memokeepers can't sense them.
星海间有太多消逝之物，那些前人寻过的路和被遗忘的往昔，本都应当在宇宙的进程中留下浓墨重彩的一笔。
There are too many discarded things in the sea of stars. Our predecessors' trodden paths and forgotten pasts should have left behind vivid marks across the universe.
我曾为这些不留痕迹的逝去感到遗憾，幸运的是，后来我们得以感知、发现、收藏。
I once felt regret for those that were lost without a trace, but fortunately, we were later able to sense, discover, and preserve them.
不知道今日发现的记忆碎片里，会留有怎样的故事呢？
I wonder what stories have been left behind in the memory fragments that we found today?
别急，{NICKNAME}。待我将这些碎片中的记忆一一复现，会与你一同分享的。

别急，{NICKNAME}。待我将这些碎片中的记忆一一复现，会与你一同分享的。
Settle down, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to manifest the memories from these fragments, and I'll share them with you.
那位活泼的小姑娘方才同我说了一些关于「你」的事……

看来你忘记了，列车的碎镜前还有一位活泼的忆者小姑娘。

她同我说你在「忘却之庭」打捞记忆的表现十分出色，是难得的天赋型选手。

Did my performance get at least sixty points?
这个数字有些保守，在那位忆者小姑娘眼中…你这位在「忘却之庭」打捞记忆的天赋型选手，可远远不止这个分数呢~

记得有一次，我在夜晚寻得了一处散落在玫瑰园中的记忆碎片。当我以为四处无人而后现身时，吓晕了一位正准备告白的先生……

嗯…忆者们也该思考一下有没有更好的现身方式了。

可惜，曾经包裹住她的「六相冰」虽然承载着一些不为人知的过往，加之三月小姐对自己的过去没有任何印象…

不用谢，这也算是忆者的「职责」吧。

我相信总有一天，她现在的经历会成为独一无二的回忆。

The first set, the gold deck.
我看到了星辰的指引。群星的光芒在漆黑的夜空中闪烁，比月亮更为耀眼。魔术师高举奖杯，木桌上是金色的徽章。
I see the guidance of the stars. Their radiance shines in the jet-black night sky, even more dazzling than the moon. The magician raises the trophy high, and on the wooden table is a Golden Badge.
你的前路很遥远…且充满了未知与不确定。但只需坚定向前，便能得到指引，从而进展会更加迅速，直至抵达想要的未来。
The path ahead is long... and filled with uncertainty and the unknown. But so long as you forge ahead, you will find direction, and your progress will be swift till you reach the future you desire.

希望这次的占卜能对你有所帮助。不过，运势占卜的结果仅供参考，只能作为当下的建议。可不要让自己陷入思维的怪圈哦~

哦？相当聪明呢~不过在打开福袋前，一定要做好入睡的准备哦。

再次谢谢你的邀请，不久之后，我也要启程了…列车的下一站会是哪里呢？记忆的流向…又将去往何处呢。

谢谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}，我们又见面了，请容许我赞美你诚挚而热情的心灵！

请容许我赞美你高尚的品格！
