根据播报中的描述，我确定我与他曾有过一面之缘。
According to the description in the news, I'm certain I once encountered him.
那时，我在宇宙中捕捉到了一丝「纯美」的气息，并循着气息找到了一个充满废墟的大孔洞。还未等我彻底靠近，就被一股力量吸了过去。若不是他及时抛出了绳索，恐怕现在……

At that time, I had caught the scent of a sliver of Beauty in the universe, and followed that scent to a Macro Void full of ruins. But before I could get close, I was sucked in by a powerful force. If he hadn't tossed me his rope in time, I might've been...
那后来呢，你们没有同行吗？
What happened later? Did you not travel together?
很遗憾。我虽自心底里产生了「美」的情绪，也打算永远记住这份恩情，但在表达感谢后，我们还是打算分道扬镳。
Alas, while Beauty was invoked in the depths of my heart and I vowed to remember this kindness forever, after I expressed my gratitude, we still decided to part ways.
纯美骑士们追逐着各自的目标，走向不同的道路，这是命运使然。
The Knights of Beauty each pursue their own goals, venturing down different paths. That is our destiny.
倘若契机存在，我会毫不犹豫，拼尽全力助他脱离困境。
If an opportunity had arisen, I would have spared no effort to help him out of his predicament.
…抱歉，这名单臂骑士的陨落令我有些失神。
...Apologies, this one-armed knight's passing has left me somewhat distraught.
我打算前往他陨落的地方，为他立碑，并献上一枚纯美骑士的勋章。{NICKNAME}，期待下次的相见。
I intend to head to the location of his passing, erect a monument to him, and confer upon him a medal of the Knights of Beauty. {NICKNAME}, I look forward to our next meeting.
我打算前往他陨落的地方，为他立碑，并献上一枚纯美骑士的勋章。{NICKNAME}，期待下次的相见。
I intend to head to the location of his passing, erect a monument to him, and confer upon him a medal of the Knights of Beauty. {NICKNAME}, I look forward to our next meeting.
{NICKNAME}，你是否在观察我手中的绒球？我正打算把它作为肩甲上的装饰。
{NICKNAME}, are you looking at the fluff ball in my hand? I was thinking of using it to adorn the armor on my shoulder.
I was! Where can I buy it?
它并非买卖所得，而是怪物——「凶恶绒球」的战利品。
It wasn't a purchase, but a prize from a monster — the Ferocious Fluff Ball.
这团绒球可爱而独特，颇具魅力。因此被我置于肩甲上，作为荣誉的象征。
This fluff ball is cute, unique, and quite charming. That's why I wish to wear it on my armor, as a badge of honor.
感谢你的夸奖，我的挚友。这团绒球是怪物——「凶恶绒球」的战利品。
Thank you, my dear friend. This fluff ball is a prize from a monster — the Ferocious Fluff Ball.
它可爱而独特，颇具魅力。我将它置于肩甲上，作为荣誉的象征。
It is cute, unique, and quite charming. I wish to wear it on my armor, as a badge of honor.
「凶恶绒球」是一团大型圆球毛绒生物，遇到危险时会旋转起来。届时，毛绒会变成尖刺，犹如箭雨，避无可避。
The Ferocious Fluff Ball is a giant, round fluffy creature that will spin when faced with danger. Its fur then hardens into spikes, like a shower of arrows from which one cannot escape.
无所谓，我会被可爱打败。
I would be defeated by the cuteness.
宇宙间具有「魅力」的生物很多。在不知晓对方来意的情况下，请务必保持警惕。
There are many "charming" creatures across the universe. Please keep your guard up if you don't know the other party's intentions.
怎么才能温和地打败它？
How do you defeat it gently?
「凶恶绒球」旋转起来时，会有黑色光点在绒球中心闪烁。只需找准机会，便能一击斩落。
When the Ferocious Fluff Ball starts spinning, black spots will shimmer in the center of the fluff ball. You just need the right opportunity to down it with one strike.
{NICKNAME}, are you still looking at the fluff ball ornament?
看来绒球的魅力仅能保存八个系统时，我为此深感遗憾。
Looks like the fluff ball's charm only lasts eight system hours. I'm deeply saddened.
手心中残留的一丝毛绒，我打算将它保存起来，作为它在这美丽宇宙存在过的证明。
I intend to save this remaining bit of fluff in my hand — proof that it once existed in this beautiful universe.
手心中残留的一丝毛绒，我打算将它保存起来，作为它在这美丽宇宙存在过的证明。
I intend to save this remaining bit of fluff in my hand — proof that it once existed in this beautiful universe.
丹恒先生方才带我拜访了列车的智库。
Mr. Dan Heng showed me the Express' data bank just now.
查阅片刻，我发觉「纯美」正如智库中所写：祂的消失与其诞生一样神秘。
Upon examining it for a moment, I found that the Beauty was described as such in the data bank: THEIR disappearance and birth are equally mysterious.
第一天结识你的时候，你也如这般幽默风趣。
Your sense of humor is just as sharp as when we first met.
There are clues. It's not a huge problem.
「纯美」无处不在，我会终其一生追逐祂的行迹。
The Beauty is everywhere, and I will spend my life following THEIR trail.
The data bank needs a major update.
不知我可否帮得上忙？倘若需要更多有关「纯美」的信息，请随时来找我。
I wonder if I could be of help? Please seek me out anytime if you require more information about the Beauty.
智库中的记录涉及诸多星球。各类信息纷繁复杂，却能被整理的井井有条，这实在令我感到钦佩。
The data bank's records touch upon myriad planets. Each category of information is confusingly complex, but they have all been so well-organized — 'tis an admirable feat indeed.
如果能在希世难得号上打造一间智库……
If I could install a data bank on the One and Only...
Just copy the Express' data bank!
You would possess the entire universe.
无论何时，你的回答都会超出我的预期……
Every time, your responses exceed my expectations...
请容我再次赞美你，{NICKNAME}，拥有一个智慧的灵魂和炽热的心——你，真的很美。
Please allow me to sing your praises once again, {NICKNAME}. With an erudite soul and a blazing heart, you are truly beautiful.
请容我再次赞美你，{NICKNAME}，拥有一个智慧的灵魂和炽热的心——你，真的很美。
Please allow me to sing your praises once again, {NICKNAME}. With an erudite soul and a blazing heart, you are truly beautiful.
{NICKNAME}, have you heard of space racing?
惊险刺激的飞行竞速比拼，能让紧绷的情绪更加放松。
A thrilling race among the stars can help calm high-strung emotions.
这类竞速对于刚入门的新手来说，的确有些难以掌握。
Such races can be quite difficult for beginners to get a handle on.
不过不必担心，竞逐的主办方为新手设计了专门的减速赛道区。
But do not worry, the races' organizers have designed slower courses for beginners.
但银河中的赛道受各种因素的影响，稳定性并不比地表赛道安全。
But a Cosmic racetrack is affected by various factors. It isn't exactly as stable as a terrestrial racetrack.
你的勇敢和好奇心令人动容。我与希世难得号随时等待你的到来。
Your courage and curiosity are truly moving. The One and Only and I await your arrival.
太空竞逐是一场勇气与速度的较量，当引擎的动力达到顶峰，激昂的斗志也会被随之点燃。
Space racing is a battle of bravery and speed. When the engine's power reaches its peak, one's passionate fighting spirit will also be ignited.
下次比赛开办时，{NICKNAME}与列车组如果有兴趣观看，我会给大家寄送入场门票。
The next time there's a race, if {NICKNAME} and the Express Crew are interested in spectating, I will send everyone admission tickets.
期待未来有一天，我们能有机会同场竞技。
I hope that one day, we will have the chance to meet on the racetrack.
太空竞逐是一场勇气与速度的较量，当引擎的动力达到顶峰，激昂的斗志也会被随之点燃。
Space racing is a battle of bravery and speed. When the engine's power reaches its peak, one's passionate fighting spirit will also be ignited.
下次比赛开办时，{NICKNAME}与列车组如果有兴趣观看，我会给大家寄送入场门票。
The next time there's a race, if {NICKNAME} and the Express Crew are interested in spectating, I will send everyone admission tickets.
期待未来有一天，我们能有机会同场竞技。
I hope that one day, we will have the chance to meet on the racetrack.
{NICKNAME}，我有一个疑问百思不得其解。请问你能否判断：这颗绚丽的五彩种子…真的能通过种植得到五彩晶石吗？
{NICKNAME}, I have a question that I just can't wrap my head around. I would like to ask you: This splendid rainbow seed... Can it really grow into Rainbowite?
不行吗…可那位老板说这颗同样绚丽的五彩晶石正是五彩种子的产物。
Really... But that shopkeeper said that this equally splendid Rainbowite is the product of rainbow seeds.
Feels like you were ripped off.
这样吗…我记得那位老板说这颗同样绚丽的五彩晶石正是五彩种子的产物。
Is that so... I recall that shopkeeper said that this equally splendid Rainbowite is the product of rainbow seeds.
它们如此绚丽多彩，实在难以评判。不知道列车上是否有方法可以鉴别种子和晶石的真伪？
They glimmer with such brilliance. It's really hard to determine. I wonder if there is some way to appraise the authenticity of the seeds and Rainbowite? Perhaps right here on the Express?
可以找姬子，姬子智慧过人！
Look for Himeko. Her wisdom is unparalleled!
可以找杨叔，杨叔见多识广！
Look for Mr. Yang. Mr. Yang is very experienced and knowledgeable!
Look for Pom-Pom-Pom. Pom-Pom... is cute!
我会潜心求教，避免类似的事件再次发生。
I will seek advice, to prevent something like this from happening again.
虽然晶石是真，但我为自己的疏忽感到十分惭愧。
Although the Rainbowite is real, I am extremely ashamed of my negligence.
没想到第一次为友人购置礼品，就出现了这样的失误，万分抱歉。
I never thought I'd make such an embarrassing blunder when buying a present for a dear friend for the first time. A thousand apologies.
别自责，这份礼物我们都很喜欢！
Don't beat yourself up. We all love this gift!
别自责，这样的礼物多多益善！
Don't beat yourself up. With gifts like these, the more the better!
谢谢大家的理解。我打算即刻出发，下一次的礼物，我向各位保证：一定不会辜负「纯美」盛名，出现任何纰漏。
Thank you all for your understanding. Now, I must take my leave. For my next gift, I promise you this: I will not fail the good name of Beauty.
谢谢大家的理解。我打算即刻出发，下一次的礼物，我向各位保证：一定不会辜负「纯美」盛名，出现任何纰漏。
Thank you all for your understanding. Now, I must take my leave. For my next gift, I promise you this: I will not fail the good name of Beauty.
I didn't get a wink of sleep last night.
You... you have very dark circles under your eyes.
我来之前照过镜子，明明那时还没有的……
I looked in the mirror before I came and didn't see any...
嗯？难不成咖啡还能消黑眼圈吗？怪不得这个味道…闻上去和丹鼎司熬制的汤药一样苦……
Huh? Can coffee get rid of dark circles under your eyes? No wonder it smells like... medicine brewed by the Alchemy Commission...
喝就不必了，多谢你的好意。
I appreciate the gesture, but I'll pass.
Why don't you take a break?
不必了，我不困，真的不困……
No need, I'm not tired, really...
我刚刚闻到那个味道的时候，就清醒了…闻上去和丹鼎司熬制的汤药一样苦！
I just got a whiff of it, and it woke me right up. It smells like medicine brewed by the Alchemy Commission!
喝就不必了，多谢你的好意。
I appreciate the gesture, but I'll pass.
其实收到你的邀请后，我就一直幻想列车内是什么样子，越想越兴奋，一整晚都没睡。
Actually, after I got your invitation, I couldn't stop imagining what the Express looked like on the inside. I got so excited about it that I couldn't fall asleep all night.
刚刚在你来之前，我已经东看西看了好一阵子…我自己都觉得不对劲，但是完全停不下来。
Before you came, I already had a look around... I know it wasn't appropriate, but I just couldn't help myself.
只要你想来，列车随时欢迎你！
You're free to come whenever you want!
You better keep your word {NICKNAME}! I'll be coming often!
嗯，嗯嗯！我现在就去帮你问问看。
Okay! I'll go ask for you right now.
{NICKNAME}，列车上的星际和平播报，我可以打开一下吗？「老铁」好像有些好奇…
{NICKNAME}, can I turn on the Interastral Peace Broadcast on the Express? Old Mettle seems curious about it...
Old Mettle likes to listen to the news?
星际和平播报…原来是专门播放新闻的广播吗？这岂不是正对「老铁」的胃口。
So the Interastral Peace Broadcast... specifically broadcasts the news? That's exactly what Old Mettle likes.
别看这兵器还年轻，但心态已经十分老成了，平日里很喜欢关注各类热点新闻。
This weapon may be young, but he's already very mature. He likes to keep up with the all the latest news.
My friend, he's right in front of you.
别跑呀，我开玩笑的！你见过的，「老铁」——它是我的兵器，也是我的好伙伴。
Don't run away! I'm just kidding! You've met Old Mettle — he's my weapon, and my good friend.
说来可能会有些令人难以置信。自铸剑起，我便能听到各类兵器的心声。
I know it's hard to believe, but ever since I forged this sword, I've been able to hear the thoughts of all sorts of weapons.
记得刚和「老铁」见面时，我们都不太服气对方…它说我脾气差，我嫌它长得丑。
I remember when Old Mettle and I first met, we weren't very accepting of each other... He said I had a bad temper, and I thought he was ugly.
它说我剑技超群，我说它冠绝古今。也算是…十分认可彼此了，对吧！
He says my swordsmanship is outstanding, and I think he's a master both in the past and present. So you could say we completely approve of each other now!
所以！你不仅觉得我脾气差，还觉得它长得丑？
So, not only do you think I have a bad temper, but you also think he's ugly?
罢了，这不重要。毕竟我和「老铁」早已成为了能够互相回应彼此意志的伙伴。
Forget it, it's not important. Old Mettle and I have long since become partners who can read and respond to each other's will.
值得一提的是：我和「老铁」早已成为了能够互相回应彼此意志的伙伴。
The only thing worth saying is: Old Mettle and I have long since become partners who can read and respond to each other's will.
好、好香的味道！会在哪里呢，是列车上的厨房么……
That smells so, so good! Where is it coming from? Is it coming from the kitchen on the Express?
Hey! What are you looking for?
哇啊！怎么从背后吓人！我可差点就拔剑了！
Ah! You can't scare people like that! I almost drew my sword!
话说…{NICKNAME}，闻到了吗？列车上有一股甜甜的，很浓郁的奶香糕点气息。
Anyway, {NICKNAME}, do you smell that? There's a sweet and rich smell of milk pastries here on the Express.
The kitchen is a very mysterious place!
这么神秘的话…不妨带我去看上一看，让我多领会领会它的神秘？
If it's that mysterious... could you let me take a look, so I can better understand its mysteriousness?
（甜甜的，有着浓郁奶香气息的糕点，吃下去一定很幸福吧……）
(A pastry with this sweet, rich milk flavor must taste so good...)
这么令人沉溺其中的甜香，我曾在小时候闻到过一次。
I've only smelled something this sweet and enticing once, when I was little.
出名的朱明糕点，大多以咸甜和烟熏口味为主，所以我对这种纯粹的甜香毫无抵抗之力……
The pastries that the Zhuming is known for are mostly salty-sweet or smokey in flavor. So there's no way I can resist this kind of pure sweetness.
可惜那会儿我正急着赶去工造司，当时正逢剑器冷却的关键阶段，容不得丝毫闪失。待剑器彻底冷却，我回头再去寻那香甜的气息，却早已散去了。

Unfortunately, at the time, I was hurrying to the Artisanship Commission. My sword was at a crucial point of cooling off, and I couldn't afford to make any mistakes. When the sword had completely cooled, I went back to find the sweet scent, but it had already disappeared.
难道是新开的糕点铺打烊了？
Maybe it was a new bakery that closed for the night?
我那时也这么认为。但后来…爷爷带我找遍了朱明仙舟的糕点铺子，也没能找见类似的味道。
I thought so too at the time. But later... when Grandpa took me around the Zhuming's bakeries, we didn't find the same scent anywhere.
兜兜转转，最终买了几十盒朱明特制的咸甜风味糕点，吃了数月之久。
After wandering around a bit, we finally bought a few dozen boxes of the Zhuming's special salty-sweet pastries and ended up munching on them for several months.
直到今天！列车上的甜香又唤醒了我对奶香糕点的记忆，所以……
Until today! The sweet smell on the Express has awakened my memories, so...
巨无霸帕姆帕姆派！送给你！
Then here's a Giant Pom-Pom Pie for you!
真、真的吗！这么大一份，都给我了？！那我就…不客气了！
R—Really? All this, for me!? Then... I'll take it!
{NICKNAME}，你可太懂我了！待我回了朱明，定当给你准备一份「巨无霸烟熏枣糕」送给你。
{NICKNAME}, you know me too well! When I go back to the Zhuming, I'll make sure to get you a Giant Smoked Jujube Cake.
能媲美帕姆帕姆派的巨无霸谢礼…「巨无霸烟熏枣糕」，就是你啦！
A gift comparable to Pom-Pom Pie... Giant Smoked Jujube Cake it is then!
不知道每颗星球上，会有多少个武备库……
I wonder how many armories and arsenals there are on each of these planets...
其实我只是在自言自语…这个问题太难回答了。
Actually, I was just talking to myself... I don't think this question can be answered.
Why don't you ask General Huaiyan?
早就问过啦。爷爷说他不知道。
I already asked him. He said he doesn't know.
小时候，他和我说如果世界上有人知道答案，那就只有「帝弓司命」了。
When I was little, he told me that if there was anyone in the world who knew the answer, it would be the Reignbow Arbiter.
不瞒你说，世间的「不配剑器者」众多，如果他们毫无精进剑技之心，我确实想把他们手中的神兵利器一一取回，存放在镕兵剑炉中…但我也知道这样的愿望，总有些不切实际。

To tell you the truth, there are many unworthy swordsmen in the world. If they lack the will to improve at swordsmanship, then I will have to take back every single one of their marvels of weaponry and put them in the Molten Remains... But I understand that wish is a little unrealistic.
是时候好好练习球棒秘技了！
Time to practice my baseball techniques!
的确。我瞧你体质特殊，是个可造之材。以你的实力，匹配球棒不成问题。
For sure. You have a unique constitution and a lot of potential. With your strength, wielding a baseball bat is no problem at all.
目前剑炉里的神器数量…
Right now the number of divine weapons in there...
嗯…好像很久没有记录了，自入焰轮铸炼宫受训算起，数量应当是三百一十二柄。
Mm... I haven't kept track in a while. Since I started training at Flamewheel Forge, the number should be three hundred and twelve.
不过比起计数，我只愿那些神兵利器都有珍惜他们的主人，而非单纯被蛮力驱使。
But really, I just want those marvels of weaponry to all have masters who treasure them rather than wield them with only brute strength.
说起来，列车上有专门存放兵器的地方吗？
Speaking of which, does the Express have a place specifically for storing weapons?
别、别担心，我只是想和它们交流一下，绝对没有别的想法！
Ah, don't worry. I just want to talk to them. I don't have any other intentions!
我只是想看看那些兵器，和它们交流一下，绝对没有别的想法！
I just want to take a look at the weapons and talk to them. I don't have any other intentions!
{NICKNAME}，三月近来可好？可有偷懒？剑艺有没有更上一层楼？
How has March been lately, {NICKNAME}? Has she been slacking off? Has her swordsmanship improved?
She's been great! She never slacks off!
哦？真的？可我方才听帕姆列车长说，她时不时睡到午时才起床。
Oh, really? But I just heard Pom-Pom say that she sometimes sleeps in until noon.
她很好！我经常被她打败！
She's been great! She often defeats me!
嗯！你说得很好，可她的双剑却不是这样说的。
Huh! What you're saying is quite different from what her dual swords have been saying to me.
唉…虽说徒弟已经学到了些本事，但我这当师父的，终究还是放心不下啊！
Even though my apprentice has learned a thing or two, as a master, I can't stop worrying!
师父别担心，我来监督她！
Master, don't worry, I'll supervise her!
总有种你会更加纵容她的预感。
I have a feeling you're going to let her off even more.
咳咳，这只是…身为师父应尽的职责而已！
I'm merely performing the duty required of a master.
列车行遍诸界，难免有遭遇困境的时候。多身技能，总归是能多份保障。
The Express travels to so many worlds, it's hard to avoid running into difficult situations. Having more skills can give you more protection.
所以，我要给三月和你制定一份修炼计划表！
So I want to draw up a training schedule for you and March!
列车组的前辈身手不凡，这我早有耳闻。丹恒阁下本就是列车护卫，列车长…列车长这么可爱我不忍心！
I've heard that the Crew's senior members are extremely skilled. Dan Heng is already the Express' guard, and the conductor... the conductor is too cute to ask to train!
好了，我去写计划表了。不会让你们因压力倒地不起的！
Alright, I'm going to write out the schedule. I promise I won't make you collapse under the pressure!
我去写计划表了。不会让你们因压力倒地不起的！
I'm going to write out the schedule. I promise I won't make you collapse under the pressure!
{NICKNAME}，这些石块…是不是你们正在找的那种？
{NICKNAME}, aren't you all looking for these kinds of stones?
太好了！那就…请你收下它们吧。
虽然看上去五彩斑斓的，但应该还是石块，对吧？所以这是不是你们正在找的那种？
Even though they look all bright and colorful, they're still stones, right? Aren't you all looking for these kinds of stones?
太好了！那就…请你收下它们吧。
谢谢你能邀请我登上列车！以后有机会，记得来朱明做客！
Thank you for inviting me onto the Express! If you have the chance, don't forget to come and visit the Zhuming!
爷爷给我的零花钱肯定够我们大吃大喝一顿！不…三顿！
With the allowance Grandpa gave me, we'll be able to have a huge meal! No, three huge meals!
以后有机会，记得来朱明仙舟做客！
If you have the chance, don't forget to come and visit the Xianzhou Zhuming!
The stars are numerous, and yet widely scattered...
The stars are numerous, and yet widely scattered...
是恩公呀！小女子这厢打扰了。初次登上列车，本应与各位打声招呼，不想才行两步，便被这窗外星辰吸引，看入了迷。还请见谅。

Benefactor! My apologies... I should have immediately greeted everyone as soon as I boarded on this initial visit of mine to the Express, but before I had even taken two steps I became engrossed by the stars outside the windows. Please forgive me.
一下就找到了最佳观星点！
You found the best stargazing spot in no time!
群星无垠，远眺辨不清任何一颗的来处。但身处其中，才发现它们也是四处坐落，各有栖所。
The stars are endless. It isn't easy to discern their origins when gazing from afar, yet when one is amidst them, one finds that they all have a spot in the sky... a home of their own.
宇宙深幽，想来独独一颗星星也无法照亮四周，聚落一处才能看见彼此…更能被我们观见。
With the universe being so vast, I imagine that one solitary star is not enough to illuminate its surroundings. Only when gathered in one place can they see each other... and be seen by us.
你说，它们可是因为被彼此照亮，才识得自己也是星星，也能荧荧闪烁？
Do you think they only realize that they're stars and capable of radiance after experiencing another's illumination?
或许自诞生那一刻起便知道了。
Maybe they've known since the moment of their birth.
那小女子便要厚着脸皮再多来几次，定能亲眼瞧见星星诞生时的闪动。
Then I'll shamelessly invite myself here a few more times and make sure to catch that spark at the moment of a star's birth.
小女子再多来几次，定能亲眼瞧见星星诞生时的闪动。
I'll invite myself here a few more times and make sure to catch that spark at the moment of a star's birth.
群星间的品茗，令人回味……
Having this beverage surrounded by the stars brings back memories...
入口虽苦…唔，回甘也有些酸涩…这咖啡跟罗浮风味大相径庭啊……
It tastes bitter at first... Ugh, and it has a rather sour aftertaste... This coffee is vastly different to the kind on the Luofu...
I thought you were drinking some tea.
我瞧它汁色浓郁，品尝起来个中滋味也沉浮多变…能否请教恩公，它是谁做的呀？
I see that it has a deep and rich color, and it tastes as though it contains layers of various flavors... Benefactor, may I ask who concocted this?
Himeko made it herself, because you're worth it.
原来是姬子小姐的手艺！三月姑娘方才还提醒小女子不要轻易尝试，但我仍放不下好奇心……
So it is Miss Himeko's work! Miss March was just telling me not to try her drinks haphazardly, but I could not contain my curiosity...
虽然味道有些…但也算是尝鲜啦。这偌大寰宇果真还有许多新鲜事物在等待小女子游历见识。
The taste was a bit... hmm, but it was still a novel experience. Indeed, this endless universe still has many more wonders waiting for me to experience.
虽然新的尝试可能伴随着酸涩，但总归也是看见天地广阔的必要一步呀。
Though these new experiences may turn sour, they are still necessary steps in my journey to witness this vast world.
虽然新的尝试可能伴随着酸涩，但总归也是看见天地广阔的必要一步呀。
Though these new experiences may turn sour, they are still necessary steps in my journey to witness this vast world.
方才在三月姑娘房里看到了不戴帽子的列车长，忍不住多待了会儿……
I just saw the conductor without their hat on in Miss March's room, and I couldn't help but stand there a little longer...
如今回到车厢一瞧，感觉戴上帽子的列车长也变得更可爱了。还有三月姑娘的照相机，姬子小姐的发饰也十分精妙。
Now that I'm back here, I feel the conductor looks even cuter with their hat on. Miss March's camera and Miss Himeko's hair accessories are all very intricate, too.
我对列车组的审美很有信心！
I have great faith in the Crew's tastes!
是呀，列位恩公的服饰也极为好看。
Indeed, benefactor. Your crew's outfits are all very stunning.
之前小女子总被窗外的星辰美景吸引，不逛不知道，今日仔细一瞧才发现，尽管穿行宇宙已久，列车却没有一丝风尘仆仆的感觉。

Before, I was constantly engrossed in the scenery outside the window. Now that I've walked through the Express, I realize that it doesn't seem dusty or travel-worn at all, despite its long journey through the universe.
反而干净温馨，像家一样。就连眼前这盆绿油油的盆栽看着都让人格外心仪，看来列车长真是在日日照顾。
It is clean, comforting, and feels like a home. Even this vibrant plant here is a delight to look at. I can tell the conductor has carefully tended to it day after day.
You can have this plant if you want.
多谢恩公心意！可小女子觉得，它是因为在列车上，与大家一同游历群星才这般美丽。
Thank you for the kind thought, benefactor! However, I feel that it only gained such beauty because it has travelled through the stars with everyone here on the Express.
你怎么也看上了这座盆栽。
Why are you interested in this plant, too?
想来是它葱绿得太过美丽，才这么有人气。
I imagine its popularity lies in its vibrant liveliness and beauty.
难道是这「开拓」的空气异于常世？那小女子可要趁着机会好好呼吸了…呼……
Could it be that the air of "the Trailblaze" is different from normal air? Then I must use this opportunity to take a few deep breaths... Ah...
难道是这「开拓」的空气异于常世？那小女子可要趁着机会好好呼吸了…呼……
Could it be that the air of "the Trailblaze" is different from normal air? Then I must use this opportunity to take a few deep breaths... Ah...
听说在很久以前，有将山包一般的原牛养大，赶往其他世界的巨人无名客，也有在终年下宝石雨的国度采摘品鉴奇石的无名客……

I heard that once upon a time, there were giant Nameless who raised cattle as big as the hills and herded them to other worlds, and there were also Nameless who harvested and evaluated marvelous crystals from worlds that rained gemstones...
开拓者们去往天外，让某个世界平平无奇的资材成了其他星辰令人惊叹的奇货。恩公听说过这个故事么？
The Trailblazers ventured beyond the sky and turned the most commonplace materials in one world into precious wonders of another. Have you heard this story before, benefactor?
我也是从姬子小姐处听说的，光是听着，小女子的内心便甚是澎湃。
I only heard it from Miss Himeko myself. Just listening to it made my heart fill with excitement.
Are you moved by this story?
不怕恩公笑话，小女子从姬子小姐处听到这段时确实心生澎湃。
To be completely honest, I did get very excited when I heard it from Miss Himeko.
看来也如过去相识之人所说，我有些经商的天赋呢。
It seems like I do have some natural talent in business, just like my past acquaintances said.
小女子曾在匹诺康尼听说，有一家商会在失魂星域发现了珍贵的雷云闪玉，但迟迟还未出手。
While in Penacony, I heard that a merchant guild found some precious Cumulonimbus Flash Spheres in the Consternation Starzone, but they still have not sold those goods.
若是有机会，恩公也可收购些。待之后去到新世界，遇见能鉴赏这种特殊电气晶石的收藏家再将其出售，或许能小赚一笔呢！

You might wish to purchase some, benefactor. If you happen to encounter connoisseurs of these unique electric crystals on new worlds, and then sell the spheres to them, you might find yourself with quite the windfall!
若能抓住这种机遇，恩公或许也能小赚一笔呢。
If you can seize this kind of opportunity, you might find yourself with quite the windfall!
我知道的你也知道，我不说的你也不说……
You know what I know, and you won't say what I won't say...
When did you become a Riddler!?
并非小女子自言自语，这是一位名叫巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉的谜语大师所言之语。在恩公看来，此话何解呢？
I'm not just talking to myself. It's something a Riddler named Baden Babbibalo Bala once said. What do you think those words mean, benefactor?
The answer is the riddle itself.
恩公莫不也是谜语人？开玩笑的，我知恩公是在拿我逗乐。
Are you a Riddler too now, benefactor? I'm kidding. I know you're only poking fun at me.
I don't know, so I won't say.
用谜语回答谜语么？恩公好生聪明。
Answering a riddle with a riddle? You're quite smart, benefactor.
虽然还是有些不解，但书里也说那些谜语人惯爱破坏语言的确定性，想来他们并不倚赖用文字作答。
I don't fully understand it, but the books do say that The Riddlers love to destroy the certainty of language. I imagine they would not answer with words.
让恩公见笑了。只是小女子也算是从他人言语中重构了自我的认知，所以才有如此联想。
I've made a fool of myself, haven't I? However, I essentially reconstructed my own cognition from the words of others, which is why I entertained that thought.
人的过往与记忆，还真是复杂呢。
People's memories and pasts are complicated indeed.
人的过往与记忆，还真是复杂呢。
People's memories and pasts are complicated indeed.
Is a cake of this size big enough...?
这么大的蛋糕，应该够列车组分的……
A cake this size should be enough for the Express Crew to share...
恩公，你来啦。这是小女子在匹诺康尼闲逛时，买的一份伴手礼。想着几次打扰列车，必须以表感谢。
You're here, benefactor. This is a souvenir I bought while strolling through Penacony. I've intruded on the Express a few times already, so I must express my thanks in some way.
听说这款蛋糕的奶油加了酸梦剂，吃多了不仅不会腻，反而会胃口大增。说不定会越吃越饿呢！

I heard they added Sour Dream Potion into the cream for this cake. You won't feel sick even after eating a lot of it. Your appetite will even increase. Perhaps the more you eat, the hungrier you'll get!
匹诺康尼真是热闹非凡呀，各道美食似乎都有独特的怪诞做法，倒也是它们的可爱之处。
Penacony is a truly bustling place. Every one of their dishes seems to have been made in a unique and bizarre way, but that's what makes them so delightful.
让我不禁想起了…长乐天。不知恩公吃过鸣藕糕吗？只要咬下一口，它似乎便会对你出声发笑。
It reminds me of... the Exalting Sanctum. Have you ever had a songlotus cake, benefactor? As soon as you take a bite, it seems like it's laughing at you.
That's right. Its laugh is super loud.
太好了，看来我没记错。是那种更加短促清脆的笑声，对吧？不少外邦人都被吓到过，还有很多，貘馍卷其实是…哎呀，恩公见谅，那些画面好像一下子涌上了心头。

Oh, good! It seems like my memory is still sound. It's a kind of short and crisp laugh, no? Many outworlders have been scared by that sound. And there are other foods, too, like the tuskpir wrap, which is actually... Ah, forgive me. I'm suddenly remembering everything.
不知再回仙舟，会看到怎样一番风景呢……
I wonder what kind of scenes I would behold if I returned to the Xianzhou...
不知再回仙舟，会看到怎样一番风景呢……
I wonder what kind of scenes I would behold if I returned to the Xianzhou...
那些机器人一直在工作……
Your tears smell like pineapple oil...
Tsk, its real name is considerably more insipid...
我也想像婷婷姐一样有个名字……
I want a name just like Wendy...
Have you decided what "Wen" name to call yourself?
有这些机器人帮忙果然便捷多了。
These robots helping out make everything so easy.
接下来，等修复工程完毕，我们就可以为阮•梅女士准备一个。呃，准备个什么好呢？
Next, once repairs are all done, we can get something ready for Ms. Ruan Mei. Um, what should I prepare?
不管是什么，总之就是一个超大的惊喜！
Whatever it is, I'm sure it's gonna be a huge surprise!
我听说那些机器人…从开机到现在就没停过，一直在工作。
I heard that those robots... have never been shut down since the day they'd been activated. They just keep going.
Who did you hear that from?
就是，「非常烦」无意中说到过。而且我观察过，它们全天无休……
It was "Super Annoy" who let it slip. And I've been watching and found out that they work all day long...
编的，必然是编的，这不可能，机器人也得充电。
Lies, that has to be lies. Impossible. Robots still need to recharge their batteries.
故障已知悉，正在抢修中……
识别错误，识别错误。所以…这到底是何缘故？
Verification error, verification error. So... what is the cause of this?
Feels like... I'll never... love again.
是她，是她抛弃了我们…我们的心也随她而去了。
It's her. She's the one who left us... and took our hearts with her.
我不会再为她哭泣了，因为我的眼泪…已经流尽了。
I'm not shedding another tear for her, because my tears... have run dry.
啊？你是牛油菠萝包吗？我闻到你身上的味道了……
Huh? Are you Pineapple Bun? I can smell you from here...
不得不说，牛油融化的「泪水」真的好香，我好喜欢！
I have to say, pineapple-scented tears sure smell sweet. I love it!
我听说，他掌握着去往远方的路……
I heard that he figured out how to go far away...
不止呢，他是我们中唯一一个能说话的家伙。
Not just that, he's the only one of us that can actually talk.
你也要去找他吗？我听说他才离开不久。
Are you looking for him too? I heard he left not long ago.
我们早该离开这里了，待在这里就是浪费生命！
We should've bounced from this place ages ago. Staying here is just a waste of life!
我刚刚听了「洞悉者」大人的讲座，它好厉害哇！
I just heard the "Insighter" giving a lecture. It was incredible!
这家伙神神叨叨的，我看到它就觉得讨厌。
This guy talks so much. Just looking at him gives me a headache.
别这么说，它可是去过空间站里的很多地方，见识可广啦。而且…阮•梅女士也喜欢它呢。
Don't say that. It's been to so many places on the space station and has broad knowledge. Plus... Ms. Ruan Mei favors it.
呸，它的话我才不信呢。你是不知道吧，这家伙本名叫「芝士流心」，土得很，装什么见过世面的样子，哼……
Bah, I don't believe it. You don't know, do you? This guy's name is "Molten Cheese Tart," is incredibly uncultured, but likes to pretend that it's seen the world. Hmph...
…既然创造了我，为什么又要把我扔在这里……
...Why would you throw me in here after creating me...
不，不，不是她的错，是我…都怪我。
No no no, it's not her fault. It's me... it's all my fault.
爱与关怀，这些东西本就不属于我。
Love and care, these things aren't meant for me.
我是废物…不，我什么也不是，我是虚无的零……
I'm a waste of space... No, I'm not even that. I am a void of nothingness...
外面好可怕，要不是有「威名赫赫」大人在，我们一定…呜呜！
It's scary outside. If it were not for our Sir Exemplary, then we'd surely... *sob*
我也想像婷婷姐那样…有个自己的名字，感觉好帅气诶。
I want a name just like Wendy... It sounds so cool.
我听那个呜呜叫的家伙说，科员们都有一个姓氏，所以你想好自己要叫温什么了嘛？
I heard that Wubbie saying that every one of the researchers shares the same surname. So have you decided what Wen to call yourself?
你是说…约瑟夫「召唤」来的那位…模特？
Do you mean... the model that Joseph... "summoned"?
是呀，我听说它就生活在咱们头顶上……
Yes. I heard it lives above our heads...

按这个逻辑，扮演一名完美的星际罪犯，难道真要去炸了一颗星球不成？也太不实用了吧。
By that logic, to play the perfect interstellar criminal, would you actually have to blow up a planet? That's totally impractical.

怎么可能？要有，那也不是火花~

要是这样就能成，世界上遍地都是假面愚者啦。

Shh~ The conductor's big ears seem to pick up everything.
不过，帕姆的神态和口癖，我已经完全掌握了帕。
But I've already completely nailed Pom-Pom's mannerisms and catchphrases.
该取个什么名字呢…「花胧」或者「火胧」怎么样？
What should I call it... How about "Petalveil" or "Sparkveil"?
嘻嘻，得是和赞达尔•贰•桑原不相上下的点子才行~
Hehe, it has to be an idea that can match Zandar Two Kuwabara's!
到下次见面前，我得再好好想想~
I'll think it over properly before we meet again~
到下次见面前，我得再好好想想~
I'll think it over properly before we meet again~
留声机里的音乐更新了不少嘛。下一首主打歌也有灵感了。果然还是得多接触银河间的新声音呀。
Huh, there's a lot of new music on the phonograph! I've already got inspiration for my next lead single. Sometimes all it takes is hearing a few new sounds from around the cosmos.
小灰毛，你有什么想听的吗？
Gray Hair, is there anything you'd like to hear?

Let me think... Amphoreus? Oh, right... I heard Robin's dropping a new track... Why not try them both!
没事，等我录个小样，再让你听听~
No problem. I'll record a demo and let you hear it.

I've submitted a request to the conductor for the Express's second car livestream collab, but I'm not sure when it will be approved.
谁让我是个尽职尽责的主播呢？要想维持粉丝黏性，就得一次比一次吸引眼球……

I promise I won't let you down!
I'd like to hear your opinion~
不如趁这个机会，帮我看看列车适合做什么直播？
While we're at it, could you help me brainstorm livestream ideas for the Express?
摆好火火博士、花花博士、兔兔玩偶和棒棒糖，再来点舞蹈，很会抓粉丝胃口嘛。

标题我都想好啦，就叫「无名客的狂欢派对上，他们竟喜欢……」
I've already got the title: "At the Nameless' Carnival, They Actually Liked..."
标题我都想好啦，就叫「银河球棒侠之家首度揭秘，{F#她}{M#他}竟然……」
I've already got the title: "First Look at the Galactic Baseballer's Home, {M#He}{F#She} Actually..."
以你的人气，直播间一定会爆满。

Oh, I just had a deep dive with Conductor Pom-Pom about the ways to feed different individuals.

在我们眼皮子底下将列车沾染上血污，我和老白一定会将凶手揪出来！

侦探的豪言壮志来源于他对证据与推理的自信！瞧瞧，血迹集中于此处，想必这里就是凶案发生的第一现场，可惜附近没有目击者，但这也说明，凶手对列车非常熟悉！

It's red wine that has been spilled!
幻月游戏如火如荼地展开，想靠押注赢一把吗？
The Phantasmoon Games are in full swing. Want to try to win big with a bet?
我钻研各类赛事多年，对这件事最深的见解就是——
I've studied all kinds of competitions over the years, and my greatest advice for you is...
永远不要把所有的香蕉放在同一个冰箱里。
Don't ever put all your bananas in the same fridge.
这种赌法，只适用于不要命又好运的家伙。
That type of betting only works for the reckless and ridiculously lucky.
这就对咯，世上多的是十赌九输的倒霉蛋。
That's more like it. Nine times out of ten, gamblers lose.
从前，为了改善生活，我曾一度沉迷赛马。
I got hooked on horse racing for a time, chasing a better life.
马的步速、骑师的操控、开场前的走位…其实一切都有迹可循。
The horse's gait, the jockey's handling, the pre-race positioning... it all followed discernible patterns.
总结下来，无非是「观察、分析、推理」，这套方法可以同样运用于其他赛事分析。
In summary, it's all about observation, analysis, and deduction. The same method applies to all other competition analysis.
I'm the main character, go all-in on me.
教你一招，没有开奖前，不要向任何人透露自己的押注——
I'll give you this one for free: Never reveal your bets to anyone before the results come out.
不过，你要是想分析局势，随时欢迎来找我。
But, I'm always here if you fancy going over the odds.
教你一招，没有开奖前，不要向任何人透露自己的押注——
I'll give you this one for free: Never reveal your bets to anyone before the results come out.
不过，你要是想分析局势，随时欢迎来找我。
But, I'm always here if you fancy going over the odds.
这难道没有记忆点吗？这样天才般的设计，怎么不被人欣赏？
Is this not memorable enough? I can't believe nobody appreciates this genius design!
我计划售卖几款侦探事务所的周边贴补家用，结果你猜怎么着？统统滞销！
So I was planning on getting some extra cash flow going by selling some agency merch, and what do you know? Total flop!
回头率百分百的名侦探台词T恤，印着「真相不止一个」，「最危险的凶手，往往是最明显的那个人」…亏我想了这么久，就卖出去三件！

These are head-turner t-shirts with famous detective lines like "There is more than one truth" and "The most dangerous murderer is often the most obvious"... Ugh, what a bunch of wasted effort just for THREE WHOLE ORDERS!
敲一下就会印上「你很行」字样的审判锤，也只卖出去两把。
Oh and, I only managed to sell two of those gavels that print "You Got This" when you hammer them.
最过分的是那个陨铁打造的手…手镯，超精美的设计，同时也是实用防身器具，居然一个也没卖出去。
The worst is the Meteoric Alloy... bracelet. Exquisite design, doubles as a practical self-defense gadget... ZERO sales.
二相乐园人到底懂不懂欢愉？
Do people in Planarcadia really understand "Elation"?
哎，艺术总要为商业牺牲，但谢谢你的建议。
Alas, art forever sacrifices itself on the altar of business, but I appreciate your advice.
I think they're cool! I want some!
我就知道还是有懂行的，谢谢你的认可！
I knew someone would understand! Thank YOU for the vote of confidence!
这样，我送你几张事务所的折扣券当作感谢。
How about this? I'll give you a few discount coupons from the agency as thanks.
以后星穹列车有任何需要帮助的要事，都可以放心委托给我不死途。
If the Astral Express ever needs urgent help, you can relax and count on ol' Ashveil.
至于价钱，给朋友的都是友情价，再加折扣券，等于不花钱！
As for the price... well, we offer friendship discounts. Add that on top of the coupons and you've got yourselves a free deal!
至于价钱，给朋友的都是友情价，再加折扣券，等于不花钱！
As for the price... well, we offer friendship discounts. Add that on top of the coupons and you've got yourselves a free deal!
天才的手稿散落在此，看懂手稿的人能成为天才吗？你开始浮想翩翩……
The genius' manuscripts are scattered here. Can one be a genius too if one can understand their contents? Your mind starts to wander...
天才遗留的手稿散落在桌面上，你试图拿起，但纸页却纹丝不动。上面究竟承载了怎样沉重的知识，你不得而知……
The genius' manuscripts are scattered over the desk. You try picking them up, but the pages won't budge. What kind of weighty knowledge do the manuscripts carry? You have no means to find out...
桌面上散落着几张手稿残页，你觉得此情此景需要一位会喵喵叫的桌面清扫专家。这突如其来的想法是否又会成为某项实验的灵感来源？你无从得知……

The remaining pages of a manuscript are scattered all over the desk. In your opinion, the situation calls for a meowing desk cleaning expert. Will that sudden thought become your inspiration for research? You have no means to find out...
空间站的终端网络修好后，越来越多的科员选择远程办公，在某些终端前大排长龙的场面业已消失。
Since the terminal network of the space station was fixed, more and more researchers have chosen to work from home. The long queues in front of some terminals can no longer be seen.
屏幕分辨率极高，每条数据标注都清晰可见，你开始怀念低分辨率的时代。
With the extremely high resolution of the screen, every data label is clear. You start missing the era of low resolution.
在仔细阅读了「请提交数据周报」的弹窗提醒后，你试图找熄屏按钮，但不幸的是，你没能找到它。
After carefully reading the pop-up notification that reminds you to submit the weekly data report, you fumble for the button to turn off the screen but fail to locate it.
静止的画面似乎是空间站接驳车的行程图，它们还能等来下一位客人吗？你很怀疑。
The still image on the screen appears to be the route map for the space station shuttle buses. Will there still be passengers for them to pick up? You doubt it.
你向下望去，一股强烈的危机感沿着脊椎攀爬至脑后，你默默握紧双拳。
As you look down, a strong sense of crisis creeps up your spine to the back of your head. You clench your fists in silence.
你扫视着下方，这里是整个禁闭舱段最骇人的区域，但你并不害怕，不会有什么存在比你本人更令人畏惧了。
You give the area below a scan. It is the most terrifying place in the entire seclusion zone, but you are not scared. Nothing can be more fearsome than yourself.
有传闻称下方区域隐藏着不可告人的秘密，有神秘怪物在此出没。你越发觉得这座空间站并没有外人想象中的那么「正常」。

Rumor has it that there are untold secrets hidden in the area below and mysterious monsters have been sighted. The more you think about it, the more you realize that this space station is not as "normal" as outsiders think.
冷冻休眠舱，在用不上的时候，它们便沦为维系空间站形象工程的道具。
The cryosleep pods, when not in use, are tools to maintain the image of the space station.
休眠舱里空空荡荡，你猜测在此休眠的科员或许已经得到了妥善安置。
Seeing the empty cryosleep pod, you suppose the researcher once inside has been properly accommodated.
很遗憾，童话故事在科学面前并不奏效，你并没有在冷冻舱里找到故事里的「睡美人」。
Unfortunately, fairy tales aren't a thing in the world of science, and you find no legendary Sleeping Beauty in the cryosleep pod.
密封的圆柱体实验舱，你只在影视作品里见过。
The sealed cylindrical experimental pod is something you have only seen in movies.
空间站用于进行各种生物实验的密封舱，曾被用来隔离危险物质，你很好奇它究竟装过什么东西。
The sealed pod is used to conduct various biological research at the space station and was once used to isolate dangerous substances. You wonder what kind of stuff it has contained.
你将脸贴在冰冷的表面向内窥探，却只能看见灯光下倒映出你的脸。你与空空如也的实验舱面面相觑。
You press your cheeks against its icy surface and peek inside, only to see your own reflection under the lights. You and the empty experimental pod gaze at each other.
绿叶蔬菜在某些星球是遭人嫌弃的土腥食材，在这里倒成了一种美味。
Leafy greens, which are considered repulsive and backwards foods on some planets, are a delicacy here.
「别摘！」金属外框上贴着界种科留下的便条。
"Don't take this off!" A note by the Department of Ecology is attached to the metal frame.
「你已进入监控范围，眼看手勿动。」这警告是针对你的吗？从培养田里肆意生长的植物来看，标语牌在这儿停留了很长一段时间，显然是你想多了。

"This area is under surveillance. Look with your eyes, not your hands." Is this warning meant for you? Judging from the plants growing wildly in the cultivated field, the sign has been here for quite some time. Surely you are overthinking.
界种科为培育出的植物提供了低温与干燥的密闭器具，以确保植物的长时间保存与活性。
The Department of Ecology keeps the grown plants in low-temperature, dry, and airtight containers to ensure long-term preservation and vitality.
培养舱中的植物形态让你感到似曾相识，它与星际和平公司某款食品的广告图片完全吻合，界种科捞外快的能力令你咋舌。
The plants in the incubator look familiar, as they closely resemble an advertising image of a food product from the IPC. You are amazed by the Department of Ecology's ability to rake in extra income.
在科员们撤离之后，植物培养舱依然在正常运转。
The plant incubator has been operating normally since the evacuation of the researchers.
培养罐中孕育着大株绿植，你很好奇它是否需要吸收星光。
Large green plants are grown in the incubation jar. You wonder whether they need to absorb starlight.
培养罐中的绿植只是露出新芽，但体积已经十分惊人，你很怀疑它们究竟能长到多大。
Although the plants in the incubation jar are only germinating, they are already of a staggering size. You wonder how tall they can grow into.
古怪的植物似乎无法吸收星光，你将脸贴近培育罐仔细观察，竟隐隐听到说话声，你猜测这可能就是空间站内某些爱说话的植物的雏形。

It seems that the odd plants are unable to absorb starlight. You lean in closer to the incubation jar for a closer look. To your surprise, you hear the sound of talking. You wonder if they might be the root of some chatty plants found within the space station.
I don't wanna be friends with you...
你往那边挪点，我没地方睡了。
Move over. I have nowhere to sleep.
有点冷，我可以趴在你身上睡吗？
It's quite cold. Can I sleep on top of your body?
好舒服，要是有被子就好啦。
This is comfy. I wish I had a blanket.
真受不了吃饭吧唧嘴的混蛋。
I can't stand those who eat with their mouths open.
嗝——感觉有点不消化，是吃太多了吗？
*Burp* My tummy's not feeling too good. Did I eat too much?
当前区域空间利用率未达到<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，请考虑提升空间使用率。
Space utilization rate for this domain is not yet <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. Please consider increasing space utilization rate.
不要的东西可以塞给我哦！
You can leave anything you don't want with me!
C'mon, let's snap a group picture!
这里好像没看到资料室。
I can't seem to find any archives here.
Stand in line at attention and number off.
你是几号机？我才是一号机！
Which number are you? I'm number one!
好奇怪，为什么大家都说我们身上有妈妈的味道……
That's weird. Why does everyone say that we smell like Mama's Kitchen...
We're one player short. Hurry over!
你手气也太好了吧？我不信，一会儿换个位置再来。
That's a hot hand you got tonight! I can't believe it. Will you switch places with me?
「杠上开花」算什么，我刚刚还自摸清一色了呢。
"Dead Wall Draw"? That's nothing. I just drew a Pure Suit.
我们有三名…伤口倒是有六个……
There's three of us... But six wounds...
What a coincidence. Is your name also Clara?
你们有见到一个高高的机器人吗？
Have you guys seen a tall robot around here?
咱们叠起来，一个顶三个…哎唷你打到我尾巴了。
Let's stack them up, four a stack... Ack, you hit my tail.
我感觉我们可以去表演杂耍，以我们的天赋——绝对有搞头！
I feel like we could put on our own variety show. With our talents, we'll definitely make a good show!
你可以再表演一下那个吗……
Can you do an encore of that one...
What are you still doing here?
Hush. It's my turn to speak.
你们该不会都有什么隐藏的天赋吧？
Don't tell me you all have some kind of hidden talent?
接下来要去哪里冒险呢？
Where to for the next adventure?
或许我们可以推进一个项目，模拟出一个微缩宇宙……
Maybe we can advance the project and simulate our own nano-universe...
这个概念很不错，可惜以你和我的体量，恐怕不能做到尽善尽美……
It's a brilliant concept. What a shame that with our size we won't be able to get things perfect...
好啦，别吵啦，都给人家看无语了。
Fine, quit making such a ruckus. People are going to stare.
你的花花好好看，在哪里搞到的？
Your flowers are gorgeous. Where'd you get them?
我听说那里有一个房间，里面种了很多花花！
I heard there's a room there with lots and lots of flowers planted inside!
你这伤口不要紧吧？外面是不是很危险？
Is your wound okay? Is outside really dangerous?
Shh, I'm training my mind. Keep quiet.
你也是被选中的孩子吗？
Are you a chosen child, too?
听说垃圾桶里藏着身怀绝技的{F#老奶奶}{M#老爷爷}，不知道{F#她}{M#他}能不能收我为徒……
I heard about this mystical old master {F#granny}{M#grandpa} inside the trashcan. I wonder if {F#she}{M#he} would ever take me on as a disciple...
呀——我们的颜色都是一样的！
当初阮•梅女士创造我们时，用的一定是同一袋面粉。
Miss Ruan Mei must've used the same bag of flour when she was creating us.
我头顶的颜色是天生的，你这个…是在哪里染的吗？
The color on top of my head is natural. Did you get yours dyed somewhere?
我身上也有这种「胎记」，我们会不会是失散多年的兄妹？
I've got that kind of "birthmark" on my body, too. Could we really be long-lost siblings?
没想到还能遇到和我脾气一模一样的家伙……
Never thought I'd ever meet someone with exactly the same temper as me...
…我是在照镜子吗？你走两步我看看。
...Am I looking in the mirror right now? Step back a bit and give me a proper look.
你努力踮起脚尖，试图看懂屏幕上的数据与理论。但你目光所及之处，只有空白的墙壁。
You stand on tiptoe, trying to read the data and theories on the screen. Yet, within your vision exist only blank walls.
你很懊恼，这些高深的理论离常人如此遥远。墙壁空空如也，就像你放空时的大脑，你的思绪飘远……
You are left frustrated by those profound theories which seem unreachable by average people. The walls are blank, just like your mind when you are spacing out. Your thoughts are drifting away...
你忽然醒悟，为什么要徒劳地追逐理论的彼岸，你该让宇宙的法则为你臣服。
Suddenly, realization dawns on you. Why make futile efforts to prove theories when you should in fact make the laws of the universe yield to you?
你本以为凭你的身高，想看清屏幕上的所有数据与理论都不在话下。但等你站定，你惊觉自己的渺小。
You thought you could easily read all the data and theories on the screen with your height. However, when you get to your feet, you find to your utter consternation how small you are.
你很疑惑，空间站为何要将屏幕挂在这么高的地方，你的思维开始逸散……
You are puzzled as to why the screen is hung so high up in the space station. At the same time, your thoughts begin to wander...
你从漫无边际的想象中猛地醒过来，你所窥见的，仅仅是整座空间站理论成果的冰山一角…想到这里，你对空间站肃然起敬。

You snap out of your boundless imagination and realize what you have peeked is merely the tip of the iceberg of the entire space station's theoretical results... The realization leaves you in awe of the space station.
「独家发售，稳定更新！」广告机无声地展示着黑塔手稿即将发售的消息。
"Exclusive release with regular updates!" Information about the upcoming sale of Herta's manuscripts is silently displayed on the advertising bot.
空间站终端的网络连接已经恢复，但广告机音响的修复工作还未提上日程。
The network connection of the space station terminal has been fixed, but the repair of the advertising bot's audio system is nowhere on the agenda.
你开始想念黑塔的声音，你有些好奇，她真的能「稳定更新」吗？
You are starting to miss Herta's voice, and you wonder whether she can really manage "regular updates" for her manuscript.
「新品上市，罐装一切！」广告机无声地展示着罐头广告，它的音响似乎还未修复。
"New product in the market! Everything can be canned!" An advertisement for a canned product is silently displayed on the advertising bot. Its audio system has yet to be fixed.
你认真研读了广告词上的「罐装一切」字眼，你怀疑这和奇物「分装快乐」有些关联，毕竟它们都是「罐头」。
You scrutinize the "Everything can be canned!" part of the advertisement and suspect it to have some association with the Joy Filtration Set Curio, since they are both about cans.
「定制化的绿色生活。」广告机无声地展示着绿色食品广告，它的音响似乎还未修复。
"Customize your eco-friendly lifestyle!" An advertisement for an environmental-friendly food product is silently displayed on the advertising bot. Its audio system has yet to be fixed.
你认出了广告画面上的界种科标识，你有些好奇——不知回到主控舱段后，能不能问界种科的科员要几盒来尝尝……
Noticing the Department of Ecology logo on the advertisement, you wonder whether you can get some samples of the product from their researchers when you return to the master control zone...
在科员们撤走以后，全局监控系统仍在运行。
The overall station surveillance system has been operating normally since the evacuation of the researchers.
屏幕最下方一行小字吸引了你：「系统正等待唤醒，请及时更新虹膜信息。」
A line at the bottom of the screen catches your attention: "System is waiting to be re-activated. Please update the iris information promptly."
什么人会把「生命培育箱」放在这堆破烂上？
What kind of person would leave a Life Incubator on a pile of junk like this?
——原来是你，你想起和洞悉者在此发生的一段小插曲，心神不自主地放松了下来。
So, it was you after all. You recall an episode featuring the Insighter here and your mind automatically relaxes.
你看向「王座」的目光也不自觉柔和了起来，这是你和洞悉者之间的小秘密，你将这段故事埋在心里某处柔软的角落。
Your gaze at the throne subconsciously softens. This is a little secret between you and the Insighter, and you bury it away somewhere in a warm, fuzzy corner of your heart.
嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗？
Hm? Are you trying to have a staring contest or something?
I heard you have something to tell me...
噢，那个啊，你不说我都忘了，实在是件小事……
Ah, I almost forgot. Well, it's nothing important after all...
我说我说！别生气嘛，不要这么冲动…是这样，我发现自己从来没得到过某样东西，我很想得到它，希望你能帮助我。
Alright, alright! Calm down, there's no need to get antsy... Here's the thing — I realized there's something that I've never had but always truly wanted. I hope you can help me.
这样东西就是「朋友」。对，我华莱士•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀这一生中，从来没拥有过真心的朋友。
And that something is... a friend. That's right, I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, have never had a true friend in my life.
不论花多少钱都行，我想得到朋友这样东西。
I would pay anything to acquire this thing they call a "friend."
你说的也有道理，是东西就能买到。
You're right about that. Things can be bought.
那可以多加点钱，把真心一起买了。
So you pay extra for the "true" part?
如果你能帮我交到朋友，我一定给你丰厚的酬劳。朋友越多越好。
If you can help me acquire a friend, I'll reward you handsomely. The more friends the better.
不过别太声张，我华劳斯怎么也是个有头有面的人物…不要闹得满城皆知！
But keep it discreet — I'm a well-known figure out there... I wouldn't want the whole city in an uproar!
嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗？
Hm? Are you trying to have a staring contest or something?
你就是我一直梦寐以求的「朋友」？
You're the friend I've been craving all this time?
怪了…什么情绪也没有，我还以为自己会很满足，很高兴……
How strange... I feel nothing. I thought I'd be so satisfied and contented...
开玩笑的，我们还不是朋友。
Just kidding. We're not friends yet.
原来如此，看来还是得从熟人中寻找朋友……
I see. I guess I'll just have to seek friends among my acquaintances.
As the saying goes: A hedge between keeps friendship green...
我们刚刚认识，完全没有来往嘛。看来还是得从熟人中寻找朋友……
Well, we've had no prior dealings — we only just got to know each other. I guess I'll just have to seek friends among acquaintances.
嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗？
Hm? Are you trying to have a staring contest or something?
啊，说起来，我有个好人选…
Aha! On that note, I do have a good candidate in mind...
有个叫莉拉的动物学家，学识渊博，了解很多新奇的东西，和我应该很谈得来。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
There's an erudite zoologist named Lila who understands all manner of novel things. I think we would get along splendidly. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?
有个叫曼娅的公务员，出身很不错，和我家也有点渊源。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
There's a civil servant named Manya, who is of good lineage — in fact, our families have a bit of history. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?
有个叫艾格尼斯的记者，成天在行政区晃悠，感觉挺有意思。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？

There's a journalist named Agnes who wanders around the Administrative District every day. She seems to be an interesting person. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?
有个叫拉雯妮的房地产中介，跟我做过几笔买卖，地位和我很相配。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？

There's a real estate agent named Lavonne with whom I've had a few dealings — in terms of social status we're an excellent match. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?
有个叫尼古莱的姑娘，那天搭讪我，问我愿不愿意帮她写信，是不是对我感兴趣？请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？

There's a girl named Nika who accosted me the other day and asked me to write a letter for her. Perhaps she's interested in me? Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?
要是找到了什么珍惜的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。
Remember to tell me if you find any rare animal species.
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
据说是行政区最有钱的男人
They say he's the richest man in the Administrative District.
喜欢假装自己很穷的那个
That guy that likes pretending he's poor?
你说的该不会是华莱士吧？好巧啊，他就是我的赞助商…等等，他要和我做朋友？我还以为他也对物种学感兴趣呢！
You can't be talking about Wallace? What a coincidence! He's my sponsor... Wait, he wants to be friends with me? I thought he was interested in speciology!
呃，说真的，我们最怕的就是和金主之间产生奇怪的关系了…你说的这件事我就当没听过，好不好？你就说你没找到我，拜托了！
*sigh* To be honest, the last thing I want is to enter into weird relationships with my backer... I'll pretend I didn't hear this, okay. Please just tell him that you didn't find me!
I hope you two can still be friends one day.
要是找到了什么珍惜的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。
Remember to tell me if you find any rare animal species.
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
他可是我的赞助商啊…唉，我为什么遇到这样的事情！要是处理不当，出城的计划就泡汤了……
But he's my sponsor... *sigh* Why do I always get into trouble like this? If I don't get this right, my plan to get out of the city will fall flat...
他为什么会想和我做朋友啊？我们都没说过几句话…我哪里吸引了他的注意，我改还不行吗？
Why would he want to be friends with me? We haven't talked much at all... What is it about me that attracted his attention? I'll fix it!
He thinks he'd get along splendidly with you.
No, no. I can't do it. He's so weird!
要是找到了什么珍惜的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。
Remember to tell me if you find any rare animal species.
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
太不像话了，这个人一点都不在乎别人怎么想吗？我才不会和这种人做朋友！
This is ridiculous. Doesn't he care how other people might feel? I'll never be friends with people like him!
我拒绝！我莉拉最讨厌那种把私人交往和学术工作混为一谈的人！
I refuse to! I hate people who confuse academic work with personal relations the most!
谢谢，我现在确实没有心情思考这些…
Thanks. I'm just really not in the mood to think about all this...
怎么又来了？都说我很忙，非常忙，城东城西，大事小事，事事都需要我们政务官思考……
You're here again? I told you I was busy. Like, very busy. No matter where or what the issue is, we civil servants have to be on hand at all times...
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
谢谢，我很感谢这位市民对我的认可，但我还有工作——谁？华劳斯？莱姆士汀家那个？
Thank you. I appreciate his recognition, but I have work to... Who? Wallace? That Limestein guy?
有意思，没想到我居然有机会认识莱姆士汀家族…
Interesting. I didn't expect to meet a Limestein...
I'll take that as a yes?
不对，不能冲动，曼娅啊！你要谨慎！莱姆士汀虽然富有，但本质上只是暴发户，并没有其他贵族的底蕴……
No, wait! Don't be impulsive, Manya! You have to be careful! The Limesteins are wealthy, but they're also new money. They have no aristocratic roots...
华莱士现年三十二岁又两个月，没有担任任何公职，传闻他整日游手好闲，莱姆士汀家族也不是很喜欢他……
Wallace is <unbreak>32</unbreak> years and 2 months old. He's never held a public office, and I hear he's a complete idler. The Limestein family doesn't appear to like him much either...
You know a lot about him.
…短期来看，我似乎有机会一跃进入上流社会！但是莱家树敌无数，在政坛缺乏根基。一旦莱家失势，或者华莱士被莱家抛弃……

...In the short term, it'd be my expressway to the upper classes! But the Limesteins have so many enemies, and no real foundation in political circles. If they were to lose their influence, or if Wallace were to be disowned by his family...
Gosh, my career would be ruined!
I think you two would hit it off.
再见，这位市民！我很感激你带来的口信，只惜我工作在身，没法回应！
Goodbye, dear citizen! I appreciate your kind message, but I must apologize. I simply have too much work to do to reply!
怎么又来了？都说我很忙，非常忙，城东城西，大事小事，事事都需要我们政务官思考……
You're here again? I told you I was busy. Like, very busy. No matter where or what the issue is, we civil servants have to be on hand at all times...
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
我的情报果然不假，这一定是个陷阱。莱姆士汀家的公子没理由对我一个小职员这么执着，这背后不知有怎样的政治黑幕…

As expected, my intel was right all along. This is most certainly a trap. A Limestein has no reason to be obsessed with a simple office worker like me. I wonder what shady political force is driving this...
He just wants to make friends.
He's really desperate to make friends.
哈哈，你还是太年轻，思维太浅，格局小了。这世界上没有这么简单的事，一切的背后都有权力和资本的推动……算了算了，我要洁身自好。
Haha, you're too young and too naive. Nothing is that simple. Everything here is driven by power and capital... Anyway, I choose to preserve my moral integrity.
我好不容易爬到这个位置，我绝不能犯错！
It took me so long to get where I am now. I can't afford to make a mistake!
怎么又来了？都说我很忙，非常忙，城东城西，大事小事，事事都需要我们政务官思考……
You're here again? I told you I was busy. Like, very busy. No matter where or what the issue is, we civil servants have to be on hand at all times...
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
我是一名光荣的政务官，我的生活里没有朋友，只有需要服务的市民！再见！
I am an honorable civil servant. I have no time for friends — only citizens that need to be served! Goodbye now!
随着时间推移，鲑鱼的醇味被稀释，夕红果的肉脯会被入侵，当夕红鱼的食材和调味已经难分彼此，以食材命名的区分方式将失去意义…

Over time, the rich flavor of Salmon dilutes, as it makes its way into Redsunset's flesh. When you can no longer tell Redsunset Salmon's main ingredient from its seasoning, the dish's name doesn't make much sense...
我在干什么，我不能再这么思考了……
What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
Wallace? Is he a food connoisseur?
如果他喜爱美食，那我很愿意和他交流！不然的话还是免了，我还要思考下一期专栏怎么编…怎么写呢！
If he loves gourmet food then I'm willing to get in touch with him! Otherwise, no can do. I still have to work out how I'm going to spin... I mean, write my next column!
随着时间推移，鲑鱼的醇味被稀释，夕红果的肉脯会被入侵，当夕红鱼的食材和调味已经难分彼此，以食材命名的区分方式将失去意义…

Over time, the rich flavor of Salmon dilutes, as it makes its way into Redsunset's flesh. When you can no longer tell Redsunset Salmon's main ingredient from its seasoning, the dish's name doesn't make much sense...
我在干什么，我不能再这么思考了……
What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
又是那个人？他到底是谁啊？
Him again? Who is he exactly?
他是莱姆士汀家的公子。
他是个没朋友的可怜人。
He's a pitiful guy with no friends.
他除了钱以外一无所有。
He has nothing apart from money.
听上去和我不在一个世界啊，你还是建议他找别人当朋友吧。
Sounds like someone from a different world to me. Tell him to find someone else.
你回来啦？宜居城郊板块，新的商机新的风口，要不要？
You're back? We have all kinds of new suburban commercial prospects. Interested?
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
因为他是我的客户，跟客户只能谈生意，不能谈友情。
He's my client. I talk business with clients, not friendship.
我怎么会讨厌华莱士？我可喜欢他了，问题是——如果你跟一个人是朋友，就只能赚他一次钱；做客户，能赚无数次。
Why would I hate Wallace? I actually like him. The thing is, you can only make money from a friend once. But with a client, you can make as many times as you want.
你回来啦？宜居城郊板块，新的商机新的风口，要不要？
You're back? We have all kinds of new suburban commercial prospects. Interested?
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
这家伙还挺固执的哈？我看出来了，哈，他也不傻，想和我套近乎……
This guy sure is persistent. I see... he's not stupid. He's just trying to curry favor with me...
但是不行，老实说，我很喜欢华莱士，但我可不能为了友情损失一位大客户。
But still, no can do. To be honest with you, I like Wallace, but I can't lose a big client just for the sake of friendship.
当然可以，有的商人能一边称兄道弟，一边把你卖了数钱。但我不是那种商人，我有自己的原则。
Of course, some businesses can be on intimate terms with you — all the while selling you down the river. But I'm not that kind of businesswoman. I have my principles.
你回来啦？宜居城郊板块，新的商机新的风口，要不要？
You're back? We have all kinds of new suburban commercial prospects. Interested?
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
唉，你知不知道华莱士和我是什么关系？上个月他和西蒙勋爵打赌输了，托我处理了两套宅子——这一笔买卖我赚了小半年的收入。

*sigh* Do you even know the kind of relationship I have with Wallace? Last month he lost a bet with Lord Simon, so he got me to sell two of his mansions. I earned nearly half my annual income just from those deals.
你觉得我要是和这样的金主成了朋友，还能赚他那么多钱吗？那还有人性吗？
Do you think I could make that kind of money if I became friends with guys like him? And would that even be ethical?
Can't you separate life and work?
只要活在这世上，就不可能公私分明的。感情会让人失去理性，大多数人没有能力把两者区分开。
As long as you live in this world, you'll never achieve that. Emotions make you irrational. Most people can't even tell life from work.
这样赚钱也没好到哪里去啊…
It's not like there's anywhere else to go with all that money...
但我对得起自己啊，我问心无愧就好，管别人呢？
At least I can live with myself — my conscience is clear. I don't care what others think.
Wallace wants to be friends with you.
你的标签几乎覆盖了行政区一半的人，住这儿的非富即贵。
That's over half the population of the Administrative District. Everyone here is well-to-do.
你搭讪让帮忙写信的那个。
The one you approached to help with your letter.
哈哈哈，我几乎让所有人都帮忙写信来着。
Hahaha, I ask everyone to help me with that.
我现在还挺忙的，抱歉，如果那位华劳斯有什么事情找我，让他自己来吧。

Wallace wants to be friends with you.
噢，现在我知道是谁了，可我俩没什么来往啊。
Ohh, now I know who he is. But we've never even spoken to each other.
You asked him to help with a letter.
这…也行吧。但我没那个意思，并没想认识他，抱歉。
That was... Fine. But that's all it was — I'm not interested in getting to know him. Sorry.
总之我没那个意思，不是想认识他，抱歉。
Anyway, that's all it was — I'm not interested in getting to know him. Sorry.
看的出来，唉，人和人之间怎样才能正确地传递信息呢？我遇到这种事情越多，越觉得笔杆子乏力。
I can tell. *sigh* What's the best way to convey information to another person? The more I come across questions like this, the more I realize how tired our writers must be.
还是专注于培养优秀的作者吧。
We should focus on training good writers instead.
嘘——这里边，每首都有故事。有空的话你也多听听呗？
Shh... Listen, each song has its own story. Maybe you can listen to some when you have the time?
诶诶诶诶诶，别、别踩！我刚扫的！
Ehhhh! Don't bring the dirt in here! Pom-Pom just swept!
这又脏了，都是你干的好事！
It's dirty again all thanks to you!
虽然我没法出去，但就像这样看看外面的星空，好像也挺不错的。
Pom-Pom can't go outside, yet even from here, the stars are still so pretty to look at.
你说…外面的世界，是什么样的呢？
So... the outside world. What do you think it's like?
看来暂时是不用再补货了。
Looks like the inventory won't need be restocked anytime soon.
嗯？来买东西的？记得要先排队哦。
Hmm? Here to buy something? You'll have to get in line first.
喝完水就要快点长高高帕！
More water for you to grow taller, taller, taller!
你也需要浇水吗？看你长这么高，不至于吧？
Do you need to be watered too? It looks like you've grown tall enough already.
…ZZZZZ…怎么回事，有什么紧急状况吗？
...Zzzzz... What's going on? Did something happen?
列车长也是需要休息的，帕姆可不是机器人。
Pom-Pom isn't a robot! Train conductor needs breaks too!
旅途…梦想…走到最后的人不过寥寥，更多的人只是在见证诞生与破碎……
Journeys... dreams... few make it to the end. Most people are just bystanders, witnessing birth and brokenness in the world...
没什么，在列车上待久了，总有一天你会明白的。
It's nothing. Stay on the train long enough and one day you'll understand.
呣呣呣…扣子怎么会扣不上呢……
Hmmm... how can a button be so stubborn...
你、你可别误会了，甜甜圈这种东西，帕姆一天只吃三个……
Do—don't get the wrong idea! Pom-Pom only eats three donuts a day...
每天都得打扫一遍，烦死个人了帕！
Ugh... Every day Pom-Pom has to clean it over again. What a nuisance!
这位乘客麻烦让一让， 你的列车长还要去干活呢！
Move along, passenger! Your conductor has to get to work!
好像也没什么特别的事情发生。
Eh, there doesn't seem to be anything special going on.
不过…车厢里这么安静，反而让人有点不习惯呢？
Hm... the coach is quiet. Maybe a little too quiet?
唔…站久了果然就会想打瞌睡。
Ah... Standing for such a long time makes Pom-Pom want to take a nap.
不是我自夸，这里的灯光、温度都是我精心设计过的，会犯困倒也正常。
Not to brag or anything, but the lighting and temperature here are carefully calibrated by Pom-Pom, so it's normal to get sleepy.
啦啦啦啦～嗯？你回来啦！见到乘客安全归来，列车长自然会感到很欣慰的帕！
La la la la la~ huh? You're back! It's natural for the conductor to feel relieved when their passengers return safely!
难得的闲暇时光，{NICKNAME}乘客要是玩累了的话可以直接休息哦。
You finally got some leisure time. Don't forget to grab some sleep when you're done wandering about, {NICKNAME}.
真好啊，要是我能跟你们一起出去看看的话……
Sounds nice. If only Pom-Pom could go out on expeditions with you...
你怎么突然回来了，是在外面惹上什么麻烦了吗？
Back already? Did you get into some trouble?
请不要干扰列车长的日常工作！
Quit being a nuisance! Pom-Pom is working!
Aha! One of Pom-Pom's best buddies!
平安无事又一天～啦啦啦啦～
Another peaceful day... La la la la la⁓
车厢温度给你调好啦，欢迎回来哦！
Pom-Pom adjusted the cabin temperature for you~ Welcome back!
帕姆喜欢甜甜圈、星穹列车，还有…列车上的所有乘客！
Pom-Pom loves donuts, the Astral Express, and all the passengers aboard the train!
倒也没有什么特别有趣的事，不过就是感觉…特别舒服！
Things have been pretty quiet here recently... but at least it's always cozy!
呜啊…车厢里很舒服对吧，这就是家的感觉！
The Express is so cozy... Just like home should feel!
年轻人，以前没见过你啊。
Young {F#lady}{M#man}, I've never seen you before.
呵呵，人呐，一辈子总得来趟行政区，要不怎么好自称贝洛伯格人呢？你还是挺幸运的，不像我，打小在这长大，住得都麻木了。

Heh, everyone needs to visit the Administrative District at least once in their lifetime. How would they be able to call themselves a citizen of Belobog if they don't? You're lucky, I've grown numb to this place from growing up here.
I was also born and raised in the Administrative District.
呵呵，你真幽默。行政区本地每家人我都熟悉，可从没见过你。哎～人人都爱往行政区跑，可我们这些本地人啊，都住腻咯。

Hehe, you're a funny one. I know every local family in the Administrative District, yet I've never seen you before. *sigh* Everyone wants to come to this district, but for us locals, we've grown tired of living here...
I've never seen you before either.
你「没见过」我？没见过我华劳斯？呵呵，那你一定不是本地人。
You've NEVER seen me before? Never seen Wallace? Hehe, then you must not be a local.
我是华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，莱姆士汀家族第二十五任家主。幸会！
I am Wallace Cambridge Limestein. I am the <unbreak>25</unbreak>th head of the Limestein family. Pleasure to make your acquaintance!
好！咱们这就算认识了。记住，以后你在行政区需要找什么人办什么事，尽管开口问我就行。
Good! I'd say we're now fairly acquainted. Remember, if you ever need someone in the Administrative District to get something done, just come to me.
对了，你要是在这附近发现了什么好玩的人或事，别忘了叫上我一起研究讨论。人生嘛，就是要及时行乐！钱不是问题，图的就是一个新鲜。
By the way, if you find anything or anyone interesting, let me know too. Life is all about having fun! Money is no issue, curiosity fuels me.
呵，真是悠闲的一天…你还有什么想问的吗？
Ahh, what a fine day it is... Is there anything that you want to know?
嗨，算不上有钱，将将够用而已。
Oh, I wouldn't say I'm rich. I'm... comfortable.
行政区这儿有几套私宅，都得雇人打理，还要交土地税。你说租出去吧？又懒得费这个心思，时间也是钱啊。再说，那些宅子里还放了不少古董……

I have a couple of properties in the Administrative District that require maintenance. I have to pay taxes for them. But I'm far too lazy to rent them out — I mean, time is money! Besides, they're full of priceless relics...
算不上，就是喜欢折腾而已！
Not exactly. I just like to own them.
比如前阵子，西蒙勋爵告诉我，他弄到了一块特别稀有的金表，听说是第三任大守护者留下的遗物。
For example, a while back Lord Simon told me he obtained a particularly rare gold watch, said to be a relic left behind by the third supreme guardian.
这种好东西我怎么能错过！所以我提议，拿三套宅子跟他换那块表……
How could I miss out on such a rarity! So I offered him three houses for it...
I think I get the picture.
嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗，还是说有事找我？
Hmm? Is there anything worth my attention, or something you need to talk to me about?
我前几天花了点小钱——啊，也就是几个古董花瓶的价格——托人搞到了下层区的机械宠物。可惜吧…组装完之后，也就那么回事。

A few days ago, I spent a small sum of money — as much as the price of a few antique vases. I requested for someone to fetch a mech-pet from the Underworld. Unfortunately... once it was assembled, it was nothing special.
至于下面来的人呢，张口谈政策，闭口谈钱谈生意。我啊，和他们根本聊不来，没劲透了！
As for the people who come from below, all they talk about is policies, money, and business. There is absolutely nothing I can talk to them about. How painfully mundane!
我就搞不懂了——哎，你说说，这钱到底有啥用啊？怎么大家成天就想着这点东西…庸俗，实在是庸俗……
I just can't even fathom the point. Can you try to explain to me what's the use of money? How can people spend all day longing after something like this? It's so unrefined, down right vulgar even...
咦？看你这副模样…有点与众不同啊。
{F#是长得太美了的意思吗？}{M#是长得太帅了的意思吗？}
{F#Do you mean I'm very pretty?}{M#Do you mean I'm very handsome?}
唔…除了毛发灰白以外，看上去倒也还是个正常的人类。
Well... Besides the hair, you appear to be normal.
但你这身衣服并不是这里常见的款式，上面的纹理装饰也很罕见。而且你裸露在外的手指和脸颊，并没有涂抹矿脂的痕迹……
But the way you dress isn't the norm around here. Those patterns are rarely seen. And there's no trace of petroleum jelly on those clean fingers and face of yours...
对了，和你聊了这么多，你应该没看过《地底动物百科》吧？
Oh, yes, I've just been rambling on. You probably haven't read the Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology, right?
啊，抱歉，我并不是有意冒犯你。我叫莉拉，是《远行者》月刊的撰稿人，也是一名动物学家。
Ah, sorry, I didn't mean to offend you. My name is Lila. I'm a writer for the Voyager, and also a zoologist.
你知道吗？贝洛伯格的人种至少有三个不同的起源。但你似乎并不属于其中任何一种，这也是我当时那么吃惊的原因。
Did you know that humans in Belobog have at least three different origins? But you don't seem to belong to any one of them. That's why I was so surprised back then.
但你看起来好像…不属于其中任何一种，所以我有点好奇。
But you... you don't seem to be from any of them, so I'm a little curious.
哈哈，我一定是研究到脑子不正常了…唉，自从得到那本书后，我就经常胡思乱想。
Haha, I must've been researching too much... Ever since I got my hands on that book, my head's been in the clouds.
就是这本《地底动物百科》，据说是某个银鬃铁卫从地底带回来的。里面记录了好多奇珍异兽：结晶宝石蜥蜴呀、食髓洞螈呀、葬礼虫呀什么的……

This one, the Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology. I heard a Silvermane Guard brought it from the underground. It describes many strange creatures: Crystalline lizards, geomarrow olms, funeral worms...
就是这本《地底动物百科》，据说是某个银鬃铁卫从地底带回来的，里面记录了好多奇珍异兽呢。
This Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology was apparently brought back from the underground by a Silvermane Guard. It talks about a lot of strange creatures.
自打我看完以后，连吃饭都在想象这些动物的模样。
Ever since I finished the book, I couldn't stop thinking about how these animals must look like.
真想知道结晶宝石蜥蜴、食髓洞螈、葬礼虫之类的生物，究竟是怎么进食、怎么繁衍的呢……
I really want to know more about these crystalline lizards, geomarrow olms, funeral worms... I want to know what they eat, how they reproduce... everything.
对了，和你聊了这么多，你应该没看过《地底动物百科》吧？
Oh, yes, I've just been rambling on. You probably haven't read the Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology, right?
What creatures are there in Belobog?
猫，狗，雪地里的野狼和一些抗寒的鸟类…没别的了。其它动物只能去博物馆里看标本，一睹往日模样。
Cats and dogs. There are wolves and birds in the wild... That's about it. You'll have to check out the museum's specimens to see what other kinds of animals there were in the past.
听说好多年以前，贝洛伯格还有被驯化的熊，野外有冰原狼。不过现在已经看不到了。
I heard that hundreds of years ago, Belobog had domesticated bears, and direwolves roamed the wild. They're no longer around though.
不过，我相信还有其它物种设法在寒潮中幸存了下来，只是没法证实而已。现在嘛，也只能研究研究各种各样的人类——
But I believe there are other animals out there that survived the Eternal Freeze. I just have no way to prove it. Now, I have no choice but to study humans...
Why don't you go look for them?
我也以记者的身份出过几次城，但是报导期根本没时间做生态调查。
I've been outside the city a few times for journalism, but there wasn't enough spare time to do ecological research then.
不过…我最近遇到一个大金主——只要能满足他的要求，他就愿意资助我探险，而且还帮我搞定了出城的批文。
But recently, I met a benefactor who is willing to finance my expedition as long as his requirements are met. He's even willing to take care of the expedition permits and formalities as well.
我已经在筹备出城的计划啦。
I'm already making preparations for the expedition.
没有，等我见到了再跟你说。
Not yet. But I'll let you know when I see one.
以后你要是有幸见到了什么珍惜的生物，记得要告诉我哦~
If you see any rare species in the future, remember to tell me about them!
这套书在市面上可买不到，但是非常有意思的动物学科普读物哦。这两本书就送你啦，有空的时候翻翻看吧。
These interesting books on zoological science can't be found on the market. So, here, take these two books. Read them when you have the time.
以后你要是有幸见到了什么珍稀的生物，记得要告诉我哦~
If you see any rare species in the future, remember to tell me about them!
嗯？你来啦，是见到了什么珍稀动物吗？
Oh, you're back. Seen any rare animal species?
还是你有什么关于动物方面的问题，想来找我聊聊？
Or do you have any zoological questions you'd like to ask me about?
我过得挺好的呀，就是最近睡得不怎么好。
I've been doing alright. I just haven't been sleeping so well.
唔…说出来也不怕你笑话，我现在是市政厅派往贝洛伯格外部区域探索的先遣队队员，负责调查那些未知的动植物。
Oh... I'm worried you'll laugh if I tell you. I am a member of an exploratory vanguard dispatched by the Town Hall to go outside Belobog. I'm responsible for investigating unknown flora and fauna.
So the reason you aren't sleeping is that you want to imitate owls?
「猫头鹰」？那是什么，从来没听说过呢…壁外有这种动物吗？如果是真的，我一定要去好好调查一番。
Owls? What's an owl? Never heard of it... Is there a creature like that outside these walls? If there really is such an animal, then I must to go and do some research.
啊…想必你还不知道吧？市政厅最近已经在安排人手探索城外啦。听说上下层区也即将恢复正常，再过不久大家都能随意进出了。

Ah... You probably don't know, right? The Town Hall recently arranged for some people to explore the area outside the city. Supposedly, the Underworld will be returning to normal soon. Pretty soon, everyone will be able to come and go as they please.
市政厅还给我发了一些户外用具——我准备之后去考察下野生动植物的生存环境，然后把它们记录成册！
The Town Hall gave me some outdoor gear. Once my preparations are complete, I'll go and investigate the habitat of the wild flora and fauna out there. I'm going to record them to make a manual.
所以啊，一想到我的研究有机会取得重大突破，我就兴奋得整夜都睡不着……
So, whenever I think about how my research has a chance of achieving a major breakthrough, I get so excited that I can't sleep a wink...
抱歉，我很忙。有事请预约，好吗？如果你预约了——呃，现在是我的休息时间，你可以先去窗口取号排队，预计在一个小时后就会轮到你……

Sorry, I'm busy. Please make an appointment. If you already have an appointment... well, I'm on break, so you can get a number and wait until you are called. It's expected to be your turn in an hour...
You just said you were busy...
那当然，我们政务官员永远都在忙，总有那么多事情要思考…市民杂务就像千条线，能穿上线的就只有我们几根针，你说能不忙吗？

Of course, administrative staff are always busy. There are always so many things to think about... Admin works are like messy yarns, and there are only a few administrators to gather the threads into skeins. How could I not be busy?
哪怕是休息时间，我脑子里也在一刻不停地规划各种工作的细节。所以，请不要打扰我的工作，谢谢。
I'm going through work details in my brain even during my breaks. So, please don't interrupt my work, thank you.
我的工作就是帮市民解决问题。如果保证不了充足的休息，我就没法高效地帮助市民。
My job is to help citizens solve problems. If I can't get enough rest, how can I help others effectively?
合理分配工作和休息时间，有利于我们提高工作效率。我能理解大家焦虑的心情，但还请你们耐心等待。
A reasonable time allotment for both work and break helps improve efficiency. I understand your anxiety, but I'll have to ask you to be patient.
听明白了吗，这位市民朋友？
There's something else I want to ask.
都说了，现在是休息时间…好吧，既然你执意要问，那就问吧。
I just said I'm on break... Fine, if you insist.
What kind of work do you do exactly?
问得好！我的工作可能有点琐碎，但却是贝洛伯格正常运转中不可或缺的重要环节！你甚至可以说，我是这座城市的无名英雄。
Excellent question! My job involves a little bit of everything, but vital to keeping things running smoothly in Belobog! You could say I'm the unsung hero of the city.
我负责行政区的街道和社区事务，倾听来自基层民众的请求，解决日常的民生难题。
I'm responsible for grassroots affairs in the Administrative District, listening to basic requests from people, and solving day-to-day issues.
那你会倾听我的请求吗？
In that case, can you hear out my request?
当然没问题！不过，刚刚我说的还不够严谨：每天上午9点到中午<unbreak>12</unbreak>点，下午2点到5点，我在这段时间内负责行政区街道和社区事务。

Of course! But you will need to reserve a slot. My work hours are from 9:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM to <unbreak>12</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM, and 2:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM to 5:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM. I handle administrative and civil affairs during these times.
现在是休息时间。作为公职人员，公私分明是最基本的素养。
I'm currently on break. As a public official, separating professional and private time is of basic importance.
How do I make an official appointment?
在克里珀堡二楼<unbreak>236</unbreak>号柜台填写申请表格。然后去克里珀堡三楼<unbreak>35</unbreak>号窗口找工作人员确认盖章。
Please fill out a form at counter <unbreak>236</unbreak> on the second floor of Qlipoth Fort. Then have a staff member stamp it at window <unbreak>35</unbreak> on the third floor.
盖完章之后，请去克里珀堡一楼的<unbreak>155</unbreak>号窗口排队领预约证明，正式处理通常需要在预约发起一个月以后。

After stamping, please head to window <unbreak>155</unbreak> on the first floor and wait in line for the proof of appointment. The formal processing usually takes one month after the appointment has been made.
具体的流程请在预约时咨询窗口办公人员。
To inquire about the specific processes, please consult the window staff when making the appointment.
你其实就是在偷懒而已吧…
You're just trying to slack off, aren't you?
你怎么会这么想？不过也不怪你，很多人都有和你一样的错误认知，以为我的做的是一份清闲的工作。
What would make you think that? But I don't blame you. Many have the same misunderstanding, thinking this is just a job where you can kick your feet up.
比如说「上班就是喝茶看报，跟同事聊聊天，然后看着时钟等着下班」。实际上，这都是误传。
A job where I just "Clock in, drink tea, read the newspaper, chit-chat with colleagues, and stare at the time, waiting to get off." But that's all nonsense.
请抛弃你对基层公职人员的刻板印象，我们的一天可是很忙碌的。
Please lose these false impressions of grassroots public officials. Our days are busy ones indeed.
没什么了…你继续休息吧。
Nothing... Sorry to bother you during your break.
不客气，为每位市民服务是我的职责所在。
It's okay. It is my duty to serve every citizen.
好了，现在请给我一点私人时间……
Now, if you could just give me some privacy...
怎么又来了？都说了现在是休息时间…哎，这位市民，你到底想问什么事？
You again? I just said I'm on break... Fine, so what exactly do you want to know?
过得怎样？如你所见，还是老样子。办着一样的公事，领着一样的工资。
How have things been? As you can see, it's just the same old, same old. Doing the same work for the same pay.
市政厅没派你去下层区吗？
Didn't the Town Hall send you to the Underworld?
市政厅已经安排了合适的人员，我们政务官员当然要依照规章制度来行事。
The Town Hall has already allocated suitable personnel for that. Our administrative officials naturally want to do things by the book.
还有，下层区的民生问题并不在我的职责范围内。你要想咨询下层区的事务，请咨询下层区临时政务官员。

Also, the livelihoods of people in the Underworld is not within my job responsibilities. If you want to inquire about the Underworld, please submit your inquiries to an Underworld interim administrative official.
Oh, I assumed you had been promoted.
…让你失望了，我还是政务部官员，依旧负责处理行政区的民生事务。
...Sorry to disappoint you. I am still an Administrative Official responsible for handling matters related to civil affairs in the Administrative District.
大守护者阁下正在优化市政厅的官员结构。但在最终结果公示出来之前，请不要相信任何小道消息，一切以克里珀堡张贴的公告为准。

Her Excellency, the Supreme Guardian, is optimizing the structure for officials in the Town Hall. But I advise you not to give credence to any gossip before the final results are announced. Everything will be subject to notices posted in Qlipoth Fort.
咳咳，这位市民…没事的话请不要妨碍我工作。为了保证上下层区的正常连通，市政厅上下最近都在加班，我可没时间和你闲聊。

Ugh. Citizen... If there is no problem, then please refrain from obstructing my work. In order to ensure the regular connection between the Overworld and Underworld, Town Hall officials at every rank are working overtime. I don't have time for idle chatter.
我捡到了几封未妥投的信。
投丢的信？这倒是属于政务部的业务范围不假，但是……
Unsent letters? This falls within the scope of duties of the Administrative Department, but...
Alas... fine. Let me take a look.
这上面写的什么？「帮我买张邮票贴上，再帮我寄出去」……
What does it say? "Please buy me a stamp and post this for me..."
那你倒是写上地址呀——这人怎么没头没脑的？
Why isn't the recipient's address provided? The sender is so careless.
…咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.
你捕捉到曼娅的目光扫了一眼旁边的垃圾桶。
You notice Manya's fleeting glance at the trashcan next to her.
「行政区，六号街，三十五栋B<unbreak>03</unbreak>室，卡隆•艾尔收。」
"Carlo Eyre, B<unbreak>03</unbreak>, Building <unbreak>35</unbreak>, 6th Street, Administrative District."
奇怪，地址和收信人写的很清楚，这怎么还会寄丢？邮政局的人也太懈怠了吧……
How can this letter be undelivered when the recipient's name and address are clearly written on it? The people at the post office must be slacking off...
…咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.
「致我唯一的，珍贵的，芳华永驻的，聪慧伶俐的……」
"To my one and only beautiful and smart..."
…什么乱七八糟的，这人不会觉得自己很浪漫吧？
...What kind of nonsense is this? Does this guy think he's very romantic?
…咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.
你捕捉到曼娅的目光扫了一眼旁边的垃圾桶。
You notice Manya's fleeting glance at the trashcan next to her.
「我写的垃圾的文字就不该见到阳光。也好，就让它们在黑不见底的邮筒里慢慢腐烂吧。」
"The trash I wrote should never see the light of day. That's fine, it can rot forever in the bottom of the dark mailbox."
我看看…欸…我觉得这人的文笔还不错呀？
Let me see... Hmm... This person is quite a good writer, huh?
…咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.
你从她的眼神中能看出来，曼娅已经决定把这封信留给自己了。
You can see in Manya's eyes that she has decided to keep the letter to herself.
「这个甜味，有点像是煦日节之后，冻河初开，从冰块的缝隙中挤出的第一滴水，凛冽之中又裹挟着一丝温暖……」
"This sweet taste is like the first drop of water from the cracks of the ice when the river unfreezes after the Solwarm Festival, a bit of warmth amidst the bitter cold..."
你觉得这样写怎么样，会让你食欲大振吗？
What do you think? Doesn't this description give you an appetite?
Yeah, do you see anyone else?
语气这么勉强？说明你其实就是在说「不」。
You don't sound so convinced. I understand, you are saying "No."
唉，也不能怪你，是我的描述还不够吸引人。
Well, I can't blame you — it's my own problem. My writing is not good enough.
可恶，要是不能用文字构筑味觉、形成通感，那我们美食记者还有什么存在的价值？对了，正巧跟你聊着，我这里还有一段，你帮我听听——

Darn it. What's the point of being a food journalist if I can't use words to construct a sense of taste and utilize synesthesia? By the way, while I'm talking with you, I have another paragraph here. Let me read it to you.
对了，正巧跟你聊着，我这里还有一段，你帮我听听——
By the way, I've got another line, listen to this:
「喧宾夺主的浓油赤酱，就像大军入侵一般，将鲑鱼本来的清爽味道完全淹没，那一丝气息微薄的鱼本味，只能高举降旗败下阵来……」
"The rich sauces are like an invading army, completely overwhelming the crisp and fresh taste of the salmon. The gentle aroma of fish has no choice but to surrender in defeat..."
感觉如何？是不是有点累赘？
How's that feel? A little too wordy?
Yes, a lot of unnecessary details.
是啊，职业病。我以前是文学记者，每天就是变着法地往句子里塞形容词，要是读者能在三行内弄清楚主谓宾，主编就要扣我奖金。

I can't help myself, I used to be a literary journalist. Every day I was trying to add more adjectives to the sentence anywhere I could fit them. I wouldn't get my bonus if readers can easily deduce the subject, predicate, and object within three lines.
后来我就转行了，因为来了个新人，比我还会凑字数…哎，你看过《水晶日报》的美食专栏吗？专栏作者艾格尼斯就是我。
But then a new girl came and was better at filling in words than I was, so I made a career change. Have you read the cuisine section of the Crystal Daily? I am the author of that section.
说实话，我也不想闭着眼睛搞这些虚头巴脑的东西了……
Honestly, I don't want to include all that garish garbage in my writing anyway...
哎，我打算再研究研究遣词排句的技巧。你还有别的事吗？
I'm gonna put more work into honing my rhetorical skills. Well, enough about me — how can I help you?
Then why don't you try a more straightforward style of writing?
不行啊，报社有要求，主编有规定：首先字数得给够，这玩意有指标的，我们按字数结工资……
It won't do. The paper has its requirements and the chief editor has his own. Word count needs to hit quotas, that's for sure. We get paid by words after all...
其次，我们主编的硬性标准就是：高端大气！最好让读者一看就觉得自己没作者懂得多，心里油然而生一股子敬佩之情。

Other than that, the editor has made it clear that our paper is produced with the educated class in mind. Ideally, our average readership should consider exposure to our publication both a privilege and a chance to learn.
那个新人编辑就特别擅长这一手，她有门绝活，就是把一句话翻来覆去地写，洋洋洒洒几百行，本质上就十个字。
That newbie is a natural for this. She can write a hundred pages for what could have been described using a few words.
十个字能说清楚的事，谁又想写几千字呢？不过，从专业的角度来看，这也是一门谋生技术，所以把位置让给尼古莱，我也心悦诚服……

Who wants to write an essay when it could be done with just ten words? But when you write professionally, it becomes a useful skill. Nika was better at this. That's why I had no objections to giving my position to Nika...
不过——我写不来啊！鄙人真的做不到啊！
Be that as it may, I just can't force myself! I am not made for this!
努力加强下写作技巧吧。
Write some more and you'll get the hang of it.
一万字的采访稿，被我生生地扩成了四万字，这已经是极限了！
I've already bloated a ten thousand-word interview script to forty thousand! That's the best I can do.
想想人类迄今为止的写作技巧都被我拿来堆砌字数，实在是悲哀啊。
To think that the ways of great writers accrued through the ages are used by me to simply bloat word count... How pathetic.
希望我的连篇累牍也能像今天的解释一样清楚……
I hope my long articles can be as clear as the explanation today...
没有。不是气话，就是没有——贝洛伯格就这么大，几百年来就这么些食材翻来覆去地做，再怎么排列组合也做不出新菜色了。

Nope. I'm not mad at you. I'm simply stating facts. Belobog is not a huge place with a huge variety of food. The same ingredients are used for hundreds of years. Quite literally every possible combination has been used at some point.
不过如果你是外地人…那倒是可以试试夕红鱼。
But if you are not from around here, Redsunset Salmon might be worth trying.
虽然其它区也有这道菜，但没有哪的食材新鲜程度能和行政区相提并论。第一次尝试的味道绝对让你难以忘怀！
It's not exclusive to this place, I know. But you can only get the freshest salmon from the Administrative District. Once you've tasted it, you'll remember it for the rest of your life.
How many dishes have you tried?
往少了说，四千多种吧——但实际上嘛，贝洛伯格人编菜名是一绝：一条鱼身上可以划出几十种部位，每个部位之间排列组合一下，几百道不重样的菜就诞生了。

Four thousand, if I'm being conservative. But to be honest, hundreds of these dishes are purely new combinations of old recipes. People in Belobog are masters when it comes to naming their food. We have names for dozens of body parts of fish. When you mix and match, you'll come up with new recipes in no time.
哎，别客气。有空的话可以看看我的美食专栏，提点意见。
No worries. If you'd like, do have a look at my column on food. Comments are always welcome.
要是有任何与美食相关的问题，千万不要客气，直接来问我就好。
