If you have any questions related to food, don't hesitate to come to me.
「随着时间推移，鲑鱼的醇味被稀释，夕红果的肉脯无力阻挡被入侵的命运，当夕红鱼的食材和调味已经难分彼此，以食材命名的区分方式将失去意义…」

"Over time, salmon's rich taste becomes mild and makes its way into the defenseless Redsunset. When the seasoning and ingredient of Redsunset Salmon melt into each other, the distinction drawn between salmon and Redsunset becomes ever more blurred..."
抱歉，我的稿子还没赶完。今天刚写了一段，结果连我自己都看不下去……
Sorry, still scrambling to finish my article. Did one paragraph today, but I want to bin the whole thing already...
哎，我打算再研究研究遣词排句的技巧。你有事找我吗？
Need to put more work into honing my rhetorical skills. How may I help?
抱歉，我刚刚在脑海里构思稿子的细节，没注意到你。
Sorry, I was thinking about the details of something I'm writing. I didn't notice you.
你问我最近啊？挺好的，可以说是前所未有的充实。
You were asking how I've been recently? Pretty well, but I've been more productive than ever.
又在编虚假的美食故事？
Are you making up food stories again?
没有的事。说起来，多亏了大守护者的决策——虽然我还没资格申请去下层转悠啦——但上下层区的物资已经开始正常运输了。

I would never make up a story! Anyway, thanks to the Supreme Guardian's decision — even though I still don't qualify to apply to wander around the Underworld — the flow of goods between the Overworld and Underworld has already started to normalize.
那些蘑菇和可食用苔藓，吃起来真不错。我最近品尝了不少新奇的下层区美食，我现在脑子里可是灵感爆炸，得好好捋一捋才行。
The mushrooms and edible moss aren't too bad. I've recently sampled several new foods from the Underworld, and now my brain is bursting with inspiration. I have to make good use of it.
Will you go to the Underworld to collect materials?
我倒是想呐…但想前往下层区得去市政厅申请许可，像我这种游客性质的出行需求可没那么容易获得批准。
I certainly would love to... But you need to apply for permission from the Town Hall to go to the Underworld. Travel requests of a tourism nature like mine aren't as likely to receive approval.
不过现在上下层区的物资已经开始正常运输了，下层区的美食从这里也能买得到——而且价格还很便宜。
At least goods are already starting to be regularly transported between the Overworld and Underworld. I can buy food from the Underworld here, and the prices are cheap.
我这几天都在品尝下层区的新菜，比如蘑菇和可食用苔藓什么的…味道还真不错。等以后彻底放开了，我得好好下去感受下那里的就餐环境。

I've been trying new dishes from the Underworld in the past few days. I've had mushrooms, edible moss, and more... The flavor has been pretty good. Once travel between the two areas fully opens up, I simply must go down there and experience the dining environment.
宜居城郊板块，水电暖供应充足，精装修拎包入住，稀缺楼盘，机不可失！这么好的机会，我都恨不得给自己来一套！喂，你！你还在等什么？

Great location in the outskirt of the city, energy and water already sorted out. For this fully furnished property with fabulous interior design, you need to bring nothing but yourself! High demand, limited supply! I'd want to take one for myself! Hey, you there! What are you waiting for?
I'm waiting for you to finish.
还有什么可说的？一桩大便宜就在你的眼前！我上面有人，懂吗？我的内部消息向我透露，这批房子的价格在两年内稳涨不跌。
What else can be said? The price is unbeatable! I have friends in high places. You get my drift? My sources have told me that the price of this property will only go up in the next two years.
<unbreak>30%</unbreak>…不，<unbreak>40%</unbreak>！而且实话跟你说吧，这完全是保守估计。
An increase of thirty percent... no, forty! To be honest with you, I'm being conservative here.
实际涨幅至少是这个数，明白了吧，你不要被吓到啦。我其实是故意往低了说，不能让太多人知道内幕消息，毕竟——
The actual number is at least this much. Don't look so scared. See what I mean here? I'm trying to keep it on the down low, because...
I'm not looking to buy a property.
年轻人不急着买房，我能理解。但是你想过吗，从投资的角度来看，这可不仅是一座房子，它是不动产！
Sure, sure, young people are not in a hurry. I get it. Let's put it this way: From the perspective of an investor, we are not talking about a house to live in. It's an asset!
我要是你，就趁这个机会买进，等它价格涨上去了，再出手卖掉，大赚一笔！
If I were you, I wouldn't miss out on this opportunity. Buy it now, wait for the price to go up and sell it. Easy money!
而且，我向你承诺，你只要投资了，不管有没有人接手，你只要打算卖，我就会按涨幅<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的价格给你挂牌——

Tell you this, if you buy the property and decide to sell it at some point, no matter if you find a potential buyer, I'll list it for you <unbreak>13%</unbreak> higher than the current price. You have my word.
我跟你说，我可是本地最大的中介商！没有我卖不掉的房子。
Trust me, I am the best local property agent. There hasn't been a house that I couldn't sell!
But the outskirts have only snow-covered fields.
我以为你是个目光长远的人呢。难道你只看眼前吗——
I took you for someone who can think long-term! Don't be shortsighted.
买房就是一项投资，等到楼盘建好了再买，升值空间就小了。很多人买房都喜欢观望，结果呢，观望着房价就飞涨到压根买不起了。

A property is an investment. If you wait until the house is built before you buy it, that'll eat into your profit margin. I've seen lots of people who like to wait before making a purchase. By the time they made their decisions, the price had already gone out of their league.
而你呢？你是个聪明的投资者，赶在开盘前投资进场，过几年就能高价卖出大赚一笔。
You, my friend, look like a shrewd investor. Buy it before it's listed and you'll be raking in money in a few years' time.
现在你再看看，那还是一片平平无奇的雪地吗？那分明是一座静待开掘的金山！
Now when you look at those fields again, do they still look like snow-covered dust bowls? They're unexplored gold mines!
I still think you are a scammer...
说话注意点，我是拉雯妮——行政区谁不认识我？只有蠢材才会分不清机遇和骗局，你不傻，对吧？

Don't be rude! I am Lavonne. If you ask around, there's not a single soul in the Administrative District who doesn't know my name. Only fools mistake opportunities for fraud. I trust you are not one of them?
而且，大守护者的购房新政听说过没有，你去打听打听，绝不会有假的，白纸黑字清清楚楚。
Even if you don't trust me, surely you have at least heard about the Supreme Guardian's new housing bill? Go ask around and see it for yourself.
连我都已经购置了两套！我还能自己骗自己吗？
I myself have bought two properties! I can't be scamming myself, can I?
话只能说到这个份上了，你回去再好好想想，别做会让自己后悔的决定！
I've probably said enough. Anyway, think about my proposal. Don't make a decision that you will someday regret.
我想再深入了解你的房源。
I'd like to know more about these properties.
再考虑下去，花店的花都要谢了！要是有什么关于买房的问题，我建议你现在就问。
It'll be too late if you don't make up your mind soon! If you have any questions regarding the property, I suggest that you ask me now.
But I don't have enough money...
我知道你在顾虑什么，我就明说吧，看上这个项目的人很多，钱已经投进去不少了。
I understand your concern. Let me tell you this, lots of people have already invested in it.
现在只需要付一笔定金，我就能在开发商那儿给你先预定一套。怎么样，很方便吧？现在没钱不是问题，未来还长，早投早发财。

All I need is a deposit, with which I will be able to secure your place for the property. Sounds good, huh? Money is not the problem here. In the long run, the earlier you make the investment, the more you get in return.
Are you certain about the info of the property?
那当然，我手上很多项目都需要和克里珀堡里的大人物打交道，就连现任的大守护者我也见过几面。
Of course! I'm working with influential figures in Qlipoth Fort on a number of projects. I've even met the current Supreme Guardian a few times.
细节不能透露太多，这事牵扯太大——你是明白人，应该知道我的意思。我只能说懂的都懂。
I can't go into details, as many are involved if you see what I mean. I trust we understand each other. All I can say is if you are in, you won't regret it.
I need some time to process all that information.
Can I ask you something else?
你问吧，客户永远是我的上帝。
Ask away. It's always a pleasure to help a customer.
贝洛伯格就你一个地产中介？
You are the only property agent in Belobog?
严格来说，是行政区唯一的房产中介——我在别的区有几个竞争对手，不过嘛，你看地盘就知道谁更厉害，他们可休想染指行政区。

Technically, I'm the only one in the Administrative District. I do have a few competitors in other districts, but I'm sure you can tell who deals with bigger clients judging by the areas we operate in. They won't be a threat to me in a million years.
我手头有行政区七百年来的全部房产交易纪录，另外，贝洛伯格八大家族的族史我都倒背如流——靠着手头的这些信息，我才能争取到官员的支持和民众的信任。

I have data on all property sales in the Administrative District for the past seven hundred years, and I know the nitty-gritty of the history of the Eight Belobog Families. My knowledge has won me the trust of both government officials and regular people.
官员和民众都爱来我这打听房源，跟我做生意。住房对每个人来说都是刚需，而我努力工作就是为了满足这些需求。
People from all walks of life come to me when they need to find properties. Demand for housing has always been high, and my job is to help people find what they need.
那楼盘到底是怎么回事？
If so, what's the deal with the not-yet-built property we talked about?
嗐，何必问这么细呢？这是种新的商业模式，叫做「预售」。我先收一笔钱，然后给到开发商去做开发，如果开发失败了，我就把钱退还，成功了则皆大欢喜。

Nah, you don't want me to bother you with trivial details. What we talked about is a new business model called presale. I take the money from the buyer, send it to real estate company for delivery. If for some reason the property can't be delivered, I'll simply refund the buyer. Everyone ended up happy.
可靠渠道告诉我，下一任大守护者布洛妮娅大人是个温和中立派，所以有超过七成的概率会支持开发新城区的战略，而我是行政区唯一的地产中介……

I've learned from reliable sources that the next Supreme Guardian Lady Bronya is a moderate centrist. There's a seventy percent chance that she will be in favor of developing new districts. Combine that with the fact that I am the only property agent in the Administrative District...
所以我决定做个成熟的商人，转嫁风险、预支利益。这可是个发大财的机会，你千万别错过了！
Therefore, I decided to be a smart businesswoman who knows how to spread risk and maintain cash flow. This is a great opportunity if you are looking to make a fortune. Don't miss out!
这就完了？不打算预购吗？我告诉你，机不可失，失不再来！
So soon? Not going to make the purchase? It's a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!
I'm in a hurry. See you later.
聪明人都懂得把握机会，我相信你也是个聪明人。
Smart people always seize opportunities when they present themselves. I trust you are no exception.
你回来啦？之前跟你说的城郊楼盘你考虑得怎么样了，来一套吧。
Good to see you back. Did you have time to consider buying the property we talked about?
还是说，你还有些什么别的事儿要来找我？
Or is there anything else you want to talk about?
你是说城郊楼盘？记得我怎么跟你说的吗——「下一任大守护者布洛妮娅大人是个温和中立派」，现在不就应验了嘛。

You mean the real estate at the outskirts of the city? Do you remember what I told you once before? "Lady Bronya, our next Supreme Guardian, is gentle and a centrist." Well, turns out that I was right.
我跟你说，开发城郊那都是板上钉钉的事！之前没人想到这回事，楼盘的价格才低……
I told you that the development of areas outside the city was carved in stone. No one had imagined this before, and so property prices were low...
但现在这上下层即将连通，那势必要迎来一波购房热潮，房价自然要往上走——你想啊，这一来一回不是赚翻了？

But now that the Overworld and Underworld are going to be connected soon, people are going to be buying up property for sure. Naturally, housing prices are going to start climbing up. Then, people can make money hand over fist, right?
So, did you sell the place?
So, how much money did you make?
商业机密，无可奉告，我只能告诉你，这套楼盘最近热得烫手，要买就抓紧了！再迟一点说不定你就负担不起，只能租房了。

Trade secret. No comment. All I can tell you is that real estate has been hot. Better buy while you've got the chance! If you're too late, you might not be able to afford the prices and will be stuck renting a place.
以后可能会有不少人在那边定居，到时候房源可就供不应求了…这可是克里珀堡的大人物跟我透露的内幕消息，绝对靠谱！

In the future, there might be a lot of people looking to live out that way. Demand for housing will outpace supply... I'm revealing insider information I got from some important people in Qlipoth Fort. It is totally reliable!
Anything else you'd like to ask?
如今新任守护者已经上任——据我了解，她有极大概率会支持开发新城区的战略，而我是行政区唯一的地产中介……

Now, the new Guardian has taken office. As far as I know, she will highly likely be in favor of developing new districts. Combining that with how I am the only property agent in the Administrative District...
过了这村可就没这店啦，劝你早点做决定。
It's now or never. Please make a decision soon.
那边的朋友，请留步！对对，就是您！不好意思…能耽误您几分钟吗？
Excuse me! Sorry—Yeah, sorry to bother you. Can I take a moment of your time?
我能问您一个问题吗？——文学方面的。
Can I ask you a question, about literature?
只是很简单的常识问题，想请教一下您的看法。
Just one of those general questions. I'd like to hear your take on it.
哎，请等一下！不会花您太长时间的。
Wait a minute! It won't take long.
那么我就直接问了——您会如何评价《雪原》、《三个三重音》这两部作品？
I'll get straight to it. How would you rate these two books, Snow Plains and The Three Trebles?
什么？实在太可惜了…这两部可都是上过「贝洛伯格必读榜」的名作啊。
What? That's a pity. These are must-reads on the list of "Books You Should Read in Belobog."
唉，算了…我也不能指望人人都有文学素养……
Well, don't mind me... I guess I can't expect everyone to be as educated...
自我介绍一下，我是《水晶日报》出版部的尼古莱。这样唐突打扰您，是因为我们正在收集读者的请愿，申请解禁《雪国冒险奇谭》。
Let me introduce myself. I am Nika with the Crystal Daily. Sorry to bother you but we are collecting petitions from readers to lift the ban on the Tale of the Winterlands.
这两部作品构思别出心裁，情感色彩鲜明，语言精雕细琢，具有强烈的个人风格…
Powerful, stylish, and full of unexpected twists and turns, these two books demonstrated with their refined language the strengths of both authors.
虽然可以看出作者尝试对自我意识进行探寻和突破，美中不足的是思考浅尝辄止，终究成不了文学史上留名的杰作。
Their attempt to question and explore the spiritual side of mankind is commendable but unfortunately falls short compared with some of the greatest works of literature.
妙啊，妙啊！您真的对文学有很深的研究。
Amazing! Words of wisdom from a true master.
自我介绍一下，我是《水晶日报》出版部的尼古莱。这样唐突打扰您，是因为我们正在收集读者的请愿，申请解禁《雪国冒险奇谭》。
Let me introduce myself. I am Nika with the Crystal Daily. Sorry to bother you but we are collecting petitions from readers to lift the ban on the Tale of the Winterlands.
如果您能赏光在这里留下自己的签名，那就帮大忙了。当然，如果您有任何顾虑，也尽可发问……
It would be wonderful if you could sign here. Of course, feel free to raise any concerns...
What exactly is Tale of the Winterlands?
您不知道吗？那是我社出版的一部冒险小说，筑城者前些日子刚刚宣布把它列为禁书，我们也不得不销毁尚未售出的库存。
Have you never heard of it? It's an adventure novel published by us. The Architects banned it not long ago, which forced us to destroy what's left in our stock as well.
但我可以保证！这部书绝没有任何不良内容，它只是…太有想象力了！它描绘了雪幕之外的种种宏伟奇景…简直精彩绝伦！
But I can assure you, there is no problem with the content! It's just... too creative. By that I mean it depicts the wonders beyond the snow curtain. Truly magnificent work.
市政厅担忧人们会受这本书影响，未经许可私自出城。唉…道理我都懂，但怎么能把罪过都推给一本小说呢？
The Town Hall worries that people might venture out of the city without permission after reading the book. They have their concerns and I understand that. But you can't blame a novel for that.
我上哪去看《雪国冒险奇谭》？
Where can I read Tale of the Winterlands?
我身上没带副本…这样吧，你去行政区找一个叫亚诺的人，我之前委托过他改编《雪国冒险奇谭》，还塞给了他全本作为参考。或者您也可以找找其他门路。

I don't have a copy with me at the moment... I'd suggest you go find Amo in the Administrative District. I commissioned him to adapt Tale of the Winterlands and sent him a copy a while ago. Or if you can get the book through other means, feel free.
这套书现在不好弄，所以就麻烦您多费点心啦。
It's not easy to get a hold of the novel these days. Thank you for your trouble.
You are buying public opinion, aren't you?
不不不！我只是请您帮一个小忙…我可是正规出版社的编辑，有上岗证的，怎么会做出违反行业道德的事情呢！
No, no, no! Think of it as me asking for a favor... I am a certified editor from a reputable publishing house. I won't engage in anything unethical!
我是在、是在…是在鼓励人们说出自己的看法！对，如果您读完《雪国冒险奇谭》，觉得它应该被查禁，我也会鼓励您写下自己的观点！
I am, uh... merely encouraging people to express themselves. If you think the novel should be banned after reading it, by all means, please say so. I will encourage you to write down your opinion.
当然，如果您觉得它被查禁确实不公，那就更应该仗义执言了！
But of course, if you think it doesn't deserve the ban, that's even more of a reason to speak out!
What do I need to do exactly?
很简单——只要在这张请愿表上留下您的签名，再附上一句您发自内心的肺腑之言就好。
Simple! Just sign this petition form and add a comment about what you think.
I don't have any more questions.
I need some time to think about it...
哦对了，为了表达诚意，这本《贝洛伯格七大不思议》就送给您作为见面礼吧！
Ah yes, as a gesture of goodwill, I'll give you The Seven Wonders of Belobog as a gift!
您打算在请愿表上签字了吗？还是说，您有其它问题想问呢？
Are you ready to sign the petition or do you have any other questions?
最近出版业有啥新消息吗？
Any news from the publishing industry recently?
最近？预计会有不少新书出版，不过都是一些和下层区环境生态有关的科普读物——毕竟现在大家对那里的境况都很好奇呢。

Recently? We're expecting to have several new books coming out, but they are all popular science books about the Underworld's environment and habitat. After all, people are curious about what things are like there.
…另外还有个小道消息，说是现在市政厅已经派先遣队去城外探险了——再加上现新任大守护者布洛妮娅是个温和改良派，所以……
...Also, there has been a rumor that the Town Hall has dispatched a vanguard to explore areas outside the city. Bronya, the new Supreme Guardian, is a moderate reformist, so...
《雪国冒险奇谭》说不定要解禁了。不过这个消息尚未得到证实，只是有这个可能。
It's possible that the ban on Tale of the Winterlands will get reversed, but this hasn't been confirmed yet. It's just a possibility.
现在还不到松懈的时候，所以我还在为请愿表收集签名。
This is not the time to get complacent. I'm still collecting signatures for the petition.
曙光就在眼前了，这个时候更加不能放弃，您说对吧？
The dawn is at hand. We can't afford to quit now, right?
宇宙、时空、过去、现在…灵感就要降落了，啊！灵感！
Universe, time and space, past and present... I'm onto something! Eureka!
别出声！…喔，你没出声，很好。不要打扰我的科研！
Shh! Oh, you didn't say anything. Good, do not interrupt my research!
I doubt that's how you discover something.
不要出声！不要打扰我的科研！
First time seeing anyone doing research like this.
唉，和你这种人没法交流。科学研究不是炒菜做饭或者洗衣叠被…要是你看一眼就知道我在研究什么，那还要科学家有啥用？

*sigh* It's impossible to talk sense into people like you. Science is a complicated matter, nothing like your everyday chores that require only two brain cells to do. If you can tell what I'm doing with your untrained eyes, I might as well quit the job and let you do it!
笑话，科学家当然以理服人。唉，我雷金居然要和一个看不懂我科研的人讲道理——科学界没救了！
Fair enough? I'm trying to give you some education. Bah! To think that I, Regin, am reduced to bickering with you... Science is dead!
笑话，一个看不懂我科研的人说我雷金强词夺理——科学界没救了！
Says someone who has no clue what I'm doing with my research. Science is dead!
我的时间非常宝贵——要么有话赶紧说，要么就别妨碍我研究「大宇宙时间隧道」理论。
I don't have much time to waste. Tell me what you want or step aside and let me continue my research on the big universe time tunnel.
If I may, I'd like to ask...
What is the subject of your research?
好吧，我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
Fine, I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?
Good. So you are not completely ignorant.
我就知道，跟外行人着不了这个急。
Hardly a surprise. I knew I had to dumb things down for you people to understand.
Of course. Now let's not get ahead of ourselves.
反正你只要知道光是粒子就行了，什么波理论啊二相性啊，这些高级术语跟你说了也白搭。重点是：粒子会携带信息，对吧？
All you need to know is that light is a particle. Terms like wave theory or duality might be too complicated for you. My point is: Particles carry information. Are you with me?
光作为粒子，它携带信息；那我接触光，本质就是在接触信息。根据我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，宇宙是多个相互关联的平行实体。

Light as a particle carries information. Building on that, if I am exposed to light, I am exposed to information. My big universe time tunnel theory holds that the universe consists of multiple interconnected entities that are running in parallel.
假如某一个宇宙的我想出了传递信息的方式，而另一个宇宙的我想出了解读信息的方式，那根据我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论……
Say if in one universe I came up with ways to send messages and my "doppelganger" in another universe knew how to interpret those messages, it means, according to my theory...
就能解读平行宇宙传达的信息！
That you can interpret messages sent from another universe!
That you can get research funding!
没错，没错！当然了，我只是用一种非常浅显的方式向你解释，这里面的玄机其实深了去了……
Yes, yes, well I'm trying to explain things in layman's terms. The real mechanism behind this is far more complicated...
How did you come up with that stuff?
我再重新强调一遍，这个跨时代的理论名叫「大宇宙时间隧道」！
Let me remind you: The theory I'm proposing is called big universe time tunnel!
啊，大宇宙…我毕生的研究，我伟大的创造！这个理论起源于前年，那时我正在吃饭，一道电光突然窜进我的脑海！我当时就知道，这是当代最重要的发现！

Ah yes, big universe... my life work, my child! It all started two years ago when I was struck by this wonderful idea while having a meal. I knew from the very beginning that this is going to be the biggest discovery of our time!
只要能造出时间隧道，我就能震惊全世界！
The world will be left in awe when my time tunnel is completed!
那当然，如假包换！只有贝洛伯格科学界的那些老顽固不愿承认这点——他们嫉妒我的才能，生怕我的研究成果颠覆他们的地位。
Of course I am! What kind of question is that! Those jealous old nerds and hags in Belobog's academic circle refuse to recognize me only because my revolutionary findings will make them look useless.
不过金子总会发光，地髓总会发热，迟早会有人愿意资助真正的科学！唉，我一直在等这样的人，怀才不遇是多么痛苦啊……

Geomarrow always rises to the top, it is just a matter of time before a talented scientist such as myself receives proper funding for my research. Alas, I have always been waiting for a patron to come along. It is painful to see my talent go unnoticed...
你没有经过系统的学习吗？
Did you not receive academic training?
一看你就不懂当今的科学界…大家都忙着争权夺势，拿腔作调，从那群人身上又能学到什么呢？
That just goes to show how ill-informed you are about the science community today. What can you learn from a bunch of self-righteous nerds who fight tooth and nail for money and power?
怎么，你不信？看着吧——迟早有一天，我要让「大宇宙时间隧道」成为世人皆知的科学理论！
Find it hard to believe? One day, the world will tremble before my big universe time tunnel! You'll see.
而这条理论就出自自学成才的伟大民间科学家，雷金！
And my name, Regin, will go down history as the greatest civilian scientist!
有什么问题下次再说吧，我要继续寻找科研灵感了。宇宙、时空、过去、现在……
Whatever questions you may have, wait until next time. I need to get back to work now in search of inspiration. Universe, time and space, past and present...
灵感…这次一定能捕捉到灵感……
I'm onto something... I know it...
…啊！可恶，又让它跑了，都怪你——噢，原来是你啊。找我有什么事吗？
...ah! Dang it. It got away again. It's all your fault — Oh! It's you. Did you need something?
最近有什么研究进展吗？
Have you made any progress with your research?
当然有，我马上就要找到适合建造时空隧道的地方了——
Of course, I have. I am soon going to find a suitable place to construct the time tunnel —
——还有，你说话小点声，别打扰到我构建时空隧道的模型！
— Also, keep your voice down. Don't disrupt me from constructing the time tunnel model!
不就在这儿嘛，我这么大个脑袋没看到？我们天才从来不需要借助外力——包括纸笔——靠这一副好脑袋就够了！
It's right here, obviously. Can you not see my big brain? A genius does not require the help of external tools, including pen and paper. All a genius needs is their own brain!
Where do you plan on making the tunnel?
这还不简单？时空隧道的基点就在下层区的矿道里！
Easy. The central point of the time tunnel is within the mine tunnels in the Underworld!
可别不信！你想啊——下层区断联这么多年现在又突然开放，其背后的原因我看一定就是大宇宙时间隧道——以此类推可知……

Don't doubt me! Think about it. Contact with the Underworld has been cut off for so many years, and now the Underworld is suddenly open. I believe that the reason behind all this must be the Big Universe time tunnel. From this deduction, we know that...
可知…这时空隧道的基点就在矿道里啊！你说是不是有理有据？
We know that... The central point of this time tunnel is in the mine! It's a logical conclusion backed by evidence. Wouldn't you say?
总之，我坚信这个方向一定是正确的——只要我能到下层区的矿道实地勘察一番，就一定能找到佐证我伟大理论的有力论据！

In short, I firmly believe that this is the correct direction for my work. All I have to do is get down into the Underworld mines and inspect the site. That will absolutely lead me to solid evidence that supports my magnificent theory!
...If I can get the funding I need.
在看我的过去，现在和未来。
Things that were, things that are, and things that are yet to happen.
What's so special about the trashcan?
不，它平平无奇，毫无特色，就像我。
Nothing. It is plain and lacks character, just like me.
啊，我就是一堆一无是处的垃圾。垃圾桶才是我应该栖身的归宿。
Ah, I am good for nothing. I am destined to end up in a trashcan.
Don't be so harsh on yourself.
你误会了，我是在思考生命、价值和永恒。
You misunderstood me. I am pondering about life, value, and eternity.
谢谢，我以前确实以作诗为生。
Thank you. That was indeed my occupation.
忘了自我介绍，鄙人亚诺，是一位写手。抱歉挡住你的去路了…嗯？怎么，找我还有什么事吗？
I forgot to introduce myself. My name is Amo. I write things for a living. Sorry for blocking your way... Hm? Can I help you with anything?
啊，「作家」这称谓我可担不起！我只是个量产劣质文字的写手。我现在以代笔为生，是一堆替人代笔都不知从何写起的垃圾。

Ah, I'm afraid I don't deserve the title. I produce less than mediocre writings in great quantity for others. A ghostwriter as they say. I doubt if I'm qualified to write at all, even for the rubbish I produce.
那你都创作了什么文字？
那你都量产了什么垃圾？
What kind of rubbish have you produced?
我写了一些恐怖小说，批评家们觉得它的质量低劣到恐怖，根本不该出现在这世上；我还写了本灾难小说，评论界一致认定它的诞生就是一场灾难。

I wrote some horror novels, the quality of which can be described with the name of the genre according to some critics. Some say those novels should never have been written in the first place. For the disaster fiction I did, same critiques also apply.
你听说过《雪国冒险奇谭》吗？就是前阵子被禁了的那部小说。其实出版社觉得那本书水平很高，希望能在原本的基础上进行改编，重新出版。

Have you heard of Tale of the Winterlands, the fiction that was recently banned? The publisher was actually quite happy with the quality and wanted the author to make some edits on the original so that they can publish it again.
谁想到那作者居然跑路了，直接人间蒸发，连个影都没留下！编辑迫于压力，就联系了我，问我能不能代笔。
But they did not expect the author to simply vanish into thin air! The editors had to contact me instead, asking if I can help with the project.
「啥雪国冒险奇谭，不过是地摊文学而已，我随随便便就能给你写个十几二十万字，小意思！」——好不容易接到个活，我当时头脑一热，就这么答应下来了。

"Ha! Tale of the Winterlands is just some cheap folklore compiled together. I can give you one hundred thousand to two hundred thousand words with ease. Piece of carrot cake to me." — That was my response when I took the job. You know how hard it is to finally get something going. I was just trying to impress them but ended up getting way ahead of myself.
直到编辑送了我一本原作让我感受风格，我才发现情况不对。那是本真正的杰作！文学界高人辈出，那位作者的想象力和神韵，我根本模仿不来。

One of the editors had sent me a copy to let me get the feel of it. It wasn't until I started reading that I realized the book was going to be a classic. I had to admit, I couldn't even remotely reproduce the author's creativity and style.
编辑后来找了我好几次，我实在交不出稿子，完全不敢见她。
The editor has made several attempts to contact me since then, but I managed to avoid her each time because I just couldn't deliver.
现在你怎么看《雪国冒险奇谭》？
How would you rate Tale of the Winterlands now?
天才的杰作——也许文笔不是顶尖的，但故事里满溢的狂想令人惊叹。贝洛伯格人被困在雪里七百年，想象力都枯竭了，这部作品点燃了人们对雪原之外的事物的渴望…

A Masterpiece of a true genius. Maybe the language still has room for polishing, but the wild passion weaved into the plot is other-worldly. For seven hundred years the people of Belobog have been trapped in the snow, their imagination taken away. This book reignited people's desire to look beyond these snow-covered lands...
大概就是因为这个，筑城者才要把这本书列作禁书吧…据说《雪国冒险奇谭》出版以后，后来一个月走进雪原的失踪人数翻了好几倍。

Maybe that's why the Architects insist on banning it... I heard that within a month of the book's publication, the number of people that ventured out into the snow and went missing had gone up exponentially.
What's your plan for the future?
To avoid the editors for the time being.
…然后再想想要是被编辑拉进黑名单，以后我该靠什么过活…唉。
And contemplate on what to do for a living if I'm blocklisted... *sigh*
Don't put so much pressure on yourself.
抱歉，我最近遇到了瓶颈……
Sorry, I've had a difficult time lately...
不要气馁，努力提高自己！
Don't give up just yet. Pull yourself up by your bootstraps.
不要比较，写自己的风格！
Stop comparing yourself to others. Go with your instincts!
哈哈，那我就会被永远钉在文学史的耻辱柱上…「亚诺是谁？他怎么好意思打着《雪国冒险奇谭》的名义写这种垃圾？」
Hah! I'll become a laughingstock in the history of literature if I do that. "Who's this Amo? How dare he write this rubbish and claim to be writing Tale of the Winterlands?"
行行出状元，换个工作吧。
No need to stick to one career path. How about doing something else?
哈哈，我也想…但我真的喜欢写作，虽然我写出来的东西根本不值一提，但只要还能提笔写东西我就很开心了……
Haha, I did consider doing that, but... writing is my true passion. My writing may be bad, but I feel happy when holding a pen in my hand...
谢谢你陪我聊天，这本书送你吧，这才是真正的佳作，我希望它被更多人读到……
I should thank you instead. It's good to have a little chat. Here, take it, a fine book indeed. I hope more people get to read it.
凝视着垃圾桶，我的心灵便归于平静，仿佛回到了家乡…啊，那故乡的风；啊，那故乡的味儿……
I always feel this strange calm when I stare at the trashcan, as if finally returning to where I belong... Ah, the breeze and the smell...
…啊！不好意思，我完全沉浸在乡愁之中了。我记得你，好心人。你怎么来了？
Oh, don't mind me. I was completely lost in that sense of belonging. I remember you, friend. What brings you here?
有是有，不过…我这种水平，写的净是些没营养的小说，都是垃圾文学。
Technically, yes. But... the novels I write aren't exactly highbrow. They're all trash literature.
Are you still writing the Tale of the Winterlands?
呃…也不完全是。我在写的是达米尔和阿尔乔姆在「熔岩之国」探险的故事——有点像《奇谭》粉丝们自发进行的二次创作，只是质量更加低劣……

Eh... Not exactly. The story I'm writing is about Dalmir and Artem as they go on an adventure in the Lava Kingdom. It's a little like the fanfictions of the Tales series that the readers produce, but the quality is even worse...
在我这本书的结尾——他们没有去往「天外之境」，阿尔乔姆选择了帮助达米尔寻找他故土之下的秘密……
At the end of the book I'm working on now, they don't go to Satelleden. Artem chooses to help Dalmir search for the secret that lies below his homeland...
我沿用了《雪国冒险奇谭》系列的角色，但讲的故事不一样。这是一部…呃…外传，讲的是达米尔和阿尔乔姆在「熔岩之国」探险的故事——
I used the characters from the Tale of the Winterlands series, but it's a different story. It's a kind of... spin-off novel that depicts Dalmir and Artem's adventure in the Lava Kingdom.
达米尔带着阿尔乔姆回到了自己的家乡，在这里他们结识了新的伙伴，阿尔乔姆帮助达米尔解开了他家乡神话背后的秘密……
Dalmir takes Artem back with him to his hometown, where he meets some new companions. Artem helps Dalmir uncover the secret behind a myth in his hometown.
…虽然不确定编辑那边会不会接受这样的稿子，但总之我还是先继续写下去了。就算内容一般，但这至少是我自己的作品…代笔的活我是不想再干了。

...But I'm not sure if the editor is going to accept this kind of manuscript. I will keep writing for now. Even if the content is just average, at least it's my own work... I don't want to be a ghostwriter anymore.
最近怎么没看到你上剧？
Why haven't I seen you in anything new lately?
演完之前那几部音乐剧，我就没接新剧了。正好，贝洛伯格最近出了不少事，很多同事都暂时息影了…我干脆就也给自己放了个长假。

After I wrapped up the couple of musicals I was in, I stopped auditioning for new roles. Belobog coincidentally started having a lot of things happen recently. Many of my colleagues went on hiatus... I decided to just give myself an extended vacation.
其实和我没太大关系，但你应该也有所耳闻吧？新任大守护者继任、下层区重新开放之类的，就是那些在城里传得沸沸扬扬的事。

It doesn't really have much to do with me, actually. You've probably heard about what's been going on, right? The new Supreme Guardian assumed her role, and the Underworld reopened. It's all news that has the city abuzz.
贝洛伯格即将迎来一些重大的改变，这是众所周知的事。但我觉得…不仅仅是贝洛伯格，我们这行也是时候做出一些改变了……
Belobog is on the precipice of some big changes, and everyone knows it. I just feel like... It's not only Belobog that needs to change. It's about time for this industry to make some changes.
才不是呢。我还这么年轻，正处在事业的上升期，怎么可能这么早就隐退…虽说我们这行条条框框挺多，但我并不打算就这么轻易放弃。

No way. I'm still young. My career is on the rise. How could I step out of the spotlight so early? Although there are a lot of hoops to jump through in this industry, I don't plan on throwing in the towel so easily.
你应该也听闻了吧？贝洛伯格最近发生了不少大事，这座城市正在迎来变革…但我想，不仅仅是它，我们这行也是时候做出改变了……

You've heard the news, haven't you? There are big things happening in Belobog these days. This city is about to experience a transformation... But I think it's not just the city. It's also about time for this industry to make a change...
我是在放假没错，但现在我每天除了练歌以外，还在私下筹备着一个项目……
Yeah, I'm taking a break, but I am also privately preparing for a project on top of practicing singing every day...
但愿它能和布洛妮娅阁下一样，为贝洛伯格带来新鲜的风。
I hope that, like Her Excellency Bronya, it can bring something fresh to Belobog.
「我求着你不要远去，请你带着我一同离去……」
"Don't leave me alone. Take me with you..."
「我一直在等着你，只要你屈下左膝…我们的爱情已经注定，现在我就要告诉我愿意……」
"I've been waiting for you to show me the ring... Love is our destiny, say the word baby..."
咳，嗯哼哼…你有什么事吗？
Ah, ahem... Can I help you with something?
I'm just passing by. Don't mind me.
怎么可能不在意啊，我不喜欢在练歌的时候被人盯着。
Don't mind you how? I don't like being stared at when rehearsing.
那你以后该怎么登台啊？
How do you perform in front of your audience then?
彩排是彩排，正式表演是正式表演。
Rehearsal is different from the real thing.
那你为什么不去排练室？
Why not use the rehearsal room?
只是开开嗓而已，没有必要占着排练室。
I'm just warming up. No need to be fussy.
Do you have a problem with your throat?
嗯，最近有点感冒，是有点不舒服，谢谢你的关心。
Yeah, I've been a little under the weather recently. Thanks for your concern.
我被下水道的声音吓了一跳。
Just got startled by what sounded like things going through the sewer.
我没惹你吧，有话好好说，干嘛突然骂人？
Excuse me? I don't remember offending you before. Why are you so mean?
我只是说法夸张了一些。
…哎，虽然你的说法很过分，但是没错，我的嗓音是有一点糟糕。
*sigh* Despite how rude you are, my voice does sound not good.
既然你已经听到了，那就没什么好隐瞒的了。对，是我。
Since you've heard it already, I have nothing to hide anymore. Yes, it was me.
唔，你看起来有点奇怪啊…不会是什么来路不明的记者吧？我可没有什么独家内幕爆料哦。
Uh, you look a little strange... You're not some journalist from who knows where, are you? I don't have any exclusive insider information to reveal.
不过…是不是都不重要，黄金歌剧院的音乐剧演员塔米拉随时欢迎采访。
But... It doesn't matter either way. Tamila of the Golden Theater is always open to being interviewed.
唔，看你随身没带着笔记本的样子，也许吧。
Hmm... You don't have a notepad with you. I'll give you the benefit of the doubt.
不过是不是都不重要，黄金歌剧院的音乐剧演员塔米拉随时欢迎采访。
Doesn't matter either way. Tamila of the Golden Theater always welcomes interviews.
咦？！你不认识我？好丢人啊，这不是显得我自作多情了嘛。
Eh!? You don't know who I am? How embarrassing! Others may think I take myself too seriously.
我是黄金歌剧院的音乐剧演员塔米拉，要是你能通过我的作品来认识我就更好了。
I am Tamila, a musical performer of the Golden Theater. I'd rather you know me through my works.
哎，算了算了，这点烦恼我就自己消化好了。我打算接着练习了，你如果没有什么事的话，就到别的地方去转悠吧。
Never mind, I shouldn't bother you with this. Better keep it to myself. Now I'll continue with my rehearsal. If you don't have anything else to say, please give me some peace.
你也听出来了吧，我唱歌时的嗓音很低沉…导演对我很不满意，所以剧院就找了一位配音演员来「辅助」我。
As you can probably tell, my voice is rather low-pitched. The director is not very happy about that, so the theater hired a voice actress to "assist" me.
怎么说呢，她确实无可挑剔啦…但我也是正儿八经科班出身，视唱练耳我也从未偷懒过。
She is impeccable indeed... but I too was professionally trained. Never missed a day of practice.
但现在我却必须配合着声音做口型，配合着声音做动作…我真的很担心呢，未来某一天，那个声音会不会把我取而代之呢……
Now I have to lip sync and act as if in a silent film. I can't help but think that maybe one day they'll get rid of me altogether...
你觉得，遇到这种情况，我该怎么办呢？
What do you think I should do?
唉，光有一身演技有什么用呢？音乐剧总归是要演唱的。
*sigh* That won't do. People come to musicals for the songs.
哪有音乐剧演员是自己不能开口唱歌的。这不就和演话剧的不背台词，要找人配音念剧本一样可笑嘛……

How embarrassing would it be if a musical performer can't sing with her own voice? It's ridiculous! I'll be like thespians who can't remember their lines and need others to read out the script for them.
Why not try acting in a play?
虽然都是舞台剧，但隔行如隔山。
Both are theatrical arts, true. But the skills they require are hardly transferable.
而且演音乐剧是我从小的梦想…就这么放弃太可惜了，我还得再试试。
Plus, musicals have always been my passion... I don't want to simply give up like this. I still want to give it a go.
换个适合你声线的剧目。
Maybe find a project that suits your voice better.
I'm afraid it's not that easy.
你有所不知了——在音乐剧圈，无论男女演员，「花期」都非常有限。
You might not know this, but musical artists only look good on stage for a very limited period of time.
一旦体型有变化，又或者唱久了嗓子变粗，就要告别舞台——说是什么回归家庭生活，实际上却是再也接不到戏了。

Once their physiques change or their voice becomes coarse, they have to bid the stage farewell. They'll call it "spending more time with the family," but everyone knows that's the end of their career.
这可不是剧场这边单独能决定的，观众想看什么都是很诚实的。
Even if the theater agreed with me, the audience would not buy it. They have been quite honest in likes and dislikes.
不过你说得对…这种「规则」的确是陋习。
But you do have a point... people should be less judgmental.
音乐剧的类型并非一成不变。
There are other types of musicals you can try.
剧院的经理总觉得观众只喜欢幼稚的青春情歌，但也许观众的品味早就比他们这些数票仓的人更刁钻了。
The theater manager is convinced that the audience is only interested in love songs aimed at teens. But it's possible that people's taste has changed and the management failed to grasp it.
干脆我试试找些演员们，商量下类型不同的新剧目…如何？
You know what? I'll see if I can bring some artists together and try some new things. How does that sound?
得想办法解雇那个配音演员。
Need to find a way to get your voice assist fired.
我希望靠自己的实力稳固地位，才不想用这种手段啦。
No, I want to keep my job fair and square. I have no interest in theater politics.
再说了，大家都是剧团的演员，我也希望她有一天能在舞台上实现梦想。
She is one of us after all. I hope she will see her dream come true on stage one day.
我想不到更好的办法了。
I can't think of a better way to help.
唉，总之谢谢你愿意听我倾诉，和你聊过之后我感觉好多了。但是千万不要和别人说哦，请保守你我的秘密。
No worries. Thanks for listening to me. I feel much better already. Please keep this conversation a secret.
接下来我打算继续练歌，消化一下满脑子的杂乱思绪。请和我稍微保持一些距离，谢谢你。
I'll have to keep practicing and clear my mind in the meantime. If you don't mind, I'd like some privacy. Thank you.
「我不想唯唯诺诺，也不愿曲意逢迎。因为我的人生…只属于我自己…只属于…我自己……」
"I don't want to walk on a path others laid out for me, for life knows no boundary. I want to break free..."
啊啊，阿尔乔姆…达米尔…一边是冰霜，一边是火焰……
Ah, Artem... Dalmir... One is frost, the other flame...
都是无忧无虑的少年人，现在为了未知的世界探索奔走…几经风雨，他们却始终没有抛下过彼此……
They are both carefree. In exploring the unknown world... they suffer many ups and downs, yet they are still by each other's side.
呜呜…阿尔乔姆他真的好温柔……
Oooh... Artem is such a gentleman...
Huh... Sorry, I got lost in thought.
他是最完美的男子…他是我看过的书里最温柔的人啦。他有恰到好处的幽默感，既温柔体贴又内敛克制……
He's the perfect man... He is the kindest character I've ever read about. He has the right sense of humor. He's caring, thoughtful, and restrained...
他有恰到好处的幽默感，既温柔体贴又内敛克制……
He has the right amount of humor. He's caring, thoughtful, and restrained...
哎？对不起，我看书看得有点太投入了，说话太激动了点，不好意思……
Huh...? Oh... I may have gotten a little too wrapped up in the book. Sorry for rambling on...
咳咳，欢迎光临花店！瓦丝卡为您服务！
*cough* Welcome! What can the florist Vaska do for you?
我们店里的花朵，花型各不相同，价位也不一样。在这个时节有好几种花都开得相当不错，在我们这儿也很畅销。
We have all types of flowers at different prices. There are several types that bloom quite well at this time of year—those are the bestsellers in our shop.
您喜欢什么品种的花呢？是打算摆在房间里，还是要送给谁吗？
What kind of flowers do you like? Are you looking for indoor plants? Are you gifting them to someone?
这些花虽然颜色各异、价格不同，但是它们都有着其他花无法替代的价值。
These flowers come in a variety of colors and prices, but really, they are all priceless.
比如这「暖阳花」就是一种非常甜美的小花，红黄交间，看上去就像太阳——光是看着它心里就会觉得暖洋洋的。
For example, this one named Sunshine is lovely. Its red and yellow colors make it look like the sun. Just looking at it makes you feel warm inside.
不管您是想送人还是自己欣赏，「暖阳花」都是个不错的选择。
It's a great choice for a gift or even to keep for yourself.
怎么样，您看中了吗？还是说您想了解下其它种类的花？
What do you think? Or do you want to know more about other kinds of flowers?
这些花虽然颜色各异、价格不同，但是它们都有着其他花无法替代的价值。请问你对哪种花感兴趣？
These flowers come in a variety of colors and prices, but really, they are all priceless. Which one are you interested in?
我们这里最贵的花就是「侯爵夫人」了，这个名字背后可有一段不得了的故事呢。
The Marquise is our most expensive flower. There's a grand story behind its name.
听说历史上曾有贵族夫人为此花倾家荡产，这花因此得名「侯爵夫人」了。时至今日，它依然深受上流社会的喜爱。
Rumor has it that a noblewoman spent her entire family's fortune on one of these flowers. This was why it was given the name "Marquise." To this day, it is beloved by high society.
嗯，它生有八片花瓣，瓣尖有白色斑点，就像雪花。听老人们说，在很久很久以前，每年的第一场雪叫做初雪，象征着丰收和喜悦。
The flower has eight petals with white spots at each tip, just like snowflakes. A long time ago, the first snow of the year was called first snow, symbolizing harvest and joy.
与其说花，不如说是一种植物～它有很长的杆茎，杆上有孔，据说很久以前有艺术家用它当作乐器呢！…大概吧。
It would be more appropriate to call it a plant, rather than a flower. It is said that long ago artists would use its long stalk with holes on it to create musical instruments! Probably...
「暖阳花」是一种非常甜美的小花，红黄交间，看上去就像太阳——光是看着它心里就会觉得暖洋洋的。
It's a Sunshine. A red and yellow flower that looks like the sun. It's very lovely. Just looking at it makes you feel warm inside.
一种非常娇贵的花朵，每年只开一次，一次一月——不骗您，就算为了那一个月的艳丽，也值得它的价钱！
It is a very expensive flower. It blooms only once a year for one month. But honestly, the price is completely worth that one month of bloom!
噢，是我们这儿最畅销的一种小花！五颜六色，好看极了——而且价格非常便宜。
Oh, this is our best-selling flower! It's colorful and gorgeous, and is offered at a great price!
Thank you. I learned a lot today.
Thank you. I learned a lot today.
不用着急，仔细看看再做出决定吧。
又见面了客人，瓦丝卡为您服务！您如果需要一些买花的建议的话，可以随时来问我。
Nice to see you again! Vaska at your service. If you need some help picking the right flowers, feel free to let me know.
…我听说是准备出续作了，阿尔乔姆可能要…啊，抱歉，我以为你在问《雪国冒险奇谭》的事。
...I heard that a sequel is going to come out. Artem might... Ah, sorry. I thought you were asking about the Tale of the Winterlands.
我的话…就还挺好的？花店最近稍微忙了些，留给我看书的时间没以前多，让我有点头疼。
I guess... I've been doing alright? The florist has been a bit busier these days, so I haven't had as much time to read as before. It's been a headache.
Is the florist selling anything new?
没有哦，目前还没培育出什么新品种。不过最近的雪小了很多，气温也有所回升，有些花开得特别灿烂——这不，店里正准备搞些促销活动呢。

Nah. I haven't cultivated any new varieties, but we've had a lot less snow recently, and the temperature is starting to go back up. Some flowers have blossomed splendidly. It could be a good chance for the shop to put together some sales promotions.
Is that book's ban... going to get lifted?
你说《雪国冒险奇谭》？我也不确定啦，只是我们书迷的圈子里最近在流传这个消息，也不知道是真是假。
You mean the Tale of the Winterlands? I'm not sure. But that's the rumor that has been circulating among us book fans. I don't know if it's true or not.
不过我听说市政厅准备开发城郊，还派了人去勘探城郊区域了，那么这套小说也没有再禁的必要了吧……

I've heard that the Town Hall is getting ready to develop the outskirts of the city. They've apparently dispatched people to explore that area. If that's true, then there's no need to ban that series...
Ah, ah, ah, ah! La, la, la, la!
哎呀呀～没注意到这附近还有其他人，不好意思，小女子没打扰到你吧？
Sorry, I didn't notice there were people around. I'm not disturbing you, am I?
嗯嗯～那小女子就继续开嗓了啊。
Well, I'm gonna keep warming up my vocals then.
啦啦啦啦～「他说我的琴弦撩动着他的心～作为回应他的笛声彻夜奏鸣～」
La la la la. He said that my strings stirred his heart, and to that tune, his flute played all through the night.
「和声之间有某种奇妙反应～我确定他就是我的唯一～」啦啦啦～
I can feel something deep in the harmony... I'm sure he's the one... la la la...
嗯嗯～那小女子就继续开嗓了…啊！这部新剧还没开始公演呢，可不能泄露出去。你瞧我，这种事都能忘记~
Okay, I shall continue warming up my voice... Oh, no! The play isn't open to the public yet. I'd better not spoil it. I am so forgetful!
请问你是音乐剧演员吗？
Are you an actor in a musical?
是也不是，小女子是歌剧院台柱——的御用配音，嘻嘻。
Yes and no. I'm the leading actress... the leading actress' voice-over at the theater, heehee.
May I have the pleasure of listening to the whole song?
那可不行，你要是想听完全曲，在歌剧院现场体验才是最好的，有乐队，有演出，可不能现在就剥夺这份期待。
Sorry, I can't. If you want to hear it all, it's best to experience it live at the theater. There will also be an orchestra and a performance. Don't spoil the surprise.
总之，这部剧还在排练阶段，小女子可是歌剧院台柱——的御用配音，你要是真的喜欢这首歌的话，就让我们在剧院里再会吧～
Anyway, the play is still in rehearsal. I'm the leading.... actress' voice. If you like the song, we can meet again in the theater.
这种情况的确不多见，但导演执意要小女子给塔米拉小姐的每首歌配音，小女子也推不掉呀。
Usually, no. But the director insisted that I do the voice over for Tamila's songs.
毕竟，「塔米拉的声音听了很出戏，一点也不少女」——导演是这么说来着。
He said, "Tamila's voice isn't catchy and girly enough."
Then why is she considered the mainstay of the theater?
哎呀呀～话可不能这么说，塔米拉小姐的演技和观众缘都是一流的呀。
Shhh, don't say that. Tamila's performance skills are top-notch and the audience loves her.
只是导演说塔米拉小姐的声音「听了很出戏，一点也不少女」——然后才让小女子来配音的。
It's just that the director said that Tamila's voice isn't catchy and girly enough, so he invited me to do the singing.
罢了罢了，这只是小女子自己的事情，还请你不要放在心上～
This is my private affair. Please don't be bothered by it.
I'd like to know more about Tamila...
你可真是好奇心旺盛呢，不过小女子这里没有什么好爆料的。
You are as curious as a child. But I don't have much to offer.
塔米拉小姐声线虽然低沉了点，但演技与歌唱水平都是没太大问题的。再怎么说她也是人气女演员嘛～
Although Tamila's voice is a bit deep, her acting and singing skills are not much of a problem. She's got a lot of fans.
不过…塔米拉小姐好像是对我不太满意？这让小女子有些困惑呢……
It's just that... she seems to be unhappy with me, which I'm a little confused about...
Why is she unhappy with you?
…或许是小女子想多了吧？最近排练的时候，总感觉塔米拉小姐不太愿意对口型了……
I don't know... Maybe I'm overthinking it but during the rehearsals recently, I felt that Tamila didn't want to lip-sync...
还有就是…啊呀呀，说起来有点难为情——但塔米拉小姐最近公开批评歌词立意很差这种事，总令小女子觉得不太舒服呢～
Also... *sigh* I shouldn't say this but I don't feel comfortable with Tamila's recent public criticism of the lyrics.
因为她批评的那些歌，虽说是她自己的角色曲，却都是由小女子负责演唱配音的。
Although the songs she criticized were for her character, I was responsible for the voice-over.
总觉得她的话像是在针对谁而说的…不知道是不是小女子惹到塔米拉小姐了呢？
It just feels like she was aiming that at me... Have I done something to get on her bad side?
你自己登台演出不就好了吗？
Why don't you perform on stage yourself?
嗯～我原本没有这种想法…但是时间一久，总会想试试开拓新的道路呢。
I've been thinking about that lately... I want to set foot on a new path.
说出来还有点不好意思呢，小女子自幼喜欢唱歌～无论什么歌都可以，一天唱到晚我也不会腻。
I've loved singing since I was a little girl... I could sing all day long, no matter what the song is.
是不是你们之前有过什么恩怨？
Did anything happen between the two of you?
没有哦～之前有过几次合作，也称得上是配合无间呢。
I don't think so. We teamed up a few times and it always went well.
至于生活中嘛，塔米拉小姐毕竟是大明星，小女子和她接触不多，也称不上有什么「恩怨」。
As for outside of the theater... well, Tamila is a star, after all, so I really don't have much contact with her. I don't know what she could be mad about.
…所以，也许是小女子多想了，我们可能只是观念不同而已。
...maybe I'm just overthinking it. It's probably just because we have different perspectives.
或许她是嫉妒你有副好嗓子。
Maybe she is jealous of your voice.
哎呀呀～这可不能乱说，塔米拉小姐只是声线太低沉了些，但小女子却觉得很有韵味，在唱抒情曲子的时候尤为感人——
Shhh. Don't speak so rashly. Tamila's voice is deep but I think it's very touching, especially when she's singing lyrical type songs...
「今夜我看见你眼里泪光晶莹～你是否还会爱我～在黎明之后～」像《回到黑夜》里的这一段低音，小女子就唱不来呢。
For example, the contralto in Back to the Night is something that's beyond me. "I saw the tears in your eyes tonight, will you still love me after dawn~"
塔米拉小姐天生丽质，气场过人，肯定不至于嫉妒小女子啦…还是不要把人想得太坏唷～
Tamila is a natural beauty and she has a great stage presence. I'm sure she isn't jealous of me... Let's not think too negatively about people.
Don't let it bother you too much.
没事，是小女子打扰你了。那么小女子就继续练歌，慢走不送了～
Bye bye. I'll go back to practicing my singing now.
啦啦啦～「追逐着泡沫幻影～看不清雾中小径～只愿此生长路慢慢行～」
La la la. "Chasing a mirage, I lose sight of the path in the fog. I only wish for a steady journey through life."
「他说我的琴弦撩动着他的心～作为回应他的笛声彻夜奏鸣～」
He said that my strings stirred his heart, and to that tune, his flute played all through the night.
「和声之间有某种奇妙反应～我知道我还年轻～噢～但我确定他就是我的唯一～」
I can feel something deep in the harmony... I know I'm still young, but I'm sure he's the one... la la la...
咦，你又来听小女子唱歌啊，这可不行啊，你得去歌剧院里正儿八经地听…难道说你还有什么事情要找小女子吗？
Huh. Are you here for my singing again? That won't do. You need to enjoy the performance in the theater... Or are you here for something else?
啊啦啦，是你呀～小女子接了不少音乐剧的活，光是排练啊就忙得喘不过气了～
Ah, it's you! Well, I've been taking several roles in different musicals. Just the rehearsal times have me so busy that I can hardly stop to catch my breath!
Are you going to be a big star?
哎呀呀～别这么说，才不是什么「大明星」呢。小女子先前虽有担任过一部新剧的女主角，可惜剧评人说这种题材太俗套了……
Oh my, don't say that. I'm not going to be some big star. I was the lead actress in a new play, but critics panned it as being too cliché...
还批评说什么「贝洛伯格在改变，但音乐剧还是那么老土做作」…总之啊，在那之后小女子又接了些小角色来演，想好好打磨下演技啦～
They even said something like, "Belobog has changed, but its musicals are still singing the same ole tune." The point is, after that, I start taking on small roles. I want to polish my acting chops.
这不算什么值得恭喜的事情啦，小女子只是接了许多小角色，连着赶场可不是什么轻松的活儿～
There's nothing to congratulate me for. I've just been landing several small parts. Even just rushing to venues is no easy feat.
小女子之前担任过一部新剧的女主角，但收到的评价并不好……
I had a lead role in a new play, but it didn't get good reviews...
有些剧评人说「贝洛伯格在改变，但音乐剧还是那么老土做作」…总之啊，在那之后小女子又接了些小角色来演，想好好打磨下演技啦～
Some critics said that Belobog has changed, but its musicals are still singing the same old tune. The point is, after that, I start taking on small roles. I want to polish my acting chops.
烦心事可真多…干嘛，没见过发牢骚的人啊？
I've got a lot on my mind... What? You've never seen someone express emotion before?
…喂！看什么看，没见过发牢骚的人啊？
...Hey! What are you looking at? Have you never seen someone express a little emotion before?
…抱歉，我不该突然对你发脾气。但你出现得不是时候，我现在心情很差……
Sorry, I shouldn't have lost my temper. You showed up at a bad time...
我是银鬃铁卫技术部的执行顾问，茉莉。你是哪位？
I'm Molly, the executive consultant of Silvermane Guards' Technology Division. Who are you?
是个有意思的名字…啊，又随便评价别人的名字了，不好意思……
That's an interesting title... Huh? Why am I commenting on people's names again? Sorry.
那…你找我有什么要紧事吗？我现在没有聊闲天的心情……
Is there something important you wanted to see me about? I'm not in the mood for small talk...
你遇到什么不顺心的事了吗？
全都是部队里的烦心事…不方便透露太多。
It's about the guards... I'm in no position to talk about it.
办公室内外的人都看我不顺眼，处处给我使绊子…真不知道我到底怎么惹到他们了！我只是在做分内的工作而已啊。
They don't like me and they're giving me a hard time... I don't know why they are like this! I'm just trying to do my job. That's it.
总之，部队里的氛围太压抑了，现在我只想出来透透气。
Anyway, it was so depressing in the army, so I came out to get some fresh air.
你的脾气一直这么大吗？
我？脾气大？你哪只眼看出来的？
Me? Grumpy? How can you tell?
From every word you've just yelled...
又不是在相亲…我说话一直都是这个语调。
It's not like I'm on a bad date or something... This is just how I talk.
…算了，我也不是没有自觉。但我跟你保证，这不是我的常态……
Forget it. I assure you that this is not how I normally am.
What does a technical consultant do?
我平时主要的工作是协调工程项目、监督产品质量。哦，还有，如果哪些军队项目有外包需求，我也要参与谈判，协助筛选供应商。

My job is to coordinate engineering projects and monitor product quality. Oh, also, when there is a need to outsource a military project, I will participate in the negotiations and assist in the selection of vendors.
我最近被工作的事搞得心力交瘁…谁说脑力工作比体力活轻松的？
I've been so worn out at work lately... Who said that using your head to work is easier than physical labor?
Why don't you leave the garrison?
要是因为这点挫折就离开的话，别人会怎么看我啊？
What will people think of me if I leave because of this little setback?
算了，我再努力忍忍吧。说不定过了这阵就好了……
Forget it, I'll try to endure it. Maybe everything will be better soon...
It's good to push yourself when you are young.
算了，我也得学会控制自己这暴脾气……
Whatever. I have to learn to control my temper...
负责采购的那帮人又在做什么啊…真是的，气死我了！这些破零件全都是残次品！他们真就没把我这执行顾问放在眼里吗？！
What the heck is the Procurement Department doing? These parts are all defective! Man. They really know how to grind my gears! Am I nothing to them!?
…啊，不好意思，我没注意到你。有什么事吗？
...Ah, sorry, I didn't see you there. Can I help you?
哎…我到底该怎么办才好啊……
咦，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！欢迎光临机械屋！
Oh, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the workshop!
Okay. What do you want to talk about?
嘿嘿，毕竟离开了技术部那个乌烟瘴气的地方，还能做自己想做的事，我当然开心啦。
Hehe. Well, I did leave that foul Technology Division, and I'm able to do whatever I want now. Of course, I'm happy.
当然，这也多亏了{NICKNAME}你、佩拉长官，还有希露瓦小姐。能遇到各位真的是我人生中最幸运的事…非常感谢各位！
Naturally, it's all thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, Officer Pela, and Serval. Meeting you all was the luckiest break I've had in my life... I am so grateful to you all!
只是我现在暂时没想好该怎么报答你…这样吧，你要是有什么东西要修就来找我，我免费给你修！
I just haven't been able to figure out how to repay you... How about this. If you have anything you want repaired, come and find me. I'll do it for free!
在机械屋工作感觉如何？
How is the workshop treating you?
嗯，怎么说呢…大概是有种「家」的感觉？
Hmmm. How should I put it? I guess I would say it feels like home, maybe?
以前的我在技术部总是和大家格格不入。同事们不愿意搭理我，搞得我到离职时都没能和其中的某些人说过话。
I just did not fit with everyone at the Technology Division. My coworkers wouldn't even acknowledge my existence. There were some people I never spoke to before even by the time I left.
那时的我有什么事都是自己扛着，从来没和人分享过自己的感情和想法。但在这机械屋就不一样了——希露瓦小姐和我兴趣相投，我们现在可是好闺蜜呢！

I had to handle everything by myself. I was never able to share my thoughts and feelings with anyone. But being here at the workshop is totally different. Serval and I have similar interests. We're close friends now!
啊，还有佩拉小姐和玲可小姐！那两位都是很好的姑娘，我现在已经把她俩当作妹妹看待了，哈哈。
Ah, and then there's Pela and Lynx! Those two are great girls. They're like sisters to me now. Haha!
嘿嘿，谢谢你。多亏了你，我的人生才能有这样一个崭新的开始……
Hehe. Thank you. I've started a whole new chapter of my life thanks to you...
聊了半天好像没聊到工作…
We've been chatting and chatting, but we haven't talked about your work.
嗯？啊，好像确实是这样…可能是因为机械屋平时没什么生意吧？
Huh? Ah, you've got a point... Maybe that's because the workshop often doesn't have any business?
我的工作内容就是要帮希露瓦小姐处理一些机械屋的订单，基本上都是一些维修机械的活，比如供暖器、汽车引擎之类的。
My job is to help Serval with handling some workshop orders. It's mostly repairing mechanism, like heaters and car engines.
我从小的兴趣爱好就是折腾机械，所以工作起来也不会感到累。或者说，我潜意识里压根没把这些活计当工作……
I've loved tinkering with machines since I was a kid, so my work doesn't tire me out. Or maybe subconsciously I don't view this as work...
…啊！看来这才是我没聊到工作内容的原因。原来如此……
...ah! Maybe that's why I didn't talk about what I actually do at the workshop. So that's it...
No worries. I'll leave you to it.
唉，还能怎么样？无非就是和我那些个同事接着怄气呗……
Ugh, how do you think I've been? I've just been so angry with my coworkers...
感觉…我现在已经有点麻木了，总觉得没必要再蹚军队里的浑水——反正他们再怎么胡作非为也不会影响到我的生活，我何必自找不痛快呢？

I just feel like... I've grown numb to it already. There's really no reason for me to put up with the military. Whatever nonsense they get up to has no bearing on my life. So why should I be making myself miserable?
…不过，这真的是我想要的生活吗？我当初拼死拼活挤进铁卫技术部，可不是为了躺着混吃等死的。
...Is this really the life that I want? Back then, I did everything I could to get into the Technology Division, but I didn't do all that just so I could lie back and wait for my life to be over.
你的做法是正确的，坚持下去吧。
You are doing the right thing. Keep at it.
唉，这种事情说说容易，做起来难啊。
我也觉得没必要自找麻烦。
I don't think you need to put yourself through all that either.
你说得对，但我真的不敢想象自己放弃这一切之后，事情还会变成什么样。难道我要看着这贝洛伯格就这么一天天地烂下去吗？
You're right, but I don't dare to imagine how things would change if I give up everything. Am I really going to stand here and watch Belobog get worse by the day?
老实说，我挺害怕的。不光是因为周围的环境在变糟，更多的是害怕自己真的会变得和那帮人没有区别，变成我最讨厌的样子。
To be honest, I'm scared. It's not just because the environment is getting worse. What's even more terrifying is that I will end up just like those people. I'll become the worst version of myself.
你所热爱的才是你的生活…
Whatever you're passionate about is what your life really is...
你是说…要我去做自己真正热爱的事吗？
So you're saying... I should do what I truly love?
可在经历了生活中各种糟心的事情后…我感觉已经找不到那种能让自己义无反顾投入热情的事了。
But after all the upsetting things I've experienced... I feel as if I'll never find something that I can completely throw myself into.
不过…虽然不知道我还能撑多久，但我姑且还是会再坚持一段时间试试看的。和你聊天很开心，谢谢你。
I don't know how long I'll be able to hold on... but I will try to stick with it a little longer. It was nice chatting with you. Thanks.
最近吗？听希露瓦小姐说上下层区可能要重新开放了，我正打算回家一趟呢。
Serval told me that the Over and Underworlds are opening up again. I'm thinking of heading back home.
是啊，我没和你们说过吗？我小时候是在磐岩镇出生的，爸妈也都是土生土长的下层区人。
Yes. Have I not told you that? I was born in Boulder Town, and both my parents are native Underworlders.
我老爹他在铆钉镇的「淬火工坊」做过很长时间工，我对机械的兴趣就是从那时开始培养起来的。
My dad worked for a long time at the Tempering Workshop in Rivet Town. That's when my interest in mechanics began to develop.
再后来，我为了接触接触贝洛伯格的前沿科技，就一人打包行李来到上层区打拼——只是，没想到大守护者的一纸封锁令让我回不了家了……
Later, I packed my bags and came here by myself to learn about Belobog's cutting-edge technology. Little did I know, I would be stuck here because of the Supreme Guardian's order...
现在好容易熬出头，我也该回家看看啦。正好，我也要把遇到你们的故事分享给老爹老妈——他们肯定会为我高兴的！
Now that I've made it professionally, it's time for me to visit home. I can't wait to tell my parents about meeting you all! I'm sure they will be happy to know that!
唉，你看看这《水晶日报》，上边刊的都是些什么新闻！这些新闻媒体再这么搞下去，贝洛伯格迟早要完！
*sigh* Have you read today's Crystal Daily? What kind of news is that!? If the media keeps going on like this, Belobog will eventually be doomed!
要不然呢？本少爷会闲到在大街上自言自语吗？你以为我是那个叫什么多米尼克的老头？
Of course. Who else would I be talking to? Do I look like someone who talks to himself in the street? It's not like I'm old man Dominic.
What does that have to do with me?
我们都有同一个家，名字叫贝洛伯格——你连和城市息息相关的新闻都不关心，还算是贝洛伯格人吗？
We share a home. It's called Belobog. How can you call yourself a citizen of Belobog if you don't even care about the news in our city?
你看这《水晶日报》头版，刊登的内容永远是毫无营养、胡说八道——这帮家伙到底在想什么？这能刊登在头版上？我简直要气昏了。

Look at the front page of the Crystal Daily. The content that the newspaper puts out is just junk, tabloid-level stuff. What's going on in their heads? Can you really put this stuff on the front page? I'm about to blow a gasket here!
话不用说得这么绝对吧？
You don't have to make it sound so extreme.
哼，你肯定不怎么关注时事。真正的有志青年应该像我一样多听、多看、多思考，针砭时弊，为推动贝洛伯格发展贡献自己的力量！
I bet you're not someone who follows the news. Anyone who is ambitious should pay attention to the world and think more, like I do. That way they can contribute to the development of Belobog!
You sure seem to have plenty of time on your hands.
我这是合理地提意见，懂不懂？贝洛伯格能不断变好，就是因为有我这样的有志青年在不停地提出种种真知灼见！
Hey, I'm making a reasonable suggestion, alright? Belobog is getting better because of people like me — people who keep offering their insight!
看来你是真的什么都不懂——别走，今天我就得好好给你上一课！
Hmm, you really don't know anything. How about I give you a lecture right now!
来，本少爷带你仔细读读这版报纸——
Here, let me show you how to read this newspaper...
你自己看看，这都写的什么烂玩意：「文化和教育大臣波瓦今日出席……」
Listen to this malarkey: "Today, the Minister of Culture and Education, Mr. Bova, attended..."
哎哟，不对，波瓦大臣是我爸…咳，看下一条吧。
Oh wait, Bova is my father... *cough* Let's look at the next one.
「莱姆士汀家家主谈家族企业文化：『发扬冰原狼精神——团结一致，超越极限』」……
"Head of the Limesteins shares the family's corporate culture, 'Cultivating a direwolf spirit to come together and transcend limitations.'"...
你听听，这说的还是人话吗？什么「冰原狼精神」？他就是想鼓励年轻人累死累活地拼命工作，榨取他们的劳动力，供他莱姆士汀一家吃香喝辣！

Are you hearing this nonsense? What's this, "direwolf spirit"? He is encouraging young people to work themselves to an early grave. This Limestein is trying to squeeze them for their labor so the Limesteins can keep up their lavish lifestyles!
依我看啊，这个贝洛伯格供暖公司就不值得信任！大守护者就该直接接手，把整个城市的供暖管线翻新！
The way I see it, Belobog Heating Corporation shouldn't be trusted! The Supreme Guardian should step in and revamp all of the city's heating pipes!
看你这打扮，花里胡哨的，怕也是个无法体味人间疾苦的富家子弟吧？罢了，像你这种人，不懂倒也正常。
Judging from your garish outfit, I suppose you're some rich kid who couldn't possibly appreciate the hardships normal people face. Whatever. People like you typically don't get it anyway.
坏了，我怎么又成富家子弟了？
Huh, why do you think I'm a rich kid?
怎么，让我戳到痛处了？你也该多培养下自己的共情能力，像我这样，把世间各种纷扰都尽收眼底……
Did I hit the nail on the head? You should develop some empathy so that you can see all the world's troubles like me...
你不也是大臣家的贵公子吗？
Aren't you also rich — as the son of a government official?
我和那莱姆士汀家的人可不一样。再说了，大臣家的公子就非得不食人间烟火吗？这是偏见，要不得！
I'm not like this Limestein guy. What? Does being the son of an official automatically put someone above the common people? That's an unacceptable stereotype!
我看你只是吃饱了撑的。
瞧你这话说的，我也有自己的痛苦好吧？
Hey, I have my own problems, too. Okay?
唉，算了，和你说不明白。现在的同龄人啊，根本不懂什么是独立思考……
Never mind. It's useless trying to explain it to you. People your age don't know the meaning of independent thinking...
贝洛伯格供暖的人连这么简单的问题都想不清楚，那我上我也行啊！
If the people at Belobog Heating can't figure out such a simple problem, then leave it to me!
You have a problem with everyone, don't you?
这叫哀其不幸、怒其不争，明白？算了，跟你这种人掰扯不清，咱还是接着看新闻吧。
It's just common angst, don't you get it? Never mind. Let's just continue reading the news.
…好家伙，看看第三版这条，气不死你！「贝洛伯格供暖称外环供暖系统持续故障，面向社会招募紧急维修工人」……
...Get a load of this guy. Check out what's on the third page. It kills me! "Belobog's outer ring heating system continues to malfunction. Now recruiting emergency repair workers"...
他们居然好意思写出这种东西？这上层区的供暖从来就没有让人放心过，年年坏年年修——
They sure have tough skin, printing something like this. The Overworld's heating system has always been a headache with its constant need for repairs.
紧急维修是能解决一时的问题，咱们也是能撑过这波寒潮。可忙到头来也没法从根本解决问题，这一切真的值得吗？
Emergency repairs are nothing more than temporary fixes. We can survive the Eternal Freeze. The problem is all this busy work isn't going to solve the real issue. Is all this effort really worth it?
这是衡量过成本后得出的结果。
I'm sure they reached this conclusion after weighing all the costs.
哼，你又没亲自去维修供暖系统，当然站着说话不腰疼！
Hmph. You've never fixed the heating system yourself. It's easy to be an armchair professional!
翻新管线的钱你来出吗？
Are you going to pay for the renovation of all the pipes?
这种道德绑架的话术我可见得多了。告诉你——本少爷不吃这一套！
Don't you try and morally blackmail me. I know that trick and I won't fall for it!
照你这逻辑，我要是批评「哞哞」牛奶不好喝，还得自己先学会产奶了是不是？简直是荒谬！
Based on your logic, I would have to learn to produce milk myself if I say I'm not a fan of Moo-Moo Milk. That's ridiculous!
行了，跟你聊这些真没意思。现在的同龄人啊，格局都打不开……
Anyway, why am I talking to you about this? Not everyone of my age sees the big picture...
闲得没事干就去贝洛伯格供暖上班嘛，为城市建设贡献自己的力量，多好！何必在这里浪费自己的大好年华？
If you are bored, why don't you work for Belobog's heating system and contribute to society!? Why waste your best years here?
Was there... anything else? If not, I'm gonna go.
你就自己在这里指点江山吧。
You can stay here and keep lecturing.
嘁，怎么都这个点了。我妈喊我回家吃饭，告辞！
Huh? Wow, it's getting late. My mom wants me home for dinner. See you later!
哎哟，你可瞧瞧吧！这报纸连中缝广告写得都这么气人…我可得好好批评两句！
Jeez, have a look at this! Even the advertisement in the middle column of this newspaper is annoying... I've got to say something!
唉，世风日下、道德沦丧，这贝洛伯格真是一秒也待不下去了！
Geez. The moral decay of this place grows more severe by the day. Mark my words. Belobog is on the brink of collapse!
给本少看着啊，这是今天的《水晶日报》——对，就这儿，版头大字，看见没？
Look at this. This is today's edition of the Crystal Daily. Here. Look at the front page headline. Do you see it?
「大守护者布洛妮娅将于近日筹建壁外调查团队，是为历时七百余年首次踏入雪原」——
"Supreme Guardian Bronya to organize survey team for exploration beyond the walls: First explorers on the Snow Plains in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years."
嘿，你瞧我这脾气…我光盯着这行字就难受！
Hey, look how riled up I am... Just glancing at this headline is more than I can take!
怎么你也叫好啊？唉，现在的同龄人，包括那位新任大守护者布洛妮娅，真是没有半点共情能力！贝洛伯格真是要完啊……
How could you call this good? People your age don't get it, including that new Supreme Guardian Bronya. You have no semblance of empathy! Belobog is finished...
要我说，前任守护者可可利亚还没走多久，你布洛妮娅就已经要筹备什么「壁外调查团队」…这根本是毫无决策能力的体现！

Do I need to spell it out for you? The former Guardian has passed away not long ago, and now you've got Bronya jumping at the chance to organize a "survey team beyond the walls..." This clearly reflects her inability to make good policy!
现在的贝洛伯格缺的是什么，缺的是对壁外除了风就是雪的那点认知吗？把有限的资源投入到这种芝麻大点的小事里，根本就是浪费……

What is Belobog lacking right now? The awareness that there's nothing but wind and snow beyond our city walls? How wasteful do you have to be to take our limited resources and put them into something so insignificant?
（他的抱怨没完没了…还是别在这里浪费时间了。）
(His complaints are endless... I better not waste any more time here.)
年轻人，过来瞧瞧吧！只要两分钟，就能避免你在未来蒙受损失！
Young person, look over here! Just two minutes of your time can save you from future losses!
我问你，你有没有见过一个深蓝色头发，神情鬼鬼祟祟，眼神贼兮兮的小子前来搭话？
Has a sneaky kid with dark blue hair ever come up to talk to you?
那你很有可能就是「深蓝骗局」的受害者。
You are likely a victim of the "Dark-Blue Scam"!
…桑博？你上当了！那不过是他的化名。这说明…你已经是「深蓝骗局」的受害者了！
... Sampo? You've been scammed! That's just an alias. That means... you're a victim of the Dark-Blue Scam!
I've never seen someone like that.
那你很有可能就是「深蓝骗局」的潜在受害者。
You are likely a potential victim of the Dark-Blue Scam!
听我一句劝，那个蓝毛是个诈骗惯犯，不管他说什么都别信！
Take my advice, that guy is a serial scammer. Don't believe anything he says!
来，拿上这个。这是「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」撰写的防骗教程，你可要仔细阅读。要是有什么问题就尽管来找我！
Here, take this. This is a tutorial on preventing scams written by the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association. Read it carefully and if you have any questions, come to me!
问吧问吧！向市民普及防诈骗技巧就是我们的责任。
Go ahead! It's our responsibility to help prevent the public from being scammed.
没错！互助会的成员都是受骗经验丰富的老前辈，我们团结在一起，为的就是共同总结经验教训，帮助市民提高防范意识！
That's right! The members of the Association are all former victims. We are united to share what we have learned and help the public by raising awareness!
而这本教程里记录着那个蓝毛诈骗犯的行骗案例，是他累累恶行的见证，也是我们这些前辈血淋淋的教训！
The guide goes over case studies of those who were scammed by the blue-haired swindler. It is evidence of his evil crimes, a painful lesson that we predecessors suffered.
第一次撞见那家伙的时候，他问我需不需要「平行世界打印机」。
The first time I met that guy, he asked if I wanted a "parallel universe printer."
我问他打印机的原理，他立马开始给我灌输一大堆天花乱坠的科学概念，差点把我说懵了。
Well, I asked him how the printer works... and he immediately started rambling on a bunch of smorgasbord about science stuff. I was almost caught up in it.
什么「平行世界」、「星神」、「同位异形」之类的…骗子就喜欢用这些宇宙、星空之类的概念骗人！
Terms like parallel universe, Aeons, and parity anomaly... Swindlers love to use these words related to the universe and Aeons to scam people!
其实我一开始是不信的，直到他用那玩意随手印出两张序列号一模一样的冬城盾纸币，我才信了他的邪……
I didn't believe him until he used it to print money. He made two bills with the exact same serial number...
这个嘛…金额不是重点。重要的是你得留神，别让同样的骗局发生在自己身上。
Uh... the price isn't important. What's important is that you need to be careful, so the same scam doesn't happen to you.
这还用问吗？你以为我为什么加入「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」？
Of course not, otherwise why do you think I would have joined the association?
咳，打印机的事过去以后，又过了一段时间，我在商业区的一个巷子里又撞见了那个蓝毛。
Ahem, sometime later, after the counterfeiting scam, I bumped into that same blue-haired guy again in an alley in the Commercial District.
我本来应该直接叫银鬃铁卫去抓人的。但是我当时怒上心头，非要去跟他讨个说法……
I should have had the Silvermane Guards arrest him, but I was so angry and I needed an explanation...
没想到他反而一脸严肃地问我「你是不是一直盯着打印机看」——
Instead, he asked me with a straight face, "Were you staring at the printer?"
他斥责我根本没看说明书，还说我不识货，暴殄天物。他甚至还提出要全款回收「平行世界打印机」，找别的买家……
He accused me of not reading the manual and wasting such a genius invention. He even offered to refund the full payment so that he could find another buyer for the parallel universe printer.
他还说，「如果操作者一直死盯着打印机看，平行世界传输现象就不会发生——要想不干涉传输过程，只有借助『以太透镜』进行观测。」

He also said, "If the operator keeps staring at the printer, the parallel universe transmission can't happen. The only way to avoid interfering with the transmission process is to observe it with the help of an aether lens."
…这不是自然而然的事吗？那骗子一本正经地跟我理论，又把我给说服了……
Doesn't that sound reasonable? So I was tricked again by his apparent sincerity...
我现在算是明白了，听好了——打着「平行世界」的旗号推广商品的家伙，十有八九都是骗子！
Now I know that nine out of ten people who try to associate their products with any kind of parallel universe theory are scammers!
哈哈，逗我玩是吧？你指望我相信你吗？
Haha, are you kidding me? Do you really expect me to believe that?
还是说…难道你是那蓝头发的同伙？
Or... are you working with the blue-haired guy?
走开，走开！你再不走，我就让银鬃铁卫来逮捕你了！
Get out! If you don't leave, I'll have Silvermane Guards come and arrest you!
尽管嘲笑我吧，但你一定要记住我的教训…总之，警惕「平行世界」！
Laugh at me if you want, just remember what I told you... Be careful with anything related to parallel universes!
这就对了！千万别上了他的当！
That's right! Don't fall for his tricks!
我好像记得你，年轻人。怎么，读过防骗教程后有问题想问了吗？
I remember you, young person. Do you have any questions after reading the fraud prevention tutorial?
还是说，你也想加入「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」？
Or do you want to join the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association?
最近啊，我正以互助会的名义准备诉愿信，打算找布洛妮娅大人一趟。
Recently... I'm preparing an appeal on behalf of the Association. I plan on meeting with Lady Bronya.
那当然是因为这件事关系到我们互助会的根本利益了。
Obviously, this issue involves the Association's fundamental interests.
那当然是因为只有布洛妮娅大人能解决我们的问题了。
Because Lady Bronya clearly is the only person who can solve our issue.
别激动，有什么诉求坐下来谈…
Take it easy. If there's an issue, we can sit down and discuss it...
Huh? What are you talking about?
…嗐，你误会了！我们只是想让布洛妮娅大人关注一下「深蓝骗局」——这可关系到我们贝洛伯格的长治久安啊。
...You misunderstood what I meant! All we want is to make Lady Bronya aware of the Dark-Blue Scam. This issue has implications for the peace and stability of Belobog.
听说布洛妮娅大人要比前任大守护者开明得多。她现在正在克里珀堡广开言路，人人有份…那我们「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」自然不能放过这个机会。

I heard that the Supreme Guardian Lady Bronya is far more open-minded than the former Supreme Guardian. She is encouraging people at Qlipoth Fort to air their opinions. Everyone has a responsibility to speak... Well, the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association naturally isn't going to let this opportunity get away.
我们的诉求也很简单：银鬃铁卫内部应当立即成立一支「深蓝骗局专案大队」，在贝洛伯格城内展开地毯式搜索，围剿这个蓝毛诈骗犯……

Our request is quite simple. The Silvermane Guards should immediately establish a Dark-Blue Scam Special Task Force that will launch a city-wide search in Belobog to round up this blue-haired con artist...
What will happen after the task force catches him?
这还不简单？把这个混蛋五花大绑，关在克里珀堡的地下室里严刑拷问，直到他把犯下的所有罪行供出来为止；接着再把他吊在城墙外面……

That's easy. They should tie this wretched villain up and lock him beneath Qlipoth Fort to be questioned under torture. The interrogation would continue until he has confessed all of his crimes. After that, he'll be hanged outside the city...
你是在夸我吗？我就当是吧。
Are you praising me? I'll assume you are.
总之，我们一定要找到那个蓝毛骗子，刻不容缓！
The point is, we simply must find that blue-haired swindler. We cannot tolerate such criminal activity!
突然感觉桑博怪可怜的…
I suddenly feel pity for Sampo.
桑博？哦，你说的是那个诈骗犯的假名吧？
你可千万不能同情他啊！不然轻则贪小失大，重则倾家荡产……
Don't ever sympathize with him! You'll either end up losing some money at the minimum, or even see your family fortune go down the drain...
你是在夸我吗？我就当是吧。
Are you praising me? I'll assume you are.
总之，我们一定要找到那个蓝毛骗子，刻不容缓！
The point is, we simply must find that blue-haired swindler. We cannot tolerate such criminal activity!
突然感觉桑博怪可怜的…
I suddenly feel pity for Sampo.
桑博？哦，你说的是那个诈骗犯的假名吧？
你可千万不能同情他啊！不然轻则贪小失大，重则倾家荡产……
Don't ever sympathize with him! You'll either end up losing some money at the minimum, or even see your family fortune go down the drain...
——打住。民事纠纷请找银鬃铁卫报案，不要企图绕过检方直接与法官议论……
...Wait! Please file a report with the Silvermane Guards if you encounter any civil disputes. Please don't try to bypass the prosecution and discuss it with the judge directly.
我知道你想问什么，既然自称法官，为什么会站在大街上，而不是待在法院里——听过「流动法官」这个词吗？
I know what you want to ask. As a judge, how is it that I am standing out in the street instead of in the courthouse, right? Have you heard of the term "Roaming Judge"?
…唉，算了。听着挺高大上，实际上就是个协助铁卫工作的外派法律顾问而已。跟法院里的工作相比，这活计简直就是浪费时间……
...*sigh* Forget about it. It sounds impressive, but I'm just a legal advisor sent to help the guards. Compared to my work at the court, this is a major waste of time...
跟法院里的工作相比，这活计简直就是浪费时间……
Compared to working in the court, this is a waste of time...
Well, you shouldn't put it like that...
嘁，我现在的工作就是和每天来找茬的老头老太太理论，这还不算浪费时间吗？我可是贝洛伯格法学院的高材生，凭什么每天只能处理些家长里短的琐事？

Don't you think it's a waste of my time to have me out here trying to talk sense into the elderly every day? I was a straight-A student at Belobog Law School. Why am I dealing with trivial family stuff?
凭我的实力，就应该去负责更复杂、更有价值的大案！那种案件才能体现我的价值！你懂我在说什么吧？
I should be in charge of more complex, important cases! That's where I shine! You know what I'm talking about, right?
…你那是什么表情？算了，我看你和那群老头老太太也差不了多少…要是你碰上了什么悬而难决的大案，记得来找我。
...What's that look on your face? Forget it. You aren't much different from those old-timers... Just come to me when you have a big case.
哈？有那么明显吗，这都被你看出来了？
成天和一帮什么都不懂的老头老太太吵架，换做是你，你能不烦么？
Dealing with a bunch of ignorant old people, every day — you would be annoyed too if you were me.
你都帮他们处理什么法律问题？
What kind of legal issues do you help them with?
「法律问题」？你可太看得起贝洛伯格的老百姓了。他们来找我解决的问题和法律可一点都不沾边，无非就是些家长里短的抱怨。
Legal issues? You think too highly of the people of Belobog. What they come to me for has nothing to do with the law. It's all complaints about daily life.
我随口就能给你来一段：反正就是他本人隐忍退让、委曲求全、顾全大局；另一方不知好歹、得寸进尺、真不是人。

It's always the same thing. The complainant tells me they have been altruistic and taken the big picture into consideration and the offending party has taken advantage of them and is being ungrateful.
你在煦日节的家族聚会上能听到超过一万种类似街坊故事的变体，那些故事说来说去，不就是换着花样的「道德绑架」吗？我反正是一点兴趣都没有。
You can hear thousands of stories like this at Solwarm Festival family gatherings. Those stories are, in the end, moral blackmail, which I'm not interested in at all.
但我毕竟是个法律工作者，给民众普法是我的职责——每到这个环节，那群人就开始假装听不明白了——
But I am a legal practitioner after all, so it is my duty to help the public get to know the law. Every time it gets to this part, they start to pretend like they don't understand me.
谁叫法律就是公正无私，不偏袒任何人呢？
But who's to blame? After all, the law is always fair and impartial, showing favor to no one?
Wow. You have a hard job.
Just hearing about it makes my head spin.
那可不！什么破流动法官，我真是一秒都做不下去了，唉。
I know, right!? I can't go on being a Roaming Judge for a second longer.
What kind of cases do you consider important?
纠察贪污腐败，惩治恶党奸徒…再不济也得涉火涉骗吧？
Corruption-related, with evil organizations or personnel involved. Or at least arms smuggling... or scams...
算了，你就当是听我说梦话吧。现在贝洛伯格治安可好得很，就算真撞上了大案也轮不着我来审……
Forget it. Just pretend like I'm talking nonsense. Belobog is too safe to have cases like that. Even if there is a big case, it's out of my reach...
呃…你好像来找过我。怎么，碰到什么大案了吗？
Hmm... I remember you. Got some big case?
最近可是有个大案子啊！——可惜还是轮不到我来审……
I've got a big case on my hands! It's a shame I'll never be the one to try the case...
不对，应该说这案子根本无从审起…就是布洛妮娅大人本人来了也不行。
I guess more specifically, I should say that there's no way this case can be tried... Even Lady Bronya herself would not be able to.
What's this case you're talking about?
是啊，前任大守护者可可利亚…在之前贝洛伯格北面的裂界骚动中牺牲了。她的女儿布洛妮娅小姐接替了她的位置。
Yeah. Former Supreme Guardian Cocolia... passed during the Fragmentum disturbance that happened north of Belobog. Her daughter Bronya took over her position after that.
布洛妮娅大人声称可可利亚「前往了裂界的根源，以生命为代价守护了贝洛伯格」…但这是她一家之言，谁知道究竟发生了什么呢？反正也没有别的证人……

Lady Bronya stated that Cocolia went to the source of the Fragmentum and sacrificed herself to protect Belobog... But that's just what she is saying. Who knows what actually happened? There were no other witnesses after all...
…咳，不过这一切都与我无关。变化就是机会，我要做的事情只有抓住这个机会，想办法让自己坐在法庭上…而不是接着和这帮老头老太太吵架。

...Hmph. Then again, that all has nothing to do with me. Change is opportunity. All I have to do now is take hold of this opportunity and find a way to get myself seated at the court... I don't need to keep arguing with those old hags.
借你吉言…虽然我觉得可能性不大就是了。也许这亚历珊德拉广场就是我的归宿吧……
Hopefully your words will bring me good luck... But I think my chances are not particularly good. Maybe Alexandra Plaza is just where I belong...
你说得对，我也觉得没戏。也许这亚历珊德拉广场就是我的归宿吧……
You're right. There's no way it'll work out. Maybe Alexandra Plaza is just where I belong...
考虑过当大守护者的法律顾问吗？
Have you thought about being a legal adviser to the Supreme Guardian?
…你疯啦？！就凭我？不行不行，法律可是神圣的，我这种小法官可配不上这职位……
...Are you out of your mind!? Me? No way. The law is sacred. A small judge like me isn't worthy of a role like that...
去去去，你赶紧走吧，可别让那边的铁卫听到我们在议论这些……
Scram. Don't let the guards hear us talking about this...
…嗯？以前好像没见过你。是第一次来买书吗？
Hmm... I don't think I've met you before. Is this your first time visiting the bookstore?
我先看会书，你选好了就告诉我吧。
I'll be here reading. Let me know when you've made your selections.
Alright. Let's hear it. What do you want to chat about?
还不错啊，贝洛伯格爱读书的人可不少呢。
Not bad. Belobog has a lot of people who love to read.
不过，要是有些人看完书能付钱就更好了……
But it would be nice if everyone paid for the books they read...
哼哼，这你可问对人了。你喜欢什么类型的书？
You came to the right person. What kind of books do you like?
I'd like to read some fantasy.
奇幻小说呀…我会推荐这本哦。这本书讲述的是从世界之外漂流而来的旅行者为寻找血亲踏上旅途的故事，在年轻人当中非常受欢迎…我也很喜欢！
Fantasy...? You'll love this one. It's about a traveler from a different world who is on a journey to find their family. It's very popular among young people... I loved it!
科幻小说…你会喜欢主角一行搭乘蒸汽火车在银河中穿行、探索星际文明的故事吗？这本小说在科幻爱好者群体中广受好评哦！
Science fiction...? Would you like to try reading a story about a group traveling by steam train through the cosmos to explore interstellar civilizations? This book is widely acclaimed!
原来你也是推理小说爱好者…这本怎么样？讲的是少女安乐椅侦探和搭档一起解决各种离奇案件、发掘隐秘真相的故事——虽然不算热门，但是质量相当高的作品呢。

I'm also a fan of mystery novels... What do you think about this one? It's about a young girl, Detective Anraku, and her associates, solving strange cases and uncovering hidden truths. It isn't exactly a hit but it's quality writing.
I'll leave you to your work.
I should stop bothering you now.
…啊！不好意思，读书太入迷了没注意到你。想看看书吗？
...Ah! Sorry, I was so caught up in my reading that I didn't notice you. Do you need help with some books?
最近吗？最近我读了好多书，手里的存货又要读完了…改天是不是得再去进货了呢？
Lately? I've been doing a lot of reading. I'm almost done reading all the books I have in stock... Maybe I'll need to get some new books in?
原来进货是为了给自己读啊…
So, you've been getting new stock to give yourself things to read...
嘿嘿，只是先向出版社要样书啦。我对书籍内容的要求可是很严格的。连我这关都过不了的书，可别想流到市场上。
Hehe. I just ask publishers for advanced copies of books. I have high standards when it comes to content, so if a book can't satisfy me, then they shouldn't even think about putting it on the market.
如果样书都没问题的话，我才会向出版社要大货，到那时候再正式对外发售——这就是我的售书方法论！
If an advanced copy is okay, I'll tell the publisher I want to place an order for that book. Then I'll officially put it on sale for the general public. That's how I sell books!
你这是利用职务之便吧…
You're just taking advantage of your position...
唔…你要这么说，我也没办法反驳你。
Oh... I mean, when you put it that way, I can't say that you're wrong.
不过有些书的内容真的称得上是粗制滥造…我怀疑是出版社内部有编辑在偷懒。要我说，我这可是在帮读者一个大忙！

There's some content out there that tells me a publisher is churning out books without any regard to quality... I suspect that the publisher has a lazy editor. From my perspective, I'm doing the reader a solid!
那有打听到什么其他消息吗？
Have you heard any other news?
有打听到什么其他消息吗？
Have you heard any other news?
啊，说到这个…你听说了吗？据说那本《雪国冒险奇谭》可能有机会重新公开发售了哦！
Ah. Well... have you heard? Supposedly, there's a chance that the Tale of the Winterlands can be openly sold again!
那可真是一本好书呀，之前被查禁了真的很可惜…你也是《奇谭》的书迷吗？我现在正在全程跟进相关信息哦，如果有什么新进展肯定第一时间告诉你！

That book series is simply fantastic. It was such a shame that it was banned before... Are you a Tales fan? I've been keeping up with all the news about it. If I hear any updates, I'll be sure to tell you right away!
报纸！今天的报纸！快来看看咯！
We got the news! Today's paper! Hot off the press!
哟，竟然来了个生面孔！要买份报吗？
Hah! A new face! Interested in a newspaper?
哎哟，这可头疼了，现在可是工作时间哪？不过您要是愿意买份报的话……
Sorry, you caught me during work hours, but if you want to buy a newspaper...
生意？嘿嘿，至少填饱肚子是不用愁咯。
Business? Hehe. Just enough to keep from starving.
不过嘛，走街串巷沿街叫卖到底是个体力活…但您要是能给我贡献点销售额，我兴许就能讨些不一样的食，那可是再好不过！
Selling these in the streets is hard work... It would be nice if you could contribute a little to my profits. Then, I may be able to afford to eat something different for once!
怎么说？您有新闻看，我能吃顿好——各取所需！如何，这笔买卖不亏吧？
What do you think? You get the news, I get a good meal. It's a win-win! A good deal, right?
哟，这您可是提了个好问题！等我来给您翻翻……
Hmm, that's a good question! Let me see...
这个怎么样？——「黑衣人来到波瓦大臣身旁——只说了一句话，大臣便神色紧张地离开了宴会。到底发生了什么？」
How about this one — What did the man in black tell Mr. Bova, the minister, that made him leave the party in a hurry?
嘿嘿，您甭着急！再看看这个：「七人聚众火锅，六人相继昏倒；调查发现火锅里并无有害物质，凶手如何达成完美犯罪？」
Hold on! Check out this one — Six out of seven people fainted while eating hot pot. No harmful substances were found in the hot pot. How did this perfect crime happen?
那我可是有个妙招，能解您燃眉之急！
I have a great idea to help with your urgent needs!
来，您看看这份报纸——谜底就在这上边印着啦！只要您肯舍我点冬城盾……
Here, the answer is right in this newspaper! It's yours as long as you give me some shield...
我这就把答案告诉您——只要您肯舍我点冬城盾就行！
I'll tell you the answer, right away, after you give me a few shield!
您消消气，消消气！嗐，这不都是为了生意嘛，还请您理解……
Take it easy! Take it easy! It's just how the business works. I'm sure you understand...
I'll leave you to your work.
I'll leave you to your work.
News! We got the news! Don't miss it!
最近？最近那可是过得红红火火，哈哈…您也知道吧？这贝洛伯格的情况简直是要翻天覆地啦！
Recently? I've been living large. Haha... You've heard, right? Belobog is about to go through some big changes!
哈哈，您的消息也真是灵通！
Haha, you're really up with the play!
悄悄告诉您，我从报社的人那儿听说，前任大守护者出事的时候，在场的只有布洛妮娅大人一个人…怎么样，可疑吧？
On the down-low... I heard from my contacts at the newspapers that when the old Supreme Guardian had her accident, the only one at the scene was Lady Bronya... doesn't that seem suspicious?
那还有假？您看看，我可是卖报的，每天有什么新闻我都是第一个知道——都是一手消息，千真万确！
Would I lie to you? Look, I sell newspapers for a living, and I'm the first to hear the news every day — all first-hand, every word of it is true!
悄悄告诉您，我从报社的人那儿听说，前任大守护者出事的时候，在场的只有布洛妮娅大人一个人…怎么样，可疑吧？
On the down-low... I heard from my contacts at the newspapers that when the old Supreme Guardian had her accident, the only one at the scene was Lady Bronya... doesn't that seem suspicious?
实不相瞒，我亲眼看着大守护者…
To tell you the truth, I saw with my own eyes that the Supreme Guardian...
嚯，那您可得好好说说…那大守护者到底出什么事了？
Huh, then you have to tell me about it... What happened to the Supreme Guardian?
哈哈，开个玩笑！您就甭拿我打趣了。瞧瞧告诉您，我跟报社的人确认过了，前任大守护者出事的时候，在场的只有布洛妮娅大人一个人……

Haha, just kidding! Don't make fun of me. On the down-low... I had it confirmed from my contacts at the newspapers that when the old Supreme Guardian had her accident, the only one at the scene was Lady Bronya...
…咳咳，不论如何，现在的贝洛伯格可在风口浪尖上——我们这行可得好好抓住这个机会哪！所谓「机不可失，失不再来」…您说是吧？

...Ahem, well no matter what, Belobog is in the teeth of a storm now — and in this line of business, you've got to take ya chances! You know what they say: "An opportunity lost is an opportunity wasted"... right?
干后勤，干后勤，每天就是干后勤，唉……
Logistics, logistics, all I do is logistics every day, *sigh*...
十来岁的姑娘当领导，五十岁的老头儿干后勤……
Get a teenage girl to be the boss, get a <unbreak>50</unbreak>-year-old geezer to do logistics...
二十多的小伙当大官，五十岁的老头儿干后勤……
Get a <unbreak>20</unbreak>-year-old boy to be an official, get a <unbreak>50</unbreak>-year-old geezer to do logistics...
哎，这些「地火」的人…还有那些流浪者，没完没了的好烦啊…就不能安分点吗。
Ack, these Wildfire guys... and the vagrants, they're so annoying... can't you just chill out?
我可没有讨厌「地火」，我只是觉得他们太过理想化了。别看我是个家庭主妇，但外面的情况我还是知道的。
I don't hate Wildfire. I just think they're too idealistic. I might be just a housewife, but I know a thing or two about the outside world.
吃喝拉撒、装备后勤，地底样样都缺。没有这些物资保障，你拿什么保卫自己的家园？那不就是空想嘛！
