Food, water, waste disposal, logistics — it's a mess from head to toe in the Underworld. Without these basics guaranteed, how do you plan on defending your home? Why, it's just a daydream!
You seem to hate the vagrants.
那不然呢？成天就知道惹事，安分点找个稳定的工作不好吗？
Of course. They stir up trouble all day. They should settle down and get stable jobs.
是是是，我知道那些怪物害得有些人没了家园，但有手有脚的找份工作很难吗？凡事总不能让环境迁就你，你得去适应环境，懂吧？

I know some people lost their homes because of the monsters, but is it that hard for able-bodied people to find jobs? You can't let your situation dictate your predicament, instead you have to adapt. Do you get me?
所以啊，我是这么教育我家小孩的——「你不听爸爸妈妈的话，长大以后就只能去当流浪者咯！」
So that's how I taught my kids — "If you don't listen to your parents, you'll end up as a vagrant when you grow up!"
你问这么多干吗？看你也不像流浪者，难道你是「地火」的人？不对，看你这身衣服不像是下层的风格…莫非你是从上层区来的？
Why are you asking so many questions? You don't look like a vagrant. Are you part of the Wildfire? No, you don't dress like you're from the Underworld... Are you from the Overworld?
…啧，我还以为是个从上面来的大人物…你来找我干吗，有什么事吗？
...Gee, I thought you were some big shot from above... So what's your deal?
那当然，以前我和孩子他爸刚刚认识的时候，还经常在上面的餐厅里烛光晚餐呢，我又不是镇子上这些年轻人，我怎么可能……
Of course. Back when my husband and I first met, we used to have romantic candlelit dinners up there in the restaurants. I'm not just some country kid, tsk...
呃，等等，你是问我上面的现况吗？那我还真不知道，要不你给我讲讲？
Uh, hang on — do you mean up above right now? I really don't know. Could you tell me about it?
你如何评价铁卫撤离一事？
What's your view of the evacuation of the Guards?
有什么好评价的呀，我听说这是可可利亚大人的命令，但我想总归有她的道理吧…她可是大守护者诶，我不相信她还能相信谁?
What's there to say? I heard it's on Madam Cocolia's orders, but she has to have her reasons... She's the Supreme Guardian after all. If I can't trust her, who can I trust?
所以…我觉得吧，铁卫们迟早会重回下层保卫我们的！大守护者一定不会抛弃我们。
So... I think that sooner or later the Guards will return to the Underworld to protect us! The Supreme Guardian will never abandon us!
I don't have any other questions.
Nothing. Sorry, I have to go.
我跟你说，你别学那群流浪者一样，总以为自己比可可利亚大人他们聪明。
I'm telling you, don't you dare be like those vagrants and dream that you're smarter than Madam Cocolia and the government.
大守护者不会抛弃我们的，而银鬃铁卫也迟早会回来的，不信的话咱们走着瞧！
The Supreme Guardian will never abandon us. And the Silvermane Guards have to return some time. Just you wait and see!
孩子他爸最近回来得早，最近难得有几天清净日子，干脆加个菜好了。
My husband has been coming back early these days, and peace and quiet has been in short supply. Let's add another dish.
不过…又得自己买菜自己煮…哎，真怀念能以前在上面的餐厅约会的日子…也不知道那个铁卫大哥现在过得怎么样……
But... I'll have to buy everything and cook it myself... Ack, I really miss those days when we could date up there... I wonder what that man from the Guards is up to these days...
诶？是你啊，吓我一跳，我以为是哪个不长眼的流浪者呢。
Ah? It's you. You startled me. I thought it was some dense vagrants.
怎么，你找我有什么事吗？
What do you want from me?
和以前一样呗，不过…你听说了吗？上下层区马上就要开放了！我就知道大守护者不会放弃我们，之前撤走铁卫果然是形势所迫吧…太好了，我们有希望了！

Same as before. But... have you heard? The Underworld and Overworld are being connected soon! I knew the Supreme Guardian would never abandon us, and withdrawing Guards was just out of circumstances... Great! We have hope!
你觉得是大守护者的功劳？
Do you think it's the work of the Supreme Guardian?
那当然！大守护者高瞻远瞩，人家哪样不比我们普通人强。可惜啊，之前镇子上还有些人一直在诋毁大守护者——

Of course, it is! The Supreme Guardian is far-sighted, and more powerful than us commoners in every way. It's a pity then that some villagers have taken to slandering the name of the Supreme Guardian...
尤其是「地火」和流浪者那帮人，之前成天就知道抱怨大守护者抛弃了下层区…这下把她盼回来了吧？哼，回头我倒要看看那帮人怎么解释！
Especially that Wildfire and the vagrants, endlessly complaining about how the Supreme Guardian abandoned the Underworld... Now she's back. Hmph, I'll have to see how they spin this one.
你说这话是什么意思？难道你就不觉得激动吗？
What do you mean? Don't you feel excited, too?
等银鬃铁卫正式回归下层区，这地方的未来不是肉眼可见的光明吗？
Once the Silvermane Guards return to the Underworld, the glorious future of this place will be obvious to all.
哎…银鬃铁卫的各位怎么还不下来呀？有他们在镇子上巡逻，我这心里才有安全感啊！
Hey... Why haven't the Silvermane Guards come down yet? It only feels safe to have them patrol around the town!
没看见我在忙吗？有话快说，没事别烦我……
Can't you see I'm busy? Spit it out and stop bothering me...
是你啊，又见面了！上次走得匆忙，还没来得及向你道谢呢。
...Ah, it's you again! The last time we met, I left in a hurry. I never got a chance to thank you.
再自我介绍一下，我是大矿区的承包商、矿队工头安东尼娜。如你之前在矿区所见，这地底有不少人跟着我混口饭吃。

I'd like to introduce myself again. I'm Antonia, the developer responsible for the Great Mine and the supervisor for the mining teams. As you saw in the mine, a lot of people in the underground count on me to make a living.
矿头不用去矿场监工吗？
Don't you need to supervise the miners?
监工的事，交给采掘现场的小队长就行了。
The team leaders are responsible for supervision.
我的工作就是统筹人力，安排工期。亲自下场不仅帮不上忙，还会碍了矿工们的事。何必给大家找不自在呢？
My job is to coordinate personnel and arrange work schedules. My presence down in the mines will only hinder the miners' work. Why make everyone uncomfortable?
Supervisors make a lot of money, right?
你的问题还真尖锐…咳，这么说吧，下层区的大家过得都很拮据，相对于大多数人来说…我手头还算富余。
You are quite direct... Ahem, let's put it this way, everyone in the Underworld is practically living on scraps... so compared to most of them, I have a decent life.
这地底算得上值钱的玩意就只有地髓了——碰巧，我手里最不缺的就是地髓。
The only thing that's worth anything in Underground is Geomarrow, which I happen to have a ton of on hand.
对了，听说你们在帮「地火」办事？我提醒你们一句，奥列格那帮人虽然很讲义气，但是兜里其实根本没几个子儿。
By the way, I heard that you were working for Wildfire. A kind reminder for you, Oleg's crew takes care of their own, but their pockets aren't deep.
要是各位在资金周转方面遇到了什么困难，欢迎随时来找我帮忙。
Feel free to come to me when you have financial problems.
怎么样，还有别的什么事吗？没有的话，我就要开始忙了。
Is there anything else you want to know? If not, I'll get back to my work.
I still have some more questions...
I heard that the mine hasn't been peaceful lately.
是有点乱，上次你在矿场也见到了吧…不过闹归闹，那些流浪者迟早会消停下来的。
Yes. As you saw last time in the mine, it's been a bit chaotic... but it will end. The vagrants will stop messing around sooner or later.
毕竟到头来，大家还是要吃饭的嘛。要是真把正经矿队都排挤走了，光凭那些流氓地痞根本养不活自己。
After all, they've got mouths to feed. If they really got rid of all the professional mining teams, those hooligans won't be able to make a living.
他们自己也清楚这点，所以每次闹事都还算有分寸，稍微尝到点甜头就打道回府了。只是没想到这次居然惊动了史瓦罗……
They are well aware of this, which is why they have never crossed the line. A small reward goes a long way with them. I just didn't expect the news to get all the way to Svarog this time...
听说你招了些流浪者进矿队？
I heard you recruited some of the vagrants into the mining team.
唉，怎么说呢…大家都不容易，要是这磐岩镇也被裂界侵蚀了，我们也得像他们一样另寻生计，谁又不希望这时有人能帮一把呢？
Well, how should I put it...? Life isn't easy. If Boulder Town also gets eroded by the Fragmentum, we will have to find another livelihood. Who wouldn't want some help at a time like that?
可是老矿工们不这么想，他们觉得流浪者把矿队弄得乌烟瘴气的…然后那些新来的又觉得矿队待遇太差，没有自由…到头来搞得两头不讨好。

But the old miners have their own ideas. They think the vagrants have made a mess of the mining team... and the vagrants aren't happy with their payment and feel that they've lost freedom... In the end, neither side is happy.
不过我有自己的行事准则，这点挫折不会改变我的想法，放心吧。
But I know what I am doing. This minor setback will not change my mind. Don't worry about it.
地底有什么推荐的活动吗？
Do you have any recommendations for activities in the underground?
比较出名的是那个搏击俱乐部——但我才不会花钱去看那种滑稽表演，太掉价了，恶俗又低级。
The Fight Club is quite popular. But personally, I wouldn't pay a shield for that kind of cheap show. It's vulgar and low-class.
还有家大饭店，就是歌蒂开的那家，菜品挺不错——前提是歌蒂没有突发奇想，研究出一些难以下咽的诡异菜谱……
There is a restaurant, the one owned by Gertie. The food there is quite good... so long as Gertie doesn't come up with some weird recipes on a whim...
另外，流浪者那边好像有说唱表演来着？我欣赏不来，也没去过，只是有所耳闻。你要是感兴趣可以去逛逛，就是去的时候得注意安全。

Also, I heard there will be a rap concert where the vagrants are? I don't know how to appreciate that kind of thing, so I've never been there. Go check it out if you are interested. Just be careful there.
没什么事，那我就不打扰你了。
That's about it. I will leave you to your work.
那行，以后要有机会再合作吧。眼下我还得想下排班的事，回头再聊。
Okay. I'm looking forward to working with you sometime. I have to figure out scheduling, so I'll talk to you later.
又见面了，外来者。怎么说，要谈生意，还是说你找我有事？
Hello again, outsider. What brings you here, business or something personal?
哦，这不有消息说上下层区马上要重新开放了嘛，我最近正忙得团团转呢。
Well, rumor has it that the Overworld and Underworld are opening up to each other again, so I've been busy with that.
嗐，不过是些生意上的事，我正和上层区的企业家们谈条件呢——虽然到目前为止只是在互相写信罢了。
It's just a business thing. I'm still ironing out the details with some Overworld entrepreneurs — even if we're still only at the letter-writing stage.
你如何评价解除封锁一事？
What do you think about the lifting of the blockade?
你问我？要我说，那好处肯定大于坏处。
You asking me? I reckon the good outweighs the bad.
封锁之后，我只能靠矿场的生意过活——这虽然够我吃穿用度、也够给矿民开工资，但这下层区的经济环境说到底还是死水一潭，资金和物料根本流动不起来……

During the days of the blockade, I could only rely on my mining for work — and despite leaving me with enough money and my miners' wages, this Underworld and its economy are stagnant. There's no trickling down of funds or goods...
但如今封锁解除，那状况可就大不相同了。我手里的资产现在可以用在各种投资上，等雪球越滚越大再坐享红利——这才是生财之道。

But now the blockade's lifted — well, things are completely different. I can invest my assets into anything I want, and I'll wait for that compound interest to start snowballing — that's how you make money, see.
我想想啊…有家专做地髓设备的私人工厂，好像还有个生产机器人的民营军工厂。
Let me think... There's a private manufacturer that makes Geomarrow gear, and another military one that produces robots.
哦，对了，我还联系上了一个叫拉雯妮的房地产中介，她手里的项目看着很有前途…但前提是她所说属实。
Oh yeah, that's right — I also got in touch with a real estate agent called Lavonne. Her project looks promising... if what she's saying is actually true.
总之…我先观望观望再说。
In short... I'll have to wait and see.
除了这些，还有什么其他变化吗？
Any other changes around here besides those?
你这是当调查记者还是商业间谍啊？问得这么仔细…不过我信得过你，毕竟你是救了我们矿区的恩人。
Are you an investigative reporter, or is this commercial espionage!? All these detailed questions... But I know I can trust you — after all, you're the generous soul one who saved our mine.
要我说，除此之外的最大变化——大概就是我终于有地方能花钱了？比如上层区的那家黄金歌剧院，我老早就想去看看了……
If you ask me, the other biggest change has got to be — that I've finally got somewhere to spend my money. I've always dreamed of going to the Golden Theater up in the Overworld...
造物之柱的工程也由你负责吗？
Are you responsible for the Pillars of Creation construction project, too?
哦？你可真抬举我。这么重要的工程，当然是大守护者亲自负责。
Oh? You flatter me. Such an important project is naturally overseen by the Supreme Guardian.
我呢，只要确保来干活的工人们吃饱穿暖，就算是最大的贡献了。
As for me, I make sure that the workers are all fed and clothed, that is my greatest contribution.
你觉得造物引擎能修好吗？
Do you think the Engine of Creation can be fixed?
Of course, it has to be.
大家都已经把力气用到这份上了，还有什么不能完成的工作？
Everyone has already worked so hard for this, do you think there is anything that they cannot do?
What are your thoughts on the Engine of Creation?
高大，宏伟，比地下的任何工程都要目光长远，承载着我们的希望。
It is large, grand, and requires greater foresight than any underground construction project. It is a vessel of our hope.
之前的事我也听说了， 这是你们和大守护者共同争取来的机会，我们当然要把握住。
I've heard about what happened before, that you and the Supreme Guardian fought for this opportunity together. Naturally, we want to seize it.
为了让工程进展顺利，我把一部分积蓄捐给了施工队——这是我最正确的一笔投资。
In order to keep the construction underway, I donated a portion of my savings to the construction team. It's the best investment I've ever made.
好不容易回到地面上，我可不希望一切都泡了汤。
We worked hard to make it back up to the surface, I don't want it to all be for nothing.
I'm just passing by. I've got somewhere else to be.
哼，淡季过去了，拳赛的高峰期就要来了…如果票价提高十个点……
Hmm, the off-season is over and the busy season for boxing is coming up... If the ticket prices go up by <unbreak>10%</unbreak>...
嗯？你谁啊，买票了么？没买就别在这瞎凑热闹…等会儿，看你这身奇异的装扮，莫非——
Huh? Who are you? Do you have a ticket? If not, please leave... Hang on, judging by your strange outfit, could you be —
哦，等会儿，看你这身奇异的装扮，莫非……
Wait a minute. The way you're dressed... Are you...?
哈哈，原来是「外来者」！怪我有眼无珠，多有冒犯，请你不要介意。
Haha! So you're an outsider! I'm being blind here. Sorry if I offended you.
先自我介绍一下，我是史考特，「搏击俱乐部」的老板。我听他们说，你身手特别好…啧，看你这副模样，卖相倒也不错。
Let me introduce myself. I'm Scott, the owner of the Fight Club. I heard that you are very good at fighting... Hmm, you also look pretty good.
我这儿就缺你这种人才，怎么样，有没有兴趣跟我签约，成为本赛季的常驻拳手？
I need people like you here. Do you want to join the club and be a resident boxer for this season?
还考虑什么？时机不等人。
What do you say? Time waits for no man.
我才不跟你这种人签约。
I'm not signing up with you.
你这家伙，真是不识好歹，哼，回头后悔了可别回来求我。
Hmph, you'll regret it. Don't come asking me to change my mind later.
行吧，你不是来打拳的，那就是来观赛的咯？
If you're not here to fight, you must be here to watch.
自己排队买票去，我史考特做生意向来公私分明，别以为跟我聊几句混个脸熟了，就能免票入场。
Go buy a ticket. I'm an honest businessman. Exchanging a few words with me won't get you free admission.
I'm not here for the match.
Don't you look down on me.
…怎么说？难道是来找我谈生意的？看你这样子，也不像啊。
...Then are you here for business? You don't look like a businessman.
说吧，你找我到底有什么事？
So, what exactly do you want to see me about?
嗯？你想问什么？商业机密的话免谈！门儿都没有！
Hmm? What do you want to know? If you want to know my business secrets, then I'll have to tell you to go away.
给你打拳的都是什么人？
想在我这儿打拳，你身上必须得有「卖点」。只要能给我带来收益，管你是小丑还是怪物，我统统买单。
Anyone that wants to be a fighter here needs to have some selling points. As long as they can bring me profit, whether they are clowns or monsters, I'll hire them.
我最擅长鉴别拳手，一眼就能看出哪个有真材实料，哪个是混饭吃的废物。
I'm the best at seeing through people. I can tell at a glance which boxer has real talent and which one is just a loser.
你问这个干嘛，心动了？想露两手？那刚才怎么不答应我？
Why are you asking? Are you thinking about giving it a try now? You could have said yes to me earlier.
Is there a lot of money in this line of work?
只要客源不断，收入自然有保障。哈，你不会真以为我只是个卖门票的吧？光靠卖票赚的那点钱够干什么？
As long as we have a constant flow of customers, income is guaranteed. Hah, do you really think that all I do is sell tickets? What could I do with the tiny bit of money I make from tickets?
我的目标是在地底搞个全链路深度推广，细分观众群体，抓住话题风口，形成拳赛视听娱乐的产业闭环……
My goal is to create an end-to-end in-depth marketing campaign, segment the audience, seize on the trends, and build an audio-visual entertainment industry around boxing in the Underworld...
然后多方位布局，打通地底所有产业，创造属于我的商业帝国……
And then link it to all the industries in the Underground to create a business empire...
咳，扯远了，全当我在自言自语吧。你就当没听见，行吧？
Ahem, I've said too much. Just consider this as me thinking out loud....pretend you heard nothing, okay?
I heard you mistreat the boxers.
扯淡！你听谁说的，他敢当着我的面说吗？
Baloney! Who said that? Tell them to say it to my face.
自己顶不住不会找我解约吗？实在不行就去别的地方找个班上啊，矿队不就喜欢收那种五大三粗的家伙吗？
They are welcome to end their contracts and find a job somewhere else if they can't take it anymore. The mining team would love one of these big, burly guys.
再说了，究竟是被我虐待了，还是这个拳手自己内心承受力太弱啊？不知道从自己身上找原因，这就是弱者的心态！
Maybe they're just too fragile. Instead of reflecting on their own decisions, they accuse me of abuse! The typical mentality of the weak!
在这地底要想发财，谁不知道得跟我史考特混。
Everyone knows, they have to follow Scott if they want to make a life for themselves Underground.
哼，我怎么说来着，机会难得，跟着我吃香的喝辣的是迟早的事。
Hmph, as I said, opportunity doesn't wait. Getting rich is just a matter of time when you are with me.
不过我先说好，你先前错过了一次好机会，你要找我签约当拳手啊，这底薪和分成的比例可没之前那么高了。
Let me be clear, you already missed one chance to sign up, so if you want to be a boxer now, the basic salary and profit share ratio won't be as high as before.
拳赛就是这样，观众的喜好随时都在变，合同也得跟着调整——嗯？不对，看你个表情，也不像来找我签约的。
This is how boxing is. The audience's preferences change all the time, therefore the contract must also be adjusted. Hmm? You don't look like you are here to sign with me.
说吧，你找我到底有什么事？
So, what exactly do you want to see me about?
嚯哈哈哈，你听说了吗？上下层区马上就要重新打通，那帮银鬃铁卫也要下来了！
Bwahaha, did you hear that? They're lifting the blockade between the Overworld and the Underworld, and the Silvermane Guards will be coming down here!
这件事对你有什么好处？
…难道其中藏了我不知道的笑点？
...Is there a joke in there that I've failed to understand?
哼，这你就不懂了吧！将来铁卫们肯定会长期驻扎在这里。那么问题来了——这下层区本来也没什么娱乐活动，那他们该去哪儿找乐子呢？

Hmph, you just don't get it! The Silvermane Guards will definitely be stationed here for a long time. So, here's my question: There's nothing to do for fun down in the Underworld, so what are they going to be getting up to for entertainment?
Are you hinting at the Fight Club?
Are you hinting at the Wildfire gathering place?
哎——肤浅，真是肤浅！铁卫老爷们可看不上那种地方！
Oh — that's shallow, reeeal shallow! The Silvermane Guards don't give a dang about that kinda place!
我听说史瓦罗那里有说唱大赛…
I heard there's a rap battle over at Svarog's...
哎——肤浅，真是肤浅！铁卫老爷们可看不上那种地方！
Oh — that's shallow, reeeal shallow! The Silvermane Guards don't give a dang about that kinda place!
嚯哈哈哈…告诉你：答案就是我史考特的搏击俱乐部！
Bwahaha, let me tell you: The answer is my Fight Club!
驻扎在地下的铁卫可不像前线的兄弟们每天出生入死…整天除了巡逻就是站岗，肯定早就技痒难耐了。
The guards stationed down in the Underworld aren't like those heroes staring down death every day on the frontlines... All they do is stand or patrol. They must be itching to show off their skills.
你也想明白了吧？这种想要上战场的欲望无处发泄，那就只能来我的搏击俱乐部找刺激咯。
So you get it, too? All this bloodlust with nowhere to vent. All you can do is rock up to the Fight Club and have a good time.
哼哼，我可千万不能放过这种机会——这可是发大财的好时机啊。搞不好还能忽悠几个新兵蛋子来给我打拳，甚至还能在地上开分馆，啧啧啧……
Hmph, I mustn't waste this opportunity — now's the time when fortunes are made. Maybe I can fool a few rookies to take a crack at me, or even open up a branch up in the Overworld, tsk tsk tsk...
你知道吗，科鲁泽去世了。
Did you hear? Kluzer passed away.
科鲁泽？科鲁泽…哦，你是说那个，「怪物盔甲」！
Kluzer? Kluzer... Oh, you mean that thing — "Monster Armor"!
原来他已经入土了啊…我说怎么好几天没见着这人呢。
So he's kicked the bucket, huh... I was wondering why I hadn't seen him for a few days.
还好，这两天没他比赛，要不他这一出准给我生意搅黄咯。我还得赶紧把后边的安排调整调整……
Luckily he doesn't have any fights for a while, otherwise he'd definitely mess up my business. I gotta switch things up quickly behind the scenes...
冷血？你说我？怎么着，难道你想说是我把他逼上绝路的不成？
Cold-blooded? Me? What do you mean, are you saying that I forced him down that dead end road?
这地下的大环境就是这样——富贵险中求！你要是想挣大钱，要么自己把命搭进去，要么让别人给你卖命，懂吗？
That's how things are down in the Underworld — it's high risk, high reward! If you wanna make it big, you have to either stake your life on it, or stake someone else's life on it. Get it?
I knew you'd overreact like that...
哈，看来你也是个识时务的{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}。
Ha, looks like you're a {M#guy}{F#gal} who keeps themselves up on all the plays.
这地下的大环境就是这样——富贵险中求啊！你要是想挣大钱，要么自己把命搭进去，要么让别人给你卖命……
That's how things are down in the Underworld — it's high risk, high reward! If you wanna make it big, you have to either stake your life on it, or stake someone else's life on it...
行了行了，我还有事，可没空一直跟你聊这种无聊的话题……
Alright, alright. I've got something I need to do, and I don't have the time to keep blathering with you about all this...
啊，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我真的不能收你的礼物啦！
Huh? Oh, I can't take your gift!
不过，如果一定、一定要送给我的话，人家也可以勉为其难收下的……
But if you really, really want... I guess I can take it... but I don't wanna...
咦，原来{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}没有准备礼物啊……
Oh, so you didn't bring a gift...
那…{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}来找阿丽娜有什么事情吗？我可是很忙的哟，请不要占用人家太多时间～
So... what are you here for? I'm really busy. Please don't take too much of my time.
倒是也没什么特别的事…
也没关系啦，直觉告诉我，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}一定是个很可爱的人…阿丽娜想要和可爱的人交朋友！
It's okay. Alina thinks you are sooo cute... I like being friends with cute people!
那么，以后就请{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}多关照啦！
It's really nice to meet you!
Let's get to know each other...
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}不知道吗？诊所里的其他小朋友每天都会给我送小礼物呢～
You didn't know? The kids in the clinic give me gifts every day.
这个嘛…我也不知道。可能因为大家都很善良吧～
Well... I don't know. Maybe they are just nice.
What kind of gifts do they give you?
种类还挺多的呢，嘿嘿～不过我最喜欢的就是毛绒玩具啦。
All kinds of things. Hehe... my favorite is the plush toys.
收到礼物确实会很开心，不过要是数量太多的话，我也会觉得有点不好意思呢…但我也不方便拒绝大家的好意，就只好都收下啦。
I'm happy to get gifts but sometimes there are too many, and I feel pressured... It's not nice to say no to gifts, so I accept them all.
偷偷告诉你哦，有些时候，还会有小朋友为了送人家礼物吵架，甚至打起来…
You know what? Sometimes kids even fight over giving me gifts...
我只希望大家能够和睦相处…呜呜。
I just hope everyone can get along...
送你礼物的孩子…有什么目的？
Why do they give you gifts... What are they up to?
咿！{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}居然问我这种问题…真是坏心眼！
Hey! What are you asking me that for?... Don't be a jerk!
Why am I a jerk all of a sudden...?
因为确实是这样嘛…有很多小朋友都会送阿丽娜礼物，然后对阿丽娜说「喜欢」……
They just want to... A lot of kids want to give me things and tell me they like me...
用大人的话说，这就叫「追求」吧？其实我也不太懂啦……
Grown-ups call that "pursuing someone," but I don't really understand...
She is referring to something else...
咦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}说什么啦？如果遇到了什么问题，可以直接对我说哦～
Sorry, what did you say? You can tell me if you have any problems.
阿丽娜一定很讨人喜欢吧？
People must like you a lot, Alina.
不过，我很高兴听到{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}这么说！谢谢你～
You just made my day! Thank you!
但是，其实诊所里还是有些孩子不愿意和阿丽娜一起玩的……
Actually, some kids in the clinic don't want to play with me...
原因的话，我也不是特别清楚啦。
只是，在诊所里，有很多小朋友的爸爸妈妈都不知道去了哪里，而阿丽娜的爸爸妈妈偶尔还会来看人家……
A lot of kids in the clinic don't have moms and dads, but my mom and dad come to see me sometimes...
爸爸妈妈来接我的时候，总会看到那些小朋友远远躲着，好像不想让别人看到自己……
When my mom and dad are here to pick me up, those kids always hide far away. They don't want other people to see them...
我在想…也许，这会是大家不愿意和阿丽娜一起玩的原因吗？
I think... maybe that's why they don't want to play with me.
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我们又见面啦！
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}今天是特意来看阿丽娜的吗？好开心喔～
Are you here to see me? I'm so happy!
咦？是问我最近有收到什么样的礼物吗？最近的话…有一大包「雪地跳跳糖」，还有一只很可爱的毛绒兔哦！
Mmm? Are you asking me if I've gotten any nice gifts recently? Well... Recently, there's been a big bag of snow-white popping candy, and also a cute fluffy bunny rabbit!
啊，对了，我还听爸爸妈妈说，我们很快又能去上层区玩了…好期待呀～
Oh yeah, I also heard from my parents that we'll be able to go to the Overworld soon... I can't wait~
Alina, you must love the Overworld, right?
当然喜欢呀。上层区的孩子们都穿很好看的衣服，还能收到很多精致的小礼物。
Course I do! The kids in the Overworld all wear beautiful clothes, and they all get pretty little gifts.
听爸爸妈妈说，他们以前就住在上层区，直到家里「破产」了以后才搬到了下层区。如果有机会的话，阿丽娜真想回到上层生活呢。
My parents told me that they used to live up there until they were "bankrupted" and we had to move down here. If I get the chance, I'm definitely gonna try and go back up there to the Overworld.
下次去上层区玩的时候…我想问问鼹鼠党的小朋友要不要一起去。毕竟一个人玩总会无聊的～
When I go to the Overworld... I'm gonna ask the Mole kids if they wanna come with me. 'Cos it's boring just playing by yourself.
…尤利安就不用问啦，反正他一定会跟我一起去的，嘻嘻。
...I don't need to ask Julian. He'll definitely come with me, heehee.
哦、哦哦！又见面了，咱们还真有缘。
Oh... Ooh! We meet again! It seems we have a connection.
Work is just a small part of my life.
做一天，然后躺三天，这就是我的工作准则。
My philosophy is to work for one day and relax for three.
哎呀…让你见笑了，嘿嘿，睡了一天，我也该起来吃早饭了。
Hehe, time to get up for breakfast. I've been sleeping all day.
让你见笑了，嘿嘿，睡了一天，我也该起来吃早饭了。
Hehe, time to get up for breakfast. I've been in bed all day.
对啊，我每天一般只吃一顿饭，这第一顿不就是叫「早饭」吗？
Mm-hmm. I usually just have one meal per day. Isn't the first meal of the day called "breakfast"?
才一天，不是很正常吗？没什么好大惊小怪的……
It's only been one day, which is pretty normal. It's really no big deal...
我的最高记录是连续三天不吃东西，这算什么。
My record is fasting for three days, so this is nothing.
又不是活不下去，你看，我现在不还活蹦乱跳的吗？嘿嘿…呃，倒也不必用这种怜悯的眼神看着我，没那么夸张吧？
It's not like I might die. Look, I'm alive and doing just fine. Hehe... And don't look at me with all that pity. It's nothing.
话说回来…你把我叫醒，是有什么事吗?
By the way... Why did you wake me up again?
How can you live on such a small amount of money?
我开销不多，一人吃饱全家不饿，嘿嘿。你要是学我一天只吃一顿饭，肯定也能省下不少伙食费。
My expenses are low. One person eats and the whole family is fed. Hehe. If you have one meal a day like me, you could also save a lot on food.
别误会，我可不是为了省钱才只吃一顿的…主要还是因为我每天都会睡到自然醒，不怎么干活，能量消耗自然就少了。
Don't get me wrong. My goal isn't to save money... It's just that I sleep most of the day and I don't do much work, so my energy consumption is naturally low.
我这人没什么购买欲，凡事只要够用就行——你看我这身衣服裤子，都是旧的！至于其它那些身外之物…仔细想想就能明白，我根本不需要那些玩意！
I don't have much desires for shopping. I'm happy with what I have. The clothes I'm wearing are old. As for other kinds of worldly possessions... I don't need any of them!
…懒？才不是！这只是一种生活方式而已！我又不是什么活都不干，最低限度的工作我还是会按时按量完成的……
... Lazy? No, I'm not lazy! It's just my way of life! It's not like I don't do anything at all. I simply do the minimum amount, but I do my work on time...
要我说，挖矿这事根本不值得耗费太多心神和体力。每天就这么低头锄大地，人的思想都会被束缚……
If you ask me, mining is not worth the effort and energy. Digging every day can trap the mind...
而我挣脱束缚的方式就是——睡觉！通过这种低消耗的行为来审视自己的人生，远离外界的纷扰……
My way of breaking the cycle is to... sleep! I stay clear of the world's disturbances through this low-cost act and I regularly reflect on my life...
Aren't you worried about what people say?
什么非议？我跟大家伙处的都可好了。
People aren't saying anything. I get along well with everyone.
大家都知道我的脾气，时间长了也都习惯了我的生活方式…说到底，我又没碍着谁的事，也没挡着谁升官发财，对不？
They all know how I am and over time they have become used to my lifestyle... After all, I'm not in anyone's way, am I?
再说了，这年头谁还顾得上关心别人的生活啊…能管好自己就不错了。
Besides, no one has the time to obsess about other people's business nowadays... People are lucky just to be able to take care of themselves.
What will you do when you're old?
那么遥远的事，想它干嘛…放心吧，我肯定饿不死的啦！
That's far in the future. Why think about it now...? Don't worry so much. I won't starve to death!
你看那些卖力气工作的矿工，一天到晚汗流浃背——图个啥？年轻的时候享受不到生活，老了又落下一身病痛……
Look at those hard-working miners. They are soaked in sweat all day long, and what do they get? They miss out on life when they're young and when they're old, they are sick and in pain...
与其担心我，你不如去关心关心他们。依我看，他们才是可怜人呐……
You should focus on them instead of worrying about me. In my opinion, they are the poor ones...
I don't have any other questions.
Nothing. I will leave you alone.
要我说，人就该丢掉那些不切实际的欲望，回归自然，回归地底……
If you ask me, humans should just abandon those unrealistic desires and return to nature... return to the underground...
好了好了，我要继续睡了…呼…呼噜……
Okay, I'm going back to sleep... *snore*...
呼——哎哟！我刚做了个美梦…哎，怎么又是你啊？
*Snore*... Ah! I was having a really nice dream... Huh, it's you again?
等会儿，我睡觉流口水了吗？你怎么用这种眼神看着我…还是说你有什么事想问我？
Wait a minute. Why are you looking at me like that...? Was I drooling in my sleep or do you have something to ask me?
最近？感觉也没什么特殊的变化……
一定要说的话，我的睡眠质量似乎又上升到了新的高度……
If you must know, my sleep quality seems to have improved again...
嗯…但要说为什么会这样，我也没什么头绪…你说，会不会是因为最近温度变低了？
Yep... But I have no idea why... Do you think it's because the temperature got colder lately?
这是怎么回事呢？我也没什么头绪…你说，会不会是因为最近温度变低了？
Why? I have no idea... Do you think it's because the temperature has got colder lately?
这地下的温度居然还变过？
是啊，其实每天都有细微的变化。一般人可能感觉不到，但这和我的睡眠质量息息相关。
There are actually subtle changes every day. Others might not notice it, but the changes can affect the quality of my sleep.
不管怎么说，最近的暖气管道确实是不如以前热了。不过稍微凉快点对我来说倒是件好事……
Anyway, the heating pipes are not as hot as they used to be. But I feel better with the cooler temperature...
桑博都和你聊什么商业机密了？
What business secrets did Sampo say to you?
也没啥，就是聊了聊我这矿具能租多少钱。
Nothing really. We were just talking about how much I could get if I rented my mining tools out.
我还以为是什么大事呢。
I thought you talked about something important.
对吧，确实不是啥大事，但是件好事。
It isn't important, but it's good.
你就这么把机密交代了？
You're revealing your secret like that?
这有啥呀，桑博老哥也没和我说不能交代。
What's the big deal? Sampo didn't say to keep it a secret.
难得碰上这么件好事，我还想和你分享分享呢。
Such a good thing is hard to come by, and I really want to share it with you.
噢，其实这也是我半梦半醒时才意识到的。
Well, I actually thought this up when I was half asleep.
你想啊，我平时做一休三——一天挣够活三天的钱，后三天不挣钱。
Think about this — I usually work one day and rest for the next three days, since I can earn enough in a day to support my expenses for the next three days.
但现在可不一样了。只要有人租我的矿具，那么我不出工的三天也能挣到钱！这也就意味着……
But now it's different. If someone rents my mining tools, I can earn money during the time I don't work! It means...
It means you can make more money!
是，但重点并不只是能多挣点钱……
Yes, but making more money isn't the main point...
意味着你可以不出工了！
It means you don't have to work anymore!
哟，你这脑子和桑博老哥一样快啊。
Hah, your mind's just as quick as Sampo's.
总之，我这一合计——如果不用亲自劳动的话，生活开销又能再砍一半…要是我能光靠出租矿具挣钱，那还何必专门跑去矿场工作呢？
Anyway, based off my calculations, if I don't go to work myself, I can cut my daily expenses in half too... If all I need to do is to rent out my tools, why would I even need to work at the mine?
四舍五入一下，这不相当于让别人替我工作，而且我还有钱挣吗？啧啧，听着就美滋滋啊……
All in all, wouldn't that mean someone else is doing the work for me, but I'm still earning money? Tsk tsk, the mere thought of it makes me happy...
呵欠…我这困意好像又有点上来了。今儿就聊到这儿吧，我先休息了……
*yawn*...I'm getting sleepy again. We'll stop here today. I want to take a nap...
怎么听着有点像工头呢…
That sounded exactly like a supervisor...
呵欠…问题好像变复杂了，弄得我又有点困。今儿就聊到这儿吧，我先休息了……
*yawn*... Looks like the problem's become complicated, and it's gotten me all sleepy. Let's talk another time. I'm taking a nap...
…这种苔藓，只有极少量会伴生在地髓矿上，它会汲取地髓的精华，因此拥有着强盛的生命力……
... Rare moss only growing in the Geomarrow mines! This moss draws on the essence of Geomarrow, and has great vitality...
只要轻轻点燃它，烟雾就会创造一个平和的空间，清除矿场机械在运转时产生的有害磁场，抚平你的身心气息。
Burn it and its smoke will create a calmness, remove the harmful magnetic fields generated by the operation of the mine machinery, and soothe your mind.
小小一捆，就能净化你周边的环境，帮你提高记忆力与专注力——
A small bundle is enough to purify your surroundings, improve your memory, and help you focus —
走过路过，不要错过，数量有限的珍稀…哎、哎哟，哪个不长眼的来烦我？
Don't miss out on this rare item... Hey! How dare you distract me!?
没什么…一点矿坑里的「土特产」而已……
Nothing... It's just a little specialty from the mine...
No, I am not! I wouldn't dare!
干嘛用那种眼神看着我？我、我又没做什么坏事。
Why are you looking at me like that? I—I didn't do anything wrong.
我怎么没听说过这苔藓？
I've never heard of this type of moss before.
这是磐岩镇的特产，你们小年轻的见识少很正常……
It's a specialty of Boulder Town. Younger people usually don't know much about it...
难道你已经改邪归正了?
So you're on the right path now?
那当然，我现在可是已经浪子回头了！
Of course. I'm a completely different person now.
你也听到了吧？我可是在一开始就介绍得很清楚了……
You heard my sales pitch, right? I made everything very clear...
我不过是再卖些无害的苔藓，我、我可没有招摇撞骗！
I'm just selling some harmless moss. I'm not tricking anyone!
是长在矿坑里啊。这附近只有地髓矿洞，长在同一片土壤上，「伴生」不就是「一起生长的同伴」的意思……
That's right. The Geomarrow mine is the only mine in these lands, and the moss also grows around here. So if they are on the same soil...
我这个说法也没问题吧？
What about "it can remove harmful magnetic fields"?
熏香嘛，至少能净化下空气……
Well, it's incense, so it can at least purify the air...
…至于磁场，虽然眼睛看不见，但你也不能断定它不存在，是吧？
As for the magnetic field, although its not visible, you can't fully deny its existence, right?
What about "improve memory and help focus"?
呃、呃，苔藓晒干以后用法和熏香差不多，就点燃了烧一下，闻闻味道——
Well... um... dried moss is similar to incense. You burn it and enjoy the scent...
盯着烟雾放空一段时间，休息够了，这人的记忆力和专注力自然就上去了。非常合理，非常科学，我可没糊弄人啊！
Let your mind relax for a while, get enough rest, and your memory and focus will naturally improve. It's logical and scientific. I'm not fooling anyone!
你那套说辞全是糊弄人的。
Your story is all a sham.
别狡辩了，你和娜塔莎说去吧。
哎？别啊，我这都很坦诚了呀？我真没有骗人！
What? Please, I'm being honest. I'm not lying!
都是一点心理安慰，苔藓本身也是无毒无公害我辛苦挖了后晒干的！
It was just for the placebo effect. The moss itself is non-toxic and harmless. It took me a long time to dig it up and dry it!
求你放过我吧，可千万别和诊所的那个女魔头说啊…她、她太可怕了！我再也不敢了！
Please let me go. Don't tell her... S—She's terrifying! I won't do it again! I promise!
数量有限，先到先得，老顾客重复购买有九折优惠！
Limited quantity, first-come, first-served. <unbreak>10%</unbreak> discount for regular customers!
地髓矿的伴生苔藓，清除有害磁场、驱逐不利……
Moss from the Geomarrow mine. It can remove harmful magnetic fields and unhealthy stuff from the air...
睡前熏一熏，家里诸事顺利，睡得安心，熏得放心！
Use before bed — then a good sleep and a peaceful mind are guaranteed!
哪个没长眼的又来——哎哟，怎么又是你？我、我可没骗人啊，只是正好路过，我这就走！
What the heck... you again? I'm not selling anything. I just happened to be passing by. See you!
呣…「雪地跳跳糖」又吃完了……
Hmm... I'm out of snow-white popping candy...
…唔，你是谁？妈妈说过，我不能和陌生人说话。
Wait, who are you? Mom told me not to talk to strangers.
我们之前一起玩过捉迷藏…
什么捉迷藏…？完全没印象。
Hide-and-seek...? That doesn't ring a bell.
You are the one talking to me...
…还不是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}先来搭话的嘛。
我说…{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}不会是认错人了吧？
Hey, did you mistake me for someone else?
当然啦，我才不是什么「千面尤利安」呢。
Of course. I'm not "Julian of a Thousand Faces."
是漆黑的虎克大人让我来的…
Pitch-Dark Hook the Great sent me...
嗯？虎克老大？找我「千面尤利安」有什么事吗？
Huh? Boss Hook? What does she want from Julian of a Thousand Faces?
哼，算了，不和你开玩笑了。我就是尤利安，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}没认错。找我有什么事嘛？
Hmm... Fine. I'll stop messing with you. You are right, I'm Julian. What do you want from me?
哼哼…{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}果然不明白。
Hmmm... you seriously do not understand.
我，堂堂「千面尤利安」——正在磨炼自己的伪装技巧呢！
I, Julian of a Thousand Faces, am honing my own disguise skills!
But you're very skilled already, aren't you?
哎呀，就、就算你这么夸我，我也不会感到开心的哦……
Well... um... your praise doesn't excite me...
「魔法」？怎么可能，那种东西根本不存在的啦。我的伪装靠的都是纯纯的手艺跟技术！
Magic? No. Magic doesn't exist. My disguise is based on pure craftsmanship and skill!
…总之，等下次再玩捉迷藏的时候，你肯定抓不到我的！我保证！
...Anyway, the next time we play hide-and-seek, you won't be able to find me! I am <unbreak>100%</unbreak> sure of that!
尤利安究竟是怎么伪装的？
How exactly do you disguise yourself?
呣…这可是秘密哦？可不能轻易告诉{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}……
Hmm... It's a secret. I'm not going to tell you...
当然不能！这可是我们「鼹鼠党」的头号机密之一！
No! That's one of The Moles' most important secrets!
我作为虎克老大的得力干将，怎么能透露这种重要的信息！{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}还是放弃吧！
As the right-hand man to Boss Hook, I would never reveal such important information! You might as well give up!
其实是虎克拜托我来问的…
虎克？…不对，应该是漆黑的虎克大人！真是没大没小！
Hook? I mean... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! How dare you address her by just that name!
哼，别想用这种借口来套我的话！虎克老大想知道的话，她早就当面来问我了！
Hmph, I won't be fooled by that excuse! If Boss Hook wanted to know anything from me, she would ask me herself!
嘿，看你那副沮丧的表情…被我识破了吧！
Haha, your pathetic face tells me that... I saw through your trick.
这才对嘛。有的事情，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}还是不知道为好哦？
Good. It's better for you to not know everything.
不过，要是你要是能给我带一千包「雪地跳跳糖」过来…我就考虑把「千面」的绝技传授给你！
If you can bring me a thousand packets of snow-white popping candy... I'll consider teaching you my disguise technique!
再见！想学「伪装术」的话，记得带跳跳糖过来！
Bye! If you want to learn the disguise technique, bring me some popping candy!
啊，又见到{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}了！我在执行虎克老大的机密任务呢！
Ah, it's you again! I'm on a classified mission from Boss Hook!
任务的目标…就是把下层区所有的跳跳糖都搜刮过来，嘿嘿！
The goal of the mission is to... get my hands on all the popping candy in Underworld. Hehe!
咦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}问我吗？我的话…最近我的「雪地跳跳糖」又吃完了。
Oh, do you mean me, {F#miss}{M#mister}? Me, I'm... fresh out of snow-white popping candy.
嗯…那我最近也没什么别的事情呀。跟着虎克老大执行任务，还有修炼我的伪装技巧！除此以外就没了。
Oh... well, there's nothing much going on with me. Just questing with Hook, and practicing my camouflage skills! That's about it.
难道最近还有什么大新闻吗？有的话就快告诉我，我要赶紧向虎克老大报告！
Why, has something really big happened? If so, please tell me — and I'll report back to Hook about it!
What on earth is this snow-white popping candy?
这你都不知道？这是现在磐岩镇最流行的零食！跳跳糖和别的糖不一样，它会在你的嘴里噼里啪啦地乱跳呢！厉害吧？
You don't know? It's the most popular snack in all Boulder Town right now! It's not like other candies, because it goes POP POP in your mouth! Awesome, huh?
哼，现在的大人真是一点见识都没有。可惜我现在已经吃完了，等下次我再分你一点吧——不过…你要用一条有用的信息来交换！
Hmm, grown-ups these days really have no idea. Too bad I've finished it all. You can have some next time — but... you'll have to trade me some information for it!
最近上下层区要解除封锁了。
The Overworld and the Underworld are going to be reunited.
嗐，这个鼹鼠党早就知道啦！{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}可别把我们当成那种反应迟钝的组织喔！
Ah, the Moles already knew all that! {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you should know we're smarter than that!
你要是能再带点跳跳糖过来的话，我就教你怎么搜集下层区最前沿的信息！
If you can bring me some more popping candy, I'll tell you how to collect the hottest gossip about the Underworld!
我把费斯曼老爹的事摆平了。
I sorted things out with Fersman.
喔，那可太好了！难怪虎克老大会授予你荣誉队员称号呢。谢谢你，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
Oh, that's great! No wonder Hook made you an honorary member. Thank you, {F#miss}{M#mister}!
不过，事情都摆平了…虎克老大为什么还哭得那么惨啊？
But if everything's sorted... Why has Hook been bawling her eyes out?
Because a father and daughter's love knows no bounds.
…听起来好像发生了很多事。等虎克老大心情好的时候，我去找她打听打听。
...Sounds like lots of water under the bridge. I'll wait for Hook to be in a better mood before I ask her about it.
Don't stick your beak into ladies' affairs.
…你说得对。我还是不瞎打听了。
...You're right. I'm not gonna do it anymore.
总之，费斯曼老爹的事就是我们鼹鼠党的事。我身为鼹鼠党二把手，必须好好夸奖你一番，荣誉队员！
After all, Fersman's problem is the Moles' problem, too. And as the Moles' deputy, I really must praise you, o trusty honorary member!
发生这种事，你要我怎么冷静下来！
How can I calm down when something like this happened!
你不要跟着起哄了好吗？我是真的很急。
I'm seriously worried. Can you not make it worse?
…这你都不知道吗？发生了…大事！
...You don't know? Something BIG has happened!
不能忘记的事，不想忘记的事，绝对不可以忘记的事…是什么来着？
Something I cannot forget... don't want to forget... absolutely must not forget... What was it again?
…算了，之后再说吧。你找我有什么事？
...No, I'll deal with it some other time. What is it you want to see me about?
There is something I want to ask you...
我真的不记得了，只知道是绝对不可以忘记的事…这样，你给我点时间！我从头捋一遍。
I don't know. What I do know is that it was something I should never forget... Look, give me some time! I'll try to retrace my memory...
就从「我是谁」开始吧。我叫…马克西姆…？
Let's start with who I am. My name is... Maxime... I think.
I don't think you need to start from the beginning...
别打断我，我好不容易才把名字想起来……
Don't interrupt me. I had a hard time just remembering my name...
然后就是，我是做什么的…我应该是个矿工，没错吧？
And then what do I do...? I'm a miner, right?
你怎么也不知道？这还怎么往下捋……
You don't know either? How am I supposed to go on then...
你这身打扮，应该没跑了。
That's a reasonable conclusion, given how you're dressed.
行，就当我是吧。我叫马克西姆，是个矿工。
Okay, let's just assume I am. I'm Maxime and I'm a miner.
Hmm, we are back to square one.
你可真事不关己，都怪你……
Wow, you look so relaxed. It was your fault, you know...!
Do you remember the way to the clinic?
What, do you think I'm ill?
算了，算了…我再想想，肯定能记起来……
Never mind... I'll go over it all again. I'm sure I can remember something...
希望下次见面你能想起来…
I hope you remember something before the next time we meet...
…你一说话，我就又忘了。让我一个人静静……
...I forgot as soon as you spoke. Now leave me alone...
Ah, I remember! I remember now!
——是什么来着？话明明都到嘴边了…完了完了……
Wait! What is it? It was just on the tip of my tongue... Oh, no, no, no...
最近？让我想想…好像是有什么重要的事情发生，而且和上下层区有关……
Lately? Lemme think... Some important stuff happened, I think, and it had to do with the Over and Underworlds...
是说上下层区要重新打通了吗？
You mean that the Over and Underworlds are opening up?
哎，你一打岔，我又得从头捋一遍了。完了完了……
Bah, now I have to go through my thoughts again. Oh no...
噢——对的对的对的，就是这件事。这可是件大事！
Ooh, right! That's right! It was about that. This is major!
呃…不对不对不对。虽然这件事很重要，但我总觉得要说的不是这件事……
Er... No no no. This matter is major, but I don't think it's what I wanted to say...
…嗐，算了吧。想不起来就说明和我没多大关系，不想了。
...*sigh* Forget it. If I can't recall it, it just means it has nothing to do with me. I'm done thinking.
唔，到处都找不到那个姐姐…当时好像都没问姐姐叫什么名字呢。
Mmm... I can't seem to find that lady anywhere... And I don't think I asked her for her name.
话说回来…当时好像都没问姐姐叫什么名字呢。
嗯？没错，我是埃里克…那个，老爹的债务之前应该付清了吧……
Hmm? Yes, I am Eric... I believe I've already paid off my dad's debt...
啊，我在找一位大姐姐，她是一位…那个…银鬃铁卫。您见过这样的人吗？
Ah, I'm looking for a lady. She is a... Silvermane Guard... Have you seen someone like that?
…吓？！你…你不是之前铆钉镇上遇到的{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}吗？
...Huh? Didn't we meet in Rivet Town earlier?
真是太好了！我正找你们呢！…咦，铁卫姐姐和你不在一起吗？
How wonderful! I was looking for you! ...Huh, is that Guard lady with you?
那个姐姐是叫布洛妮娅吗？我记住了！
Her name was Bronya... Now I remember!
我…我以为你也是来讨债的……
I... I thought you were here to collect a debt, too...
但我先前已经替老爹付清债务了，应该没人会再来找麻烦了吧……
But I've already paid the debt for my papa. There shouldn't be anyone else coming around looking for trouble...
那个铁卫姐姐叫布洛妮娅。
那你可以告诉我她在哪里吗？我想和她说几句话。
Can you tell me where she is? I'd like to talk with her.
在那之前，我想先和你聊聊…
怎、怎么会！多亏了铁卫姐姐的奖章，现在我已经帮老爹把债务还清了。
No-no way! Thanks to the medal the Guard lady gave me, I've been able to help my old man pay off his debt.
我，我答应了那个姐姐，以后绝对不会再偷东西了…必须说到做到……
I... I promised her that I would never steal again... I must keep my word...
是的，我老爹…他之前生了重病，为了支付医药费，身上背了很多债务。
Yes, he was seriously ill. He got into a lot of debt due to his medical bills.
如果不能按时还债的话，爸爸就会…所以，所以我才被迫去外面偷东西……
If papa doesn't pay the debt on time, he would be... So that's why I started to steal...
So what do you do now?
唔，我在聚落跟着几个叔叔阿姨学机械修理…
Well, I'm learning to be a mechanic from some folks in the settlement...
等我学成了，以后就能靠这门手艺赚钱，然后就能帮到老爹他……
When I master the techniques, I'll be able to make some money with them. Then I can help my dad...
Things will get better. I'm rooting for you!
以前，我给下层区的大家添了许多麻烦…真的很对不起！那些被我偷了东西的人，说不定他们的境况也没有比我好到哪去……
I'm really sorry about all the trouble I've caused for everyone in the Underworld! Those I stole from could very well be in a worse situation than me...
我现在知道错了！以后我一定要做个有用的人，为大家多做贡献……
I really regret it! From now on, I will be a good person and be a useful member to society...
Why do you want to see Bronya?
因为…因为是那个姐姐给了我宝贵的奖章啊。
Because... Because she gave me that wonderful medal.
我按布洛妮娅姐姐说的，拿着那个奖章换了钱，这才把老爹的债务都还清了。
Bronya told me to exchange it for money and that's how I paid off all papa's debts.
而且，在布洛妮娅姐姐之前，根本没有人会那样对待我…大家都嫌弃我手脚不干净，像见了疯地鼠一样躲着我……
No one had ever treated me so nicely until I met Bronya... Everyone despised me for being a thief and avoided me like I was some kind of rabid gopher...
所以…我想找到布洛妮娅姐姐，当面好好谢谢她。
So... I want to thank her in person.
如果我见到她，会向她转达的。
I'll pass on the message when I see her.
真的吗？！…谢谢你，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
I wonder what Seele will think...
希儿姐姐吗？…唔，虽然希儿姐姐对我很凶，但那是因为我以前犯了不少错误…其实她都是为了我好，这我清楚！
Seele? Well, she was mean to me because I did a lot of bad things... but I know it was for my own good!
希儿姐姐很有正义感，身手也很好…我长大后也想成为她那样的大人！
Seele is noble and skilled... I want to be just like her when I grow up!
我找到她了就来告诉你。
I'll let you know when I see her.
拜托你了，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！你们见到布洛妮娅姐姐了吗？
最近的话，我还在找布洛妮娅姐姐…但她似乎一直都没有在附近出现。她到底住在哪里呢？
I'm still looking for Bronya... But she doesn't seem to be anywhere. Where the heck does she live?
她最近还在地上忙自己的事情。
She's been busy with work up in the Overworld.
You can go up to the Overworld to look for her.
啊…原来布洛妮娅姐姐住在上层区啊。怪不得一直都找不到她呢……
Ah... so she lives up in the Overworld, then. No wonder I couldn't find her...
啊…说起来，听大人们说，我们好像很快就能去上面了。如果有机会的话，我一定要坐缆车去找布洛妮娅姐姐。
Ah... speaking of which, I heard the grown-ups say that we can go up there soon. If I can, I'm definitely gonna try and catch the cable car to find Bronya.
{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，谢谢你告诉我这个消息。我会做好准备的！但首先要照顾好老爹，让他的身体好起来……
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, thank you for telling me this news. I'll be ready! But first, I have to look after my dad and make sure he's healthy...
Do I have something on my face?
啊…欸？没、没什么！只是，我…我想问你们点事！
Huh...? No, no. It's just that... there is something I want to ask you!
Hey... can I talk to you for a second?
You look like you have your guard up.
…怎么会呢。我、我只是，纯粹对你们有点…好奇。
...No, not at all. I'm just... just... a little curious.
啊，还是算、算了，没什么…不好意思啊。
Never mind, nothing really... Sorry about that.
怎…怎么可能！我要是扒、扒手，奥列格老大哪肯让我进「地火」啊……
No — no way! I—If I were a pickpocket, Chief Oleg wouldn't let me into Wildfire...
你、你们不知道「地火」？不、不可能，你肯定是在开、开玩笑……
Y—You don't know what Wildfire is...? You must be kidding...
我…我就是普通的「地火」文员，平时干些…记录工作，还有会、会计活。
I'm... I'm just a regular bureaucrat for Wildfire. I do... admin and accounting.
我们「地火」，就、就是自发组织起来，维持地下治安的…奥、奥列格是我们组织的老、老大。
Wildfire i—is a self-organized group for maintaining order in the Underworld... O—Oleg is the leader of the group.
What do you want to talk to me about?
没…没什么。就是，听说你们是从外、外边来的…是真的吗？
I heard that you are from the o—outside... Is that true?
你、你们放心！我是「地火」的人，不、不会和别人乱说的。
Don't worry! I—I won't tell anyone. I'm from Wildfire.
要是、要是不想说，也、也没事。我就是纯粹好、好奇……
I—If you don't want to tell me, it's okay. I was just c—curious...
是啊，我们来自另一个世界。
你、你们别逗我啊。但是你们看起来还挺认、认真……
You're kidding me... well actually... you seem p—pretty serious...
Why do you want to know about this?
没、没事！就是没见、见过外来者……
N—Nothing! It's just that I've never met an outsider...
大、大部分地底人一辈子都没见过从外面来的人，觉、觉得奇怪也正常吧……
M—Most undergrounders have never seen anyone from the outside, not in their entire lives. S—So it's quite normal for me to find you strange...
那、那个，我问完了…没别的事的话，我、我就先告辞……
Th—That's all I wanted to ask... If it's okay with you, I—I'm gonna go...
Huh? What are you looking at me for?
我、我没别的意思。各位、各位没事的话就不、不打扰了……
Sorry, I — I didn't mean to bother you. I'll leave you alone...
哦，是、是你们啊。多亏了你、你们，我们终、终于能回到地面上了。
Oh, i—it's you folks. It's all thanks to y—you that we can f—finally return to the surface.
这就是我、我们「地火」最、最想看到的。但、但是，各种麻烦事又、又层出不穷……
This is what the W—Wildfire wanted m—most. B—But, plenty of troubles h—have risen...
